## 7Zip Compressing Dump Files

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ec570e53-4c76-45a9-804d-dc3f355ff7a7` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1560.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_7zip_exfil_dmp_files.yml)**

> Detects execution of 7z in order to compress a file with a ".dmp"/".dump" extension, which could be a step in a process of dump file exfiltration.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        7Zip Compressing Dump Files
-- Sigma ID:     ec570e53-4c76-45a9-804d-dc3f355ff7a7
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1560.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_7zip_exfil_dmp_files.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of 7z with a command line in which ".dmp" or ".dump" appears accidentally; Legitimate use of 7z to compress WER ".dmp" files for troubleshooting
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hdmp%'))
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%7-Zip%')
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\7z.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\7zr.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\7za.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('7z.exe', '7za.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of 7z with a command line in which ".dmp" or ".dump" appears accidentally; Legitimate use of 7z to compress WER ".dmp" files for troubleshooting

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/09/26/bumblebee-round-two/

---

## Compress Data and Lock With Password for Exfiltration With 7-ZIP

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9fbf5927-5261-4284-a71d-f681029ea574` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1560.001 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_7zip_password_compression.yml)**

> An adversary may compress or encrypt data that is collected prior to exfiltration using 3rd party utilities

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Compress Data and Lock With Password for Exfiltration With 7-ZIP
-- Sigma ID:     9fbf5927-5261-4284-a71d-f681029ea574
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1560.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_7zip_password_compression.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate activity is expected since compressing files with a password is common.
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% a %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% u %'))
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%7-Zip%')
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\7z.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\7zr.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\7za.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('7z.exe', '7za.exe')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -p%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate activity is expected since compressing files with a password is common.

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1560.001/T1560.001.md

## Potential DLL Injection Via AccCheckConsole

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0f6da907-5854-4be6-859a-e9958747b0aa` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_acccheckconsole_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution "AccCheckConsole" a command-line tool for verifying the accessibility implementation of an application's UI.
One of the tests that this checker can run are called "verification routine", which tests for things like Consistency, Navigation, etc.
The tool allows a user to provide a DLL that can contain a custom "verification routine". An attacker can build such DLLs and pass it via the CLI, which would then be loaded in the context of the "AccCheckConsole" utility.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential DLL Injection Via AccCheckConsole
-- Sigma ID:     0f6da907-5854-4be6-859a-e9958747b0aa
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_acccheckconsole_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of the UI Accessibility Checker
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -hwnd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -process %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -window %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\AccCheckConsole.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'AccCheckConsole.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of the UI Accessibility Checker

**References:**
- https://gist.github.com/bohops/2444129419c8acf837aedda5f0e7f340
- https://twitter.com/bohops/status/1477717351017680899?s=12
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/AccCheckConsole/

---

## Suspicious AddinUtil.EXE CommandLine Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `631b22a4-70f4-4e2f-9ea8-42f84d9df6d8` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Michael McKinley (@McKinleyMike), Tony Latteri (@TheLatteri) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_addinutil_suspicious_cmdline.yml)**

> Detects execution of the Add-In deployment cache updating utility (AddInutil.exe) with suspicious Addinroot or Pipelineroot paths. An adversary may execute AddinUtil.exe with uncommon Addinroot/Pipelineroot paths that point to the adversaries Addins.Store payload.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious AddinUtil.EXE CommandLine Execution
-- Sigma ID:     631b22a4-70f4-4e2f-9ea8-42f84d9df6d8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Michael McKinley (@McKinleyMike), Tony Latteri (@TheLatteri)
-- Date:         2023-09-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_addinutil_suspicious_cmdline.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'currentDirectory')] AS currentDirectory,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\addinutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'AddInUtil.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AddInRoot:.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AddInRoot:"."%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-PipelineRoot:.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-PipelineRoot:"."%'))
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'currentDirectory') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'currentDirectory')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'currentDirectory')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'currentDirectory')] LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'currentDirectory')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'currentDirectory')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.blue-prints.blog/content/blog/posts/lolbin/addinutil-lolbas.html

---

## Uncommon Child Process Of AddinUtil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b5746143-59d6-4603-8d06-acbd60e166ee` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Michael McKinley (@McKinleyMike), Tony Latteri (@TheLatteri) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_addinutil_uncommon_child_process.yml)**

> Detects uncommon child processes of the Add-In deployment cache updating utility (AddInutil.exe) which could be a sign of potential abuse of the binary to proxy execution via a custom Addins.Store payload.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Child Process Of AddinUtil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     b5746143-59d6-4603-8d06-acbd60e166ee
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Michael McKinley (@McKinleyMike), Tony Latteri (@TheLatteri)
-- Date:         2023-09-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_addinutil_uncommon_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\addinutil.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.blue-prints.blog/content/blog/posts/lolbin/addinutil-lolbas.html

---

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon AddinUtil.EXE CommandLine Execution
-- Sigma ID:     4f2cd9b6-4a17-440f-bb2a-687abb65993a
```

## Potential Adplus.EXE Abuse

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2f869d59-7f6a-4931-992c-cce556ff2d53` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_adplus_memory_dump.yml)**

> Detects execution of "AdPlus.exe", a binary that is part of the Windows SDK that can be used as a LOLBIN in order to dump process memory and execute arbitrary commands.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Adplus.EXE Abuse
-- Sigma ID:     2f869d59-7f6a-4931-992c-cce556ff2d53
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1003.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_adplus_memory_dump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of Adplus for debugging purposes
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -hang %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -pn %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -pmn %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -p %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -po %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -sc %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\adplus.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Adplus.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of Adplus for debugging purposes

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/Adplus/
- https://twitter.com/nas_bench/status/1534916659676422152
- https://twitter.com/nas_bench/status/1534915321856917506

## AgentExecutor PowerShell Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7efd2c8d-8b18-45b7-947d-adfe9ed04f61` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), memory-shards |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_agentexecutor_potential_abuse.yml)**

> Detects execution of the AgentExecutor.exe binary. Which can be abused as a LOLBIN to execute powershell scripts with the ExecutionPolicy "Bypass" or any binary named "powershell.exe" located in the path provided by 6th positional argument

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        AgentExecutor PowerShell Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7efd2c8d-8b18-45b7-947d-adfe9ed04f61
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), memory-shards
-- Date:         2022-12-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_agentexecutor_potential_abuse.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use via Intune management. You exclude script paths and names to reduce FP rate
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use via Intune management. You exclude script paths and names to reduce FP rate

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/lefterispan/status/1286259016436514816
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/Agentexecutor/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/mem/intune/apps/intune-management-extension
- https://twitter.com/jseerden/status/1247985304667066373/photo/1

## Windows AMSI Related Registry Tampering Via CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7dbbcac2-57a0-45ac-b306-ff30a8bd2981` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001, T1562.006 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_amsi_registry_tampering.yml)**

> Detects tampering of AMSI (Anti-Malware Scan Interface) related registry values via command line tools such as reg.exe or PowerShell.
AMSI provides a generic interface for applications and services to integrate with antimalware products.
Adversaries may disable AMSI to evade detection of malicious scripts and code execution.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows AMSI Related Registry Tampering Via CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     7dbbcac2-57a0-45ac-b306-ff30a8bd2981
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001, T1562.006
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-12-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_amsi_registry_tampering.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Software\\Microsoft\\Windows Script\\Settings%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AmsiEnable%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/arttoolkit/arttoolkit.github.io/blob/16d6230d009e58fd6f773f5317fd4d14c1f26004/_wadcoms/AMSI-Bypass-Jscript_amsienable.md
- https://mostafayahiax.medium.com/hunting-for-amsi-bypassing-methods-9886dda0bf9d
- https://www.mdsec.co.uk/2019/02/macros-and-more-with-sharpshooter-v2-0/

---

## Uncommon Child Process Of Appvlp.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9c7e131a-0f2c-4ae0-9d43-b04f4e266d43` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Sreeman |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_appvlp_uncommon_child_process.yml)**

> Detects uncommon child processes of Appvlp.EXE
Appvlp or the Application Virtualization Utility is included with Microsoft Office. Attackers are able to abuse "AppVLP" to execute shell commands.
Normally, this binary is used for Application Virtualization, but it can also be abused to circumvent the ASR file path rule folder
or to mark a file as a system file.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Child Process Of Appvlp.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     9c7e131a-0f2c-4ae0-9d43-b04f4e266d43
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-03-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_appvlp_uncommon_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\appvlp.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/Appvlp/

---

## Suspicious ArcSOC.exe Child Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8e95e73e-ba02-4a87-b4d7-0929b8053038` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059, T1203 |
| **Author** | Micah Babinski |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_arcsoc_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects script interpreters, command-line tools, and similar suspicious child processes of ArcSOC.exe.
ArcSOC.exe is the process name which hosts ArcGIS Server REST services. If an attacker compromises an ArcGIS
Server system and uploads a malicious Server Object Extension (SOE), they can send crafted requests to the corresponding
service endpoint and remotely execute code from the ArcSOC.exe process.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious ArcSOC.exe Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     8e95e73e-ba02-4a87-b4d7-0929b8053038
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059, T1203
-- Author:       Micah Babinski
-- Date:         2025-11-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_arcsoc_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\ArcSOC.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://reliaquest.com/blog/threat-spotlight-inside-flax-typhoons-arcgis-compromise/
- https://enterprise.arcgis.com/en/server/12.0/administer/windows/inside-an-arcgis-server-site.htm

## AspNetCompiler Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a01b8329-5953-4f73-ae2d-aa01e1f35f00` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1127 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_aspnet_compiler_exectuion.yml)**

> Detects execution of "aspnet_compiler.exe" which can be abused to compile and execute C# code.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        AspNetCompiler Execution
-- Sigma ID:     a01b8329-5953-4f73-ae2d-aa01e1f35f00
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1127
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-11-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_aspnet_compiler_exectuion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\Framework64\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Microsoft.NET\\FrameworkArm64\\%')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\aspnet\_compiler.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Aspnet_Compiler/
- https://ijustwannared.team/2020/08/01/the-curious-case-of-aspnet_compiler-exe/

## Suspicious Child Process of AspNetCompiler

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9ccba514-7cb6-4c5c-b377-700758f2f120` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1127 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_aspnet_compiler_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious child processes of "aspnet_compiler.exe".

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Child Process of AspNetCompiler
-- Sigma ID:     9ccba514-7cb6-4c5c-b377-700758f2f120
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1127
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-08-14

  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\notepad.exe'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Roaming\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Tasks\\%'))
```

## Interactive AT Job

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `60fc936d-2eb0-4543-8a13-911c750a1dfc` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1053.002 |
| **Author** | E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_at_interactive_execution.yml)**

> Detects an interactive AT job, which may be used as a form of privilege escalation.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Interactive AT Job
-- Sigma ID:     60fc936d-2eb0-4543-8a13-911c750a1dfc
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.002
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_at_interactive_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely (at.exe deprecated as of Windows 8)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\at.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%interactive%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely (at.exe deprecated as of Windows 8)

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1053.002/T1053.002.md
- https://eqllib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/analytics/d8db43cf-ed52-4f5c-9fb3-c9a4b95a0b56.html

## Hiding Files with Attrib.exe

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4281cb20-2994-4580-aa63-c8b86d019934` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.001 |
| **Author** | Sami Ruohonen |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_attrib_hiding_files.yml)**

> Detects usage of attrib.exe to hide files from users.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Hiding Files with Attrib.exe
-- Sigma ID:     4281cb20-2994-4580-aa63-c8b86d019934
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.001
-- Author:       Sami Ruohonen
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_attrib_hiding_files.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    IgfxCUIService.exe hiding *.cui files via .bat script (attrib.exe a child of cmd.exe and igfxCUIService.exe is the parent of the cmd.exe); Msiexec.exe hiding desktop.ini
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** IgfxCUIService.exe hiding *.cui files via .bat script (attrib.exe a child of cmd.exe and igfxCUIService.exe is the parent of the cmd.exe); Msiexec.exe hiding desktop.ini

**References:**
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/unit42-sure-ill-take-new-combojack-malware-alters-clipboards-steal-cryptocurrency/
- https://www.uptycs.com/blog/lolbins-are-no-laughing-matter

## Set Suspicious Files as System Files Using Attrib.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `efec536f-72e8-4656-8960-5e85d091345b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_attrib_system_susp_paths.yml)**

> Detects the usage of attrib with the "+s" option to set scripts or executables located in suspicious locations as system files to hide them from users and make them unable to be deleted with simple rights. The rule limits the search to specific extensions and directories to avoid FPs


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Set Suspicious Files as System Files Using Attrib.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     efec536f-72e8-4656-8960-5e85d091345b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_attrib_system_susp_paths.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://app.any.run/tasks/c28cabc8-a19f-40f3-a78b-cae506a5c0d4
- https://app.any.run/tasks/cfc8870b-ccd7-4210-88cf-a8087476a6d0

## Audit Policy Tampering Via NT Resource Kit Auditpol

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c6c56ada-612b-42d1-9a29-adad3c5c2c1e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.002 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_auditpol_nt_resource_kit_usage.yml)**

> Threat actors can use an older version of the auditpol binary available inside the NT resource kit to change audit policy configuration to impair detection capability.
This can be carried out by selectively disabling/removing certain audit policies as well as restoring a custom policy owned by the threat actor.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Audit Policy Tampering Via NT Resource Kit Auditpol
-- Sigma ID:     c6c56ada-612b-42d1-9a29-adad3c5c2c1e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.002
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_auditpol_nt_resource_kit_usage.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    The old auditpol utility isn't available by default on recent versions of Windows as it was replaced by a newer version. The FP rate should be very low except for tools that use a similar flag structure
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/logon:none%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/system:none%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/sam:none%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/privilege:none%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/object:none%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/process:none%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/policy:none%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** The old auditpol utility isn't available by default on recent versions of Windows as it was replaced by a newer version. The FP rate should be very low except for tools that use a similar flag structure

**References:**
- https://github.com/3CORESec/MAL-CL/tree/master/Descriptors/Windows%202000%20Resource%20Kit%20Tools/AuditPol

---

## Audit Policy Tampering Via Auditpol

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0a13e132-651d-11eb-ae93-0242ac130002` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.002 |
| **Author** | Janantha Marasinghe (https://github.com/blueteam0ps) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_auditpol_susp_execution.yml)**

> Threat actors can use auditpol binary to change audit policy configuration to impair detection capability.
This can be carried out by selectively disabling/removing certain audit policies as well as restoring a custom policy owned by the threat actor.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Audit Policy Tampering Via Auditpol
-- Sigma ID:     0a13e132-651d-11eb-ae93-0242ac130002
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.002
-- Author:       Janantha Marasinghe (https://github.com/blueteam0ps)
-- Date:         2021-02-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_auditpol_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrator or administrator scripts might leverage the flags mentioned in the detection section. Either way, it should always be monitored
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%disable%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%clear%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%remove%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%restore%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\auditpol.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'AUDITPOL.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrator or administrator scripts might leverage the flags mentioned in the detection section. Either way, it should always be monitored

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/01/20/deep-dive-into-the-solorigate-second-stage-activation-from-sunburst-to-teardrop-and-raindrop/

---

## Suspicious Autorun Registry Modified via WMI

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c80e66d8-1780-48a9-b412-46663fd21ac0` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1547.001, T1047 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_autorun_registry_modified_via_wmic.yml)**

> Detects suspicious activity where the WMIC process is used to create an autorun registry entry via reg.exe, which is often indicative of persistence mechanisms employed by malware.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Autorun Registry Modified via WMI
-- Sigma ID:     c80e66d8-1780-48a9-b412-46663fd21ac0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1547.001, T1047
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_autorun_registry_modified_via_wmic.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative activity or software installations
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Perflogs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\ProgramData'%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Roaming%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\$Recycle.bin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Users\\Default%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Users\\public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%temp\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%tmp\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%Public\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%AppData\%%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrative activity or software installations

**References:**
- Internal Research
- https://github.com/HackTricks-wiki/hacktricks/blob/e4c7b21b8f36c97c35b7c622732b38a189ce18f7/src/windows-hardening/windows-local-privilege-escalation/privilege-escalation-with-autorun-binaries.md

## Suspicious BitLocker Access Agent Update Utility Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9f38c1db-e2ae-40bf-81d0-5b68f73fb512` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218, T1021.003 |
| **Author** | andrewdanis, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_baaupdate_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the BitLocker Access Agent Update Utility (baaupdate.exe) which is not a common parent process for other processes.
Suspicious child processes spawned by baaupdate.exe could indicate an attempt at lateral movement via BitLocker DCOM & COM Hijacking.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious BitLocker Access Agent Update Utility Execution
-- Sigma ID:     9f38c1db-e2ae-40bf-81d0-5b68f73fb512
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1218, T1021.003
-- Author:       andrewdanis, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_baaupdate_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\baaupdate.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/rtecCyberSec/BitlockMove

---

## Indirect Inline Command Execution Via Bash.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5edc2273-c26f-406c-83f3-f4d948e740dd` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1202 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bash_command_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of Microsoft bash launcher with the "-c" flag.
This can be used to potentially bypass defenses and execute Linux or Windows-based binaries directly via bash.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Indirect Inline Command Execution Via Bash.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     5edc2273-c26f-406c-83f3-f4d948e740dd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-11-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bash_command_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c %')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\System32\\bash.exe' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\bash.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Bash.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Bash/

---

```sql
  AND ((procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\System32\\bash.exe' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\bash.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Bash.exe'))
```

## Boot Configuration Tampering Via Bcdedit.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1444443e-6757-43e4-9ea4-c8fc705f79a2` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | impact |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1490 |
| **Author** | E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bcdedit_boot_conf_tamper.yml)**

> Detects the use of the bcdedit command to tamper with the boot configuration data. This technique is often times used by malware or attackers as a destructive way before launching ransomware.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Boot Configuration Tampering Via Bcdedit.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     1444443e-6757-43e4-9ea4-c8fc705f79a2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        impact | T1490
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bcdedit_boot_conf_tamper.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bootstatuspolicy%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ignoreallfailures%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%recoveryenabled%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%no%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\bcdedit.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'bcdedit.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%set%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1490/T1490.md
- https://eqllib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/analytics/c4732632-9c1d-4980-9fa8-1d98c93f918e.html

---

## Potential Ransomware or Unauthorized MBR Tampering Via Bcdedit.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c9fbe8e9-119d-40a6-9b59-dd58a5d84429` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1070, T1542.003 |
| **Author** | @neu5ron |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bcdedit_susp_execution.yml)**

> Detects potential malicious and unauthorized usage of bcdedit.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Ransomware or Unauthorized MBR Tampering Via Bcdedit.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     c9fbe8e9-119d-40a6-9b59-dd58a5d84429
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1070, T1542.003
-- Author:       @neu5ron
-- Date:         2019-02-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bcdedit_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    (none)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%delete%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%deletevalue%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%import%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%safeboot%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%network%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\bcdedit.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'bcdedit.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-hardware/drivers/devtest/bcdedit--set
- https://twitter.com/malwrhunterteam/status/1372536434125512712/photo/2

## Data Export From MSSQL Table Via BCP.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c615d676-f655-46b9-b913-78729021e5d7` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, exfiltration |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1048 |
| **Author** | Omar Khaled (@beacon_exe), MahirAli Khan (in/mahiralikhan), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bcp_export_data.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the BCP utility in order to export data from the database.
Attackers were seen saving their malware to a database column or table and then later extracting it via "bcp.exe" into a file.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Data Export From MSSQL Table Via BCP.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     c615d676-f655-46b9-b913-78729021e5d7
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, exfiltration | T1048
-- Author:       Omar Khaled (@beacon_exe), MahirAli Khan (in/mahiralikhan), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-08-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bcp_export_data.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate data export operations.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% out %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% queryout %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\bcp.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'BCP.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate data export operations.

**References:**
- https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/tools/bcp-utility
- https://asec.ahnlab.com/en/61000/
- https://asec.ahnlab.com/en/78944/
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/attacking-mssql-servers
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/attacking-mssql-servers-pt-ii
- https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2024/08/07/sophos-mdr-hunt-tracks-mimic-ransomware-campaign-against-organizations-in-india/
- https://research.nccgroup.com/2018/03/10/apt15-is-alive-and-strong-an-analysis-of-royalcli-and-royaldns/

## Suspicious Child Process Of BgInfo.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `811f459f-9231-45d4-959a-0266c6311987` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.005, T1218, T1202 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bginfo_suspicious_child_process.yml)**

> Detects suspicious child processes of "BgInfo.exe" which could be a sign of potential abuse of the binary to proxy execution via external VBScript

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Child Process Of BgInfo.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     811f459f-9231-45d4-959a-0266c6311987
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.005, T1218, T1202
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-08-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bginfo_suspicious_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\notepad.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\Roaming\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\PerfLogs\\%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\bginfo.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\bginfo64.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/Bginfo/
- https://oddvar.moe/2017/05/18/bypassing-application-whitelisting-with-bginfo/

## BitLockerTogo.EXE Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7f2376f9-42ee-4dfc-9360-fecff9a88fc8` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Josh Nickels, mttaggart |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitlockertogo_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of "BitLockerToGo.EXE".
BitLocker To Go is BitLocker Drive Encryption on removable data drives. This feature includes the encryption of, USB flash drives, SD cards, External hard disk drives, Other drives that are formatted by using the NTFS, FAT16, FAT32, or exFAT file system.
This is a rarely used application and usage of it at all is worth investigating.
Malware such as Lumma stealer has been seen using this process as a target for process hollowing.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        BitLockerTogo.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7f2376f9-42ee-4dfc-9360-fecff9a88fc8
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Josh Nickels, mttaggart
-- Date:         2024-07-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitlockertogo_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of BitLockerToGo.exe to encrypt portable devices.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\BitLockerToGo.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of BitLockerToGo.exe to encrypt portable devices.

**References:**
- https://tria.ge/240521-ynezpagf56/behavioral1
- https://any.run/report/6eea2773c1b4b5c6fb7c142933e220c96f9a4ec89055bf0cf54accdcde7df535/a407f006-ee45-420d-b576-f259094df091
- https://bazaar.abuse.ch/sample/8c75f8e94486f5bbf461505823f5779f328c5b37f1387c18791e0c21f3fdd576/
- https://bazaar.abuse.ch/sample/64e6605496919cd76554915cbed88e56fdec10dec6523918a631754664b8c8d3/

## File Download Via Bitsadmin

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d059842b-6b9d-4ed1-b5c3-5b89143c6ede` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1197, T1036.003, T1105 |
| **Author** | Michael Haag, FPT.EagleEye |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_download.yml)**

> Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download Via Bitsadmin
-- Sigma ID:     d059842b-6b9d-4ed1-b5c3-5b89143c6ede
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1197, T1036.003, T1105
-- Author:       Michael Haag, FPT.EagleEye
-- Date:         2017-03-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some legitimate apps use this, but limited.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'bitsadmin.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /transfer %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some legitimate apps use this, but limited.

**References:**
- https://blog.netspi.com/15-ways-to-download-a-file/#bitsadmin
- https://isc.sans.edu/diary/22264
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Bitsadmin/

---

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Download From Direct IP Via Bitsadmin
-- Sigma ID:     99c840f2-2012-46fd-9141-c761987550ef
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
```

## Suspicious Download From File-Sharing Website Via Bitsadmin

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8518ed3d-f7c9-4601-a26c-f361a4256a0c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1197, T1036.003, T1105 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_download_file_sharing_domains.yml)**

> Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file from a suspicious domain

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Download From File-Sharing Website Via Bitsadmin
-- Sigma ID:     8518ed3d-f7c9-4601-a26c-f361a4256a0c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1197, T1036.003, T1105
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_download_file_sharing_domains.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some legitimate apps use this, but limited.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.githubusercontent.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%anonfiles.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ddns.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dl.dropboxusercontent.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ghostbin.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%github.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%glitch.me%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gofile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mediafire.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mega.nz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%onrender.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pages.dev%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%paste.ee%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.pl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastetext.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%send.exploit.in%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sendspace.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storage.googleapis.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storjshare.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%supabase.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%temp.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%transfer.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%trycloudflare.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ufile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%w3spaces.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%workers.dev%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /transfer %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /create %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /addfile %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'bitsadmin.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some legitimate apps use this, but limited.

**References:**
- https://blog.netspi.com/15-ways-to-download-a-file/#bitsadmin
- https://isc.sans.edu/diary/22264
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Bitsadmin/
- https://symantec-enterprise-blogs.security.com/blogs/threat-intelligence/ransomware-hive-conti-avoslocker
- https://www.cisa.gov/uscert/ncas/alerts/aa22-321a
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2024/01/17/new-ttps-observed-in-mint-sandstorm-campaign-targeting-high-profile-individuals-at-universities-and-research-orgs/

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_download_susp_extensions.yml)**

> Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file with a suspicious extension

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File With Suspicious Extension Downloaded Via Bitsadmin
-- Sigma ID:     5b80a791-ad9b-4b75-bcc1-ad4e1e89c200
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1197, T1036.003, T1105
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_download_susp_extensions.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.7z%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.asax%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ashx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.asmx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.asp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.aspx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cfm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cgi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.chm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jsp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jspx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.log%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.rar%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.scf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.sct%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.war%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.wsf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.wsh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.zip%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /transfer %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /create %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /addfile %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'bitsadmin.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://blog.netspi.com/15-ways-to-download-a-file/#bitsadmin
- https://isc.sans.edu/diary/22264
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Bitsadmin/

## File Download Via Bitsadmin To A Suspicious Target Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2ddef153-167b-4e89-86b6-757a9e65dcac` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1197, T1036.003, T1105 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_download_susp_targetfolder.yml)**

> Detects usage of bitsadmin downloading a file to a suspicious target folder

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download Via Bitsadmin To A Suspicious Target Folder
-- Sigma ID:     2ddef153-167b-4e89-86b6-757a9e65dcac
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1197, T1036.003, T1105
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_download_susp_targetfolder.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /transfer %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /create %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /addfile %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Perflogs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\ProgramData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\$Recycle.Bin\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Roaming\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Contacts\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Favorites\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Favourites\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\inetpub\\wwwroot\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Music\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Pictures\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Default\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Videos\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%ProgramData\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%public\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%temp\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%tmp\%%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'bitsadmin.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://blog.netspi.com/15-ways-to-download-a-file/#bitsadmin
- https://isc.sans.edu/diary/22264
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Bitsadmin/
- https://blog.talosintelligence.com/breaking-the-silence-recent-truebot-activity/
