## Monitoring For Persistence Via BITS

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b9cbbc17-d00d-4e3d-a827-b06d03d2380d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1197 |
| **Author** | Sreeman |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_potential_persistence.yml)**

> BITS will allow you to schedule a command to execute after a successful download to notify you that the job is finished.
When the job runs on the system the command specified in the BITS job will be executed.
This can be abused by actors to create a backdoor within the system and for persistence.
It will be chained in a BITS job to schedule the download of malware/additional binaries and execute the program after being downloaded.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Monitoring For Persistence Via BITS
-- Sigma ID:     b9cbbc17-d00d-4e3d-a827-b06d03d2380d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1197
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-10-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_bitsadmin_potential_persistence.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'bitsadmin.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2020/10/kegtap-and-singlemalt-with-a-ransomware-chaser.html
- http://0xthem.blogspot.com/2014/03/t-emporal-persistence-with-and-schtasks.html
- https://isc.sans.edu/diary/Wipe+the+drive+Stealthy+Malware+Persistence+Mechanism+-+Part+1/15394

---

## Potential Data Stealing Via Chromium Headless Debugging

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3e8207c5-fcd2-4ea6-9418-15d45b4890e4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1185, T1564.003 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_headless_debugging.yml)**

> Detects chromium based browsers starting in headless and debugging mode and pointing to a user profile. This could be a sign of data stealing or remote control

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Data Stealing Via Chromium Headless Debugging
-- Sigma ID:     3e8207c5-fcd2-4ea6-9418-15d45b4890e4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1185, T1564.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_headless_debugging.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--remote-debugging-%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--user-data-dir%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--headless%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/defaultnamehere/cookie_crimes/
- https://mango.pdf.zone/stealing-chrome-cookies-without-a-password
- https://embracethered.com/blog/posts/2020/cookie-crimes-on-mirosoft-edge/
- https://embracethered.com/blog/posts/2020/chrome-spy-remote-control/

---

## Browser Execution In Headless Mode

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ef9dcfed-690c-4c5d-a9d1-482cd422225c` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105, T1564.003 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_headless_exec.yml)**

> Detects execution of Chromium based browser in headless mode

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Browser Execution In Headless Mode
-- Sigma ID:     ef9dcfed-690c-4c5d-a9d1-482cd422225c
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105, T1564.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_headless_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\opera.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--headless%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/mrd0x/status/1478234484881436672?s=12
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/23/e/managed-xdr-investigation-of-ducktail-in-trend-micro-vision-one.html

## File Download with Headless Browser

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0e8cfe08-02c9-4815-a2f8-0d157b7ed33e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105, T1564.003 |
| **Author** | Sreeman, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_headless_file_download.yml)**

> Detects execution of chromium based browser in headless mode using the "dump-dom" command line to download files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download with Headless Browser
-- Sigma ID:     0e8cfe08-02c9-4815-a2f8-0d157b7ed33e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105, T1564.003
-- Author:       Sreeman, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_headless_file_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\opera.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--headless%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dump-dom%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/mrd0x/status/1478234484881436672?s=12
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/23/e/managed-xdr-investigation-of-ducktail-in-trend-micro-vision-one.html

## Chromium Browser Instance Executed With Custom Extension

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `88d6e60c-759d-4ac1-a447-c0f1466c2d21` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1176.001 |
| **Author** | Aedan Russell, frack113, X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_load_extension.yml)**

> Detects a Chromium based browser process with the 'load-extension' flag to start a instance with a custom extension

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Chromium Browser Instance Executed With Custom Extension
-- Sigma ID:     88d6e60c-759d-4ac1-a447-c0f1466c2d21
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1176.001
-- Author:       Aedan Russell, frack113, X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_load_extension.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Usage of Chrome Extensions in testing tools such as BurpSuite will trigger this alert
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\opera.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--load-extension=%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Usage of Chrome Extensions in testing tools such as BurpSuite will trigger this alert

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/chromeloader/
- https://emkc.org/s/RJjuLa
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/lnk-between-browsers

## Chromium Browser Headless Execution To Mockbin Like Site

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1c526788-0abe-4713-862f-b520da5e5316` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_mockbin_abuse.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a Chromium based browser process with the "headless" flag and a URL pointing to the mockbin.org service (which can be used to exfiltrate data).

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Chromium Browser Headless Execution To Mockbin Like Site
-- Sigma ID:     1c526788-0abe-4713-862f-b520da5e5316
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_mockbin_abuse.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--headless%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\opera.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://run.mocky%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://mockbin%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.zscaler.com/blogs/security-research/steal-it-campaign

## Suspicious Chromium Browser Instance Executed With Custom Extension

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `27ba3207-dd30-4812-abbf-5d20c57d474e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1176.001 |
| **Author** | Aedan Russell, frack113, X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_susp_load_extension.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious process spawning a Chromium based browser process with the 'load-extension' flag to start an instance with a custom extension

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Chromium Browser Instance Executed With Custom Extension
-- Sigma ID:     27ba3207-dd30-4812-abbf-5d20c57d474e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1176.001
-- Author:       Aedan Russell, frack113, X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_chromium_susp_load_extension.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\opera.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--load-extension=%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/chromeloader/
- https://emkc.org/s/RJjuLa

## File Download From Browser Process Via Inline URL

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `94771a71-ba41-4b6e-a757-b531372eaab6` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_inline_file_download.yml)**

> Detects execution of a browser process with a URL argument pointing to a file with a potentially interesting extension. This can be abused to download arbitrary files or to hide from the user for example by launching the browser in a minimized state.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download From Browser Process Via Inline URL
-- Sigma ID:     94771a71-ba41-4b6e-a757-b531372eaab6
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_inline_file_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.7z' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.zip')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.7z"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.zip"%')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\opera.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/mrd0x/status/1478116126005641220
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Msedge/

## Browser Started with Remote Debugging

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b3d34dc5-2efd-4ae3-845f-8ec14921f449` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1185 |
| **Author** | pH-T (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_remote_debugging.yml)**

> Detects browsers starting with the remote debugging flags. Which is a technique often used to perform browser injection attacks

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Browser Started with Remote Debugging
-- Sigma ID:     b3d34dc5-2efd-4ae3-845f-8ec14921f449
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1185
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_remote_debugging.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --remote-debugging-%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\firefox.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -start-debugger-server%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://yoroi.company/wp-content/uploads/2022/05/EternityGroup_report_compressed.pdf
- https://www.mdsec.co.uk/2022/10/analysing-lastpass-part-1/
- https://github.com/defaultnamehere/cookie_crimes/
- https://github.com/wunderwuzzi23/firefox-cookiemonster

## Tor Client/Browser Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `62f7c9bf-9135-49b2-8aeb-1e54a6ecc13c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1090.003 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_tor_execution.yml)**

> Detects the use of Tor or Tor-Browser to connect to onion routing networks

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Tor Client/Browser Execution
-- Sigma ID:     62f7c9bf-9135-49b2-8aeb-1e54a6ecc13c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090.003
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-02-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_browsers_tor_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'Tor Browser')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Tor Browser'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\tor.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\Tor Browser\\Browser\\firefox.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.logpoint.com/en/blog/detecting-tor-use-with-logpoint/

## Potential Binary Proxy Execution Via Cdb.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b5c7395f-e501-4a08-94d4-57fe7a9da9d2` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1106, T1218, T1127 |
| **Author** | Beyu Denis, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cdb_arbitrary_command_execution.yml)**

> Detects usage of "cdb.exe" to launch arbitrary processes or commands from a debugger script file

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Binary Proxy Execution Via Cdb.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     b5c7395f-e501-4a08-94d4-57fe7a9da9d2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1106, T1218, T1127
-- Author:       Beyu Denis, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-10-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cdb_arbitrary_command_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of debugging tools
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -cf %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\cdb.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CDB.Exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of debugging tools

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/Cdb/

## New Root Certificate Installed Via CertMgr.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ff992eac-6449-4c60-8c1d-91c9722a1d48` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1553.004 |
| **Author** | oscd.community, @redcanary, Zach Stanford @svch0st |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certmgr_certificate_installation.yml)**

> Detects execution of "certmgr" with the "add" flag in order to install a new certificate on the system.
Adversaries may install a root certificate on a compromised system to avoid warnings when connecting to adversary controlled web servers.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        New Root Certificate Installed Via CertMgr.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     ff992eac-6449-4c60-8c1d-91c9722a1d48
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1553.004
-- Author:       oscd.community, @redcanary, Zach Stanford @svch0st
-- Date:         2023-03-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certmgr_certificate_installation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Help Desk or IT may need to manually add a corporate Root CA on occasion. Need to test if GPO push doesn't trigger FP
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/add%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%root%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\CertMgr.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CERTMGT.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Help Desk or IT may need to manually add a corporate Root CA on occasion. Need to test if GPO push doesn't trigger FP

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1553.004/T1553.004.md
- https://securelist.com/to-crypt-or-to-mine-that-is-the-question/86307/

## File Download via CertOC.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `70ad0861-d1fe-491c-a45f-fa48148a300d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certoc_download.yml)**

> Detects when a user downloads a file by using CertOC.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download via CertOC.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     70ad0861-d1fe-491c-a45f-fa48148a300d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certoc_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-GetCACAPS%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certoc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertOC.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## File Download From IP Based URL Via CertOC.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b86f6dea-0b2f-41f5-bdcc-a057bd19cd6a` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certoc_download_direct_ip.yml)**

> Detects when a user downloads a file from an IP based URL using CertOC.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download From IP Based URL Via CertOC.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     b86f6dea-0b2f-41f5-bdcc-a057bd19cd6a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1105
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certoc_download_direct_ip.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-GetCACAPS%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certoc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertOC.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '://[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Certoc/

## DLL Loaded via CertOC.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `242301bc-f92f-4476-8718-78004a6efd9f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Austin Songer @austinsonger |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certoc_load_dll.yml)**

> Detects when a user installs certificates by using CertOC.exe to loads the target DLL file.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        DLL Loaded via CertOC.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     242301bc-f92f-4476-8718-78004a6efd9f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Austin Songer @austinsonger
-- Date:         2021-10-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certoc_load_dll.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% -LoadDLL %'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certoc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertOC.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Suspicious DLL Loaded via CertOC.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `84232095-ecca-4015-b0d7-7726507ee793` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certoc_load_dll_susp_locations.yml)**

> Detects when a user installs certificates by using CertOC.exe to load the target DLL file.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious DLL Loaded via CertOC.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     84232095-ecca-4015-b0d7-7726507ee793
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certoc_load_dll_susp_locations.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% -LoadDLL %'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certoc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertOC.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Appdata\\Local\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Windows\\Tasks\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Windows\\Temp\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Suspicious CertReq Command to Download

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4480827a-9799-4232-b2c4-ccc6c4e9e12b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certreq_download.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious CertReq execution downloading a file.
This behavior is often used by attackers to download additional payloads or configuration files.
Certreq is a built-in Windows utility used to request and retrieve certificates from a certification authority (CA). However, it can be abused by threat actors for malicious purposes.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious CertReq Command to Download
-- Sigma ID:     4480827a-9799-4232-b2c4-ccc6c4e9e12b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-11-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certreq_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-config%'
  AND rawEventMsg LIKE '%-Post%'
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certreq.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertReq.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Certreq/

---

## New Root Certificate Installed Via Certutil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d2125259-ddea-4c1c-9c22-977eb5b29cf0` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1553.004 |
| **Author** | oscd.community, @redcanary, Zach Stanford @svch0st |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_certificate_installation.yml)**

> Detects execution of "certutil" with the "addstore" flag in order to install a new certificate on the system.
Adversaries may install a root certificate on a compromised system to avoid warnings when connecting to adversary controlled web servers.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        New Root Certificate Installed Via Certutil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     d2125259-ddea-4c1c-9c22-977eb5b29cf0
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1553.004
-- Author:       oscd.community, @redcanary, Zach Stanford @svch0st
-- Date:         2023-03-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_certificate_installation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Help Desk or IT may need to manually add a corporate Root CA on occasion. Need to test if GPO push doesn't trigger FP
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-addstore%'
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%root%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Help Desk or IT may need to manually add a corporate Root CA on occasion. Need to test if GPO push doesn't trigger FP

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1553.004/T1553.004.md

---

## File Decoded From Base64/Hex Via Certutil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cc9cbe82-7bc0-4ef5-bc23-bbfb83947be7` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_decode.yml)**

> Detects the execution of certutil with either the "decode" or "decodehex" flags to decode base64 or hex encoded files. This can be abused by attackers to decode an encoded payload before execution

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Decoded From Base64/Hex Via Certutil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     cc9cbe82-7bc0-4ef5-bc23-bbfb83947be7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2023-02-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_decode.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((rawEventMsg LIKE '%-decode %' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '%-decodehex %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/certutil
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/new-babyshark-malware-targets-u-s-national-security-think-tanks/
- https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2021/04/13/compromised-exchange-server-hosting-cryptojacker-targeting-other-exchange-servers/
- https://twitter.com/JohnLaTwC/status/835149808817991680
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/archive/blogs/pki/basic-crl-checking-with-certutil
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Certutil/

## Suspicious Download Via Certutil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `19b08b1c-861d-4e75-a1ef-ea0c1baf202b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027, T1105 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_download.yml)**

> Detects the execution of certutil with certain flags that allow the utility to download files.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Download Via Certutil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     19b08b1c-861d-4e75-a1ef-ea0c1baf202b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027, T1105
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%urlcache %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%verifyctl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%URL %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

## Suspicious File Downloaded From File-Sharing Website Via Certutil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `42a5f1e7-9603-4f6d-97ae-3f37d130d794` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027, T1105 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_download_file_sharing_domains.yml)**

> Detects the execution of certutil with certain flags that allow the utility to download files from file-sharing websites.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious File Downloaded From File-Sharing Website Via Certutil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     42a5f1e7-9603-4f6d-97ae-3f37d130d794
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027, T1105
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_download_file_sharing_domains.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%urlcache %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%verifyctl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%URL %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.githubusercontent.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%anonfiles.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ddns.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dl.dropboxusercontent.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ghostbin.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%github.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%glitch.me%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gofile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mediafire.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mega.nz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%onrender.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pages.dev%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%paste.ee%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.pl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastetext.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%send.exploit.in%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sendspace.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storage.googleapis.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storjshare.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%supabase.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%temp.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%transfer.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%trycloudflare.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ufile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%w3spaces.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%workers.dev%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## File Encoded To Base64 Via Certutil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e62a9f0c-ca1e-46b2-85d5-a6da77f86d1a` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_encode.yml)**

> Detects the execution of certutil with the "encode" flag to encode a file to base64. This can be abused by threat actors and attackers for data exfiltration

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Encoded To Base64 Via Certutil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     e62a9f0c-ca1e-46b2-85d5-a6da77f86d1a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-02-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_encode.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    As this is a general purpose rule, legitimate usage of the encode functionality will trigger some false positives. Apply additional filters accordingly
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-encode%'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** As this is a general purpose rule, legitimate usage of the encode functionality will trigger some false positives. Apply additional filters accordingly

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/certutil
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/new-babyshark-malware-targets-u-s-national-security-think-tanks/
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Certutil/

## Suspicious File Encoded To Base64 Via Certutil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ea0cdc3e-2239-4f26-a947-4e8f8224e464` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_encode_susp_extensions.yml)**

> Detects the execution of certutil with the "encode" flag to encode a file to base64 where the extensions of the file is suspicious

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious File Encoded To Base64 Via Certutil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     ea0cdc3e-2239-4f26-a947-4e8f8224e464
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-15

-- Unmapped:     (none)

-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-encode%'
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.acl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.doc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mp3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pdf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.tmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xls%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xml%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## File In Suspicious Location Encoded To Base64 Via Certutil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `82a6714f-4899-4f16-9c1e-9a333544d4c3` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_encode_susp_location.yml)**

> Detects the execution of certutil with the "encode" flag to encode a file to base64 where the files are located in potentially suspicious locations

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File In Suspicious Location Encoded To Base64 Via Certutil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     82a6714f-4899-4f16-9c1e-9a333544d4c3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_encode_susp_location.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-encode%'
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Roaming\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Local\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\PerfLogs\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%$Recycle.Bin%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/35c22725a92d5cb1016b09421c0a6cdbfd860fd4778b3313669b057d4a131cb7/behavior
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/427616528b7dbc4a6057ac89eb174a3a90f7abcf3f34e5a359b7a910d82f7a72/behavior
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/34de4c8beded481a4084a1fd77855c3e977e8ac643e5c5842d0f15f7f9b9086f/behavior
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/4abe1395a09fda06d897a9c4eb247278c1b6cddda5d126ce5b3f4f499e3b8fa2/behavior

## Certificate Exported Via Certutil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3ffd6f51-e6c1-47b7-94b4-c1e61d4117c5` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_export_pfx.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the certutil with the "exportPFX" flag which allows the utility to export certificates.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Certificate Exported Via Certutil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     3ffd6f51-e6c1-47b7-94b4-c1e61d4117c5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_export_pfx.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    There legitimate reasons to export certificates. Investigate the activity to determine if it's benign
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-exportPFX %'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** There legitimate reasons to export certificates. Investigate the activity to determine if it's benign

**References:**
- https://www.splunk.com/en_us/blog/security/a-golden-saml-journey-solarwinds-continued.html

## Potential NTLM Coercion Via Certutil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6c6d9280-e6d0-4b9d-80ac-254701b64916` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_ntlm_coercion.yml)**

> Detects possible NTLM coercion via certutil using the 'syncwithWU' flag

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential NTLM Coercion Via Certutil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     6c6d9280-e6d0-4b9d-80ac-254701b64916
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_certutil_ntlm_coercion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -syncwithWU %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% \\\\\\\\%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CertUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/LOLBAS-Project/LOLBAS/issues/243

## Console CodePage Lookup Via CHCP

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7090adee-82e2-4269-bd59-80691e7c6338` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1614.001 |
| **Author** | _pete_0, TheDFIRReport |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_chcp_codepage_lookup.yml)**

> Detects use of chcp to look up the system locale value as part of host discovery

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Console CodePage Lookup Via CHCP
-- Sigma ID:     7090adee-82e2-4269-bd59-80691e7c6338
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1614.001
-- Author:       _pete_0, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-02-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_chcp_codepage_lookup.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    During Anaconda update the 'conda.exe' process will eventually execution the 'chcp' command.; Discord was seen using chcp to look up code pages
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
    AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% -c %' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -r %' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -k %')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\chcp.com'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%chcp' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%chcp ' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%chcp  ')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** During Anaconda update the 'conda.exe' process will eventually execution the 'chcp' command.; Discord was seen using chcp to look up code pages

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/04/04/stolen-images-campaign-ends-in-conti-ransomware/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/chcp

---

## Suspicious CodePage Switch Via CHCP

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c7942406-33dd-4377-a564-0f62db0593a3` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_chcp_codepage_switch.yml)**

> Detects a code page switch in command line or batch scripts to a rare language

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious CodePage Switch Via CHCP
-- Sigma ID:     c7942406-33dd-4377-a564-0f62db0593a3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_chcp_codepage_switch.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity (adjust code pages according to your organization's region)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\chcp.com'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 936' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 1258')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative activity (adjust code pages according to your organization's region)

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/intl/code-page-identifiers
- https://twitter.com/cglyer/status/1183756892952248325

## Deleted Data Overwritten Via Cipher.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4b046706-5789-4673-b111-66f25fe99534` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | impact |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1485 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cipher_overwrite_deleted_data.yml)**

> Detects usage of the "cipher" built-in utility in order to overwrite deleted data from disk.
Adversaries may destroy data and files on specific systems or in large numbers on a network to interrupt availability to systems, services, and network resources.
Data destruction is likely to render stored data irrecoverable by forensic techniques through overwriting files or data on local and remote drives


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Deleted Data Overwritten Via Cipher.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     4b046706-5789-4673-b111-66f25fe99534
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1485
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-12-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cipher_overwrite_deleted_data.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /w:%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CIPHER.EXE'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\cipher.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1485/T1485.md#atomic-test-3---overwrite-deleted-data-on-c-drive

## Process Access via TrolleyExpress Exclusion

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4c0aaedc-154c-4427-ada0-d80ef9c9deb6` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011, T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_citrix_trolleyexpress_procdump.yml)**

> Detects a possible process memory dump that uses the white-listed Citrix TrolleyExpress.exe filename as a way to dump the lsass process memory

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Access via TrolleyExpress Exclusion
-- Sigma ID:     4c0aaedc-154c-4427-ada0-d80ef9c9deb6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011, T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_citrix_trolleyexpress_procdump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\TrolleyExpress 7%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\TrolleyExpress 8%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\TrolleyExpress 9%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\TrolleyExpress.exe 7%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\TrolleyExpress.exe 8%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\TrolleyExpress.exe 9%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\TrolleyExpress.exe -ma %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/_xpn_/status/1491557187168178176
- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ie831jF0bb0


## Cloudflared Portable Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `fadb84f0-4e84-4f6d-a1ce-9ef2bffb6ccd` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1090.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cloudflared_portable_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the "cloudflared" binary from a non standard location.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Cloudflared Portable Execution
-- Sigma ID:     fadb84f0-4e84-4f6d-a1ce-9ef2bffb6ccd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-12-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cloudflared_portable_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of Cloudflared portable versions
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\cloudflared.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of Cloudflared portable versions
