## Potential Arbitrary File Download Via Cmdl32.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f37aba28-a9e6-4045-882c-d5004043b337` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218, T1202 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cmdl32_arbitrary_file_download.yml)**

> Detects execution of Cmdl32 with the "/vpn" and "/lan" flags.
Attackers can abuse this utility in order to download arbitrary files via a configuration file.
Inspect the location and the content of the file passed as an argument in order to determine if it is suspicious.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Arbitrary File Download Via Cmdl32.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     f37aba28-a9e6-4045-882c-d5004043b337
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218, T1202
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-11-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cmdl32_arbitrary_file_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/vpn%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/lan%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmdl32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CMDL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Cmdl32/
- https://twitter.com/SwiftOnSecurity/status/1455897435063074824
- https://github.com/LOLBAS-Project/LOLBAS/pull/151

## CMSTP Execution Process Creation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|

| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.003 |
| **Author** | Nik Seetharaman |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cmstp_execution_by_creation.yml)**

> Detects various indicators of Microsoft Connection Manager Profile Installer execution

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        CMSTP Execution Process Creation
-- Sigma ID:     7d4cdc5a-0076-40ca-aac8-f7e714570e47
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218.003
-- Author:       Nik Seetharaman
-- Date:         2018-07-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cmstp_execution_by_creation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate CMSTP use (unlikely in modern enterprise environments)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
```

## OpenEDR Spawning Command Shell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7f3a9c2d-4e8b-4a7f-9d3e-5c6f8a9b2e1d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.003, T1021.004, T1219 |
| **Author** | @kostastsale |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_comodo_ssh_shellhost_cmd_spawn.yml)**

> Detects the OpenEDR ssh-shellhost.exe spawning a command shell (cmd.exe) or PowerShell with PTY (pseudo-terminal) capabilities.
This may indicate remote command execution through OpenEDR's remote management features, which could be legitimate administrative activity or potential abuse of the remote access tool.
Threat actors may leverage OpenEDR's remote shell capabilities to execute commands on compromised systems, facilitating lateral movement or other command-and-control operations.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        OpenEDR Spawning Command Shell
-- Sigma ID:     7f3a9c2d-4e8b-4a7f-9d3e-5c6f8a9b2e1d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003, T1021.004, T1219
-- Author:       @kostastsale
-- Date:         2026-02-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_comodo_ssh_shellhost_cmd_spawn.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of OpenEDR for remote command execution
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pwsh%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\ITSMService.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\ssh-shellhost.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--pty%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of OpenEDR for remote command execution

**References:**
- https://kostas-ts.medium.com/detecting-abuse-of-openedrs-permissive-edr-trial-a-security-researcher-s-perspective-fc55bf53972c

---

## Arbitrary File Download Via ConfigSecurityPolicy.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1f0f6176-6482-4027-b151-00071af39d7e` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | exfiltration |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1567 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_configsecuritypolicy_download_file.yml)**

> Detects the execution of "ConfigSecurityPolicy.EXE", a binary part of Windows Defender used to manage settings in Windows Defender.
Users can configure different pilot collections for each of the co-management workloads.
It can be abused by attackers in order to upload or download files.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary File Download Via ConfigSecurityPolicy.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     1f0f6176-6482-4027-b151-00071af39d7e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration | T1567
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-11-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_configsecuritypolicy_download_file.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConfigSecurityPolicy.exe%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\ConfigSecurityPolicy.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'ConfigSecurityPolicy.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ftp://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/ConfigSecurityPolicy/

---

## Powershell Executed From Headless ConHost Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `056c7317-9a09-4bd4-9067-d051312752ea` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001, T1059.003, T1564.003 |
| **Author** | Matt Anderson (Huntress) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_headless_powershell.yml)**

> Detects the use of powershell commands from headless ConHost window.
The "--headless" flag hides the windows from the user upon execution.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Powershell Executed From Headless ConHost Process
-- Sigma ID:     056c7317-9a09-4bd4-9067-d051312752ea
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1059.003, T1564.003
-- Author:       Matt Anderson (Huntress)
-- Date:         2024-07-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_headless_powershell.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--headless%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\conhost.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CONHOST.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## Suspicious High IntegrityLevel Conhost Legacy Option

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3037d961-21e9-4732-b27a-637bcc7bf539` |
| **Level** | informational |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1202 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_legacy_option.yml)**

> ForceV1 asks for information directly from the kernel space. Conhost connects to the console application. High IntegrityLevel means the process is running with elevated privileges, such as an Administrator context.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious High IntegrityLevel Conhost Legacy Option
-- Sigma ID:     3037d961-21e9-4732-b27a-637bcc7bf539
-- Level:        informational  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_legacy_option.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Very Likely, including launching cmd.exe via Run As Administrator
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'S-1-16-12288'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%conhost.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0xffffffff%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ForceV1%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Very Likely, including launching cmd.exe via Run As Administrator

**References:**
- https://cybercryptosec.medium.com/covid-19-cyber-infection-c615ead7c29
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/04/04/stolen-images-campaign-ends-in-conti-ransomware/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/secauthz/mandatory-integrity-control

---

## Conhost.exe CommandLine Path Traversal

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ee5e119b-1f75-4b34-add8-3be976961e39` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.003 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_path_traversal.yml)**

> detects the usage of path traversal in conhost.exe indicating possible command/argument confusion/hijacking

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Conhost.exe CommandLine Path Traversal
-- Sigma ID:     ee5e119b-1f75-4b34-add8-3be976961e39
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_path_traversal.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%conhost%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/../../%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://pentestlab.blog/2020/07/06/indirect-command-execution/

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Child Process Of Conhost.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     7dc2dedd-7603-461a-bc13-15803d132355
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test

-- ============================================================

SELECT

  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,

  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,

  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Potentially Suspicious Child Processes Spawned by ConHost

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `dfa03a09-8b92-4d83-8e74-f72839b1c407` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1202, T1218 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_susp_winshell_child_process.yml)**

> Detects suspicious child processes related to Windows Shell utilities spawned by `conhost.exe`, which could indicate malicious activity using trusted system components.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Child Processes Spawned by ConHost
-- Sigma ID:     dfa03a09-8b92-4d83-8e74-f72839b1c407
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1202, T1218
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_susp_winshell_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative tasks using `conhost.exe` to spawn child processes such as `cmd.exe`, `powershell.exe`, or `regsvr32.exe`.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('cmd.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'mshta.exe', 'powershell_ise.exe', 'powershell.exe', 'pwsh.dll', 'regsvr32.exe', 'wscript.exe')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\conhost.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrative tasks using `conhost.exe` to spawn child processes such as `cmd.exe`, `powershell.exe`, or `regsvr32.exe`.

**References:**
- https://tria.ge/241015-l98snsyeje/behavioral2

---

## Conhost Spawned By Uncommon Parent Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cbb9e3d1-2386-4e59-912e-62f1484f7a89` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_uncommon_parent.yml)**

> Detects when the Console Window Host (conhost.exe) process is spawned by an uncommon parent process, which could be indicative of potential code injection activity.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Conhost Spawned By Uncommon Parent Process
-- Sigma ID:     cbb9e3d1-2386-4e59-912e-62f1484f7a89
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_conhost_uncommon_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\conhost.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\lsass.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\services.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\smss.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\spoolsv.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\svchost.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\userinit.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wininit.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\winlogon.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/conhost-spawned-by-suspicious-parent-process.html

## Control Panel Items

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0ba863e6-def5-4e50-9cea-4dd8c7dc46a4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.002, T1546 |
| **Author** | Kyaw Min Thein, Furkan Caliskan (@caliskanfurkan_) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_control_panel_item.yml)**

> Detects the malicious use of a control panel item

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Control Panel Items
-- Sigma ID:     0ba863e6-def5-4e50-9cea-4dd8c7dc46a4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1218.002, T1546
-- Author:       Kyaw Min Thein, Furkan Caliskan (@caliskanfurkan_)
-- Date:         2020-06-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_control_panel_item.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CurrentVersion\\Control Panel\\CPLs%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'reg.exe')))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cpl')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://ired.team/offensive-security/code-execution/code-execution-through-control-panel-add-ins

## CreateDump Process Dump

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `515c8be5-e5df-4c5e-8f6d-a4a2f05e4b48` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036, T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_createdump_lolbin_execution.yml)**

> Detects uses of the createdump.exe LOLOBIN utility to dump process memory

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        CreateDump Process Dump
-- Sigma ID:     515c8be5-e5df-4c5e-8f6d-a4a2f05e4b48
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_createdump_lolbin_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Command lines that use the same flags
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --full %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -f %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --name %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dmp %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\createdump.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'FX_VER_INTERNALNAME_STR')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Command lines that use the same flags

**References:**
- https://www.crowdstrike.com/blog/overwatch-exposes-aquatic-panda-in-possession-of-log-4-shell-exploit-tools/
- https://twitter.com/bopin2020/status/1366400799199272960

## Windows Credential Guard Registry Tampering Via CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c17d47b7-dcd6-4109-87eb-d1817bd4cbc9` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_credential_guard_registry_tampering.yml)**

> Detects attempts to add, modify, or delete Windows Credential Guard related registry keys or values via command line tools such as Reg.exe or PowerShell.
Credential Guard uses virtualization-based security to isolate secrets so that only privileged system software can access them.
Adversaries may disable Credential Guard to gain access to sensitive credentials stored in the system, such as NTLM hashes and Kerberos tickets, which can be used for lateral movement and privilege escalation.
The rule matches suspicious command lines that target DeviceGuard or LSA registry paths and manipulate keys like EnableVirtualizationBasedSecurity, RequirePlatformSecurityFeatures, or LsaCfgFlags.
Such activity may indicate an attempt to disable or tamper with Credential Guard, potentially exposing sensitive credentials for misuse.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Credential Guard Registry Tampering Via CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     c17d47b7-dcd6-4109-87eb-d1817bd4cbc9
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-12-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_credential_guard_registry_tampering.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-ItemProperty %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ItemProperty %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%si %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%delete %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%del %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-ItemProperty %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rp %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'reg.exe')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Control\\DeviceGuard%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Control\\LSA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Software\\Policies\\Microsoft\\Windows\\DeviceGuard%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EnableVirtualizationBasedSecurity%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RequirePlatformSecurityFeatures%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LsaCfgFlags%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://woshub.com/disable-credential-guard-windows/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/client-management/mdm/policy-csp-deviceguard

---

## Dynamic .NET Compilation Via Csc.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `dcaa3f04-70c3-427a-80b4-b870d73c94c4` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027.004 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csc_susp_dynamic_compilation.yml)**

> Detects execution of "csc.exe" to compile .NET code. Attackers often leverage this to compile code on the fly and use it in other stages.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Dynamic .NET Compilation Via Csc.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     dcaa3f04-70c3-427a-80b4-b870d73c94c4
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027.004
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-08-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csc_susp_dynamic_compilation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate software from program files - https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1206874118282448897; Legitimate Microsoft software - https://twitter.com/gabriele_pippi/status/1206907900268072962; Ansible
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\csc.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate software from program files - https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1206874118282448897; Legitimate Microsoft software - https://twitter.com/gabriele_pippi/status/1206907900268072962; Ansible

**References:**
- https://securityboulevard.com/2019/08/agent-tesla-evading-edr-by-removing-api-hooks/
- https://www.clearskysec.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/11/MuddyWater-Operations-in-Lebanon-and-Oman.pdf
- https://app.any.run/tasks/c6993447-d1d8-414e-b856-675325e5aa09/
- https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1206874118282448897
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/b27a3cb25025161d49ac861cb216db68c46a3537/atomics/T1027.004/T1027.004.md#atomic-test-1---compile-after-delivery-using-cscexe

- https://reaqta.com/2017/11/short-journey-darkvnc/
- https://www.pwc.com/gx/en/issues/cybersecurity/cyber-threat-intelligence/yellow-liderc-ships-its-scripts-delivers-imaploader-malware.html

## Suspicious Csi.exe Usage

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `40b95d31-1afc-469e-8d34-9a3a667d058e` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1072, T1218 |
| **Author** | Konstantin Grishchenko, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csi_execution.yml)**

> Csi.exe is a signed binary from Microsoft that comes with Visual Studio and provides C# interactive capabilities. It can be used to run C# code from a file passed as a parameter in command line. Early version of this utility provided with Microsoft “Roslyn” Community Technology Preview was named 'rcsi.exe'

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Csi.exe Usage
-- Sigma ID:     40b95d31-1afc-469e-8d34-9a3a667d058e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1072, T1218
-- Author:       Konstantin Grishchenko, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csi_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage by software developers
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'Microsoft Corporation')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\csi.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rcsi.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('csi.exe', 'rcsi.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage by software developers

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/Csi/
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/Rcsi/
- https://enigma0x3.net/2016/11/21/bypassing-application-whitelisting-by-using-rcsi-exe/
- https://twitter.com/Z3Jpa29z/status/1317545798981324801

---

## Suspicious Use of CSharp Interactive Console

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a9e416a8-e613-4f8b-88b8-a7d1d1af2f61` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1127 |
| **Author** | Michael R. (@nahamike01) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csi_use_of_csharp_console.yml)**

> Detects the execution of CSharp interactive console by PowerShell

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Use of CSharp Interactive Console
-- Sigma ID:     a9e416a8-e613-4f8b-88b8-a7d1d1af2f61
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1127
-- Author:       Michael R. (@nahamike01)
-- Date:         2020-03-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csi_use_of_csharp_console.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Possible depending on environment. Pair with other factors such as net connections, command-line args, etc.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\csi.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'csi.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Possible depending on environment. Pair with other factors such as net connections, command-line args, etc.

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/detecting-attacks-leveraging-the-net-framework/

---

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_csvde_export.yml)**

> Detects the execution of "csvde.exe" in order to export organizational Active Directory structure.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Active Directory Structure Export Via Csvde.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     e5d36acd-acb4-4c6f-a13f-9eb203d50099
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration, discovery | T1087.002

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,

  rawEventMsg

WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**References:**

## Potential Cookies Session Hijacking

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5a6e1e16-07de-48d8-8aae-faa766c05e88` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_cookie_hijacking.yml)**

> Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "-c" flag in order to save cookie data.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Cookies Session Hijacking
-- Sigma ID:     5a6e1e16-07de-48d8-8aae-faa766c05e88
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_cookie_hijacking.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\s-c\s')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--cookie-jar%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://curl.se/docs/manpage.html

---

## Curl Web Request With Potential Custom User-Agent

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `85de1f22-d189-44e4-8239-dc276b45379b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_custom_user_agent.yml)**

> Detects execution of "curl.exe" with a potential custom "User-Agent". Attackers can leverage this to download or exfiltrate data via "curl" to a domain that only accept specific "User-Agent" strings

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Curl Web Request With Potential Custom User-Agent
-- Sigma ID:     85de1f22-d189-44e4-8239-dc276b45379b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_custom_user_agent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%User-Agent:%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://labs.withsecure.com/publications/fin7-target-veeam-servers
- https://github.com/WithSecureLabs/iocs/blob/344203de742bb7e68bd56618f66d34be95a9f9fc/FIN7VEEAM/iocs.csv

## Suspicious File Download From IP Via Curl.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5cb299fc-5fb1-4d07-b989-0644c68b6043` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_download_direct_ip_susp_extensions.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious file downloads directly from IP addresses using curl.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious File Download From IP Via Curl.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     5cb299fc-5fb1-4d07-b989-0644c68b6043
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_download_direct_ip_susp_extensions.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.log' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.log"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.log'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs''))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -O%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--remote-name%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--output%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '://[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://labs.withsecure.com/publications/fin7-target-veeam-servers
- https://github.com/WithSecureLabs/iocs/blob/344203de742bb7e68bd56618f66d34be95a9f9fc/FIN7VEEAM/iocs.csv
- https://github.com/pr0xylife/IcedID/blob/8dd1e218460db4f750d955b4c65b2f918a1db906/icedID_09.28.2023.txt

```sql
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps1"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1'' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.psm1"'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -O%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--remote-name%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--output%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.githubusercontent.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%anonfiles.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ddns.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dl.dropboxusercontent.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ghostbin.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%github.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%glitch.me%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gofile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mediafire.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mega.nz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%onrender.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pages.dev%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%paste.ee%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.pl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastetext.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pixeldrain.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%send.exploit.in%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sendspace.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storage.googleapis.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storjshare.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%supabase.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%temp.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%transfer.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%trycloudflare.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ufile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%w3spaces.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%workers.dev%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://labs.withsecure.com/publications/fin7-target-veeam-servers
- https://github.com/WithSecureLabs/iocs/blob/344203de742bb7e68bd56618f66d34be95a9f9fc/FIN7VEEAM/iocs.csv

## Insecure Transfer Via Curl.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cb9cc1d1-e84e-4bdc-b7ad-c31b1b7908ec` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_insecure_connection.yml)**

> Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "--insecure" flag.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Insecure Transfer Via Curl.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     cb9cc1d1-e84e-4bdc-b7ad-c31b1b7908ec
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-06-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_insecure_connection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Access to badly maintained internal or development systems
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\s-k\s')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--insecure%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Access to badly maintained internal or development systems

**References:**
- https://curl.se/docs/manpage.html

---

## Insecure Proxy/DOH Transfer Via Curl.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2c1486f5-02e8-4f86-9099-b97f2da4ed77` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_insecure_proxy_or_doh.yml)**

> Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "insecure" flag over proxy or DOH.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Insecure Proxy/DOH Transfer Via Curl.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     2c1486f5-02e8-4f86-9099-b97f2da4ed77
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_insecure_proxy_or_doh.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Access to badly maintained internal or development systems
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--doh-insecure%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--proxy-insecure%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Access to badly maintained internal or development systems

**References:**
- https://curl.se/docs/manpage.html

## Local File Read Using Curl.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `aa6f6ea6-0676-40dd-b510-6e46f02d8867` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_local_file_read.yml)**

> Detects execution of "curl.exe" with the "file://" protocol handler in order to read local files.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Local File Read Using Curl.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     aa6f6ea6-0676-40dd-b510-6e46f02d8867
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_local_file_read.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%file:///%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://curl.se/docs/manpage.html

## Suspicious Curl.EXE Download

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e218595b-bbe7-4ee5-8a96-f32a24ad3468` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_susp_download.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious curl process start on Windows and outputs the requested document to a local file

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Curl.EXE Download
-- Sigma ID:     e218595b-bbe7-4ee5-8a96-f32a24ad3468
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-07-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_curl_susp_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'The curl executable'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## Suspicious CustomShellHost Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `84b14121-9d14-416e-800b-f3b829c5a14d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1216 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_customshellhost_susp_exec.yml)**

> Detects the execution of CustomShellHost.exe where the child isn't located in 'C:\Windows\explorer.exe'. CustomShellHost is a known LOLBin that can be abused by attackers for defense evasion techniques.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious CustomShellHost Execution
-- Sigma ID:     84b14121-9d14-416e-800b-f3b829c5a14d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_customshellhost_susp_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives are unlikely, investigate matches carefully.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\CustomShellHost.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** False positives are unlikely, investigate matches carefully.

**References:**
- https://github.com/LOLBAS-Project/LOLBAS/pull/180
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/CustomShellHost/

## ManageEngine Endpoint Central Dctask64.EXE Potential Abuse

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6345b048-8441-43a7-9bed-541133633d7a` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1055.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_dctask64_arbitrary_command_and_dll_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of "dctask64.exe", a signed binary by ZOHO Corporation part of ManageEngine Endpoint Central.
This binary can be abused for DLL injection, arbitrary command and process execution.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        ManageEngine Endpoint Central Dctask64.EXE Potential Abuse
-- Sigma ID:     6345b048-8441-43a7-9bed-541133633d7a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-01-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_dctask64_arbitrary_command_and_dll_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% executecmd64 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% invokeexe %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% injectDll %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\dctask64.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6834B1B94E49701D77CCB3C0895E1AFD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=1BB6F93B129F398C7C4A76BB97450BBA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=FAA2AC19875FADE461C8D89DCF2710A3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=F1039CED4B91572AB7847D26032E6BBF%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1222088214581825540
- https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1222095963789111296
- https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1222095371175911424

## PowerShell Defender Threat Severity Default Action Set to 'Allow' or 'NoAction'

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1e8a9b4d-3c2a-4f9b-8d1e-7c6a5b4f3d2e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Matt Anderson (Huntress) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_defender_default_action_modified.yml)**

> Detects the use of PowerShell to execute the 'Set-MpPreference' cmdlet to configure Windows Defender's threat severity default action to 'Allow' (value '6') or 'NoAction' (value '9').
This is a highly suspicious configuration change that effectively disables Defender's ability to automatically mitigate threats of a certain severity level.
An attacker might use this technique via the command line to bypass defenses before executing payloads.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Defender Threat Severity Default Action Set to 'Allow' or 'NoAction'
-- Sigma ID:     1e8a9b4d-3c2a-4f9b-8d1e-7c6a5b4f3d2e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Matt Anderson (Huntress)
-- Date:         2025-07-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_defender_default_action_modified.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Highly unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-LowThreatDefaultAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ModerateThreatDefaultAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-HighThreatDefaultAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-SevereThreatDefaultAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ltdefac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-mtdefac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-htdefac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-stdefac %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-MpPreference%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Allow%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NoAction%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%9%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Highly unlikely

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/defender/set-mppreference
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-hardware/customize/desktop/unattend/security-malware-windows-defender-threatseveritydefaultaction
- https://research.splunk.com/endpoint/7215831c-8252-4ae3-8d43-db588e82f952
- https://gist.github.com/Dump-GUY/8daef859f382b895ac6fd0cf094555d2
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/10/18/icedid-to-xinglocker-ransomware-in-24-hours/

---

## Windows Defender Context Menu Removed

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b9e8c7d6-a5f4-4e3d-8b1a-9f0c8d7e6a5b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Matt Anderson (Huntress) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_defender_remove_context_menu.yml)**

> Detects the use of reg.exe or PowerShell to delete the Windows Defender context menu handler registry keys.
This action removes the "Scan with Microsoft Defender" option from the right-click menu for files, directories, and drives.
Attackers may use this technique to hinder manual, on-demand scans and reduce the visibility of the security product.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Defender Context Menu Removed
-- Sigma ID:     b9e8c7d6-a5f4-4e3d-8b1a-9f0c8d7e6a5b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Matt Anderson (Huntress)
-- Date:         2025-07-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_defender_remove_context_menu.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    May be part of a system customization or "debloating" script, but this is highly unusual in a managed corporate environment.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%del%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-Item%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ri %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('powershell_ise.EXE', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'reg.exe')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\shellex\\ContextMenuHandlers\\EPP%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** May be part of a system customization or "debloating" script, but this is highly unusual in a managed corporate environment.

**References:**
- https://research.splunk.com/endpoint/395ed5fe-ad13-4366-9405-a228427bdd91/
- https://winaero.com/how-to-delete-scan-with-windows-defender-from-context-menu-in-windows-10/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/10/18/icedid-to-xinglocker-ransomware-in-24-hours/
- https://blog.malwarebytes.com/malwarebytes-news/2021/02/lazyscripter-from-empire-to-double-rat/

---

## Remote File Download Via Desktopimgdownldr Utility

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `214641c2-c579-4ecb-8427-0cf19df6842e` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_desktopimgdownldr_remote_file_download.yml)**

> Detects the desktopimgdownldr utility being used to download a remote file. An adversary may use desktopimgdownldr to download arbitrary files as an alternative to certutil.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote File Download Via Desktopimgdownldr Utility
-- Sigma ID:     214641c2-c579-4ecb-8427-0cf19df6842e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_desktopimgdownldr_remote_file_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\desktopimgdownldr.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\desktopimgdownldr.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/lockscreenurl:http%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/remote-file-download-via-desktopimgdownldr-utility.html

---

| **Sigma ID** | `bb58aa4a-b80b-415a-a2c0-2f65a4c81009` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
