## Suspicious HH.EXE Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e8a95b5e-c891-46e2-b33a-93937d3abc31` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1059.001, T1059.003, T1059.005, T1059.007, T1218, T1218.001, T1218.010, T1218.011, T1566, T1566.001 |
| **Author** | Maxim Pavlunin |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hh_susp_execution.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious execution of a Microsoft HTML Help (HH.exe)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious HH.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e8a95b5e-c891-46e2-b33a-93937d3abc31
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047, T1059.001, T1059.003, T1059.005, T1059.007, T1218, T1218.001, T1218.010, T1218.011, T1566, T1566.001
-- Author:       Maxim Pavlunin
-- Date:         2020-04-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hh_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'HH.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\hh.exe')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.application%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Content.Outlook\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.trustwave.com/en-us/resources/blogs/spiderlabs-blog/chm-badness-delivers-a-banking-trojan/
- https://github.com/elastic/protections-artifacts/commit/746086721fd385d9f5c6647cada1788db4aea95f#diff-27939090904026cc396b0b629c8e4314acd6f5dac40a676edbc87f4567b47eb7
- https://www.ptsecurity.com/ww-en/analytics/pt-esc-threat-intelligence/higaisa-or-winnti-apt-41-backdoors-old-and-new/
- https://www.zscaler.com/blogs/security-research/unintentional-leak-glimpse-attack-vectors-apt37

## HackTool - ADCSPwn Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cd8c163e-a19b-402e-bdd5-419ff5859f12` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1557.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_adcspwn.yml)**

> Detects command line parameters used by ADCSPwn, a tool to escalate privileges in an active directory network by coercing authenticate from machine accounts and relaying to the certificate service

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - ADCSPwn Execution
-- Sigma ID:     cd8c163e-a19b-402e-bdd5-419ff5859f12
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1557.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_adcspwn.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --adcs %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --port %')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/bats3c/ADCSPwn

## HackTool - Bloodhound/Sharphound Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f376c8a7-a2d0-4ddc-aa0c-16c17236d962` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1087.001, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.001, T1069.002, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_bloodhound_sharphound.yml)**

> Detects command line parameters used by Bloodhound and Sharphound hack tools

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Bloodhound/Sharphound Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f376c8a7-a2d0-4ddc-aa0c-16c17236d962
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, execution | T1087.001, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.001, T1069.002, T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-12-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_bloodhound_sharphound.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Other programs that use these command line option and accepts an 'All' parameter
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -CollectionMethod All %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --CollectionMethods Session %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --Loop --Loopduration %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --PortScanTimeout %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe -c All -d %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Bloodhound%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-BloodHoundData%'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -JsonFolder %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ZipFileName %')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% DCOnly %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --NoSaveCache %')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%SharpHound%'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%SharpHound%')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] LIKE '%SpecterOps%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] LIKE '%evil corp%')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\Bloodhound.exe%' OR procName LIKE '%\\SharpHound.exe%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Other programs that use these command line option and accepts an 'All' parameter

**References:**
- https://github.com/BloodHoundAD/BloodHound
- https://github.com/BloodHoundAD/SharpHound

---

> F-Secure C3 produces DLLs with a default exported StartNodeRelay function.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - F-Secure C3 Load by Rundll32
-- Sigma ID:     b18c9d4c-fac9-4708-bd06-dd5bfacf200f
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Alfie Champion (ajpc500)
-- Date:         2021-06-02

-- Unmapped:     (none)

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%StartNodeRelay%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## HackTool - Certify Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `762f2482-ff21-4970-8939-0aa317a886bb` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1649 |
| **Author** | pH-T (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_certify.yml)**

> Detects Certify a tool for Active Directory certificate abuse based on PE metadata characteristics and common command line arguments.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Certify Execution
-- Sigma ID:     762f2482-ff21-4970-8939-0aa317a886bb
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1649
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-04-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_certify.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Certify.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Certify.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%Certify%')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe cas %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe find %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe pkiobjects %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe request %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe download %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /vulnerable%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /template:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /altname:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /domain:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /path:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /ca:%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/GhostPack/Certify

## HackTool - Certipy Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_certipy.yml)**

> Detects Certipy execution, a tool for Active Directory Certificate Services enumeration and abuse based on PE metadata characteristics and common command line arguments.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Certipy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     6938366d-8954-4ddc-baff-c830b3ba8fcd
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1649
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems), Sittikorn Sangrattanapitak
-- Date:         2023-04-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_certipy.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Certipy.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Certipy.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%Certipy%')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% account %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% auth %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% cert %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% find %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% forge %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ptt %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% relay %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% req %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% shadow %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% template %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -bloodhound%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ca-pfx %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -dc-ip %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -kirbi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -old-bloodhound%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -pfx %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -target%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -template%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -username %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -vulnerable%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%auth -pfx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%shadow auto%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%shadow list%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/ly4k/Certipy
- https://research.ifcr.dk/certipy-4-0-esc9-esc10-bloodhound-gui-new-authentication-and-request-methods-and-more-7237d88061f7

## Operator Bloopers Cobalt Strike Commands

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `647c7b9e-d784-4fda-b9a0-45c565a7b729` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.003 |
| **Author** | _pete_0, TheDFIRReport |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_cobaltstrike_bloopers_cmd.yml)**

> Detects use of Cobalt Strike commands accidentally entered in the CMD shell

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Operator Bloopers Cobalt Strike Commands
-- Sigma ID:     647c7b9e-d784-4fda-b9a0-45c565a7b729
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003
-- Author:       _pete_0, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-05-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_cobaltstrike_bloopers_cmd.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE 'cmd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE 'cmd.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE 'c:\\windows\\system32\\cmd.exe%'))
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%psinject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spawnas%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%make\_token%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%remote-exec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rev2self%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dcsync%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%logonpasswords%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%execute-assembly%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%getsystem%')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Cmd.Exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://hstechdocs.helpsystems.com/manuals/cobaltstrike/current/userguide/content/cobalt-4-5-user-guide.pdf
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/10/04/bazarloader-and-the-conti-leaks/

## Operator Bloopers Cobalt Strike Modules

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4f154fb6-27d1-4813-a759-78b93e0b9c48` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.003 |
| **Author** | _pete_0, TheDFIRReport |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_cobaltstrike_bloopers_modules.yml)**

> Detects Cobalt Strike module/commands accidentally entered in CMD shell

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Operator Bloopers Cobalt Strike Modules
-- Sigma ID:     4f154fb6-27d1-4813-a759-78b93e0b9c48
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003
-- Author:       _pete_0, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-05-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_cobaltstrike_bloopers_modules.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-UserHunter%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ShareFinder%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Kerberoast%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-SMBAutoBrute%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Nightmare%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%zerologon%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%av\_query%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Cmd.Exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://hstechdocs.helpsystems.com/manuals/cobaltstrike/current/userguide/content/cobalt-4-5-user-guide.pdf
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/10/04/bazarloader-and-the-conti-leaks/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/06/16/sans-ransomware-summit-2022-can-you-detect-this/

## CobaltStrike Load by Rundll32

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ae9c6a7c-9521-42a6-915e-5aaa8689d529` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Wojciech Lesicki |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_cobaltstrike_load_by_rundll32.yml)**

> Rundll32 can be use by Cobalt Strike with StartW function to load DLLs from the command line.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        CobaltStrike Load by Rundll32
-- Sigma ID:     ae9c6a7c-9521-42a6-915e-5aaa8689d529
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Wojciech Lesicki
-- Date:         2021-06-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_cobaltstrike_load_by_rundll32.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% StartW' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%,StartW')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32 %'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.cobaltstrike.com/help-windows-executable
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2020/10/18/ryuk-in-5-hours/

## Potential CobaltStrike Process Patterns

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f35c5d71-b489-4e22-a115-f003df287317` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_cobaltstrike_process_patterns.yml)**

> Detects potential process patterns related to Cobalt Strike beacon activity

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential CobaltStrike Process Patterns
-- Sigma ID:     f35c5d71-b489-4e22-a115-f003df287317
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_cobaltstrike_process_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /C echo%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% > \\\\\\\\.\\\\pipe%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%conhost.exe 0xffffffff -ForceV1'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%/C whoami')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%conhost.exe 0xffffffff -ForceV1'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /C whoami')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE 'C:\\Temp\\%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\runonce.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\dllhost.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c echo%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%> \\\\\\\\.\\\\pipe%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://hausec.com/2021/07/26/cobalt-strike-and-tradecraft/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/08/29/cobalt-strike-a-defenders-guide/

## HackTool - CoercedPotato Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e8d34729-86a4-4140-adfd-0a29c2106307` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1055 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_coercedpotato.yml)**

> Detects the use of CoercedPotato, a tool for privilege escalation

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - CoercedPotato Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e8d34729-86a4-4140-adfd-0a29c2106307
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-10-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_coercedpotato.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\CoercedPotato.exe'
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=A75D7669DB6B2E107A44C4057FF7F7D6%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=F91624350E2C678C5DCBE5E1F24E22C9%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=14C81850A079A87E83D50CA41C709A15%'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --exploitId %')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/hackvens/CoercedPotato
- https://blog.hackvens.fr/articles/CoercedPotato.html

## HackTool - Covenant PowerShell Launcher

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c260b6db-48ba-4b4a-a76f-2f67644e99d2` |

| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001, T1564.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_covenant.yml)**

> Detects suspicious command lines used in Covenant luanchers

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Covenant PowerShell Launcher
-- Sigma ID:     c260b6db-48ba-4b4a-a76f-2f67644e99d2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1564.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-06-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_covenant.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    (none)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Sta%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Nop%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Window%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Hidden%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Command%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-EncodedCommand%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sv o (New-Object IO.MemorySteam);sv d %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta file.hta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GruntHTTP%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-EncodedCommand cwB2ACAAbwAgA%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## HackTool - CrackMapExec Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `42a993dd-bb3e-48c8-b372-4d6684c4106c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, persistence, discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1053, T1059.003, T1059.001, T1110, T1201 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_crackmapexec_execution.yml)**

> This rule detect common flag combinations used by CrackMapExec in order to detect its use even if the binary has been replaced.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - CrackMapExec Execution
-- Sigma ID:     42a993dd-bb3e-48c8-b372-4d6684c4106c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence, discovery | T1047, T1053, T1059.003, T1059.001, T1110, T1201
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_crackmapexec_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\crackmapexec.exe'
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --local-auth%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -x %')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --local-auth%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -p %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -H 'NTHASH'%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% mssql %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -p %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -M %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -d %')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% smb %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -H %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -M %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -o %')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% smb %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -p %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --local-auth%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -M pe\_inject %')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --local-auth%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -p %')
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 10.%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 192.168.%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/24 %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://mpgn.gitbook.io/crackmapexec/smb-protocol/authentication/checking-credentials-local
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/telegram-malware-iranian-espionage
- https://www.infosecmatter.com/crackmapexec-module-library/?cmem=mssql-mimikatz
- https://www.infosecmatter.com/crackmapexec-module-library/?cmem=smb-pe_inject

## HackTool - CrackMapExec Execution Patterns

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `058f4380-962d-40a5-afce-50207d36d7e2` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1053, T1059.003, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Thomas Patzke |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_crackmapexec_execution_patterns.yml)**

> Detects various execution patterns of the CrackMapExec pentesting framework

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - CrackMapExec Execution Patterns
-- Sigma ID:     058f4380-962d-40a5-afce-50207d36d7e2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1047, T1053, T1059.003, T1059.001
-- Author:       Thomas Patzke
-- Date:         2020-05-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_crackmapexec_execution_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /Q /c * 1> \\\\\\\\*\\\\*\\\\* 2>&1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /C * > \\\\\\\\*\\\\*\\\\* 2>&1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /C * > *\\\\Temp\\\\* 2>&1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell.exe -exec bypass -noni -nop -w 1 -C "%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell.exe -noni -nop -w 1 -enc %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/byt3bl33d3r/CrackMapExec

## HackTool - CrackMapExec Process Patterns

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f26307d8-14cd-47e3-a26b-4b4769f24af6` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_crackmapexec_patterns.yml)**

> Detects suspicious process patterns found in logs when CrackMapExec is used

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - CrackMapExec Process Patterns
-- Sigma ID:     f26307d8-14cd-47e3-a26b-4b4769f24af6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_crackmapexec_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tasklist /fi %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Imagename eq lsass.exe%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /k %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /k %'))
    AND (user LIKE '%AUTHORI%' OR user LIKE '%AUTORI%'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%do rundll32.exe C:\\windows\\System32\\comsvcs.dll, MiniDump%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% full%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%\%B%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tasklist /v /fo csv%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%findstr /i "lsass"%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://mpgn.gitbook.io/crackmapexec/smb-protocol/obtaining-credentials/dump-lsass

---

## HackTool - CrackMapExec PowerShell Obfuscation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6f8b3439-a203-45dc-a88b-abf57ea15ccf` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001, T1027.005 |
| **Author** | Thomas Patzke |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_crackmapexec_powershell_obfuscation.yml)**

> The CrachMapExec pentesting framework implements a PowerShell obfuscation with some static strings detected by this rule.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - CrackMapExec PowerShell Obfuscation
-- Sigma ID:     6f8b3439-a203-45dc-a88b-abf57ea15ccf
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1027.005
-- Author:       Thomas Patzke
-- Date:         2020-05-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_crackmapexec_powershell_obfuscation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%join*split%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%( $ShellId[1]+$ShellId[13]+'x')%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%( $PSHome[*]+$PSHOME[*]+%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%( $env:Public[13]+$env:Public[5]+'x')%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%( $env:ComSpec[4,*,25]-Join'')%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[1,3]+'x'-Join'')%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/byt3bl33d3r/CrackMapExec
- https://github.com/byt3bl33d3r/CrackMapExec/blob/0a49f75347b625e81ee6aa8c33d3970b5515ea9e/cme/helpers/powershell.py#L242

---

## HackTool - CreateMiniDump Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_createminidump.yml)**

> Detects the use of CreateMiniDump hack tool used to dump the LSASS process memory for credential extraction on the attacker's machine

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - CreateMiniDump Execution
-- Sigma ID:     36d88494-1d43-4dc0-b3fa-35c8fea0ca9d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\CreateMiniDump.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=4a07f944a83e8a7c2525efa35dd30e2f%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## HackTool - Doppelanger LSASS Dumper Execution

| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.001 |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_doppelganger.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the Doppelanger hacktool which is used to dump LSASS memory via process cloning while evading common detection methods

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Doppelanger LSASS Dumper Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d474c8fe-bb69-4ea0-b7d9-f682b56d52d3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-07-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_doppelganger.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Doppelganger.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=AB94D5217896ADCD765A06B2D52F0AEB%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=65F0EA61156EE0C2A35421926F0C7F78%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Hacktool - EDR-Freeze Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c598cc0c-9e70-4852-b9eb-8921af79f598` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_edr_freeze.yml)**

> Detects execution of EDR-Freeze, a tool that exploits the MiniDumpWriteDump function and WerFaultSecure.exe to suspend EDR and Antivirus processes on Windows.
EDR-Freeze leverages a race-condition attack to put security processes into a dormant state by suspending WerFaultSecure at the moment it freezes the target process.
This technique does not require kernel-level exploits or BYOVD, but instead abuses user-mode functionality to temporarily disable monitoring by EDR or Antimalware solutions.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Hacktool - EDR-Freeze Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c598cc0c-9e70-4852-b9eb-8921af79f598
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-09-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_edr_freeze.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\EDR-Freeze%' OR procName LIKE '%\\EDRFreeze%')
    AND procName LIKE '%.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=1195F7935954A2CD09157390C33F8E8C%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=129F58DE3D687FB7F012BF6C3D679997%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=2C617A175D0086251642C6619F7CC8BA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=8828F0B906F7844358FB92A899E9520F%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=AF76D95157EC554DC1EF178E4E66D447%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=E1B04316B61ACA31DD52ABBEC0A37FD5%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=8B2D5B54AFCFEC60D54F6B31D80ED4A0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=AB8BB31EDD91D2A05FE7B62A535E9EB7%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://www.zerosalarium.com/2025/09/EDR-Freeze-Puts-EDRs-Antivirus-Into-Coma.html
- https://github.com/TwoSevenOneT/EDR-Freeze

---

## HackTool - EDRSilencer Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `eb2d07d4-49cb-4523-801a-da002df36602` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562 |
| **Author** | @gott_cyber |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_edrsilencer.yml)**

> Detects the execution of EDRSilencer, a tool that leverages Windows Filtering Platform (WFP) to block Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR) agents from reporting security events to the server based on PE metadata information.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - EDRSilencer Execution
-- Sigma ID:     eb2d07d4-49cb-4523-801a-da002df36602
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562
-- Author:       @gott_cyber
-- Date:         2024-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_edrsilencer.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\EDRSilencer.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'EDRSilencer.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%EDRSilencer%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/netero1010/EDRSilencer

## HackTool - Empire PowerShell Launch Parameters

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `79f4ede3-402e-41c8-bc3e-ebbf5f162581` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_empire_powershell_launch.yml)**

> Detects suspicious powershell command line parameters used in Empire

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Empire PowerShell Launch Parameters
-- Sigma ID:     79f4ede3-402e-41c8-bc3e-ebbf5f162581
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-04-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_empire_powershell_launch.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Other tools that incidentally use the same command line parameters
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoP -sta -NonI -W Hidden -Enc %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noP -sta -w 1 -enc %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoP -NonI -W Hidden -enc %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noP -sta -w 1 -enc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -enc  SQB%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -nop -exec bypass -EncodedCommand %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Other tools that incidentally use the same command line parameters

**References:**
- https://github.com/EmpireProject/Empire/blob/c2ba61ca8d2031dad0cfc1d5770ba723e8b710db/lib/common/helpers.py#L165
- https://github.com/EmpireProject/Empire/blob/e37fb2eef8ff8f5a0a689f1589f424906fe13055/lib/modules/powershell/persistence/powerbreach/deaduser.py#L191
- https://github.com/EmpireProject/Empire/blob/e37fb2eef8ff8f5a0a689f1589f424906fe13055/lib/modules/powershell/persistence/powerbreach/resolver.py#L178
- https://github.com/EmpireProject/Empire/blob/e37fb2eef8ff8f5a0a689f1589f424906fe13055/data/module_source/privesc/Invoke-EventVwrBypass.ps1#L64

## HackTool - WinRM Access Via Evil-WinRM

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a197e378-d31b-41c0-9635-cfdf1c1bb423` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1021.006 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_evil_winrm.yml)**

> Adversaries may use Valid Accounts to log into a computer using the Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP). The adversary may then perform actions as the logged-on user.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - WinRM Access Via Evil-WinRM
-- Sigma ID:     a197e378-d31b-41c0-9635-cfdf1c1bb423
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1021.006
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_evil_winrm.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ruby.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-i %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-u %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-p %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1021.006/T1021.006.md#atomic-test-3---winrm-access-with-evil-winrm
- https://github.com/Hackplayers/evil-winrm

---

## Hacktool Execution - Imphash

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `24e3e58a-646b-4b50-adef-02ef935b9fc8` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1588.002, T1003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_execution_via_imphashes.yml)**

> Detects the execution of different Windows based hacktools via their import hash (imphash) even if the files have been renamed

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Hacktool Execution - Imphash
-- Sigma ID:     24e3e58a-646b-4b50-adef-02ef935b9fc8
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1588.002, T1003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_execution_via_imphashes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of one of these tools
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=BCCA3C247B619DCD13C8CDFF5F123932%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=3A19059BD7688CB88E70005F18EFC439%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=bf6223a49e45d99094406777eb6004ba%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=23867A89C2B8FC733BE6CF5EF902F2D1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=A37FF327F8D48E8A4D2F757E1B6E70BC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=F9A28C458284584A93B14216308D31BD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6118619783FC175BC7EBECFF0769B46E%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=233F85F2D4BC9D6521A6CAAE11A1E7F5%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE ## Hacktool Execution - PE Metadata
```

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `37c1333a-a0db-48be-b64b-7393b2386e3b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1588.002, T1003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_execution_via_pe_metadata.yml)**

> Detects the execution of different Windows based hacktools via PE metadata (company, product, etc.) even if the files have been renamed

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Hacktool Execution - PE Metadata
-- Sigma ID:     37c1333a-a0db-48be-b64b-7393b2386e3b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1588.002, T1003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-04-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_execution_via_pe_metadata.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'Cube0x0')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/cube0x0
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/search/metadata%253ACube0x0/files

---

## HackTool - GMER Rootkit Detector and Remover Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9082ff1f-88ab-4678-a3cc-5bcff99fc74d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_gmer.yml)**

> Detects the execution GMER tool based on image and hash fields.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - GMER Rootkit Detector and Remover Execution
-- Sigma ID:     9082ff1f-88ab-4678-a3cc-5bcff99fc74d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_gmer.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\gmer.exe'
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=E9DC058440D321AA17D0600B3CA0AB04%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=539C228B6B332F5AA523E5CE358C16647D8BBE57%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=E8A3E804A96C716A3E9B69195DB6FFB0D33E2433AF871E4D4E1EAB3097237173%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- http://www.gmer.net/

---

## HackTool - HandleKatz LSASS Dumper Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ca621ba5-54ab-4035-9942-d378e6fcde3c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_handlekatz.yml)**

> Detects the use of HandleKatz, a tool that demonstrates the usage of cloned handles to Lsass in order to create an obfuscated memory dump of the same

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - HandleKatz LSASS Dumper Execution
-- Sigma ID:     ca621ba5-54ab-4035-9942-d378e6fcde3c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_handlekatz.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--pid:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--outfile:%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.obf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dump%')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\loader.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--pid:%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=38D9E015591BBFD4929E0D0F47FA0055%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=0E2216679CA6E1094D63322E3412D650%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/codewhitesec/HandleKatz

---

## HackTool - Hashcat Password Cracker Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `39b31e81-5f5f-4898-9c0e-2160cfc0f9bf` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1110.002 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_hashcat.yml)**

> Execute Hashcat.exe with provided SAM file from registry of Windows and Password list to crack against

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Hashcat Password Cracker Execution
-- Sigma ID:     39b31e81-5f5f-4898-9c0e-2160cfc0f9bf
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1110.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-12-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_hashcat.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Tools that use similar command line flags and values
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-a %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-m 1000 %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-r %')
  OR procName LIKE '%\\hashcat.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Tools that use similar command line flags and values

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1110.002/T1110.002.md#atomic-test-1---password-cracking-with-hashcat
- https://hashcat.net/wiki/doku.php?id=hashcat

## HackTool - HollowReaper Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `85d23b42-9a9d-4f8f-b3d7-d2733c1d58f5` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1055.012 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_hollowreaper.yml)**

> Detects usage of HollowReaper, a process hollowing shellcode launcher used for stealth payload execution through process hollowing.
It replaces the memory of a legitimate process with custom shellcode, allowing the attacker to execute payloads under the guise of trusted binaries.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - HollowReaper Execution
-- Sigma ID:     85d23b42-9a9d-4f8f-b3d7-d2733c1d58f5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1055.012
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-07-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_hollowreaper.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\HollowReaper.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/vari-sh/RedTeamGrimoire/tree/b5e7635d34db6e1f0398d8847e8f293186e947c5/HollowReaper

---

## HackTool - Htran/NATBypass Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f5e3b62f-e577-4e59-931e-0a15b2b94e1e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1090 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_htran_or_natbypass.yml)**

> Detects executable names or flags used by Htran or Htran-like tools (e.g. NATBypass)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Htran/NATBypass Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f5e3b62f-e577-4e59-931e-0a15b2b94e1e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_htran_or_natbypass.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe -tran %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe -slave %'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\htran.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\lcx.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/HiwinCN/HTran
- https://github.com/cw1997/NATBypass

## HackTool - Hydra Password Bruteforce Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `aaafa146-074c-11eb-adc1-0242ac120002` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1110, T1110.001 |
| **Author** | Vasiliy Burov |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_hydra.yml)**

> Detects command line parameters used by Hydra password guessing hack tool

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Hydra Password Bruteforce Execution
-- Sigma ID:     aaafa146-074c-11eb-adc1-0242ac120002
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1110, T1110.001
-- Author:       Vasiliy Burov
-- Date:         2020-10-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_hydra.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Software that uses the caret encased keywords PASS and USER in its command line
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-u %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-p %')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%^USER^%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%^PASS^%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Software that uses the caret encased keywords PASS and USER in its command line

**References:**
- https://github.com/vanhauser-thc/thc-hydra
