## HackTool - Potential Impacket Lateral Movement Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `10c14723-61c7-4c75-92ca-9af245723ad2` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1021.003 |
| **Author** | Ecco, oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, Tim Rauch |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_impacket_lateral_movement.yml)**

> Detects wmiexec/dcomexec/atexec/smbexec from Impacket framework

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Potential Impacket Lateral Movement Activity
-- Sigma ID:     10c14723-61c7-4c75-92ca-9af245723ad2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047, T1021.003
-- Author:       Ecco, oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, Tim Rauch
-- Date:         2019-09-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_impacket_lateral_movement.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%svchost.exe -k netsvcs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%taskeng.exe%'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/C%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Windows\\Temp\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%&1%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wmiprvse.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\mmc.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\services.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Q%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\127.0.0.1\\\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%&1%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/SecureAuthCorp/impacket/blob/8b1a99f7c715702eafe3f24851817bb64721b156/examples/wmiexec.py
- https://github.com/SecureAuthCorp/impacket/blob/8b1a99f7c715702eafe3f24851817bb64721b156/examples/atexec.py
- https://github.com/SecureAuthCorp/impacket/blob/8b1a99f7c715702eafe3f24851817bb64721b156/examples/smbexec.py
- https://github.com/SecureAuthCorp/impacket/blob/8b1a99f7c715702eafe3f24851817bb64721b156/examples/dcomexec.py
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/suspicious-cmd-execution-via-wmi.html

## HackTool - Impacket Tools Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4627c6ae-6899-46e2-aa0c-6ebcb1becd19` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1557.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_impacket_tools.yml)**

> Detects the execution of different compiled Windows binaries of the impacket toolset (based on names or part of their names - could lead to false positives)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Impacket Tools Execution
-- Sigma ID:     4627c6ae-6899-46e2-aa0c-6ebcb1becd19
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, execution | T1557.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_impacket_tools.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of the impacket tools
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\goldenPac%' OR procName LIKE '%\\karmaSMB%' OR procName LIKE '%\\kintercept%' OR procName LIKE '%\\ntlmrelayx%' OR procName LIKE '%\\rpcdump%' OR procName LIKE '%\\samrdump%' OR procName LIKE '%\\secretsdump%' OR procName LIKE '%\\smbexec%' OR procName LIKE '%\\smbrelayx%' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmiexec%' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmipersist%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\atexec\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dcomexec\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dpapi\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\findDelegation\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\GetADUsers\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\GetNPUsers\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\getPac\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\getST\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\getTGT\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\GetUserSPNs\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\ifmap\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mimikatz\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\netview\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\nmapAnswerMachine\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\opdump\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\psexec\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rdp\_check\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sambaPipe\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\smbclient\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\smbserver\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sniff\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sniffer\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\split\_windows.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\ticketer\_windows.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of the impacket tools

**References:**
- https://github.com/ropnop/impacket_static_binaries/releases/tag/0.9.21-dev-binaries

---

## HackTool - Impersonate Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cf0c254b-22f1-4b2b-8221-e137b3c0af94` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1134.001, T1134.003 |
| **Author** | Sai Prashanth Pulisetti @pulisettis |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_impersonate.yml)**

> Detects execution of the Impersonate tool. Which can be used to manipulate tokens on a Windows computers remotely (PsExec/WmiExec) or interactively

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Impersonate Execution
-- Sigma ID:     cf0c254b-22f1-4b2b-8221-e137b3c0af94
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.001, T1134.003
-- Author:       Sai Prashanth Pulisetti @pulisettis
-- Date:         2022-12-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_impersonate.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%impersonate.exe%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% list %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% exec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% adduser %')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=9520714AB576B0ED01D1513691377D01%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=E81CC96E2118DC4FBFE5BAD1604E0AC7681960143E2101E1A024D52264BB0A8A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=0A358FFC1697B7A07D0E817AC740DF62%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://sensepost.com/blog/2022/abusing-windows-tokens-to-compromise-active-directory-without-touching-lsass/
- https://github.com/sensepost/impersonate

## HackTool - Inveigh Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b99a1518-1ad5-4f65-bc95-1ffff97a8fd0` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_inveigh.yml)**

> Detects the use of Inveigh a cross-platform .NET IPv4/IPv6 machine-in-the-middle tool

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Inveigh Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b99a1518-1ad5-4f65-bc95-1ffff97a8fd0
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_inveigh.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Very unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Inveigh.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('\Inveigh.exe', '\Inveigh.dll')))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Inveigh')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -SpooferIP%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ReplyToIPs %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ReplyToDomains %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ReplyToMACs %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -SnifferIP%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Very unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/Kevin-Robertson/Inveigh
- https://thedfirreport.com/2020/11/23/pysa-mespinoza-ransomware/

---

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Invoke-Obfuscation CLIP+ Launcher
-- Sigma ID:     b222df08-0e07-11eb-adc1-0242ac120002
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7

  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0

    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/r%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Invoke-Obfuscation Obfuscated IEX Invocation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4bf943c6-5146-4273-98dd-e958fd1e3abf` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Daniel Bohannon (@Mandiant/@FireEye), oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_invoke_obfuscation_obfuscated_iex_commandline.yml)**

> Detects all variations of obfuscated powershell IEX invocation code generated by Invoke-Obfuscation framework from the following code block

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Invoke-Obfuscation Obfuscated IEX Invocation
-- Sigma ID:     4bf943c6-5146-4273-98dd-e958fd1e3abf
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1027, T1059.001
-- Author:       Daniel Bohannon (@Mandiant/@FireEye), oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-11-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_invoke_obfuscation_obfuscated_iex_commandline.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\$PSHome\[\s*\d{1,3}\s*\]\s*\+\s*\$PSHome\[')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\$ShellId\[\s*\d{1,3}\s*\]\s*\+\s*\$ShellId\[')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\$env:Public\[\s*\d{1,3}\s*\]\s*\+\s*\$env:Public\[')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\$env:ComSpec\[(\s*\d{1,3}\s*,){2}')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\*mdr\*\W\s*\)\.Name')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\$VerbosePreference\.ToString\(')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\[String\]\s*\$VerbosePreference')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/danielbohannon/Invoke-Obfuscation/blob/f20e7f843edd0a3a7716736e9eddfa423395dd26/Out-ObfuscatedStringCommand.ps1#L873-L888

## HackTool - Jlaive In-Memory Assembly Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0a99eb3e-1617-41bd-b095-13dc767f3def` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.003 |
| **Author** | Jose Luis Sanchez Martinez (@Joseliyo_Jstnk) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_jlaive_batch_execution.yml)**

> Detects the use of Jlaive to execute assemblies in a copied PowerShell

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Jlaive In-Memory Assembly Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0a99eb3e-1617-41bd-b095-13dc767f3def
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003
-- Author:       Jose Luis Sanchez Martinez (@Joseliyo_Jstnk)
-- Date:         2022-05-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_jlaive_batch_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.bat'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://jstnk9.github.io/jstnk9/research/Jlaive-Antivirus-Evasion-Tool
- https://web.archive.org/web/20220514073704/https://github.com/ch2sh/Jlaive

## HackTool - Koadic Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5cddf373-ef00-4112-ad72-960ac29bac34` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.003, T1059.005, T1059.007 |
| **Author** | wagga, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_koadic.yml)**

> Detects command line parameters used by Koadic hack tool

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Koadic Execution
-- Sigma ID:     5cddf373-ef00-4112-ad72-960ac29bac34
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003, T1059.005, T1059.007
-- Author:       wagga, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-01-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_koadic.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/q%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%chcp%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Cmd.Exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/unit42-sofacy-groups-parallel-attacks/
- https://github.com/offsecginger/koadic/blob/457f9a3ff394c989cdb4c599ab90eb34fb2c762c/data/stager/js/stdlib.js
- https://blog.f-secure.com/hunting-for-koadic-a-com-based-rootkit/

## HackTool - KrbRelay Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e96253b8-6b3b-4f90-9e59-3b24b99cf9b4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1558.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_krbrelay.yml)**

> Detects the use of KrbRelay, a Kerberos relaying tool

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - KrbRelay Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e96253b8-6b3b-4f90-9e59-3b24b99cf9b4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1558.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-04-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_krbrelay.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -spn %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -clsid %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -rbcd %')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%shadowcred%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%clsid%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spn%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spn %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%session %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%clsid %')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\KrbRelay.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'KrbRelay.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/cube0x0/KrbRelay

---

## HackTool - RemoteKrbRelay Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a7664b14-75fb-4a50-a223-cb9bc0afbacf` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1558.003 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_krbrelay_remote.yml)**

> Detects the use of RemoteKrbRelay, a Kerberos relaying tool via CommandLine flags and PE metadata.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - RemoteKrbRelay Execution
-- Sigma ID:     a7664b14-75fb-4a50-a223-cb9bc0afbacf
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1558.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-06-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_krbrelay_remote.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\RemoteKrbRelay.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RemoteKrbRelay.exe'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -clsid %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -target %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -victim %')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-rbcd %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-cn %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--computername %')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-chp %')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-chpPass %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-chpUser %'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-addgroupmember %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-group %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-groupuser %')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-smb %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--smbkeyword %')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%interactive%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%secrets%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%service-add%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/CICADA8-Research/RemoteKrbRelay

---

## HackTool - KrbRelayUp Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `12827a56-61a4-476a-a9cb-f3068f191073` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1558.003, T1550.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_krbrelayup.yml)**

> Detects KrbRelayUp used to perform a universal no-fix local privilege escalation in Windows domain environments where LDAP signing is not enforced

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - KrbRelayUp Execution
-- Sigma ID:     12827a56-61a4-476a-a9cb-f3068f191073
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1558.003, T1550.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-04-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_krbrelayup.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% relay %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Domain %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ComputerName %')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% krbscm %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -sc %')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% spawn %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -d %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -cn %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -cp %')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\KrbRelayUp.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'KrbRelayUp.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/Dec0ne/KrbRelayUp

## HackTool - LaZagne Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c2b86e67-b880-4eec-b045-50bc98ef4844` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_lazagne.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the LaZagne. A utility used to retrieve multiple types of passwords stored on a local computer.
LaZagne has been leveraged multiple times by threat actors in order to dump credentials.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - LaZagne Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c2b86e67-b880-4eec-b045-50bc98ef4844
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-06-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_lazagne.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some false positive is expected from tools with similar command line flags.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%:\\PerfLogs\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\ProgramData\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Tmp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\$Recycle.bin%' OR procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Favorites\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Links\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Music\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Photos\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Pictures\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Saved Games\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Searches\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Contacts\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Default\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Searches\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Videos\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\addins\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\Fonts\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\IME\\%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe all' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe browsers' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe chats' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe databases' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe games' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe git' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe mails' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe maven' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe memory' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe multimedia' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe sysadmin' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe unused' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe wifi' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe windows')))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\lazagne.exe'
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% all %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% browsers %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% chats %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% databases %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% games %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% mails %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% maven %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% memory %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% multimedia %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% php %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% svn %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% sysadmin %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% unused %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% wifi %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-1Password%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-apachedirectorystudio%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-autologon%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ChromiumBased%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-coreftp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-credfiles%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-credman%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-cyberduck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-dbvis%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-EyeCon%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-filezilla%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-filezillaserver%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ftpnavigator%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-galconfusion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-gitforwindows%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-hashdump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-iisapppool%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-IISCentralCertP%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-kalypsomedia%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-keepass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-keepassconfig%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-lsa\_secrets%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-mavenrepositories%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-memory\_dump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Mozilla%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-mRemoteNG%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-mscache%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-opensshforwindows%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-openvpn%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-outlook%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-pidgin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-postgresql%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-psi-im%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-puttycm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-pypykatz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Rclone%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-rdpmanager%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-robomongo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-roguestale%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-skype%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-SQLDeveloper%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-squirrel%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-tortoise%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-turba%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-UCBrowser%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-unattended%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-vault%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-vaultfiles%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-vnc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-winscp%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some false positive is expected from tools with similar command line flags.

**References:**
- https://github.com/AlessandroZ/LaZagne/tree/master
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/05/09/seo-poisoning-a-gootloader-story/
- https://cloud.google.com/blog/topics/threat-intelligence/alphv-ransomware-backup/
- https://securelist.com/defttorero-tactics-techniques-and-procedures/107610/
- https://github.com/CyberMonitor/APT_CyberCriminal_Campagin_Collections/raw/800c0e06571993a54e39571cf27fd474dcc5c0bc/2017/2017.11.14.Muddying_the_Water/muddying-the-water-targeted-attacks.pdf

## HackTool - LocalPotato Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6bd75993-9888-4f91-9404-e1e4e4e34b77` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_localpotato.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the LocalPotato POC based on basic PE metadata information and default CLI examples

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - LocalPotato Execution
-- Sigma ID:     6bd75993-9888-4f91-9404-e1e4e4e34b77
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_localpotato.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe -i C:\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-o Windows\\%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=E1742EE971D6549E8D4D81115F88F1FC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=DD82066EFBA94D7556EF582F247C8BB5%'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\LocalPotato.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://www.localpotato.com/localpotato_html/LocalPotato.html
- https://github.com/decoder-it/LocalPotato

---

## Potential Meterpreter/CobaltStrike Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `15619216-e993-4721-b590-4c520615a67d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1134.001, T1134.002 |
| **Author** | Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Ecco, Florian Roth |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_meterpreter_getsystem.yml)**

> Detects the use of getsystem Meterpreter/Cobalt Strike command by detecting a specific service starting

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Meterpreter/CobaltStrike Activity
-- Sigma ID:     15619216-e993-4721-b590-4c520615a67d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.001, T1134.002
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Ecco, Florian Roth
-- Date:         2019-10-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_meterpreter_getsystem.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Commandlines containing components like cmd accidentally; Jobs and services started with cmd
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\services.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Commandlines containing components like cmd accidentally; Jobs and services started with cmd

**References:**
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-privilege-escalation-in-windows-environment
- https://blog.cobaltstrike.com/2014/04/02/what-happens-when-i-type-getsystem/

## HackTool - Mimikatz Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a642964e-bead-4bed-8910-1bb4d63e3b4d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.001, T1003.002, T1003.004, T1003.005, T1003.006 |
| **Author** | Teymur Kheirkhabarov, oscd.community, David ANDRE (additional keywords), Tim Shelton |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_mimikatz_command_line.yml)**

> Detection well-known mimikatz command line arguments

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Mimikatz Execution
-- Sigma ID:     a642964e-bead-4bed-8910-1bb4d63e3b4d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001, T1003.002, T1003.004, T1003.005, T1003.006
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov, oscd.community, David ANDRE (additional keywords), Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2019-10-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_mimikatz_command_line.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::aadcookie%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::detours%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::memssp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::mflt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::ncroutemon%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::ngcsign%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::printnightmare%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::skeleton%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::preshutdown%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::mstsc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::multirdp%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rpc::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%token::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%crypto::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dpapi::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sekurlsa::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kerberos::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsadump::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privilege::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%process::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%vault::%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DumpCreds%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mimikatz%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://www.slideshare.net/heirhabarov/hunting-for-credentials-dumping-in-windows-environment
- https://tools.thehacker.recipes/mimikatz/modules

## HackTool - PCHunter Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `fca949cc-79ca-446e-8064-01aa7e52ece5` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1082, T1057, T1012, T1083, T1007 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_pchunter.yml)**

> Detects suspicious use of PCHunter, a tool like Process Hacker to view and manipulate processes, kernel options and other low level stuff

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - PCHunter Execution
-- Sigma ID:     fca949cc-79ca-446e-8064-01aa7e52ece5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, discovery | T1082, T1057, T1012, T1083, T1007
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2022-10-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_pchunter.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=5F1CBC3D99558307BC1250D084FA968521482025%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=987B65CD9B9F4E9A1AFD8F8B48CF64A7%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=2B214BDDAAB130C274DE6204AF6DBA5AEEC7433DA99AA950022FA306421A6D32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=444D210CEA1FF8112F256A4997EED7FF%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=3FB89787CB97D902780DA080545584D97FB1C2EB%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=228DD0C2E6287547E26FFBD973A40F14%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=55F041BF4E78E9BFA6D4EE68BE40E496CE3A1353E1CA4306598589E19802522C%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=0479F44DF47CFA2EF1CCC4416A538663%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\PCHunter64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PCHunter32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PCHunter.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Epoolsoft Windows Information View Tools')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://web.archive.org/web/20231210115125/http://www.xuetr.com/
- https://www.crowdstrike.com/blog/falcon-overwatch-report-finds-increase-in-ecrime/
- https://www.hexacorn.com/blog/2018/04/20/kernel-hacking-tool-you-might-have-never-heard-of-xuetr-pchunter/

## HackTool - Default PowerSploit/Empire Scheduled Task Creation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `56c217c3-2de2-479b-990f-5c109ba8458f` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1053.005, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Markus Neis, @Karneades |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_powersploit_empire_default_schtasks.yml)**

> Detects the creation of a schtask via PowerSploit or Empire Default Configuration.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Default PowerSploit/Empire Scheduled Task Creation
-- Sigma ID:     56c217c3-2de2-479b-990f-5c109ba8458f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005, T1059.001
-- Author:       Markus Neis, @Karneades
-- Date:         2018-03-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_powersploit_empire_default_schtasks.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
    AND procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Create%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell.exe -NonI%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/TN Updater /TR%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/SC ONLOGON%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/SC DAILY /ST%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/SC ONIDLE%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/SC HOURLY%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/0xdeadbeefJERKY/PowerSploit/blob/8690399ef70d2cad10213575ac67e8fa90ddf7c3/Persistence/Persistence.psm1
- https://github.com/EmpireProject/Empire/blob/08cbd274bef78243d7a8ed6443b8364acd1fc48b/lib/modules/powershell/persistence/userland/schtasks.py

## HackTool - PowerTool Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a34f79a3-8e5f-4cc3-b765-de00695452c2` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_powertool.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the tool PowerTool which has the ability to kill a process, delete its process file, unload drivers, and delete the driver files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - PowerTool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     a34f79a3-8e5f-4cc3-b765-de00695452c2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-11-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_powertool.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\PowerTool.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PowerTool64.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PowerTool.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - PurpleSharp Execution
-- Sigma ID:     ff23ffbc-3378-435e-992f-0624dcf93ab4
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1587
```

## HackTool - Pypykatz Credentials Dumping Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a29808fd-ef50-49ff-9c7a-59a9b040b404` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.002 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_pypykatz.yml)**

> Detects the usage of "pypykatz" to obtain stored credentials. Adversaries may attempt to extract credential material from the Security Account Manager (SAM) database through Windows registry where the SAM database is stored

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Pypykatz Credentials Dumping Activity
-- Sigma ID:     a29808fd-ef50-49ff-9c7a-59a9b040b404
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_pypykatz.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\pypykatz.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\python.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%live%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%registry%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/skelsec/pypykatz
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1003.002/T1003.002.md#atomic-test-2---registry-parse-with-pypykatz

## HackTool - Quarks PwDump Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0685b176-c816-4837-8e7b-1216f346636b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.002 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_quarks_pwdump.yml)**

> Detects usage of the Quarks PwDump tool via commandline arguments

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Quarks PwDump Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0685b176-c816-4837-8e7b-1216f346636b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.002
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_quarks_pwdump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] IN (' -dhl', ' --dump-hash-local', ' -dhdc', ' --dump-hash-domain-cached', ' --dump-bitlocker', ' -dhd ', ' --dump-hash-domain ', '--ntds-file'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\QuarksPwDump.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

## HackTool - RedMimicry Winnti Playbook Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `95022b85-ff2a-49fa-939a-d7b8f56eeb9b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1106, T1059.003, T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Alexander Rausch |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_redmimicry_winnti_playbook.yml)**

> Detects actions caused by the RedMimicry Winnti playbook a automated breach emulations utility

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - RedMimicry Winnti Playbook Execution
-- Sigma ID:     95022b85-ff2a-49fa-939a-d7b8f56eeb9b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1106, T1059.003, T1218.011
-- Author:       Alexander Rausch
-- Date:         2020-06-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_redmimicry_winnti_playbook.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gthread-3.6.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp\\tmp.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sigcmm-2.4.dll%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5589ab4f-a767-433c-961d-c91f3f704db1` |

| **FSM Severity** | 9 |

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_relay_attacks_tools.yml)**

> Detects different hacktools used for relay attacks on Windows for privilege escalation

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential SMB Relay Attack Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     5589ab4f-a767-433c-961d-c91f3f704db1
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, execution | T1557.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_relay_attacks_tools.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate files with these rare hacktool names
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## HackTool - Rubeus Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7ec2c172-dceb-4c10-92c9-87c1881b7e18` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003, T1558.003, T1550.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_rubeus.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the hacktool Rubeus via PE information of command line parameters

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Rubeus Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7ec2c172-dceb-4c10-92c9-87c1881b7e18
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        T1003, T1558.003, T1550.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2018-12-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_rubeus.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Rubeus.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Rubeus.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Rubeus')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%asreproast %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dump /service:krbtgt %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dump /luid:0x%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kerberoast %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%createnetonly /program:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ptt /ticket:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/impersonateuser:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%renew /ticket:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%asktgt /user:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%harvest /interval:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%s4u /user:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%s4u /ticket:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hash /password:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%golden /aes256:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%silver /user:%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://blog.harmj0y.net/redteaming/from-kekeo-to-rubeus
- https://m0chan.github.io/2019/07/31/How-To-Attack-Kerberos-101.html
- https://github.com/GhostPack/Rubeus

> Detects the execution of the hacktool SafetyKatz via PE information and default Image name

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SafetyKatz Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b1876533-4ed5-4a83-90f3-b8645840a413
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-20

-- Unmapped:     Description

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SafetyKatz.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SafetyKatz.exe'))
```

## HackTool - SecurityXploded Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7679d464-4f74-45e2-9e01-ac66c5eb041a` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1555 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_secutyxploded.yml)**

> Detects the execution of SecurityXploded Tools

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SecurityXploded Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7679d464-4f74-45e2-9e01-ac66c5eb041a
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        T1555
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2018-12-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_secutyxploded.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'SecurityXploded'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%PasswordDump.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%PasswordDump.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**

## HackTool - PPID Spoofing SelectMyParent Tool Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `52ff7941-8211-46f9-84f8-9903efb7077d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1134.004 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_selectmyparent.yml)**

> Detects the use of parent process ID spoofing tools like Didier Stevens tool SelectMyParent

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - PPID Spoofing SelectMyParent Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     52ff7941-8211-46f9-84f8-9903efb7077d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.004
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_selectmyparent.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SelectMyParent.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PPID-spoof%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ppid\_spoof%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spoof-ppid%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spoof\_ppid%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ppidspoof%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spoofppid%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spoofedppid%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -spawnto %')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%PPID-spoof%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%ppid\_spoof%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%spoof-ppid%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%spoof\_ppid%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%ppidspoof%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%spoofppid%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%spoofedppid%')))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'SelectMyParent')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=04D974875BD225F00902B4CAD9AF3FBC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=A782AF154C9E743DDF3F3EB2B8F3D16E%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=89059503D7FBF470E68F7E63313DA3AD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=CA28337632625C8281AB8A130B3D6BAD%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://pentestlab.blog/2020/02/24/parent-pid-spoofing/
- https://www.picussecurity.com/resource/blog/how-to-detect-parent-pid-ppid-spoofing-attacks
- https://www.ired.team/offensive-security/defense-evasion/parent-process-id-ppid-spoofing
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/search/filename%253A*spoof*%2520filename%253A*ppid*/files

## HackTool - SharpDPAPI Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c7d33b50-f690-4b51-8cfb-0fb912a31e57` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1134.001, T1134.003 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharp_dpapi_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the SharpDPAPI tool based on CommandLine flags and PE metadata.
SharpDPAPI is a C# port of some DPAPI functionality from the Mimikatz project.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpDPAPI Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c7d33b50-f690-4b51-8cfb-0fb912a31e57
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.001, T1134.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-06-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharp_dpapi_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SharpDPAPI.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpDPAPI.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% backupkey %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% blob %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% certificates %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% credentials %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% keepass %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% masterkeys %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% rdg %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% vaults %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/GhostPack/SharpDPAPI

## HackTool - SharpImpersonation Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f89b08d0-77ad-4728-817b-9b16c5a69c7a` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1134.001, T1134.003 |
| **Author** | Sai Prashanth Pulisetti @pulisettis, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharp_impersonation.yml)**

> Detects execution of the SharpImpersonation tool. Which can be used to manipulate tokens on a Windows computers remotely (PsExec/WmiExec) or interactively

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpImpersonation Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f89b08d0-77ad-4728-817b-9b16c5a69c7a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.001, T1134.003
-- Author:       Sai Prashanth Pulisetti @pulisettis, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharp_impersonation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% user:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% binary:%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% user:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% shellcode:%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% technique:CreateProcessAsUserW%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% technique:ImpersonateLoggedOnuser%')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\SharpImpersonation.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpImpersonation.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://s3cur3th1ssh1t.github.io/SharpImpersonation-Introduction/

|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9f8fc146-1d1a-4dbf-b8fd-dfae15e08541` |

| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
