> Detects execution of the SharpLDAPmonitor. Which can monitor the creation, deletion and changes to LDAP objects.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpLDAPmonitor Execution
-- Sigma ID:     9f8fc146-1d1a-4dbf-b8fd-dfae15e08541
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/user:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/pass:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/dcip:%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\SharpLDAPmonitor.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpLDAPmonitor.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## HackTool - SharPersist Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `26488ad0-f9fd-4536-876f-52fea846a2e4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1053 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpersist.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the hacktool SharPersist - used to deploy various different kinds of persistence mechanisms

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharPersist Execution
-- Sigma ID:     26488ad0-f9fd-4536-876f-52fea846a2e4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpersist.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t schtask -c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t startupfolder -c %'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t reg -c %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m add%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t service -c %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m add%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -t schtask -c %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m add%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\SharPersist.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'SharPersist'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/sharpersist-windows-persistence-toolkit
- https://github.com/mandiant/SharPersist

```sql
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SharpEvtMute.exe')
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'SharpEvtMute')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--Filter "rule %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--Encoded --Filter \\"%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/bats3c/EvtMute

## HackTool - SharpLdapWhoami Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d9367cbb-c2e0-47ce-bdc0-128cb6da898d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1033 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpldapwhoami.yml)**

> Detects SharpLdapWhoami, a whoami alternative that queries the LDAP service on a domain controller

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpLdapWhoami Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d9367cbb-c2e0-47ce-bdc0-128cb6da898d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1033
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpldapwhoami.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Programs that use the same command line flags
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /method:ntlm' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /method:kerb' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /method:nego' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /m:nego' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /m:ntlm' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /m:kerb'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\SharpLdapWhoami.exe'
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%SharpLdapWhoami%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'SharpLdapWhoami'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Programs that use the same command line flags

**References:**
- https://github.com/bugch3ck/SharpLdapWhoami

## HackTool - SharpMove Tool Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `055fb54c-a8f4-4aee-bd44-f74cf30a0d9d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1021.002 |
| **Author** | Luca Di Bartolomeo (CrimpSec) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpmove.yml)**

> Detects the execution of SharpMove, a .NET utility performing multiple tasks such as "Task Creation", "SCM" query, VBScript execution using WMI via its PE metadata and command line options.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpMove Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     055fb54c-a8f4-4aee-bd44-f74cf30a0d9d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1021.002
-- Author:       Luca Di Bartolomeo (CrimpSec)
-- Date:         2024-01-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpmove.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SharpMove.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpMove.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=create%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=dcom%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=executevbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=hijackdcom%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=modschtask%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=modsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=query%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=scm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=startservice%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%action=taskscheduler%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%computername=%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/0xthirteen/SharpMove/
- https://pentestlab.blog/tag/sharpmove/

## HKTL - SharpSuccessor Privilege Escalation Tool Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `38a1ac5f-9c74-47d2-a345-dd6f5eb4e7c8` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1068 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpsuccessor_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of SharpSuccessor, a tool used to exploit the BadSuccessor attack for privilege escalation in WinServer 2025 Active Directory environments.
Successful usage of this tool can let the attackers gain the domain admin privileges by exploiting the BadSuccessor vulnerability.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HKTL - SharpSuccessor Privilege Escalation Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     38a1ac5f-9c74-47d2-a345-dd6f5eb4e7c8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1068
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-06-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpsuccessor_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SharpSuccessor.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SharpSuccessor.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SharpSuccessor%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% add %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /impersonate%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /path%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /account%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /name%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/logangoins/SharpSuccessor

```sql
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
```

## HackTool - SharpWSUS/WSUSpendu Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b0ce780f-10bd-496d-9067-066d23dc3aa5` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1210 |
| **Author** | @Kostastsale, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpwsus_wsuspendu_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of SharpWSUS or WSUSpendu, utilities that allow for lateral movement through WSUS.
Windows Server Update Services (WSUS) is a critical component of Windows systems and is frequently configured in a way that allows an attacker to circumvent internal networking limitations.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SharpWSUS/WSUSpendu Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b0ce780f-10bd-496d-9067-066d23dc3aa5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1210
-- Author:       @Kostastsale, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sharpwsus_wsuspendu_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Inject %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -PayloadArgs %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -PayloadFile %')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% approve %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% create %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% check %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% delete %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /payload:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /payload=%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /updateid:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /updateid=%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://labs.nettitude.com/blog/introducing-sharpwsus/
- https://github.com/nettitude/SharpWSUS
- https://web.archive.org/web/20210512154016/https://github.com/AlsidOfficial/WSUSpendu/blob/master/WSUSpendu.ps1

---

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `03552375-cc2c-4883-bbe4-7958d5a980be` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |

> Detects SILENTTRINITY stager use via PE metadata

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SILENTTRINITY Stager Execution
-- Sigma ID:     03552375-cc2c-4883-bbe4-7958d5a980be
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1071
-- Author:       Aleksey Potapov, oscd.community

  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
```

## HackTool - Sliver C2 Implant Activity Pattern

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `42333b2c-b425-441c-b70e-99404a17170f` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sliver_c2_execution_pattern.yml)**

> Detects process activity patterns as seen being used by Sliver C2 framework implants

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Sliver C2 Implant Activity Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     42333b2c-b425-441c-b70e-99404a17170f
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_sliver_c2_execution_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-NoExit -Command [Console]::OutputEncoding=[Text.UTF8Encoding]::UTF8%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/BishopFox/sliver/blob/79f2d48fcdfc2bee4713b78d431ea4b27f733f30/implant/sliver/shell/shell_windows.go#L36
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/08/24/looking-for-the-sliver-lining-hunting-for-emerging-command-and-control-frameworks/

## HackTool - SOAPHound Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e92a4287-e072-4a40-9739-370c106bb750` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1087 |
| **Author** | @kostastsale |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_soaphound_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of SOAPHound, a .NET tool for collecting Active Directory data, using specific command-line arguments that may indicate an attempt to extract sensitive AD information.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - SOAPHound Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e92a4287-e072-4a40-9739-370c106bb750
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1087
-- Author:       @kostastsale
-- Date:         2024-01-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_soaphound_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --buildcache %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --bhdump %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --certdump %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --dnsdump %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --cachefilename %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -o %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --outputdirectory%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/FalconForceTeam/SOAPHound
- https://medium.com/falconforce/soaphound-tool-to-collect-active-directory-data-via-adws-165aca78288c

## HackTool - Stracciatella Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7a4d9232-92fc-404d-8ce1-4c92e7caf539` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059, T1562.001 |
| **Author** | pH-T (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_stracciatella_execution.yml)**

> Detects Stracciatella which executes a Powershell runspace from within C# (aka SharpPick technique) with AMSI, ETW and Script Block Logging disabled based on PE metadata characteristics.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Stracciatella Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7a4d9232-92fc-404d-8ce1-4c92e7caf539
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059, T1562.001
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-04-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_stracciatella_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Stracciatella.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Stracciatella.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Stracciatella')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=9d25e61ec1527e2a69d7c2a4e3fe2fe15890710c198a66a9f25d99fdf6c7b956%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=fd16609bd9830c63b9413671678bb159b89c357d21942ddbb6b93add808d121a%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/mgeeky/Stracciatella

---

## HackTool - UACMe Akagi Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d38d2fa4-98e6-4a24-aff1-410b0c9ad177` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_uacme.yml)**

> Detects the execution of UACMe, a tool used for UAC bypasses, via default PE metadata

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - UACMe Akagi Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d38d2fa4-98e6-4a24-aff1-410b0c9ad177
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_uacme.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=767637C23BB42CD5D7397CF58B0BE688%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=14C4E4C72BA075E9069EE67F39188AD8%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=3C782813D4AFCE07BBFC5A9772ACDBDC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=7D010C6BB6A3726F327F7E239166D127%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=89159BA4DD04E4CE5559F132A9964EB3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6F33F4A5FC42B8CEC7314947BD13F30F%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=5834ED4291BDEB928270428EBBAF7604%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=5A8A8A43F25485E7EE1B201EDCBC7A38%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=DC7D30B90B2D8ABF664FBED2B1B59894%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=41923EA1F824FE63EA5BEB84DB7A3E74%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=3DE09703C8E79ED2CA3F01074719906B%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\Akagi64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\Akagi.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'UACMe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] IN ('REvol Corp', 'APT 92', 'UG North', 'Hazardous Environments', 'CD Project Rekt')))
  OR (rawEventMsg IN ('UACMe main module', 'Pentesting utility'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Akagi.exe', 'Akagi64.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME

## HackTool - Windows Credential Editor (WCE) Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7aa7009a-28b9-4344-8c1f-159489a390df` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_wce.yml)**

> Detects the use of Windows Credential Editor (WCE), a popular post-exploitation tool used to extract plaintext passwords, hash, PIN code and Kerberos tickets from memory.
It is often used by threat actors for credential dumping and lateral movement within compromised networks.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Windows Credential Editor (WCE) Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7aa7009a-28b9-4344-8c1f-159489a390df
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-12-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_wce.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=136F0A8572C058A96436C82E541E4C41%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=589657C64DDE88533186C39F82FA1F50%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6BFE09EFCB4FFDE061EBDBAFC4DB84CF%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=7D490037BF450877E6D0287BDCFF8D2E%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=8AB93B061287C79F3088C5BC7E7D97ED%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=A53A02B997935FD8EEDCB5F7ABAB9B9F%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=BA434A7A729EEC20E136CA4C32D6C740%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=BD1D1547DA13C0FCB6C15E86217D5EB8%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=E96A73C7BF33A464C510EDE582318BF2%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\WCE.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\WCE64.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.ampliasecurity.com/research/windows-credentials-editor/

## HackTool - winPEAS Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `98b53e78-ebaf-46f8-be06-421aafd176d9` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1082, T1087, T1046 |
| **Author** | Georg Lauenstein (sure[secure]) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_winpeas.yml)**

> WinPEAS is a script that search for possible paths to escalate privileges on Windows hosts. The checks are explained on book.hacktricks.xyz

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - winPEAS Execution
-- Sigma ID:     98b53e78-ebaf-46f8-be06-421aafd176d9
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1082, T1087, T1046
-- Author:       Georg Lauenstein (sure[secure])
-- Date:         2022-09-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_winpeas.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://github.com/carlospolop/PEASS-ng/releases/latest/download/%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% applicationsinfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% browserinfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% eventsinfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% fileanalysis%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% filesinfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% processinfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% servicesinfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% windowscreds%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% -linpeas'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -linpeas'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'winPEAS.exe'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\winPEASany\_ofs.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\winPEASany.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\winPEASx64\_ofs.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\winPEASx64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\winPEASx86\_ofs.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\winPEASx86.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/carlospolop/PEASS-ng
- https://book.hacktricks.xyz/windows-hardening/windows-local-privilege-escalation

---

## HackTool - WinPwn Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d557dc06-62e8-4468-a8e8-7984124908ce` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1046, T1082, T1106, T1518, T1548.002, T1552.001, T1555, T1555.003 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_winpwn.yml)**

> Detects commandline keywords indicative of potential usge of the tool WinPwn. A tool for Windows and Active Directory reconnaissance and exploitation.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - WinPwn Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d557dc06-62e8-4468-a8e8-7984124908ce
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, execution | T1046, T1082, T1106, T1518, T1548.002, T1552.001, T1555, T1555.003
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2023-12-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_winpwn.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Offline\_Winpwn%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WinPwn %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WinPwn.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WinPwn.ps1%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/S3cur3Th1sSh1t/WinPwn
- https://www.publicnow.com/view/EB87DB49C654D9B63995FAD4C9DE3D3CC4F6C3ED?1671634841
- https://reconshell.com/winpwn-tool-for-internal-windows-pentesting-and-ad-security/
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/4d6c4e8e23d465af7a2388620cfe3f8c76e16cf0/atomics/T1082/T1082.md
- https://grep.app/search?q=winpwn&filter[repo][0]=redcanaryco/atomic-red-team

## HackTool - Wmiexec Default Powershell Command

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `022eaba8-f0bf-4dd9-9217-4604b0bb3bb0` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_wmiexec_default_powershell.yml)**

> Detects the execution of PowerShell with a specific flag sequence that is used by the Wmiexec script

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - Wmiexec Default Powershell Command
-- Sigma ID:     022eaba8-f0bf-4dd9-9217-4604b0bb3bb0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-03-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_wmiexec_default_powershell.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-NoP -NoL -sta -NonI -W Hidden -Exec Bypass -Enc%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**

## HackTool - WSASS Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `589ac73f-8e12-409c-964e-31a2f5775ae2` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_wsass.yml)**

> Detects execution of WSASS, a tool used to dump LSASS memory on Windows systems by leveraging WER's
(Windows Error Reporting) WerFaultSecure.EXE to bypass PPL (Protected Process Light) protections.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - WSASS Execution
-- Sigma ID:     589ac73f-8e12-409c-964e-31a2f5775ae2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_wsass.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '(?i)\.exe[\"\']?\s+.{12,64}[\"\']?\s+\d{2,10}'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%werfaultsecure%'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=32F5095C9BBDCACF28FD4060EB4DFC42%')
  OR procName LIKE '%\\wsass.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/TwoSevenOneT/WSASS
- https://www.zerosalarium.com/2025/09/Dumping-LSASS-With-WER-On-Modern-Windows-11.html

---

## HackTool - XORDump Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `66e563f9-1cbd-4a22-a957-d8b7c0f44372` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036, T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_xordump.yml)**

> Detects suspicious use of XORDump process memory dumping utility

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        HackTool - XORDump Execution
-- Sigma ID:     66e563f9-1cbd-4a22-a957-d8b7c0f44372
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_xordump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Another tool that uses the command line switches of XORdump
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\xordump.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -process lsass.exe %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m comsvcs %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m dbghelp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m dbgcore %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Another tool that uses the command line switches of XORdump

**References:**
- https://github.com/audibleblink/xordump

## Suspicious ZipExec Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `90dcf730-1b71-4ae7-9ffc-6fcf62bd0132` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218, T1202 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_zipexec.yml)**

> ZipExec is a Proof-of-Concept (POC) tool to wrap binary-based tools into a password-protected zip file.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious ZipExec Execution
-- Sigma ID:     90dcf730-1b71-4ae7-9ffc-6fcf62bd0132
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218, T1202
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-11-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hktl_zipexec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/generic:Microsoft\_Windows\_Shell\_ZipFolder:filename=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.zip%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/pass:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/user:%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/delete%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Microsoft\_Windows\_Shell\_ZipFolder:filename=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.zip%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/SBousseaden/status/1451237393017839616
- https://github.com/Tylous/ZipExec

## Hypervisor-protected Code Integrity (HVCI) Related Registry Tampering Via CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6225c53a-a96e-4235-b28f-8d7997cd96eb` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hvci_registry_tampering.yml)**

> Detects the tampering of Hypervisor-protected Code Integrity (HVCI) related registry values via command line tool reg.exe.
HVCI uses virtualization-based security to protect code integrity by ensuring that only trusted code can run in kernel mode.
Adversaries may tamper with HVCI to load malicious or unsigned drivers, which can be used to escalate privileges, maintain persistence, or evade security mechanisms.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Hypervisor-protected Code Integrity (HVCI) Related Registry Tampering Via CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     6225c53a-a96e-4235-b28f-8d7997cd96eb
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2026-01-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hvci_registry_tampering.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate system administration tasks that require disabling HVCI for troubleshooting purposes when certain drivers or applications are incompatible with it.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-ItemProperty %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ItemProperty %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%si %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\DeviceGuard%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EnableVirtualizationBasedSecurity%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HypervisorEnforcedCodeIntegrity%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'reg.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate system administration tasks that require disabling HVCI for troubleshooting purposes when certain drivers or applications are incompatible with it.

**References:**
- https://www.sophos.com/en-us/blog/sharpening-the-knife-gold-blades-strategic-evolution
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/security/hardware-security/enable-virtualization-based-protection-of-code-integrity

---

## Suspicious HWP Sub Processes

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `023394c4-29d5-46ab-92b8-6a534c6f447b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1566.001, T1203, T1059.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hwp_exploits.yml)**

> Detects suspicious Hangul Word Processor (Hanword) sub processes that could indicate an exploitation

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious HWP Sub Processes
-- Sigma ID:     023394c4-29d5-46ab-92b8-6a534c6f447b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1566.001, T1203, T1059.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hwp_exploits.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Hwp.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\gbb.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.securitynewspaper.com/2016/11/23/technical-teardown-exploit-malware-hwp-files/

## Potential Fake Instance Of Hxtsr.EXE Executed

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4e762605-34a8-406d-b72e-c1a089313320` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036 |
| **Author** | Sreeman |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hxtsr_masquerading.yml)**

> HxTsr.exe is a Microsoft compressed executable file called Microsoft Outlook Communications.
HxTsr.exe is part of Outlook apps, because it resides in a hidden "WindowsApps" subfolder of "C:\Program Files".
Any instances of hxtsr.exe not in this folder may be malware camouflaging itself as HxTsr.exe


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Fake Instance Of Hxtsr.EXE Executed
-- Sigma ID:     4e762605-34a8-406d-b72e-c1a089313320
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-04-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_hxtsr_masquerading.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\hxtsr.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- Internal Research

## Use Icacls to Hide File to Everyone

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4ae81040-fc1c-4249-bfa3-938d260214d9` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.001 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_icacls_deny.yml)**

> Detect use of icacls to deny access for everyone in Users folder sometimes used to hide malicious files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use Icacls to Hide File to Everyone
-- Sigma ID:     4ae81040-fc1c-4249-bfa3-938d260214d9
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-07-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_icacls_deny.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/deny%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%*S-1-1-0:%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'iCACLS.EXE'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\icacls.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**

> Detects execution of the IEExec utility to download and execute files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download And Execution Via IEExec.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     9801abb8-e297-4dbf-9fbd-57dde0e830ad
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ieexec_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\IEExec.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'IEExec.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Ieexec/

## Self Extracting Package Creation Via Iexpress.EXE From Potentially Suspicious Location

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b2b048b0-7857-4380-b0fb-d3f0ab820b71` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iexpress_susp_execution.yml)**

> Detects the use of iexpress.exe to create binaries via Self Extraction Directive (SED) files located in potentially suspicious locations.
This behavior has been observed in-the-wild by different threat actors.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Self Extracting Package Creation Via Iexpress.EXE From Potentially Suspicious Location
-- Sigma ID:     b2b048b0-7857-4380-b0fb-d3f0ab820b71
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iexpress_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrators building packages using iexpress.exe
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% /n %'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\iexpress.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'IEXPRESS.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\ProgramData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Tasks\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrators building packages using iexpress.exe

**References:**
- https://strontic.github.io/xcyclopedia/library/iexpress.exe-D594B2A33EFAFD0EABF09E3FDC05FCEA.html
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IExpress
- https://decoded.avast.io/janvojtesek/raspberry-robins-roshtyak-a-little-lesson-in-trickery/
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/602f4ae507fa8de57ada079adff25a6c2a899bd25cd092d0af7e62cdb619c93c/behavior

## Disable Windows IIS HTTP Logging

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e4ed6030-ffe5-4e6a-8a8a-ab3c1ab9d94e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.002 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_appcmd_http_logging.yml)**

> Disables HTTP logging on a Windows IIS web server as seen by Threat Group 3390 (Bronze Union)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Disable Windows IIS HTTP Logging
-- Sigma ID:     e4ed6030-ffe5-4e6a-8a8a-ab3c1ab9d94e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_appcmd_http_logging.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%set%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%config%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%section:httplogging%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dontLog:true%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\appcmd.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'appcmd.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1562.002/T1562.002.md#atomic-test-1---disable-windows-iis-http-logging

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

## IIS Native-Code Module Command Line Installation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9465ddf4-f9e4-4ebd-8d98-702df3a93239` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1505.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_appcmd_susp_module_install.yml)**

> Detects suspicious IIS native-code module installations via command line

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        IIS Native-Code Module Command Line Installation
-- Sigma ID:     9465ddf4-f9e4-4ebd-8d98-702df3a93239
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1505.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-12-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_appcmd_susp_module_install.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown as it may vary from organisation to organisation how admins use to install IIS modules
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown as it may vary from organisation to organisation how admins use to install IIS modules

**References:**
- https://researchcenter.paloaltonetworks.com/2018/01/unit42-oilrig-uses-rgdoor-iis-backdoor-targets-middle-east/
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/07/26/malicious-iis-extensions-quietly-open-persistent-backdoors-into-servers/

## Suspicious IIS URL GlobalRules Rewrite Via AppCmd

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7c8af9b2-dcae-41a2-a9db-b28c288b5f08` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_appcmd_susp_rewrite_rule.yml)**

> Detects usage of "appcmd" to create new global URL rewrite rules. This behaviour has been observed being used by threat actors to add new rules so they can access their webshells.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious IIS URL GlobalRules Rewrite Via AppCmd
-- Sigma ID:     7c8af9b2-dcae-41a2-a9db-b28c288b5f08
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_appcmd_susp_rewrite_rule.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of appcmd to add new URL rewrite rules
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%set%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%config%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%section:system.webServer/rewrite/globalRules%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%commit:%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\appcmd.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'appcmd.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of appcmd to add new URL rewrite rules

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/malmoeb/status/1616702107242971144
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/answers/questions/739120/how-to-add-re-write-global-rule-with-action-type-r

## Microsoft IIS Connection Strings Decryption

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `97dbf6e2-e436-44d8-abee-4261b24d3e41` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003 |
| **Author** | Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_connection_strings_decryption.yml)**

> Detects use of aspnet_regiis to decrypt Microsoft IIS connection strings. An attacker with Microsoft IIS web server access via a webshell or alike can decrypt and dump any hardcoded connection strings, such as the MSSQL service account password using aspnet_regiis command.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Microsoft IIS Connection Strings Decryption
-- Sigma ID:     97dbf6e2-e436-44d8-abee-4261b24d3e41
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_connection_strings_decryption.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%connectionStrings%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -pdf%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\aspnet\_regiis.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'aspnet_regiis.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/microsoft-iis-connection-strings-decryption.html

## IIS WebServer Log Deletion via CommandLine Utilities

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0649be4a-aeb0-45b0-b89e-7f1668f6d9c0` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1070 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_logs_deletion.yml)**

> Detects attempts to delete Internet Information Services (IIS) log files via command line utilities, which is a common defense evasion technique used by attackers to cover their tracks.
Threat actors often abuse vulnerabilities in web applications hosted on IIS servers to gain initial access and later delete IIS logs to evade detection.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        IIS WebServer Log Deletion via CommandLine Utilities
-- Sigma ID:     0649be4a-aeb0-45b0-b89e-7f1668f6d9c0
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1070
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-09-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_logs_deletion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Deletion of IIS logs that are older than a certain retention period as part of regular maintenance activities.; Legitimate schedule tasks or scripts that clean up log files regularly.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%del %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%erase %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%remove-item %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rmdir %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\inetpub\\logs\\%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('cmd.exe', 'powershell.exe', 'powershell_ise.exe', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Deletion of IIS logs that are older than a certain retention period as part of regular maintenance activities.; Legitimate schedule tasks or scripts that clean up log files regularly.

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/iis/manage/provisioning-and-managing-iis/managing-iis-log-file-storage

---

## Suspicious IIS Module Registration

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `043c4b8b-3a54-4780-9682-081cb6b8185c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1505.004 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Microsoft (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_susp_module_registration.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious IIS module registration as described in Microsoft threat report on IIS backdoors

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious IIS Module Registration
-- Sigma ID:     043c4b8b-3a54-4780-9682-081cb6b8185c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1505.004
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Microsoft (idea)
-- Date:         2022-08-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_iis_susp_module_registration.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\w3wp.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative activity

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/07/26/malicious-iis-extensions-quietly-open-persistent-backdoors-into-servers/

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        C# IL Code Compilation Via Ilasm.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     850d55f9-6eeb-4492-ad69-a72338f65ba4

  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
```

## ImagingDevices Unusual Parent/Child Processes

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f11f2808-adb4-46c0-802a-8660db50fa99` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_imagingdevices_unusual_parents.yml)**

> Detects unusual parent or children of the ImagingDevices.exe (Windows Contacts) process as seen being used with Bumblebee activity

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        ImagingDevices Unusual Parent/Child Processes
-- Sigma ID:     f11f2808-adb4-46c0-802a-8660db50fa99
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_imagingdevices_unusual_parents.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\ImagingDevices.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\WmiPrvSE.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\svchost.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\dllhost.exe'))
    AND procName LIKE '%\\ImagingDevices.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/09/26/bumblebee-round-two/

## Arbitrary File Download Via IMEWDBLD.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `863218bd-c7d0-4c52-80cd-0a96c09f54af` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_imewbdld_download.yml)**

> Detects usage of "IMEWDBLD.exe" to download arbitrary files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary File Download Via IMEWDBLD.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     863218bd-c7d0-4c52-80cd-0a96c09f54af
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2023-11-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_imewbdld_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\IMEWDBLD.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'imewdbld.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1105/T1105.md#atomic-test-10---windows---powershell-download
