## File Download Via InstallUtil.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `75edd216-1939-4c73-8d61-7f3a0d85b5cc` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_installutil_download.yml)**

> Detects use of .NET InstallUtil.exe in order to download arbitrary files. The files will be written to "%LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Windows\INetCache\IE\"


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download Via InstallUtil.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     75edd216-1939-4c73-8d61-7f3a0d85b5cc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_installutil_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ftp://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\InstallUtil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'InstallUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/LOLBAS-Project/LOLBAS/pull/239

## Suspicious Execution of InstallUtil Without Log

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d042284c-a296-4988-9be5-f424fadcc28c` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_instalutil_no_log_execution.yml)**

> Uses the .NET InstallUtil.exe application in order to execute image without log

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Execution of InstallUtil Without Log
-- Sigma ID:     d042284c-a296-4988-9be5-f424fadcc28c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_instalutil_no_log_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\InstallUtil.exe'
    AND procName LIKE '%Microsoft.NET\\Framework%'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/logfile= %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/LogToConsole=false%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **Author** | Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_java_keytool_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects suspicious shell spawn from Java utility keytool process (e.g. adselfservice plus exploitation)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Shells Spawn by Java Utility Keytool
-- Sigma ID:     90fb5e62-ca1f-4e22-b42e-cc521874c938
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence
-- Author:       Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)
-- Date:         2021-12-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_java_keytool_susp_child_process.yml

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\keytool.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bash.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\whoami.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\scrcons.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\hh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\forfiles.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\scriptrunner.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mftrace.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AppVLP.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\systeminfo.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\query.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cea2b7ea-792b-405f-95a1-b903ea06458f` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1102 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_java_manageengine_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects suspicious child processes of the "Manage Engine ServiceDesk Plus" Java web service

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Child Process Of Manage Engine ServiceDesk
-- Sigma ID:     cea2b7ea-792b-405f-95a1-b903ea06458f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1102
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_java_manageengine_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate sub processes started by Manage Engine ServiceDesk Pro
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\ManageEngine\\ServiceDesk\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\java.exe%')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\AppVLP.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bash.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\forfiles.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mftrace.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\notepad.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\query.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\scrcons.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\systeminfo.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\whoami.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate sub processes started by Manage Engine ServiceDesk Pro

## Java Running with Remote Debugging

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8f88e3f6-2a49-48f5-a5c4-2f7eedf78710` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1203 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_java_remote_debugging.yml)**

> Detects a JAVA process running with remote debugging allowing more than just localhost to connect

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Java Running with Remote Debugging
-- Sigma ID:     8f88e3f6-2a49-48f5-a5c4-2f7eedf78710
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1203
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_java_remote_debugging.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%address=127.0.0.1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%address=localhost%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://dzone.com/articles/remote-debugging-java-applications-with-jdwp

> Detects suspicious processes spawned from a Java host process which could indicate a sign of exploitation (e.g. log4j)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Processes Spawned by Java.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     0d34ed8b-1c12-4ff2-828c-16fc860b766d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\java.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\AppVLP.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\forfiles.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\hh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mftrace.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\query.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\scrcons.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\scriptrunner.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\systeminfo.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\whoami.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

```sql
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\java.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\javaw.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%SysAidServer%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/08/25/mercury-leveraging-log4j-2-vulnerabilities-in-unpatched-systems-to-target-israeli-organizations/

## Attempts of Kerberos Coercion Via DNS SPN Spoofing

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0ed99dda-6a35-11ef-8c99-0242ac120002` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection, persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1557.001, T1187 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_kerberos_coercion_via_dns_spn_spoofing.yml)**

> Detects the presence of "UWhRC....AAYBAAAA" pattern in command line.
The pattern "1UWhRCAAAAA..BAAAA" is a base64-encoded signature that corresponds to a marshaled CREDENTIAL_TARGET_INFORMATION structure.
Attackers can use this technique to coerce authentication from victim systems to attacker-controlled hosts.
It is one of the strong indicators of a Kerberos coercion attack, where adversaries manipulate DNS records
to spoof Service Principal Names (SPNs) and redirect authentication requests like in CVE-2025-33073.
If you see this pattern in the command line, it is likely an attempt to add spoofed Service Principal Names (SPNs) to DNS records,
or checking for the presence of such records through the `nslookup` command.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Attempts of Kerberos Coercion Via DNS SPN Spoofing
-- Sigma ID:     0ed99dda-6a35-11ef-8c99-0242ac120002
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        collection, persistence | T1557.001, T1187
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-06-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_kerberos_coercion_via_dns_spn_spoofing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UWhRCA%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%BAAAA%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.synacktiv.com/publications/ntlm-reflection-is-dead-long-live-ntlm-reflection-an-in-depth-analysis-of-cve-2025
- https://googleprojectzero.blogspot.com/2021/10/using-kerberos-for-authentication-relay.html

## Potentially Suspicious Child Process of KeyScrambler.exe

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ca5583e9-8f80-46ac-ab91-7f314d13b984` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1203, T1574.001 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_keyscrambler_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious child processes of KeyScrambler.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Child Process of KeyScrambler.exe
-- Sigma ID:     ca5583e9-8f80-46ac-ab91-7f314d13b984
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1203, T1574.001
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2024-05-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_keyscrambler_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.Exe', 'cscript.exe', 'mshta.exe', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'regsvr32.exe', 'RUNDLL32.EXE', 'wscript.exe')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\KeyScrambler.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/DTCERT/status/1712785421845790799

## Import LDAP Data Interchange Format File Via Ldifde.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6f535e01-ca1f-40be-ab8d-45b19c0c8b7f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218, T1105 |
| **Author** | @gott_cyber |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ldifde_file_load.yml)**

> Detects the execution of "Ldifde.exe" with the import flag "-i". The can be abused to include HTTP-based arguments which will allow the arbitrary download of files from a remote server.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Import LDAP Data Interchange Format File Via Ldifde.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     6f535e01-ca1f-40be-ab8d-45b19c0c8b7f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218, T1105
-- Author:       @gott_cyber
-- Date:         2022-09-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ldifde_file_load.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Since the content of the files are unknown, false positives are expected
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-i%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-f%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ldifde.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'ldifde.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Since the content of the files are unknown, false positives are expected

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/0gtweet/status/1564968845726580736
- https://strontic.github.io/xcyclopedia/library/ldifde.exe-979DE101F5059CEC1D2C56967CA2BAC0.html

## Uncommon Link.EXE Parent Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6e968eb1-5f05-4dac-94e9-fd0c5cb49fd6` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_link_uncommon_parent_process.yml)**

> Detects an uncommon parent process of "LINK.EXE".
Link.EXE in Microsoft incremental linker. Its a utility usually bundled with Visual Studio installation.
Multiple utilities often found in the same folder (editbin.exe, dumpbin.exe, lib.exe, etc) have a hardcode call to the "LINK.EXE" binary without checking its validity.
This would allow an attacker to sideload any binary with the name "link.exe" if one of the aforementioned tools get executed from a different location.
By filtering the known locations of such utilities we can spot uncommon parent process of LINK.EXE that might be suspicious or malicious.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Link.EXE Parent Process
-- Sigma ID:     6e968eb1-5f05-4dac-94e9-fd0c5cb49fd6
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_link_uncommon_parent_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\link.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LINK /%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/0gtweet/status/1560732860935729152

---

## Rebuild Performance Counter Values Via Lodctr.EXE

| **Sigma ID** | `cc9d3712-6310-4320-b2df-7cb408274d53` |
| **Level** | medium |

> Detects the execution of "lodctr.exe" to rebuild the performance counter registry values. This can be abused by attackers by providing a malicious config file to overwrite performance counter configuration to confuse and evade monitoring and security solutions.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rebuild Performance Counter Values Via Lodctr.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     cc9d3712-6310-4320-b2df-7cb408274d53
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-06-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lodctr_performance_counter_tampering.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage by an administrator
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% -r%'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\lodctr.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'LODCTR.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage by an administrator

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/security/identity-protection/virtual-smart-cards/virtual-smart-card-tpmvscmgr

## Suspicious Windows Trace ETW Session Tamper Via Logman.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cd1f961e-0b96-436b-b7c6-38da4583ec00` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001, T1070.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_logman_disable_eventlog.yml)**

> Detects the execution of "logman" utility in order to disable or delete Windows trace sessions

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Windows Trace ETW Session Tamper Via Logman.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     cd1f961e-0b96-436b-b7c6-38da4583ec00
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001, T1070.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-02-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_logman_disable_eventlog.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate deactivation by administrative staff; Installer tools that disable services, e.g. before log collection agent installation
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%stop %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%delete %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\logman.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Logman.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Circular Kernel Context Logger%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EventLog-%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SYSMON TRACE%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SysmonDnsEtwSession%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate deactivation by administrative staff; Installer tools that disable services, e.g. before log collection agent installation

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/0gtweet/status/1359039665232306183?s=21
- https://ss64.com/nt/logman.html

## LOLBAS Data Exfiltration by DataSvcUtil.exe

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e290b10b-1023-4452-a4a9-eb31a9013b3a` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | exfiltration |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1567 |
| **Author** | Ialle Teixeira @teixeira0xfffff, Austin Songer @austinsonger |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_data_exfiltration_by_using_datasvcutil.yml)**

> Detects when a user performs data exfiltration by using DataSvcUtil.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        LOLBAS Data Exfiltration by DataSvcUtil.exe
-- Sigma ID:     e290b10b-1023-4452-a4a9-eb31a9013b3a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration | T1567
-- Author:       Ialle Teixeira @teixeira0xfffff, Austin Songer @austinsonger
-- Date:         2021-09-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_data_exfiltration_by_using_datasvcutil.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    DataSvcUtil.exe being used may be performed by a system administrator.; Verify whether the user identity, user agent, and/or hostname should be making changes in your environment.; DataSvcUtil.exe being executed from unfamiliar users should be investigated. If known behavior is causing false positives, it can be exempted from the rule.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/in:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/out:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/uri:%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\DataSvcUtil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'DataSvcUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** DataSvcUtil.exe being used may be performed by a system administrator.; Verify whether the user identity, user agent, and/or hostname should be making changes in your environment.; DataSvcUtil.exe being executed from unfamiliar users should be investigated. If known behavior is causing false positives, it can be exempted from the rule.

**References:**
- https://gist.github.com/teixeira0xfffff/837e5bfed0d1b0a29a7cb1e5dbdd9ca6
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/dotnet/framework/data/wcf/wcf-data-service-client-utility-datasvcutil-exe
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/dotnet/framework/data/wcf/generating-the-data-service-client-library-wcf-data-services
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/dotnet/framework/data/wcf/how-to-add-a-data-service-reference-wcf-data-services
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/DataSvcUtil/

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_devtoolslauncher.yml)**

> The Devtoolslauncher.exe executes other binary

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Devtoolslauncher.exe Executes Specified Binary
-- Sigma ID:     cc268ac1-42d9-40fd-9ed3-8c4e1a5b87e6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test

  reptDevName,
```

## Suspicious Diantz Alternate Data Stream Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6b369ced-4b1d-48f1-b427-fdc0de0790bd` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.004 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_diantz_ads.yml)**

> Compress target file into a cab file stored in the Alternate Data Stream (ADS) of the target file.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Diantz Alternate Data Stream Execution
-- Sigma ID:     6b369ced-4b1d-48f1-b427-fdc0de0790bd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-11-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_diantz_ads.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Very Possible
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%diantz.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cab%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], ':[^\\]')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Very Possible

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Diantz/

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_extrac32.yml)**

> Download or Copy file with Extrac32

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Extrac32 Execution
-- Sigma ID:     aa8e035d-7be4-48d3-a944-102aec04400d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
```

## Potential Reconnaissance Activity Via GatherNetworkInfo.VBS

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `575dce0c-8139-4e30-9295-1ee75969f7fe` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1615, T1059.005 |
| **Author** | blueteamer8699 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_gather_network_info.yml)**

> Detects execution of the built-in script located in "C:\Windows\System32\gatherNetworkInfo.vbs". Which can be used to gather information about the target machine

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Reconnaissance Activity Via GatherNetworkInfo.VBS
-- Sigma ID:     575dce0c-8139-4e30-9295-1ee75969f7fe
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, execution | T1615, T1059.005
-- Author:       blueteamer8699
-- Date:         2022-01-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_gather_network_info.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gatherNetworkInfo.vbs%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('cscript.exe', 'wscript.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative activity

**References:**
- https://posts.slayerlabs.com/living-off-the-land/#gathernetworkinfovbs
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/trojanized-windows-installers-ukrainian-government

> Detects the execution of the LOLBIN gpscript, which executes logon or startup scripts configured in Group Policy

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Gpscript Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1e59c230-6670-45bf-83b0-98903780607e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113

  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg

WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
```

## Ie4uinit Lolbin Use From Invalid Path

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d3bf399f-b0cf-4250-8bb4-dfc192ab81dc` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_ie4uinit.yml)**

> Detect use of ie4uinit.exe to execute commands from a specially prepared ie4uinit.inf file from a directory other than the usual directories

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Ie4uinit Lolbin Use From Invalid Path
-- Sigma ID:     d3bf399f-b0cf-4250-8bb4-dfc192ab81dc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_ie4uinit.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    ViberPC updater calls this binary with the following commandline "ie4uinit.exe -ClearIconCache"
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ie4uinit.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'IE4UINIT.EXE'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** ViberPC updater calls this binary with the following commandline "ie4uinit.exe -ClearIconCache"

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Ie4uinit/
- https://bohops.com/2018/03/10/leveraging-inf-sct-fetch-execute-techniques-for-bypass-evasion-persistence-part-2/

## Launch-VsDevShell.PS1 Proxy Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `45d3a03d-f441-458c-8883-df101a3bb146` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1216.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_launch_vsdevshell.yml)**

> Detects the use of the 'Launch-VsDevShell.ps1' Microsoft signed script to execute commands.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Launch-VsDevShell.PS1 Proxy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     45d3a03d-f441-458c-8883-df101a3bb146
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_launch_vsdevshell.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the script by a developer
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VsWherePath %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VsInstallationPath %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Launch-VsDevShell.ps1%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of the script by a developer

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/nas_bench/status/1535981653239255040

## Potential Manage-bde.wsf Abuse To Proxy Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c363385c-f75d-4753-a108-c1a8e28bdbda` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1216 |
| **Author** | oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_manage_bde.yml)**

> Detects potential abuse of the "manage-bde.wsf" script as a LOLBIN to proxy execution

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Manage-bde.wsf Abuse To Proxy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c363385c-f75d-4753-a108-c1a8e28bdbda
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216
-- Author:       oscd.community, Natalia Shornikova, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-10-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_manage_bde.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%manage-bde.wsf%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wscript.exe')))
  OR (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%manage-bde.wsf%'))
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Scripts/Manage-bde/
- https://gist.github.com/bohops/735edb7494fe1bd1010d67823842b712
- https://twitter.com/bohops/status/980659399495741441
- https://twitter.com/JohnLaTwC/status/1223292479270600706
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1216/T1216.md

## Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4f73421b-5a0b-4bbf-a892-5a7fb99bea66` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1055.001, T1218.013 |
| **Author** | frack113, Florian Roth |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_mavinject_process_injection.yml)**

> Detects process injection using the signed Windows tool "Mavinject" via the "INJECTRUNNING" flag

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Mavinject Inject DLL Into Running Process
-- Sigma ID:     4f73421b-5a0b-4bbf-a892-5a7fb99bea66
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055.001, T1218.013
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth
-- Date:         2021-07-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_mavinject_process_injection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /INJECTRUNNING %')
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\Windows\System32\AppVClient.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1218/T1218.md
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1056.004/T1056.004.md
- https://posts.specterops.io/mavinject-exe-functionality-deconstructed-c29ab2cf5c0e
- https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/941315826107510784
- https://reaqta.com/2017/12/mavinject-microsoft-injector/
- https://twitter.com/Hexacorn/status/776122138063409152
- https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/issues/3742
- https://github.com/keyboardcrunch/SentinelOne-ATTACK-Queries/blob/6a228d23eefe963ca81f2d52f94b815f61ef5ee0/Tactics/DefenseEvasion.md#t1055-process-injection

## MpiExec Lolbin

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `729ce0ea-5d8f-4769-9762-e35de441586d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_mpiexec.yml)**

> Detects a certain command line flag combination used by mpiexec.exe LOLBIN from HPC pack that can be used to execute any other binary

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MpiExec Lolbin
-- Sigma ID:     729ce0ea-5d8f-4769-9762-e35de441586d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_mpiexec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\mpiexec.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=d8b52ef6aaa3a81501bdfff9dbb96217%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /n 1 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -n 1 %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/mrd0x/status/1465058133303246867
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/high-performance-computing/mpiexec?view=hpc19-ps

## Execute Files with Msdeploy.exe

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `646bc99f-6682-4b47-a73a-17b1b64c9d34` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Beyu Denis, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_msdeploy.yml)**

> Detects file execution using the msdeploy.exe lolbin

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute Files with Msdeploy.exe
-- Sigma ID:     646bc99f-6682-4b47-a73a-17b1b64c9d34
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Beyu Denis, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_msdeploy.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    System administrator Usage
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%verb:sync%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-source:RunCommand%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-dest:runCommand%')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\msdeploy.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** System administrator Usage

## Use of OpenConsole

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `814c95cc-8192-4378-a70a-f1aafd877af1` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_openconsole.yml)**

> Detects usage of OpenConsole binary as a LOLBIN to launch other binaries to bypass application Whitelisting

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of OpenConsole
-- Sigma ID:     814c95cc-8192-4378-a70a-f1aafd877af1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_openconsole.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by an administrator
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'OpenConsole.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\OpenConsole.exe')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE 'C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\Microsoft.WindowsTerminal%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use by an administrator

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/nas_bench/status/1537563834478645252

## Use of Pcalua For Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0955e4e1-c281-4fb9-9ee1-5ee7b4b754d2` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcalua.yml)**

> Detects execition of commands and binaries from the context of The program compatibility assistant (Pcalua.exe). This can be used as a LOLBIN in order to bypass application whitelisting.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of Pcalua For Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0955e4e1-c281-4fb9-9ee1-5ee7b4b754d2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
-- Date:         2022-06-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcalua.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by a via a batch script or by an administrator.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\pcalua.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -a%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use by a via a batch script or by an administrator.

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Pcalua/
- https://pentestlab.blog/2020/07/06/indirect-command-execution/

## Indirect Command Execution By Program Compatibility Wizard

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b97cd4b1-30b8-4a9d-bd72-6293928d52bc` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | A. Sungurov , oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcwrun.yml)**

> Detect indirect command execution via Program Compatibility Assistant pcwrun.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Indirect Command Execution By Program Compatibility Wizard
-- Sigma ID:     b97cd4b1-30b8-4a9d-bd72-6293928d52bc
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       A. Sungurov , oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcwrun.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Need to use extra processing with 'unique_count' / 'filter' to focus on outliers as opposed to commonly seen artifacts; Legit usage of scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pcwrun.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Need to use extra processing with 'unique_count' / 'filter' to focus on outliers as opposed to commonly seen artifacts; Legit usage of scripts

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute Pcwrun.EXE To Leverage Follina
-- Sigma ID:     6004abd0-afa4-4557-ba90-49d172e0a299
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
```

## Code Execution via Pcwutl.dll

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9386d78a-7207-4048-9c9f-a93a7c2d1c05` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Julia Fomina, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcwutl.yml)**

> Detects launch of executable by calling the LaunchApplication function from pcwutl.dll library.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Code Execution via Pcwutl.dll
-- Sigma ID:     9386d78a-7207-4048-9c9f-a93a7c2d1c05
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Julia Fomina, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pcwutl.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Use of Program Compatibility Troubleshooter Helper
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pcwutl%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LaunchApplication%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Use of Program Compatibility Troubleshooter Helper

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Libraries/Pcwutl/
- https://twitter.com/harr0ey/status/989617817849876488

## Execute Code with Pester.bat as Parent

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `18988e1b-9087-4f8a-82fe-0414dce49878` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001, T1216 |
| **Author** | frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pester.yml)**

> Detects code execution via Pester.bat (Pester - Powershell Modulte for testing)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute Code with Pester.bat as Parent
-- Sigma ID:     18988e1b-9087-4f8a-82fe-0414dce49878
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1216
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2022-08-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pester.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Pester for writing tests for Powershell scripts and modules
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%{ Invoke-Pester -EnableExit ;%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%{ Get-Help "%'))
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%\\WindowsPowerShell\\Modules\\Pester\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of Pester for writing tests for Powershell scripts and modules

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/Oddvarmoe/status/993383596244258816
- https://twitter.com/_st0pp3r_/status/1560072680887525378

## Execute Code with Pester.bat

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `59e938ff-0d6d-4dc3-b13f-36cc28734d4e` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001, T1216 |
| **Author** | Julia Fomina, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pester_1.yml)**

> Detects code execution via Pester.bat (Pester - Powershell Modulte for testing)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute Code with Pester.bat
-- Sigma ID:     59e938ff-0d6d-4dc3-b13f-36cc28734d4e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1216
-- Author:       Julia Fomina, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_pester_1.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Pester for writing tests for Powershell scripts and modules
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Pester%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-Help%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pester%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%help%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\?%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of Pester for writing tests for Powershell scripts and modules

## PrintBrm ZIP Creation of Extraction

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cafeeba3-01da-4ab4-b6c4-a31b1d9730c7` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105, T1564.004 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_printbrm.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the LOLBIN PrintBrm.exe, which can be used to create or extract ZIP files. PrintBrm.exe should not be run on a normal workstation.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PrintBrm ZIP Creation of Extraction
-- Sigma ID:     cafeeba3-01da-4ab4-b6c4-a31b1d9730c7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105, T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_printbrm.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\PrintBrm.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -f%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.zip%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/PrintBrm/

## DLL Execution via Rasautou.exe

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cd3d1298-eb3b-476c-ac67-12847de55813` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Julia Fomina, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_rasautou_dll_execution.yml)**

> Detects using Rasautou.exe for loading arbitrary .DLL specified in -d option and executes the export specified in -p.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        DLL Execution via Rasautou.exe
-- Sigma ID:     cd3d1298-eb3b-476c-ac67-12847de55813
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Julia Fomina, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_rasautou_dll_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -d %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -p %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rasautou.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'rasdlui.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Rasautou/
- https://github.com/fireeye/DueDLLigence
- https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2019/10/staying-hidden-on-the-endpoint-evading-detection-with-shellcode.html

| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_register_app.yml)**

> Detects the use of a Microsoft signed script 'REGISTER_APP.VBS' to register a VSS/VDS Provider as a COM+ application.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        REGISTER_APP.VBS Proxy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1c8774a0-44d4-4db0-91f8-e792359c70bd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_register_app.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the script. Always investigate what's being registered to confirm if it's benign
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\register\_app.vbs%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-register%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Use of Remote.exe

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4eddc365-79b4-43ff-a9d7-99422dc34b93` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1127 |
| **Author** | Christopher Peacock @SecurePeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_remote.yml)**

> Remote.exe is part of WinDbg in the Windows SDK and can be used for AWL bypass and running remote files.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of Remote.exe
-- Sigma ID:     4eddc365-79b4-43ff-a9d7-99422dc34b93
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1127
-- Author:       Christopher Peacock @SecurePeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io
-- Date:         2022-06-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_remote.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Approved installs of Windows SDK with Debugging Tools for Windows (WinDbg).
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\remote.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'remote.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Approved installs of Windows SDK with Debugging Tools for Windows (WinDbg).

**References:**
- https://blog.thecybersecuritytutor.com/Exeuction-AWL-Bypass-Remote-exe-LOLBin/

```sql
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -appvscript %')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ScriptRunner.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'ScriptRunner.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use when App-v is deployed

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Scriptrunner/

---

## Using SettingSyncHost.exe as LOLBin

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b2ddd389-f676-4ac4-845a-e00781a48e5f` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1574.008 |
| **Author** | Anton Kutepov, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_settingsynchost.yml)**

> Detects using SettingSyncHost.exe to run hijacked binary

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Using SettingSyncHost.exe as LOLBin
-- Sigma ID:     b2ddd389-f676-4ac4-845a-e00781a48e5f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1574.008
-- Author:       Anton Kutepov, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_settingsynchost.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (NOT ((procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%RoamDiag.cmd%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%-outputpath%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.hexacorn.com/blog/2020/02/02/settingsynchost-exe-as-a-lolbin

|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a85ffc3a-e8fd-4040-93bf-78aff284d801` |

| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_sftp.yml)**

> Detects the usage of the "sftp.exe" binary as a LOLBIN by abusing the "-D" flag

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use Of The SFTP.EXE Binary As A LOLBIN
-- Sigma ID:     a85ffc3a-e8fd-4040-93bf-78aff284d801
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-11-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_sftp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\sftp.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -D ..%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -D C:\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown
