## Suspicious Driver Install by pnputil.exe

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a2ea3ae7-d3d0-40a0-a55c-25a45c87cac1` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1547 |
| **Author** | Hai Vaknin @LuxNoBulIshit, Avihay eldad  @aloneliassaf, Austin Songer @austinsonger |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_susp_driver_installed_by_pnputil.yml)**

> Detects when a possible suspicious driver is being installed via pnputil.exe lolbin

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Driver Install by pnputil.exe
-- Sigma ID:     a2ea3ae7-d3d0-40a0-a55c-25a45c87cac1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1547
-- Author:       Hai Vaknin @LuxNoBulIshit, Avihay eldad  @aloneliassaf, Austin Songer @austinsonger
-- Date:         2021-09-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_susp_driver_installed_by_pnputil.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Pnputil.exe being used may be performed by a system administrator.; Verify whether the user identity, user agent, and/or hostname should be making changes in your environment.; Pnputil.exe being executed from unfamiliar users should be investigated. If known behavior is causing false positives, it can be exempted from the rule.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-i%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/install%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-a%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/add-driver%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.inf%'))
    AND procName LIKE '%\\pnputil.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Pnputil.exe being used may be performed by a system administrator.; Verify whether the user identity, user agent, and/or hostname should be making changes in your environment.; Pnputil.exe being executed from unfamiliar users should be investigated. If known behavior is causing false positives, it can be exempted from the rule.

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-hardware/drivers/devtest/pnputil-command-syntax
- https://strontic.github.io/xcyclopedia/library/pnputil.exe-60EDC5E6BDBAEE441F2E3AEACD0340D2.html

> Detects process dump via legitimate sqldumper.exe binary

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Dumping Process via Sqldumper.exe
-- Sigma ID:     23ceaf5c-b6f1-4a32-8559-f2ff734be516
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       Kirill Kiryanov, oscd.community

-- Unmapped:     (none)

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

|---|---|

| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_syncappvpublishingserver_execute_psh.yml)**

> Executes arbitrary PowerShell code using SyncAppvPublishingServer.exe.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        SyncAppvPublishingServer Execute Arbitrary PowerShell Code
-- Sigma ID:     fbd7c32d-db2a-4418-b92c-566eb8911133
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_syncappvpublishingserver_execute_psh.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')

  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

> Detects the executiob of TTDInject.exe, which is used by Windows 10 v1809 and newer to debug time travel (underlying call of tttracer.exe)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of TTDInject.exe
-- Sigma ID:     b27077d6-23e6-45d2-81a0-e2b356eea5fd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1127
-- Author:       frack113

-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%ttdinject.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'TTDInject.EXE'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**

## Time Travel Debugging Utility Usage

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0b4ae027-2a2d-4b93-8c7e-962caaba5b2a` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218, T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, @oscd_initiative |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_tttracer_mod_load.yml)**

> Detects usage of Time Travel Debugging Utility. Adversaries can execute malicious processes and dump processes, such as lsass.exe, via tttracer.exe.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Time Travel Debugging Utility Usage
-- Sigma ID:     0b4ae027-2a2d-4b93-8c7e-962caaba5b2a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218, T1003.001
-- Author:       Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, @oscd_initiative
-- Date:         2020-10-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_tttracer_mod_load.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage by software developers/testers
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\tttracer.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage by software developers/testers

- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Tttracer/

## Lolbin Unregmp2.exe Use As Proxy

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `727454c0-d851-48b0-8b89-385611ab0704` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_unregmp2.yml)**

> Detect usage of the "unregmp2.exe" binary as a proxy to launch a custom version of "wmpnscfg.exe"

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Lolbin Unregmp2.exe Use As Proxy
-- Sigma ID:     727454c0-d851-48b0-8b89-385611ab0704
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_unregmp2.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% /HideWMP%'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\unregmp2.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'unregmp2.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Unregmp2/

> Detects the use of a Microsoft signed script executing a managed DLL with PowerShell.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UtilityFunctions.ps1 Proxy Dll
-- Sigma ID:     0403d67d-6227-4ea8-8145-4e72db7da120
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1216
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-05-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_utilityfunctions.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%UtilityFunctions.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RegSnapin %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Scripts/UtilityFunctions/

## Visual Basic Command Line Compiler Usage

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7b10f171-7f04-47c7-9fa2-5be43c76e535` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027.004 |
| **Author** | Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, @oscd_initiative |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_visual_basic_compiler.yml)**

> Detects successful code compilation via Visual Basic Command Line Compiler that utilizes Windows Resource to Object Converter.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Visual Basic Command Line Compiler Usage
-- Sigma ID:     7b10f171-7f04-47c7-9fa2-5be43c76e535
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027.004
-- Author:       Ensar Şamil, @sblmsrsn, @oscd_initiative
-- Date:         2020-10-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_visual_basic_compiler.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Utilization of this tool should not be seen in enterprise environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\vbc.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\cvtres.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Utilization of this tool should not be seen in enterprise environment

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Vbc/

|---|---|

| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Christopher Peacock @SecurePeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolbin_visualuiaverifynative.yml)**

> VisualUiaVerifyNative.exe is a Windows SDK that can be used for AWL bypass and is listed in Microsoft's recommended block rules.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of VisualUiaVerifyNative.exe
-- Sigma ID:     b30a8bc5-e21b-4ca2-9420-0a94019ac56a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218

-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate testing of Microsoft UI parts.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\VisualUiaVerifyNative.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'VisualUiaVerifyNative.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate testing of Microsoft UI parts.

## Potential Register_App.Vbs LOLScript Abuse

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `28c8f68b-098d-45af-8d43-8089f3e35403` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Austin Songer @austinsonger |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolscript_register_app.yml)**

> Detects potential abuse of the "register_app.vbs" script that is part of the Windows SDK. The script offers the capability to register new VSS/VDS Provider as a COM+ application. Attackers can use this to install malicious DLLs for persistence and execution.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Register_App.Vbs LOLScript Abuse
-- Sigma ID:     28c8f68b-098d-45af-8d43-8089f3e35403
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Austin Songer @austinsonger
-- Date:         2021-11-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lolscript_register_app.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Other VB scripts that leverage the same starting command line flags
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs -register %')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('cscript.exe', 'wscript.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Other VB scripts that leverage the same starting command line flags

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/sblmsrsn/status/1456613494783160325?s=20
- https://github.com/microsoft/Windows-classic-samples/blob/7cbd99ac1d2b4a0beffbaba29ea63d024ceff700/Samples/Win7Samples/winbase/vss/vsssampleprovider/register_app.vbs

|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c8da0dfd-4ed0-4b68-962d-13c9c884384e` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003, T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Samir Bousseaden |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_lsass_process_clone.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious LSASS process process clone that could be a sign of credential dumping activity

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Credential Dumping Via LSASS Process Clone
-- Sigma ID:     c8da0dfd-4ed0-4b68-962d-13c9c884384e
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003, T1003.001

-- Unmapped:     (none)

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\System32\\lsass.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\System32\\lsass.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

> Detects child processes of the "Trace log generation tool for Media Foundation Tools" (Mftrace.exe) which can abused to execute arbitrary binaries.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Mftrace.EXE Abuse
-- Sigma ID:     3d48c9d3-1aa6-418d-98d3-8fd3c01a564e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
```

## Windows Default Domain GPO Modification via GPME

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `dcff7e85-d01f-4eb5-badd-84e2e6be8294` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1484.001 |
| **Author** | TropChaud |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mmc_default_domain_gpo_modification_via_gpme.yml)**

> Detects the use of the Group Policy Management Editor (GPME) to modify Default Domain or Default Domain Controllers Group Policy Objects (GPOs).
Adversaries may leverage GPME to make stealthy changes in these default GPOs to deploy malicious GPOs configurations across the domain without raising suspicion.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Default Domain GPO Modification via GPME
-- Sigma ID:     dcff7e85-d01f-4eb5-badd-84e2e6be8294
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1484.001
-- Author:       TropChaud
-- Date:         2025-11-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mmc_default_domain_gpo_modification_via_gpme.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of GPME to modify GPOs
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%31B2F340-016D-11D2-945F-00C04FB984F9%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%6AC1786C-016F-11D2-945F-00C04FB984F9%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gpme.msc%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gpobject:%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\mmc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'MMC.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of GPME to modify GPOs

**References:**
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/25/i/unmasking-the-gentlemen-ransomware.html
- https://adsecurity.org/?p=3377
- https://sdmsoftware.com/general-stuff/launching-the-new-gp-management-editor-from-the-command-line/
- https://www.pentestpartners.com/security-blog/living-off-the-land-gpo-style/

## MMC20 Lateral Movement

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f1f3bf22-deb2-418d-8cce-e1a45e46a5bd` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1021.003 |
| **Author** | @2xxeformyshirt (Security Risk Advisors) - rule; Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mmc_mmc20_lateral_movement.yml)**

> Detects MMC20.Application Lateral Movement; specifically looks for the spawning of the parent MMC.exe with a command line of "-Embedding" as a child of svchost.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MMC20 Lateral Movement
-- Sigma ID:     f1f3bf22-deb2-418d-8cce-e1a45e46a5bd
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1021.003
-- Author:       @2xxeformyshirt (Security Risk Advisors) - rule; Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea)
-- Date:         2020-03-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mmc_mmc20_lateral_movement.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\svchost.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\mmc.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Embedding%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://enigma0x3.net/2017/01/05/lateral-movement-using-the-mmc20-application-com-object/
- https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lKya3_mLnR3UQuCoiYruO3qgu052_iS_/view?usp=sharing

## MMC Executing Files with Reversed Extensions Using RTLO Abuse

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9cfe4b27-1e56-48b4-b7a8-d46851c91a44` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1204.002, T1218.014, T1036.002 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mmc_rlo_abuse_pattern.yml)**

> Detects malicious behavior where the MMC utility (`mmc.exe`) executes files with reversed extensions caused by Right-to-Left Override (RLO) abuse, disguising them as document formats.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MMC Executing Files with Reversed Extensions Using RTLO Abuse
-- Sigma ID:     9cfe4b27-1e56-48b4-b7a8-d46851c91a44
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.002, T1218.014, T1036.002
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mmc_rlo_abuse_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative actions using MMC to execute misnamed `.msc` files.; Unconventional but non-malicious usage of RLO or reversed extensions.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cod.msc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%fdp.msc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ftr.msc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lmth.msc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%slx.msc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tdo.msc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%xcod.msc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%xslx.msc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%xtpp.msc%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\mmc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'MMC.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrative actions using MMC to execute misnamed `.msc` files.; Unconventional but non-malicious usage of RLO or reversed extensions.

**References:**
- https://www.unicode.org/versions/Unicode5.2.0/ch02.pdf
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Right-to-left_override
- https://tria.ge/241015-l98snsyeje/behavioral2

## MMC Spawning Windows Shell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `05a2ab7e-ce11-4b63-86db-ab32e763e11d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1021.003 |
| **Author** | Karneades, Swisscom CSIRT |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mmc_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects a Windows command line executable started from MMC

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MMC Spawning Windows Shell
-- Sigma ID:     05a2ab7e-ce11-4b63-86db-ab32e763e11d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1021.003
-- Author:       Karneades, Swisscom CSIRT
-- Date:         2019-08-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mmc_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    (none)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\mmc.exe')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bash.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\BITSADMIN%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**References:**
- https://enigma0x3.net/2017/01/05/lateral-movement-using-the-mmc20-application-com-object/

---

## CodePage Modification Via MODE.COM To Russian Language

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `12fbff88-16b5-4b42-9754-cd001a789fb3` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036 |
| **Author** | Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mode_codepage_russian.yml)**

> Detects a CodePage modification using the "mode.com" utility to Russian language.
This behavior has been used by threat actors behind Dharma ransomware.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        CodePage Modification Via MODE.COM To Russian Language
-- Sigma ID:     12fbff88-16b5-4b42-9754-cd001a789fb3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk
-- Date:         2024-01-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mode_codepage_russian.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Russian speaking people changing the CodePage
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% con %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% cp %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% select=%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%=1251' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%=866')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\mode.com')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'MODE.COM')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Russian speaking people changing the CodePage

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/intl/code-page-identifiers
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/mode
- https://strontic.github.io/xcyclopedia/library/mode.com-59D1ED51ACB8C3D50F1306FD75F20E99.html
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/5e75ef02517afd6e8ba6462b19217dc4a5a574abb33d10eb0f2bab49d8d48c22/behavior

## Potential Suspicious Mofcomp Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1dd05363-104e-4b4a-b963-196a534b03a1` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mofcomp_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of the "mofcomp" utility as a child of a suspicious shell or script running utility or by having a suspicious path in the commandline.
The "mofcomp" utility parses a file containing MOF statements and adds the classes and class instances defined in the file to the WMI repository.
Attackers abuse this utility to install malicious MOF scripts


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Suspicious Mofcomp Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1dd05363-104e-4b4a-b963-196a534b03a1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mofcomp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/07/11/select-xmrig-from-sqlserver/
- https://github.com/The-DFIR-Report/Sigma-Rules/blob/75260568a7ffe61b2458ca05f6f25914efb44337/win_mofcomp_execution.yml
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/wmisdk/mofcomp

## Potential Mpclient.DLL Sideloading Via Defender Binaries

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7002aa10-b8d4-47ae-b5ba-51ab07e228b9` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1574.001 |
| **Author** | Bhabesh Raj |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mpcmdrun_dll_sideload_defender.yml)**

> Detects potential sideloading of "mpclient.dll" by Windows Defender processes ("MpCmdRun" and "NisSrv") from their non-default directory.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Mpclient.DLL Sideloading Via Defender Binaries
-- Sigma ID:     7002aa10-b8d4-47ae-b5ba-51ab07e228b9
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1574.001
-- Author:       Bhabesh Raj
-- Date:         2022-08-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mpcmdrun_dll_sideload_defender.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\MpCmdRun.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\NisSrv.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://www.sentinelone.com/blog/living-off-windows-defender-lockbit-ransomware-sideloads-cobalt-strike-through-microsoft-security-tool

## File Download Via Windows Defender MpCmpRun.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `46123129-1024-423e-9fae-43af4a0fa9a5` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218, T1105 |
| **Author** | Matthew Matchen |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mpcmdrun_download_arbitrary_file.yml)**

> Detects the use of Windows Defender MpCmdRun.EXE to download files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        File Download Via Windows Defender MpCmpRun.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     46123129-1024-423e-9fae-43af4a0fa9a5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218, T1105
-- Author:       Matthew Matchen
-- Date:         2020-09-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mpcmdrun_download_arbitrary_file.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DownloadFile%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%url%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'MpCmdRun.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\MpCmdRun.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MpCmdRun.exe%'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Microsoft Malware Protection Command Line Utility'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://web.archive.org/web/20200903194959/https://twitter.com/djmtshepana/status/1301608169496612866
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/MpCmdRun/

## Windows Defender Definition Files Removed

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9719a8aa-401c-41af-8108-ced7ec9cd75c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mpcmdrun_remove_windows_defender_definition.yml)**

> Adversaries may disable security tools to avoid possible detection of their tools and activities by removing Windows Defender Definition Files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Defender Definition Files Removed
-- Sigma ID:     9719a8aa-401c-41af-8108-ced7ec9cd75c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mpcmdrun_remove_windows_defender_definition.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -RemoveDefinitions%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -All%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\MpCmdRun.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'MpCmdRun.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1562.001/T1562.001.md
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/unit42-gorgon-group-slithering-nation-state-cybercrime/

## Suspicious Msbuild Execution By Uncommon Parent Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `33be4333-2c6b-44f4-ae28-102cdbde0a31` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msbuild_susp_parent_process.yml)**

> Detects suspicious execution of 'Msbuild.exe' by a uncommon parent process

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Msbuild Execution By Uncommon Parent Process
-- Sigma ID:     33be4333-2c6b-44f4-ae28-102cdbde0a31
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-11-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msbuild_susp_parent_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\MSBuild.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'MSBuild.exe'))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\devenv.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\msbuild.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\python.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\nuget.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://app.any.run/tasks/abdf586e-df0c-4d39-89a7-06bf24913401/
- https://www.echotrail.io/insights/search/msbuild.exe

---

## MSDT Execution Via Answer File

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9c8c7000-3065-44a8-a555-79bcba5d9955` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msdt_answer_file_exec.yml)**

> Detects execution of "msdt.exe" using an answer file which is simulating the legitimate way of calling msdt via "pcwrun.exe" (For example from the compatibility tab).


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MSDT Execution Via Answer File
-- Sigma ID:     9c8c7000-3065-44a8-a555-79bcba5d9955
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msdt_answer_file_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Possible undocumented parents of "msdt" other than "pcwrun".
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\msdt.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\WINDOWS\\diagnostics\\index\\PCWDiagnostic.xml%')
    AND rawEventMsg LIKE '% -af %')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Possible undocumented parents of "msdt" other than "pcwrun".

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Msdt/

---

## Potential Arbitrary Command Execution Using Msdt.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `258fc8ce-8352-443a-9120-8a11e4857fa5` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1202 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msdt_arbitrary_command_execution.yml)**

> Detects processes leveraging the "ms-msdt" handler or the "msdt.exe" binary to execute arbitrary commands as seen in the follina (CVE-2022-30190) vulnerability

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Arbitrary Command Execution Using Msdt.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     258fc8ce-8352-443a-9120-8a11e4857fa5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msdt_arbitrary_command_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\msdt.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'msdt.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IT\_BrowseForFile=%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

|---|---|

> Detects execution of msdt.exe using the "cab" flag which could indicates suspicious diagcab files with embedded answer files leveraging CVE-2022-30190

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Cabinet File Execution Via Msdt.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     dc4576d4-7467-424f-9eee-fd2b02855fe0
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), GossiTheDog, frack113
-- Date:         2022-06-21

-- Unmapped:     (none)

-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% -cab %'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\msdt.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'msdt.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of ".diagcab" files

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/nas_bench/status/1537896324837781506
- https://github.com/GossiTheDog/ThreatHunting/blob/e85884abbf05d5b41efc809ea6532b10b45bd05c/AdvancedHuntingQueries/DogWalk-DiagCab
- https://github.com/elastic/protections-artifacts/commit/746086721fd385d9f5c6647cada1788db4aea95f#diff-9015912909545e72ed42cbac4d1e96295e8964579c406d23fd9c47a8091576a0
- https://irsl.medium.com/the-trouble-with-microsofts-troubleshooters-6e32fc80b8bd

## Suspicious MSDT Parent Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7a74da6b-ea76-47db-92cc-874ad90df734` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036, T1218 |
| **Author** | Nextron Systems |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msdt_susp_parent.yml)**

> Detects msdt.exe executed by a suspicious parent as seen in CVE-2022-30190 / Follina exploitation

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious MSDT Parent Process
-- Sigma ID:     7a74da6b-ea76-47db-92cc-874ad90df734
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1218
-- Author:       Nextron Systems
-- Date:         2022-06-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msdt_susp_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\msdt.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'msdt.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wsl.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/nao_sec/status/1530196847679401984
- https://app.any.run/tasks/713f05d2-fe78-4b9d-a744-f7c133e3fafb/

| **FSM Severity** | 5 |

| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msedge_proxy_download.yml)**

> Detects usage of "msedge_proxy.exe" to download arbitrary files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary File Download Via MSEDGE_PROXY.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     e84d89c4-f544-41ca-a6af-4b92fd38b023
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel

-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msedge_proxy_download.yml

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\msedge\_proxy.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'msedge_proxy.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_http.yml)**

> Detects execution of the "mshta" utility with an argument containing the "http" keyword, which could indicate that an attacker is executing a remotely hosted malicious hta file

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remotely Hosted HTA File Executed Via Mshta.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     b98d0db6-511d-45de-ad02-e82a98729620
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218.005
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_http.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ftp://%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'MSHTA.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Wscript Shell Run In CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2c28c248-7f50-417a-9186-a85b223010ee` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_inline_vbscript.yml)**

> Detects the presence of the keywords "Wscript", "Shell" and "Run" in the command, which could indicate a suspicious activity

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Wscript Shell Run In CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     2c28c248-7f50-417a-9186-a85b223010ee
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_inline_vbscript.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Inline scripting can be used by some rare third party applications or administrators. Investigate and apply additional filters accordingly
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Wscript.%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Shell%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Run%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Inline scripting can be used by some rare third party applications or administrators. Investigate and apply additional filters accordingly

**References:**
- https://web.archive.org/web/20220830122045/http://blog.talosintelligence.com/2022/08/modernloader-delivers-multiple-stealers.html
- https://blog.talosintelligence.com/modernloader-delivers-multiple-stealers-cryptominers-and-rats/

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious JavaScript Execution Via Mshta.EXE
```

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential LethalHTA Technique Execution

  procName,
```

## Suspicious MSHTA Child Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `03cc0c25-389f-4bf8-b48d-11878079f1ca` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.005 |
| **Author** | Michael Haag |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_susp_child_processes.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious process spawning from an "mshta.exe" process, which could be indicative of a malicious HTA script execution

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious MSHTA Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     03cc0c25-389f-4bf8-b48d-11878079f1ca
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.005
-- Author:       Michael Haag
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_susp_child_processes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Printer software / driver installations; HP software
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bash.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.Exe', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'wscript.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'Bash.exe', 'reg.exe', 'REGSVR32.EXE', 'bitsadmin.exe')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\mshta.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Printer software / driver installations; HP software

**References:**
- https://www.trustedsec.com/july-2015/malicious-htas/

## MSHTA Execution with Suspicious File Extensions

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cc7abbd0-762b-41e3-8a26-57ad50d2eea3` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1140, T1218.005, T1059.007 |
| **Author** | Diego Perez (@darkquassar), Markus Neis, Swisscom (Improve Rule), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_susp_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of mshta.exe with file types that looks like they do not typically represent HTA (HTML Application) content,
such as .png, .jpg, .zip, .pdf, and others, which are often polyglots. MSHTA is a legitimate Windows utility for executing HTML Applications
containing VBScript or JScript. Threat actors often abuse this lolbin utility to download and
execute malicious scripts disguised as benign files or hosted under misleading extensions to evade detection.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MSHTA Execution with Suspicious File Extensions
-- Sigma ID:     cc7abbd0-762b-41e3-8a26-57ad50d2eea3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1140, T1218.005, T1059.007
-- Author:       Diego Perez (@darkquassar), Markus Neis, Swisscom (Improve Rule), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-02-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.7z%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.avi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.conf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.csv%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.doc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ini%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.json%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.log%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mkv%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mp3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mp4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pdf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.rar%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.rtf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.svg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.tar%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.tmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xls%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xml%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.yaml%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.yml%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.zip%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%vbscript%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'mshta.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment

**References:**
- http://blog.sevagas.com/?Hacking-around-HTA-files
- https://0x00sec.org/t/clientside-exploitation-in-2018-how-pentesting-has-changed/7356
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/dotnet/framework/data/xml/xslt/xslt-stylesheet-scripting-using-msxsl-script
- https://medium.com/tsscyber/pentesting-and-hta-bypassing-powershell-constrained-language-mode-53a42856c997
- https://twitter.com/mattifestation/status/1326228491302563846

## Suspicious Mshta.EXE Execution Patterns

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e32f92d1-523e-49c3-9374-bdb13b46a3ba` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1106 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_susp_pattern.yml)**

> Detects suspicious mshta process execution patterns

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Mshta.EXE Execution Patterns
-- Sigma ID:     e32f92d1-523e-49c3-9374-bdb13b46a3ba
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1106
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_mshta_susp_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'MSHTA.EXE'))
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\ProgramData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Windows\\Temp\\%'))))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'MSHTA.EXE'))
  AND NOT (((procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.htm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta%')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta')))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/HTML_Application
- https://www.echotrail.io/insights/search/mshta.exe
- https://app.any.run/tasks/34221348-072d-4b70-93f3-aa71f6ebecad/

## DllUnregisterServer Function Call Via Msiexec.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `84f52741-8834-4a8c-a413-2eb2269aa6c8` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.007 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msiexec_dll.yml)**

> Detects MsiExec loading a DLL and calling its DllUnregisterServer function

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        DllUnregisterServer Function Call Via Msiexec.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     84f52741-8834-4a8c-a413-2eb2269aa6c8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.007
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-04-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msiexec_dll.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll%')
  AND rawEventMsg LIKE '% -z %'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = '\msiexec.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1218.007/T1218.007.md
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Msiexec/

## Suspicious MsiExec Embedding Parent

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4a2a2c3e-209f-4d01-b513-4155a540b469` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.007 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msiexec_embedding.yml)**

> Adversaries may abuse msiexec.exe to proxy the execution of malicious payloads

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious MsiExec Embedding Parent
-- Sigma ID:     4a2a2c3e-209f-4d01-b513-4155a540b469
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.007
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-04-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msiexec_embedding.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%MsiExec.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%-Embedding %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## Suspicious Msiexec Execute Arbitrary DLL

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6f4191bb-912b-48a8-9ce7-682769541e6d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.007 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msiexec_execute_dll.yml)**

> Adversaries may abuse msiexec.exe to proxy execution of malicious payloads.
Msiexec.exe is the command-line utility for the Windows Installer and is thus commonly associated with executing installation packages (.msi)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Msiexec Execute Arbitrary DLL
-- Sigma ID:     6f4191bb-912b-48a8-9ce7-682769541e6d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.007
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msiexec_execute_dll.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate script
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe'
    AND rawEventMsg LIKE '% -y%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate script

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/msiexec

- https://twitter.com/_st0pp3r_/status/1583914515996897281

> Adversaries may abuse msiexec.exe to proxy execution of malicious payloads.
Msiexec.exe is the command-line utility for the Windows Installer and is thus commonly associated with executing installation packages (.msi)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Msiexec Quiet Installation
-- Sigma ID:     79a87aa6-e4bd-42fc-a5bb-5e6fbdcd62f5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
```

## Potential MsiExec Masquerading

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e22a6eb2-f8a5-44b5-8b44-a2dbd47b1144` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036.005 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msiexec_masquerading.yml)**

> Detects the execution of msiexec.exe from an uncommon directory

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential MsiExec Masquerading
-- Sigma ID:     e22a6eb2-f8a5-44b5-8b44-a2dbd47b1144
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.005
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-11-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msiexec_masquerading.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = '\msiexec.exe'))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\System32\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## MsiExec Web Install

| Field | Value |
|---|---|

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_msiexec_web_install.yml)**

> Detects suspicious msiexec process starts with web addresses as parameter

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MsiExec Web Install
-- Sigma ID:     f7b5f842-a6af-4da5-9e95-e32478f3cd2f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.007, T1105

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
```
