## PowerShell Execution With Potential Decryption Capabilities

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `434c08ba-8406-4d15-8b24-782cb071a691` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_decrypt_pattern.yml)**

> Detects PowerShell commands that decrypt an ".LNK" "file to drop the next stage of the malware.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Execution With Potential Decryption Capabilities
-- Sigma ID:     434c08ba-8406-4d15-8b24-782cb071a691
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-06-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_decrypt_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ChildItem %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dir %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gci %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ls %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-Content %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gc %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cat %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%type %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ReadAllBytes%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ^| %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\*.lnk%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Recurse%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Skip %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExpandProperty %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\*.lnk%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WriteAllBytes%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% .length %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://research.checkpoint.com/2023/chinese-threat-actors-targeting-europe-in-smugx-campaign/

---

## Powershell Defender Disable Scan Feature

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1ec65a5f-9473-4f12-97da-622044d6df21` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_defender_disable_feature.yml)**

> Detects requests to disable Microsoft Defender features using PowerShell commands

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Powershell Defender Disable Scan Feature
-- Sigma ID:     1ec65a5f-9473-4f12-97da-622044d6df21
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_defender_disable_feature.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Possible administrative activity; Other Cmdlets that may use the same parameters
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-MpPreference %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-MpPreference %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableArchiveScanning %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableRealtimeMonitoring %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableIOAVProtection %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableBehaviorMonitoring %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableBlockAtFirstSeen %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableCatchupFullScan %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DisableCatchupQuickScan %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%$true%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 1 %')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBSAGUAYQBsAHQAaQBtAGUATQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAUgBlAGEAbAB0AGkAbQBlAE0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAFIAZQBhAGwAdABpAG0AZQBNAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBJAE8AQQBWAFAAcgBvAHQAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4AIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUASQBPAEEAVgBQAHIAbwB0AGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAEkATwBBAFYAUAByAG8AdABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBCAGUAaABhAHYAaQBvAHIATQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAQgBlAGgAYQB2AGkAbwByAE0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAEIAZQBoAGEAdgBpAG8AcgBNAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBCAGwAbwBjAGsAQQB0AEYAaQByAHMAdABTAGUAZQBuACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAQgBsAG8AYwBrAEEAdABGAGkAcgBzAHQAUwBlAGUAbgAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAEIAbABvAGMAawBBAHQARgBpAHIAcwB0AFMAZQBlAG4AIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQByAGUAYQBsAHQAaQBtAGUAbQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAcgBlAGEAbAB0AGkAbQBlAG0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAHIAZQBhAGwAdABpAG0AZQBtAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBpAG8AYQB2AHAAcgBvAHQAZQBjAHQAaQBvAG4AIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAaQBvAGEAdgBwAHIAbwB0AGUAYwB0AGkAbwBuACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAGkAbwBhAHYAcAByAG8AdABlAGMAdABpAG8AbgAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBiAGUAaABhAHYAaQBvAHIAbQBvAG4AaQB0AG8AcgBpAG4AZwAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAYgBlAGgAYQB2AGkAbwByAG0AbwBuAGkAdABvAHIAaQBuAGcAIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAGIAZQBoAGEAdgBpAG8AcgBtAG8AbgBpAHQAbwByAGkAbgBnACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBiAGwAbwBjAGsAYQB0AGYAaQByAHMAdABzAGUAZQBuACAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QAaQBzAGEAYgBsAGUAYgBsAG8AYwBrAGEAdABmAGkAcgBzAHQAcwBlAGUAbgAgA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kAGkAcwBhAGIAbABlAGIAbABvAGMAawBhAHQAZgBpAHIAcwB0AHMAZQBlAG4AIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBDAGEAdABjAGgAdQBwAEYAdQBsAGwAUwBjAGEAbgA%' LIKE '%RABpAHMAYQBiAGwAZQBBAHIAYwBoAGkAdgBlAFMAYwBhAG4AbgBpAG4AZwA%'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'ZGlzYWJsZWFyY2hpdmVzY2FubmluZyA|GRpc2FibGVhcmNoaXZlc2Nhbm5pbmc|BkaXNhYmxlYXJjaGl2ZXNjYW5uaW5nIA|RGlzYWJsZUFyY2hpdmVTY2FubmluZyA|ERpc2FibGVBcmNoaXZlU2Nhbm5pbmc|BEaXNhYmxlQXJjaGl2ZVNjYW5uaW5nIA|ZGlzYWJsZWJlaGF2aW9ybW9uaXRvcmluZyA|GRpc2FibGViZWhhdmlvcm1vbml0b3Jpbmc|BkaXNhYmxlYmVoYXZpb3Jtb25pdG9yaW5nIA|RGlzYWJsZUJlaGF2aW9yTW9uaXRvcmluZyA|ERpc2FibGVCZWhhdmlvck1vbml0b3Jpbmc|BEaXNhYmxlQmVoYXZpb3JNb25pdG9yaW5nIA|ZGlzYWJsZWJsb2NrYXRmaXJzdHNlZW4g|GRpc2FibGVibG9ja2F0Zmlyc3RzZWVuIA|BkaXNhYmxlYmxvY2thdGZpcnN0c2Vlbi|RGlzYWJsZUJsb2NrQXRGaXJzdFNlZW4g|ERpc2FibGVCbG9ja0F0Rmlyc3RTZWVuIA|BEaXNhYmxlQmxvY2tBdEZpcnN0U2Vlbi|ZGlzYWJsZWNhdGNodXBmdWxsc2NhbiA|GRpc2FibGVjYXRjaHVwZnVsbHNjYW4|BkaXNhYmxlY2F0Y2h1cGZ1bGxzY2FuIA|RGlzYWJsZUNhdGNodXBGdWxsU2NhbiA|ERpc2FibGVDYXRjaHVwRnVsbFNjYW4|BEaXNhYmxlQ2F0Y2h1cEZ1bGxTY2FuIA|ZGlzYWJsZWNhdGNodXBxdWlja3NjYW4g|GRpc2FibGVjYXRjaHVwcXVpY2tzY2FuIA|BkaXNhYmxlY2F0Y2h1cHF1aWNrc2Nhbi|RGlzYWJsZUNhdGNodXBRdWlja1NjYW4g|ERpc2FibGVDYXRjaHVwUXVpY2tTY2FuIA|BEaXNhYmxlQ2F0Y2h1cFF1aWNrU2Nhbi|ZGlzYWJsZWlvYXZwcm90ZWN0aW9uIA|GRpc2FibGVpb2F2cHJvdGVjdGlvbiA|BkaXNhYmxlaW9hdnByb3RlY3Rpb2|RGlzYWJsZUlPQVZQcm90ZWN0aW9uIA|ERpc2FibGVJT0FWUHJvdGVjdGlvbiA|BEaXNhYmxlSU9BVlByb3RlY3Rpb2|ZGlzYWJsZXJlYWx0aW1lbW9uaXRvcmluZyA|GRpc2FibGVyZWFsdGltZW1vbml0b3Jpbmc|BkaXNhYmxlcmVhbHRpbWVtb25pdG9yaW5nIA|RGlzYWJsZVJlYWx0aW1lTW9uaXRvcmluZyA|ERpc2FibGVSZWFsdGltZU1vbml0b3Jpbmc|BEaXNhYmxlUmVhbHRpbWVNb25pdG9yaW5nIA'))

LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Possible administrative activity; Other Cmdlets that may use the same parameters

**References:**

## Powershell Defender Exclusion

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `17769c90-230e-488b-a463-e05c08e9d48f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_defender_exclusion.yml)**

> Detects requests to exclude files, folders or processes from Antivirus scanning using PowerShell cmdlets

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Powershell Defender Exclusion
-- Sigma ID:     17769c90-230e-488b-a463-e05c08e9d48f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-04-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_defender_exclusion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Possible Admin Activity; Other Cmdlets that may use the same parameters
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-MpPreference %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-MpPreference %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExclusionPath %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExclusionExtension %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExclusionProcess %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ExclusionIpAddress %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Possible Admin Activity; Other Cmdlets that may use the same parameters

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/defender-endpoint/configure-process-opened-file-exclusions-microsoft-defender-antivirus
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1562.001/T1562.001.md
- https://twitter.com/AdamTheAnalyst/status/1483497517119590403

---

## Disable Windows Defender AV Security Monitoring

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a7ee1722-c3c5-aeff-3212-c777e4733217` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | ok @securonix invrep-de, oscd.community, frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_disable_defender_av_security_monitoring.yml)**

> Detects attackers attempting to disable Windows Defender using Powershell

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Disable Windows Defender AV Security Monitoring
-- Sigma ID:     a7ee1722-c3c5-aeff-3212-c777e4733217
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       ok @securonix invrep-de, oscd.community, frack113
-- Date:         2020-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_disable_defender_av_security_monitoring.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Minimal, for some older versions of dev tools, such as pycharm, developers were known to sometimes disable Windows Defender to improve performance, but this generally is not considered a good security practice.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-DisableBehaviorMonitoring $true%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-DisableRuntimeMonitoring $true%')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\sc.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'sc.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Minimal, for some older versions of dev tools, such as pycharm, developers were known to sometimes disable Windows Defender to improve performance, but this generally is not considered a good security practice.

**References:**
- https://research.nccgroup.com/2020/06/23/wastedlocker-a-new-ransomware-variant-developed-by-the-evil-corp-group/
- https://rvsec0n.wordpress.com/2020/01/24/malwares-that-bypass-windows-defender/
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1562.001/T1562.001.md

---

## Windows Firewall Disabled via PowerShell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `12f6b752-042d-483e-bf9c-915a6d06ad75` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562 |
| **Author** | Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_disable_firewall.yml)**

> Detects attempts to disable the Windows Firewall using PowerShell

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Firewall Disabled via PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     12f6b752-042d-483e-bf9c-915a6d06ad75
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_disable_firewall.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-NetFirewallProfile %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Enabled %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% False%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -All %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Domain%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Private%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/windows-firewall-disabled-via-powershell.html

## Disabled IE Security Features

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `fb50eb7a-5ab1-43ae-bcc9-091818cb8424` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_disable_ie_features.yml)**

> Detects command lines that indicate unwanted modifications to registry keys that disable important Internet Explorer security features

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Disabled IE Security Features
-- Sigma ID:     fb50eb7a-5ab1-43ae-bcc9-091818cb8424
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-06-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_disable_ie_features.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -name IEHarden %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -value 0 %')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -name DEPOff %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -value 1 %')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -name DisableFirstRunCustomize %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -value 2 %')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/operation-ke3chang-resurfaces-with-new-tidepool-malware/

## Potential PowerShell Downgrade Attack

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b3512211-c67e-4707-bedc-66efc7848863` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Harish Segar (rule) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_downgrade_attack.yml)**

> Detects PowerShell downgrade attack by comparing the host versions with the actually used engine version 2.0

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential PowerShell Downgrade Attack
-- Sigma ID:     b3512211-c67e-4707-bedc-66efc7848863
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Harish Segar (rule)
-- Date:         2020-03-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_downgrade_attack.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -version 2 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -versio 2 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -versi 2 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -vers 2 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ver 2 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ve 2 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -v 2 %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- http://www.leeholmes.com/blog/2017/03/17/detecting-and-preventing-powershell-downgrade-attacks/
- https://github.com/r00t-3xp10it/hacking-material-books/blob/43cb1e1932c16ff1f58b755bc9ab6b096046853f/obfuscation/simple_obfuscation.md#bypass-or-avoid-amsi-by-version-downgrade-

## Potential COM Objects Download Cradles Usage - Process Creation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `02b64f1b-3f33-4e67-aede-ef3b0a5a8fcf` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_com_cradles.yml)**

> Detects usage of COM objects that can be abused to download files in PowerShell by CLSID

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential COM Objects Download Cradles Usage - Process Creation
-- Sigma ID:     02b64f1b-3f33-4e67-aede-ef3b0a5a8fcf
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_com_cradles.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of the library
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[Type]::GetTypeFromCLSID(%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0002DF01-0000-0000-C000-000000000046%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%F6D90F16-9C73-11D3-B32E-00C04F990BB4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%F5078F35-C551-11D3-89B9-0000F81FE221%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%88d96a0a-f192-11d4-a65f-0040963251e5%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AFBA6B42-5692-48EA-8141-DC517DCF0EF1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AFB40FFD-B609-40A3-9828-F88BBE11E4E3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%88d96a0b-f192-11d4-a65f-0040963251e5%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%2087c2f4-2cef-4953-a8ab-66779b670495%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%000209FF-0000-0000-C000-000000000046%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%00024500-0000-0000-C000-000000000046%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of the library

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.type.gettypefromclsid?view=net-7.0
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-powershell-abuse?slide=57

> Detects the execution of a specific OneLiner to download and execute powershell modules in memory.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Obfuscated PowerShell OneLiner Execution
-- Sigma ID:     44e24481-6202-4c62-9127-5a0ae8e3fe3d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1562.001

-- Date:         2022-05-09

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://127.0.0.1%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%{(IRM $\_)}%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/05/09/seo-poisoning-a-gootloader-story/
- https://gist.github.com/mgeeky/3b11169ab77a7de354f4111aa2f0df38

## Potential DLL File Download Via PowerShell Invoke-WebRequest

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0f0450f3-8b47-441e-a31b-15a91dc243e2` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001, T1105 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Hieu Tran |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_dll.yml)**

> Detects potential DLL files being downloaded using the PowerShell Invoke-WebRequest or Invoke-RestMethod cmdlets.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential DLL File Download Via PowerShell Invoke-WebRequest
-- Sigma ID:     0f0450f3-8b47-441e-a31b-15a91dc243e2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1105
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Hieu Tran
-- Date:         2023-03-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_dll.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RestMethod %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IRM %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IWR %'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OutFile%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.zscaler.com/blogs/security-research/onenote-growing-threat-malware-distribution

## PowerShell Download and Execution Cradles

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `85b0b087-eddf-4a2b-b033-d771fa2b9775` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_iex.yml)**

> Detects PowerShell download and execution cradles.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Download and Execution Cradles
-- Sigma ID:     85b0b087-eddf-4a2b-b033-d771fa2b9775
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_iex.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some PowerShell installers were seen using similar combinations. Apply filters accordingly
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadString(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadFile(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RestMethod %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%irm %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;iex $%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%| IEX%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%|IEX %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%I`E`X%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%I`EX%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IE`X%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iex %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX (%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Expression%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some PowerShell installers were seen using similar combinations. Apply filters accordingly

**References:**
- https://github.com/VirtualAlllocEx/Payload-Download-Cradles/blob/88e8eca34464a547c90d9140d70e9866dcbc6a12/Download-Cradles.cmd
- https://labs.withsecure.com/publications/fin7-target-veeam-servers

## PowerShell Download Pattern

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3b6ab547-8ec2-4991-b9d2-2b06702a48d7` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_patterns.yml)**

> Detects a Powershell process that contains download commands in its command line string

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Download Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     3b6ab547-8ec2-4991-b9d2-2b06702a48d7
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%new-object%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%net.webclient).%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%download%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%string(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%file(%')))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell_ISE.EXE', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://blog.redteam.pl/2020/06/black-kingdom-ransomware.html
- https://lab52.io/blog/winter-vivern-all-summer/
- https://hatching.io/blog/powershell-analysis/

## Potentially Suspicious File Download From File Sharing Domain Via PowerShell.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b6e04788-29e1-4557-bb14-77f761848ab8` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_susp_file_sharing_domains.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious file downloads from file sharing domains using PowerShell.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious File Download From File Sharing Domain Via PowerShell.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     b6e04788-29e1-4557-bb14-77f761848ab8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-02-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_download_susp_file_sharing_domains.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadString(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadFile(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%anonfiles.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cdn.discordapp.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ddns.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dl.dropboxusercontent.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ghostbin.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%glitch.me%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gofile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mediafire.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mega.nz%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%onrender.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pages.dev%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%paste.ee%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastebin.pl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pastetext.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pixeldrain.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%privatlab.net%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%send.exploit.in%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sendspace.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storage.googleapis.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%storjshare.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%supabase.co%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%temp.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%transfer.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%trycloudflare.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ufile.io%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%w3spaces.com%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%workers.dev%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://labs.withsecure.com/publications/fin7-target-veeam-servers

## DSInternals Suspicious PowerShell Cmdlets

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `43d91656-a9b2-4541-b7e2-6a9bd3a13f4e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Nounou Mbeiri |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_dsinternals_cmdlets.yml)**

> Detects execution and usage of the DSInternals PowerShell module. Which can be used to perform what might be considered as suspicious activity such as dumping DPAPI backup keys or manipulating NTDS.DIT files.
The DSInternals PowerShell Module exposes several internal features of Active Directory and Azure Active Directory. These include FIDO2 and NGC key auditing, offline ntds.dit file manipulation, password auditing, DC recovery from IFM backups and password hash calculation.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        DSInternals Suspicious PowerShell Cmdlets
-- Sigma ID:     43d91656-a9b2-4541-b7e2-6a9bd3a13f4e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Nounou Mbeiri
-- Date:         2024-06-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_dsinternals_cmdlets.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of DSInternals for administration or audit purpose.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-ADDBSidHistory%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-ADNgcKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-ADReplNgcKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertFrom-ADManagedPasswordBlob%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertFrom-GPPrefPassword%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertFrom-ManagedPasswordBlob%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertFrom-UnattendXmlPassword%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertFrom-UnicodePassword%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-AADHash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-GPPrefPassword%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-KerberosKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-LMHash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-MsoPasswordHash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-NTHash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-OrgIdHash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-UnicodePassword%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Disable-ADDBAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Enable-ADDBAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADDBAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADDBBackupKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADDBDomainController%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADDBGroupManagedServiceAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADDBKdsRootKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADDBSchemaAttribute%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADDBServiceAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADDefaultPasswordPolicy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADKeyCredential%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADPasswordPolicy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADReplAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADReplBackupKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADReplicationAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADSIAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-AzureADUserEx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-BootKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-KeyCredential%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-LsaBackupKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-LsaPolicy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-SamPasswordPolicy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-SysKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-SystemKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-ADDBRestoreFromMediaScript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-ADKeyCredential%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-ADNgcKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-NTHashSet%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-ADDBObject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Save-DPAPIBlob%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ADAccountPasswordHash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ADDBAccountPassword%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ADDBBootKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ADDBDomainController%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ADDBPrimaryGroup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-ADDBSysKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-AzureADUserEx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-LsaPolicy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-SamAccountPasswordHash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-WinUserPasswordHash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Test-ADDBPasswordQuality%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Test-ADPasswordQuality%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Test-ADReplPasswordQuality%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Test-PasswordQuality%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Unlock-ADDBAccount%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Write-ADNgcKey%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Write-ADReplNgcKey%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of DSInternals for administration or audit purpose.

**References:**
- https://github.com/MichaelGrafnetter/DSInternals/blob/39ee8a69bbdc1cfd12c9afdd7513b4788c4895d4/Src/DSInternals.PowerShell/DSInternals.psd1

```sql
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-PSSnapin%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-Recipient%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ExpandProperty%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EmailAddresses%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SmtpAddress%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-hidetableheaders%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/09/07/profiling-dev-0270-phosphorus-ransomware-operations/
- https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/7e6aa438e254d468feec061618a7877aa528ee9f/Hunting%20Queries/Microsoft%20365%20Defender/Ransomware/DEV-0270/Email%20data%20exfiltration%20via%20PowerShell.yaml

## Potential Suspicious Windows Feature Enabled - ProcCreation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c740d4cf-a1e9-41de-bb16-8a46a4f57918` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_enable_susp_windows_optional_feature.yml)**

> Detects usage of the built-in PowerShell cmdlet "Enable-WindowsOptionalFeature" used as a Deployment Image Servicing and Management tool.
Similar to DISM.exe, this cmdlet is used to enumerate, install, uninstall, configure, and update features and packages in Windows images


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Suspicious Windows Feature Enabled - ProcCreation
-- Sigma ID:     c740d4cf-a1e9-41de-bb16-8a46a4f57918
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_enable_susp_windows_optional_feature.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the features listed in the rule.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Enable-WindowsOptionalFeature%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Online%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-FeatureName%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TelnetServer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Internet-Explorer-Optional-amd64%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TFTP%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SMB1Protocol%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Client-ProjFS%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Microsoft-Windows-Subsystem-Linux%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of the features listed in the rule.

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/dism/enable-windowsoptionalfeature?view=windowsserver2022-ps
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/projfs/enabling-windows-projected-file-system
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/wsl/install-on-server

---

## Suspicious Execution of Powershell with Base64

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `fb843269-508c-4b76-8b8d-88679db22ce7` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_encode.yml)**

> Commandline to launch powershell with a base64 payload

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Execution of Powershell with Base64
-- Sigma ID:     fb843269-508c-4b76-8b8d-88679db22ce7
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_encode.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -e %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -en %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -enc %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -enco%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ec %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1059.001/T1059.001.md#atomic-test-20---powershell-invoke-known-malicious-cmdlets
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/unit42-pulling-back-the-curtains-on-encodedcommand-powershell-attacks/
- https://mikefrobbins.com/2017/06/15/simple-obfuscation-with-powershell-using-base64-encoding/

## Potential Encoded PowerShell Patterns In CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cdf05894-89e7-4ead-b2b0-0a5f97a90f2f` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Vasiliy Burov (rule), oscd.community, Tim Shelton |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_encoding_patterns.yml)**

> Detects specific combinations of encoding methods in PowerShell via the commandline

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Encoded PowerShell Patterns In CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     cdf05894-89e7-4ead-b2b0-0a5f97a90f2f
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1027, T1059.001
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Vasiliy Burov (rule), oscd.community, Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2020-10-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_encoding_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## Powershell Inline Execution From A File

| Field | Value |
|---|---|

| **FSM Severity** | 5 |

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_exec_data_file.yml)**

> Detects inline execution of PowerShell code from a file

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Powershell Inline Execution From A File
-- Sigma ID:     ee218c12-627a-4d27-9e30-d6fb2fe22ed2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_exec_data_file.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iex %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Expression %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Command %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%icm %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -raw%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cat %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%get-content %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%type %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Certificate Exported Via PowerShell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9e716b33-63b2-46da-86a4-bd3c3b9b5dfb` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1552.004, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_export_certificate.yml)**

> Detects calls to cmdlets that are used to export certificates from the local certificate store. Threat actors were seen abusing this to steal private keys from compromised machines.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Certificate Exported Via PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     9e716b33-63b2-46da-86a4-bd3c3b9b5dfb
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1552.004, T1059.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_export_certificate.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate certificate exports by administrators. Additional filters might be required.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Export-PfxCertificate %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Export-Certificate %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate certificate exports by administrators. Additional filters might be required.

**References:**
- https://us-cert.cisa.gov/ncas/analysis-reports/ar21-112a
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/pki/export-pfxcertificate?view=windowsserver2022-ps
- https://www.splunk.com/en_us/blog/security/breaking-the-chain-defending-against-certificate-services-abuse.html

## Base64 Encoded PowerShell Command Detected

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e32d4572-9826-4738-b651-95fa63747e8a` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027, T1140, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_frombase64string.yml)**

> Detects usage of the "FromBase64String" function in the commandline which is used to decode a base64 encoded string

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Base64 Encoded PowerShell Command Detected
-- Sigma ID:     e32d4572-9826-4738-b651-95fa63747e8a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1027, T1140, T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-01-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_frombase64string.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative script libraries
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::FromBase64String(%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative script libraries

**References:**
- https://gist.github.com/Neo23x0/6af876ee72b51676c82a2db8d2cd3639

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d75d6b6b-adb9-48f7-824b-ac2e786efe1f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1132.001 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_frombase64string_archive.yml)**

> Detects attempts of decoding a base64 Gzip archive via PowerShell. This technique is often used as a method to load malicious content into memory afterward.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious FromBase64String Usage On Gzip Archive - Process Creation
-- Sigma ID:     d75d6b6b-adb9-48f7-824b-ac2e786efe1f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1132.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_frombase64string_archive.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative script
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FromBase64String%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MemoryStream%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%H4sI%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrative script

**References:**
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-powershell-abuse?slide=43

|---|---|

| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1087.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_get_localgroup_member_recon.yml)**

> Detects suspicious reconnaissance command line activity on Windows systems using the PowerShell Get-LocalGroupMember Cmdlet

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Reconnaissance Activity Using Get-LocalGroupMember Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     c8a180d6-47a3-4345-a609-53f9c3d834fc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1087.001

  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
```

## Abuse of Service Permissions to Hide Services Via Set-Service

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `514e4c3a-c77d-4cde-a00f-046425e2301e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1574.011 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_hide_services_via_set_service.yml)**

> Detects usage of the "Set-Service" powershell cmdlet to configure a new SecurityDescriptor that allows a service to be hidden from other utilities such as "sc.exe", "Get-Service"...etc. (Works only in powershell 7)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Abuse of Service Permissions to Hide Services Via Set-Service
-- Sigma ID:     514e4c3a-c77d-4cde-a00f-046425e2301e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1574.011
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_hide_services_via_set_service.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Rare intended use of hidden services
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-SecurityDescriptorSddl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sd %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'pwsh.dll'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Service %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DCLCWPDTSD%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Rare intended use of hidden services

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/Alh4zr3d/status/1580925761996828672
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.powershell.management/set-service?view=powershell-7.2

---

## Suspicious PowerShell IEX Execution Patterns

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `09576804-7a05-458e-a817-eb718ca91f54` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_iex_patterns.yml)**

> Detects suspicious ways to run Invoke-Execution using IEX alias

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell IEX Execution Patterns
-- Sigma ID:     09576804-7a05-458e-a817-eb718ca91f54
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_iex_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate scripts that use IEX
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | iex;%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | iex %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | iex}%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | IEX ;%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | IEX -Error%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | IEX (new%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%);IEX %')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::FromBase64String%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.GetString([System.Convert]::%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%)|iex;$%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%);iex($%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%);iex $%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | IEX | %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | iex\\"%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate scripts that use IEX

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.powershell.utility/invoke-expression?view=powershell-7.2
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/slashandgrab-screen-connect-post-exploitation-in-the-wild-cve-2024-1709-cve-2024-1708

## Root Certificate Installed From Susp Locations

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5f6a601c-2ecb-498b-9c33-660362323afa` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1553.004 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_import_cert_susp_locations.yml)**

> Adversaries may install a root certificate on a compromised system to avoid warnings when connecting to adversary controlled web servers.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Root Certificate Installed From Susp Locations
-- Sigma ID:     5f6a601c-2ecb-498b-9c33-660362323afa
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1553.004
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_import_cert_susp_locations.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Import-Certificate%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -FilePath %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Cert:\\LocalMachine\\Root%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\TEMP\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Perflogs\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/09/07/profiling-dev-0270-phosphorus-ransomware-operations/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/pki/import-certificate?view=windowsserver2022-ps
