## Import PowerShell Modules From Suspicious Directories - ProcCreation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c31364f7-8be6-4b77-8483-dd2b5a7b69a3` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_import_module_susp_dirs.yml)**

> Detects powershell scripts that import modules from suspicious directories

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Import PowerShell Modules From Suspicious Directories - ProcCreation
-- Sigma ID:     c31364f7-8be6-4b77-8483-dd2b5a7b69a3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_import_module_susp_dirs.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Import-Module "$Env:Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Import-Module '$Env:Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Import-Module $Env:Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Import-Module "$Env:Appdata\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Import-Module '$Env:Appdata\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Import-Module $Env:Appdata\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Import-Module C:\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipmo "$Env:Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipmo '$Env:Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipmo $Env:Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipmo "$Env:Appdata\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipmo '$Env:Appdata\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipmo $Env:Appdata\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipmo C:\\Users\\Public\\%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1003.002/T1003.002.md

## Unsigned AppX Installation Attempt Using Add-AppxPackage

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `37651c2a-42cd-4a69-ae0d-22a4349aa04a` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_install_unsigned_appx_packages.yml)**

> Detects usage of the "Add-AppxPackage" or it's alias "Add-AppPackage" to install unsigned AppX packages

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Unsigned AppX Installation Attempt Using Add-AppxPackage
-- Sigma ID:     37651c2a-42cd-4a69-ae0d-22a4349aa04a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_install_unsigned_appx_packages.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Installation of unsigned packages for testing purposes
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-AppPackage %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-AppxPackage %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -AllowUnsigned%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Installation of unsigned packages for testing purposes

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/msix/package/unsigned-package
- https://twitter.com/WindowsDocs/status/1620078135080325122

```sql
-- ============================================================

-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
```

## Suspicious Invoke-WebRequest Execution With DirectIP

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1edff897-9146-48d2-9066-52e8d8f80a2f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_invoke_webrequest_direct_ip.yml)**

> Detects calls to PowerShell with Invoke-WebRequest cmdlet using direct IP access

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Invoke-WebRequest Execution With DirectIP
-- Sigma ID:     1edff897-9146-48d2-9066-52e8d8f80a2f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-04-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_invoke_webrequest_direct_ip.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RestMethod%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% irm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('powershell_ise.EXE', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://5%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://6%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://7%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://8%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://9%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/critical-vulnerabilities-in-papercut-print-management-software

---

## Suspicious Invoke-WebRequest Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5e3cc4d8-3e68-43db-8656-eaaeefdec9cc` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_invoke_webrequest_download.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious call to Invoke-WebRequest cmdlet where the and output is located in a suspicious location

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Invoke-WebRequest Execution
-- Sigma ID:     5e3cc4d8-3e68-43db-8656-eaaeefdec9cc
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_invoke_webrequest_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ur%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -o%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('powershell_ise.EXE', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%AppData\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%Public\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%Temp\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%tmp\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.sentinelone.com/blog/living-off-windows-defender-lockbit-ransomware-sideloads-cobalt-strike-through-microsoft-security-tool/

## Suspicious Kerberos Ticket Request via CLI

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `caa9a802-8bd8-4b9e-a5cd-4d6221670219` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1558.003 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_kerberos_kerberos_ticket_request_via_cli.yml)**

> Detects suspicious Kerberos ticket requests via command line using System.IdentityModel.Tokens.KerberosRequestorSecurityToken class.
Threat actors may use command line interfaces to request Kerberos tickets for service accounts in order to
perform offline password cracking attacks commonly known as Kerberoasting or other Kerberos ticket abuse
techniques like silver ticket attacks.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Kerberos Ticket Request via CLI
-- Sigma ID:     caa9a802-8bd8-4b9e-a5cd-4d6221670219
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1558.003
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_kerberos_kerberos_ticket_request_via_cli.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate command line usage by administrators or security tools.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%System.IdentityModel.Tokens.KerberosRequestorSecurityToken%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.GetRequest()%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('powershell.exe', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate command line usage by administrators or security tools.

**References:**
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/gootloader-threat-detection-woff2-obfuscation
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1558.003/T1558.003.md#atomic-test-4---request-a-single-ticket-via-powershell
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.identitymodel.tokens.kerberosrequestorsecuritytoken?view=netframework-4.8.1

---

## Suspicious PowerShell Mailbox Export to Share

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `889719ef-dd62-43df-86c3-768fb08dc7c0` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | exfiltration |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_mailboxexport_share.yml)**

> Detects usage of the powerShell New-MailboxExportRequest Cmdlet to exports a mailbox to a remote or local share, as used in ProxyShell exploitations

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Mailbox Export to Share
-- Sigma ID:     889719ef-dd62-43df-86c3-768fb08dc7c0
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_mailboxexport_share.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%New-MailboxExportRequest%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Mailbox %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -FilePath \\\\\\\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://youtu.be/5mqid-7zp8k?t=2481
- https://blog.orange.tw/2021/08/proxylogon-a-new-attack-surface-on-ms-exchange-part-1.html
- https://peterjson.medium.com/reproducing-the-proxyshell-pwn2own-exploit-49743a4ea9a1
- https://m365internals.com/2022/10/07/hunting-in-on-premises-exchange-server-logs/

---

## Malicious PowerShell Commandlets - ProcessCreation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `02030f2f-6199-49ec-b258-ea71b07e03dc` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1482, T1087, T1087.001, T1087.002, T1069.001, T1069.002, T1069, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_malicious_cmdlets.yml)**

> Detects Commandlet names from well-known PowerShell exploitation frameworks

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Malicious PowerShell Commandlets - ProcessCreation
-- Sigma ID:     02030f2f-6199-49ec-b258-ea71b07e03dc
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, discovery | T1482, T1087, T1087.001, T1087.002, T1069.001, T1069.002, T1069, T1059.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_malicious_cmdlets.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-Exfiltration%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-Persistence%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-RegBackdoor%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-RemoteRegBackdoor%' OR ## MSExchange Transport Agent Installation
```

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `83809e84-4475-4b69-bc3e-4aad8568612f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1505.002 |
| **Author** | Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_msexchange_transport_agent.yml)**

> Detects the Installation of a Exchange Transport Agent

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        MSExchange Transport Agent Installation
-- Sigma ID:     83809e84-4475-4b69-bc3e-4aad8568612f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1505.002
-- Author:       Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-06-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_msexchange_transport_agent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate installations of exchange TransportAgents. AssemblyPath is a good indicator for this.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Install-TransportAgent%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate installations of exchange TransportAgents. AssemblyPath is a good indicator for this.

**References:**
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-persistence-via-microsoft-exchange-server-or-outlook?slide=7

## Non Interactive PowerShell Process Spawned

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f4bbd493-b796-416e-bbf2-121235348529` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g (rule), oscd.community (improvements) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_non_interactive_execution.yml)**

> Detects non-interactive PowerShell activity by looking at the "powershell" process with a non-user GUI process such as "explorer.exe" as a parent.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Non Interactive PowerShell Process Spawned
-- Sigma ID:     f4bbd493-b796-416e-bbf2-121235348529
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g (rule), oscd.community (improvements)
-- Date:         2019-09-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_non_interactive_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Likely. Many admin scripts and tools leverage PowerShell in their BAT or VB scripts which may trigger this rule often. It is best to add additional filters or use this to hunt for anomalies
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Likely. Many admin scripts and tools leverage PowerShell in their BAT or VB scripts which may trigger this rule often. It is best to add additional filters or use this to hunt for anomalies

**References:**
- https://web.archive.org/web/20200925032237/https://threathunterplaybook.com/notebooks/windows/02_execution/WIN-190410151110.html

---

## Potential PowerShell Obfuscation Via WCHAR/CHAR

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e312efd0-35a1-407f-8439-b8d434b438a6` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001, T1027 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_obfuscation_via_utf8.yml)**

> Detects suspicious encoded character syntax often used for defense evasion

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential PowerShell Obfuscation Via WCHAR/CHAR
-- Sigma ID:     e312efd0-35a1-407f-8439-b8d434b438a6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1027
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-07-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_obfuscation_via_utf8.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[char]0x%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%(WCHAR)0x%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/0gtweet/status/1281103918693482496

## Execution of Powershell Script in Public Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `fb9d3ff7-7348-46ab-af8c-b55f5fbf39b4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_public_folder.yml)**

> This rule detects execution of PowerShell scripts located in the "C:\Users\Public" folder

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execution of Powershell Script in Public Folder
-- Sigma ID:     fb9d3ff7-7348-46ab-af8c-b55f5fbf39b4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-04-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_public_folder.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-f C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-f "C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-f \%Public\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fi C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fi "C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fi \%Public\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fil C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fil "C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-fil \%Public\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-file C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-file "C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-file \%Public\%%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/evolution-of-fin7

## RemoteFXvGPUDisablement Abuse Via AtomicTestHarnesses

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a6fc3c46-23b8-4996-9ea2-573f4c4d88c5` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_remotefxvgpudisablement_abuse.yml)**

> Detects calls to the AtomicTestHarnesses "Invoke-ATHRemoteFXvGPUDisablementCommand" which is designed to abuse the "RemoteFXvGPUDisablement.exe" binary to run custom PowerShell code via module load-order hijacking.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        RemoteFXvGPUDisablement Abuse Via AtomicTestHarnesses
-- Sigma ID:     a6fc3c46-23b8-4996-9ea2-573f4c4d88c5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_remotefxvgpudisablement_abuse.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ATHRemoteFXvGPUDisablementCommand%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-ATHRemoteFXvGPUDisableme%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1218/T1218.md
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/AtomicTestHarnesses/blob/7e1e4da116801e3d6fcc6bedb207064577e40572/TestHarnesses/T1218_SignedBinaryProxyExecution/InvokeRemoteFXvGPUDisablementCommand.ps1

## Tamper Windows Defender Remove-MpPreference

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `07e3cb2c-0608-410d-be4b-1511cb1a0448` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_remove_mppreference.yml)**

> Detects attempts to remove Windows Defender configurations using the 'MpPreference' cmdlet

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Tamper Windows Defender Remove-MpPreference
-- Sigma ID:     07e3cb2c-0608-410d-be4b-1511cb1a0448
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_remove_mppreference.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate PowerShell scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-MpPreference%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ControlledFolderAccessProtectedFolders %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AttackSurfaceReductionRules\_Ids %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AttackSurfaceReductionRules\_Actions %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-CheckForSignaturesBeforeRunningScan %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate PowerShell scripts

**References:**
- https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/core-infrastructure-and-security/windows-10-controlled-folder-access-event-search/ba-p/2326088

## Potential Powershell ReverseShell Connection

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `edc2f8ae-2412-4dfd-b9d5-0c57727e70be` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | FPT.EagleEye, wagga, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_reverse_shell_connection.yml)**

> Detects usage of the "TcpClient" class. Which can be abused to establish remote connections and reverse-shells. As seen used by the Nishang "Invoke-PowerShellTcpOneLine" reverse shell and other.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Powershell ReverseShell Connection
-- Sigma ID:     edc2f8ae-2412-4dfd-b9d5-0c57727e70be
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       FPT.EagleEye, wagga, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-03-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_reverse_shell_connection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    In rare administrative cases, this function might be used to check network connectivity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Net.Sockets.TCPClient%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.GetStream(%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Write(%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** In rare administrative cases, this function might be used to check network connectivity

**References:**
- https://www.volexity.com/blog/2021/03/02/active-exploitation-of-microsoft-exchange-zero-day-vulnerabilities/
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/03/02/hafnium-targeting-exchange-servers/
- https://github.com/samratashok/nishang/blob/414ee1104526d7057f9adaeee196d91ae447283e/Shells/Invoke-PowerShellTcpOneLine.ps1

---

## Run PowerShell Script from ADS

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `45a594aa-1fbd-4972-a809-ff5a99dd81b8` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.004 |
| **Author** | Sergey Soldatov, Kaspersky Lab, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_run_script_from_ads.yml)**

> Detects PowerShell script execution from Alternate Data Stream (ADS)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Run PowerShell Script from ADS
-- Sigma ID:     45a594aa-1fbd-4972-a809-ff5a99dd81b8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       Sergey Soldatov, Kaspersky Lab, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_run_script_from_ads.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-Content%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Stream%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/p0shkatz/Get-ADS/blob/1c3a3562e713c254edce1995a7d9879c687c7473/Get-ADS.ps1

## Run PowerShell Script from Redirected Input Stream

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c83bf4b5-cdf0-437c-90fa-43d734f7c476` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Moriarty Meng (idea), Anton Kutepov (rule), oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_run_script_from_input_stream.yml)**

> Detects PowerShell script execution via input stream redirect

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Run PowerShell Script from Redirected Input Stream
-- Sigma ID:     c83bf4b5-cdf0-437c-90fa-43d734f7c476
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Moriarty Meng (idea), Anton Kutepov (rule), oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_run_script_from_input_stream.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\s-\s*<')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**

## PowerShell SAM Copy

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1af57a4b-460a-4738-9034-db68b880c665` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_sam_access.yml)**

> Detects suspicious PowerShell scripts accessing SAM hives

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell SAM Copy
-- Sigma ID:     1af57a4b-460a-4738-9034-db68b880c665
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_sam_access.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some rare backup scenarios; PowerShell scripts fixing HiveNightmare / SeriousSAM ACLs
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%System32\\config\\sam%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Copy-Item%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cp $\_.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cpi $\_.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy $\_.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.File]::Copy(%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some rare backup scenarios; PowerShell scripts fixing HiveNightmare / SeriousSAM ACLs

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/splinter_code/status/1420546784250769408

---

## Suspicious PowerShell Invocation From Script Engines

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `95eadcb2-92e4-4ed1-9031-92547773a6db` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_script_engine_parent.yml)**

> Detects suspicious powershell invocations from interpreters or unusual programs

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Invocation From Script Engines
-- Sigma ID:     95eadcb2-92e4-4ed1-9031-92547773a6db
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_script_engine_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Microsoft Operations Manager (MOM); Other scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cscript.exe'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Microsoft Operations Manager (MOM); Other scripts

**References:**
- https://www.securitynewspaper.com/2017/03/20/attackers-leverage-excel-powershell-dns-latest-non-malware-attack/

---

## Suspicious Service DACL Modification Via Set-Service Cmdlet

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a95b9b42-1308-4735-a1af-abb1c5e6f5ac` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1543.003 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_service_dacl_modification_set_service.yml)**

> Detects suspicious DACL modifications via the "Set-Service" cmdlet using the "SecurityDescriptorSddl" flag (Only available with PowerShell 7) that can be used to hide services or make them unstopable

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Service DACL Modification Via Set-Service Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     a95b9b42-1308-4735-a1af-abb1c5e6f5ac
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_service_dacl_modification_set_service.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'pwsh.dll'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-SecurityDescriptorSddl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sd %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Service %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%D;;%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;IU%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;SU%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;BA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;SY%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%;;;WD%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.sans.org/blog/red-team-tactics-hiding-windows-services/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/pt-br/windows/win32/secauthz/sid-strings

---

## PowerShell Script Change Permission Via Set-Acl

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `bdeb2cff-af74-4094-8426-724dc937f20a` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_acl.yml)**

> Detects PowerShell execution to set the ACL of a file or a folder

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Script Change Permission Via Set-Acl
-- Sigma ID:     bdeb2cff-af74-4094-8426-724dc937f20a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_acl.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Acl %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AclObject %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.powershell.security/set-acl?view=powershell-5.1
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/74438b0237d141ee9c99747976447dc884cb1a39/atomics/T1505.005/T1505.005.md

## PowerShell Set-Acl On Windows Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0944e002-e3f6-4eb5-bf69-3a3067b53d73` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_acl_susp_location.yml)**

> Detects PowerShell scripts to set the ACL to a file in the Windows folder

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Set-Acl On Windows Folder
-- Sigma ID:     0944e002-e3f6-4eb5-bf69-3a3067b53d73
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_acl_susp_location.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Acl %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-AclObject %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path "C:\\Windows%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path 'C:\\Windows%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path \%windir\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-Path $env:windir%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FullControl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Allow%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.powershell.security/set-acl?view=powershell-5.1
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/74438b0237d141ee9c99747976447dc884cb1a39/atomics/T1505.005/T1505.005.md

> Detects changing the PowerShell script execution policy to a potentially insecure level using the "-ExecutionPolicy" flag.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Change PowerShell Policies to an Insecure Level
-- Sigma ID:     87e3c4e8-a6a8-4ad9-bb4f-46e7ff99a180
```

## Service StartupType Change Via PowerShell Set-Service

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `62b20d44-1546-4e61-afce-8e175eb9473c` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_service_disabled.yml)**

> Detects the use of the PowerShell "Set-Service" cmdlet to change the startup type of a service to "disabled" or "manual"

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Service StartupType Change Via PowerShell Set-Service
-- Sigma ID:     62b20d44-1546-4e61-afce-8e175eb9473c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-03-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_set_service_disabled.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives may occur with troubleshooting scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Service%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-StartupType%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Disabled%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Manual%')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PowerShell.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** False positives may occur with troubleshooting scripts

**References:**
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/38283b775552da8981452941ea74191aa0d203edd3f61fb2dee7b0aea3514955

## Deletion of Volume Shadow Copies via WMI with PowerShell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `21ff4ca9-f13a-41ad-b828-0077b2af2e40` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | impact |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1490 |
| **Author** | Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_shadowcopy_deletion.yml)**

> Detects deletion of Windows Volume Shadow Copies with PowerShell code and Get-WMIObject. This technique is used by numerous ransomware families such as Sodinokibi/REvil

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Deletion of Volume Shadow Copies via WMI with PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     21ff4ca9-f13a-41ad-b828-0077b2af2e40
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1490
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_shadowcopy_deletion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Delete()%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-WmiObject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rwmi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-CimInstance%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rcim%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-WmiObject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gwmi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-CimInstance%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gcim%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Win32\_ShadowCopy%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1490/T1490.md#atomic-test-5---windows---delete-volume-shadow-copies-via-wmi-with-powershell
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/volume-shadow-copy-deletion-via-powershell.html

## Stop Windows Service Via PowerShell Stop-Service

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c49c5062-0966-4170-9efd-9968c913a6cf` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | impact |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1489 |
| **Author** | Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_stop_service.yml)**

> Detects the stopping of a Windows service via the PowerShell Cmdlet "Stop-Service"

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Stop Windows Service Via PowerShell Stop-Service
-- Sigma ID:     c49c5062-0966-4170-9efd-9968c913a6cf
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1489
-- Author:       Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-03-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_stop_service.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    There are many legitimate reasons to stop a service. This rule isn't looking for any suspicious behaviour in particular. Filter legitimate activity accordingly
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Stop-Service %')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** There are many legitimate reasons to stop a service. This rule isn't looking for any suspicious behaviour in particular. Filter legitimate activity accordingly

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.powershell.management/stop-service?view=powershell-7.4

## Suspicious PowerShell Download and Execute Pattern

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e6c54d94-498c-4562-a37c-b469d8e9a275` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_download_patterns.yml)**

> Detects suspicious PowerShell download patterns that are often used in malicious scripts, stagers or downloaders (make sure that your backend applies the strings case-insensitive)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Download and Execute Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     e6c54d94-498c-4562-a37c-b469d8e9a275
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_download_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Software installers that pull packages from remote systems and execute them
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX ((New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX (New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX((New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX(New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -command (New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadFile(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c (New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadFile(%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Software installers that pull packages from remote systems and execute them

**References:**
- https://gist.github.com/jivoi/c354eaaf3019352ce32522f916c03d70
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/22/j/lv-ransomware-exploits-proxyshell-in-attack.html

---

## Suspicious PowerShell Parameter Substring

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `36210e0d-5b19-485d-a087-c096088885f0` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Daniel Bohannon (idea), Roberto Rodriguez (Fix) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_parameter_variation.yml)**

> Detects suspicious PowerShell invocation with a parameter substring

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Parameter Substring
-- Sigma ID:     36210e0d-5b19-485d-a087-c096088885f0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Daniel Bohannon (idea), Roberto Rodriguez (Fix)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_parameter_variation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windowstyle h %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windowstyl h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windowsty h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windowst h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windows h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -windo h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -wind h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -wi h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win h %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win hi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win hid %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win hidd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -win hidde %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoPr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoPro %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoProf %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoProfi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -NoProfil %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -nonin %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -nonint %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninte %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninter %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -nonintera %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninterac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninteract %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninteracti %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -noninteractiv %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedComman %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedComma %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedComm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedCom %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedCo %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encodedC %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encoded %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encode %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -encod %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -enco %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -en %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionpolic %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionpoli %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionpol %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionpo %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executionp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -execution bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executio bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -executi bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -execut bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -execu bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -exec bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -exe bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ex bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ep bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windowstyle h %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windowstyl h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windowsty h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windowst h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windows h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /windo h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /wind h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /wi h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win h %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win hi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win hid %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win hidd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /win hidde %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoPr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoPro %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoProf %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoProfi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /NoProfil %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /nonin %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /nonint %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninte %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninter %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /nonintera %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninterac %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninteract %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninteracti %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /noninteractiv %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /ec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedComman %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedComma %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedComm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedCom %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedCo %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encodedC %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encoded %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encode %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /encod %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /enco %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /en %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionpolic %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionpoli %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionpol %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionpo %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executionp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /execution bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executio bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /executi bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /execut bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /execu bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /exec bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /exe bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /ex bypass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /ep bypass%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```
