## Suspicious PowerShell Parent Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `754ed792-634f-40ae-b3bc-e0448d33f695` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Harish Segar |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_parent_process.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious or uncommon parent processes of PowerShell

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious PowerShell Parent Process
-- Sigma ID:     754ed792-634f-40ae-b3bc-e0448d33f695
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Harish Segar
-- Date:         2020-03-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_parent_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Other scripts
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%tomcat%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\amigo.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\browser.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\firefox.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\httpd.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\iexplore.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\jbosssvc.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\microsoftedge.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\microsoftedgecp.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\MicrosoftEdgeSH.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\nginx.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\outlook.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\php-cgi.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\safari.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\services.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\sqlagent.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\sqlserver.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\sqlservr.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\w3wp.exe')))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c pwsh%')))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Windows PowerShell')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'PowerShell Core 6'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Other scripts

**References:**
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-powershell-abuse?slide=26

---

## PowerShell Script Run in AppData

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ac175779-025a-4f12-98b0-acdaeb77ea85` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_ps_appdata.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious command line execution that invokes PowerShell with reference to an AppData folder

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PowerShell Script Run in AppData
-- Sigma ID:     ac175779-025a-4f12-98b0-acdaeb77ea85
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-01-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_susp_ps_appdata.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\pwsh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pwsh.exe%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Local\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Roaming\\%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative scripts

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/JohnLaTwC/status/1082851155481288706
- https://app.any.run/tasks/f87f1c4e-47e2-4c46-9cf4-31454c06ce03

---

## Powershell Token Obfuscation - Process Creation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `deb9b646-a508-44ee-b7c9-d8965921c6b6` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027.009 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_token_obfuscation.yml)**

> Detects TOKEN OBFUSCATION technique from Invoke-Obfuscation

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Powershell Token Obfuscation - Process Creation
-- Sigma ID:     deb9b646-a508-44ee-b7c9-d8965921c6b6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027.009
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_token_obfuscation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\w+`(\w+|-|.)`[\w+|\s]')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '"(\{\d\})+"\s*-f')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '(?i)\$\{`?e`?n`?v`?:`?p`?a`?t`?h`?\}')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/danielbohannon/Invoke-Obfuscation

---

## Suspicious Uninstall of Windows Defender Feature via PowerShell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c443012c-7928-43bf-ac20-7eda5efe61ad` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | yxinmiracle |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_uninstall_defender_feature.yml)**

> Detects the use of PowerShell with Uninstall-WindowsFeature or Remove-WindowsFeature cmdlets to disable or remove the Windows Defender GUI feature, a common technique used by adversaries to evade defenses.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Uninstall of Windows Defender Feature via PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     c443012c-7928-43bf-ac20-7eda5efe61ad
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       yxinmiracle
-- Date:         2025-08-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_uninstall_defender_feature.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Windows-Defender%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Uninstall-WindowsFeature%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-WindowsFeature%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell_ISE.EXE', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.windows.servermanager.migration/uninstall-windowsfeature
- https://thedfirreport.com/2023/04/03/malicious-iso-file-leads-to-domain-wide-ransomware

---

## User Discovery And Export Via Get-ADUser Cmdlet

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1114e048-b69c-4f41-bc20-657245ae6e3f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1033 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_user_discovery_get_aduser.yml)**

> Detects usage of the Get-ADUser cmdlet to collect user information and output it to a file

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        User Discovery And Export Via Get-ADUser Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     1114e048-b69c-4f41-bc20-657245ae6e3f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1033
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_user_discovery_get_aduser.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate admin scripts may use the same technique, it's better to exclude specific computers or users who execute these commands or scripts often
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ADUser %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Filter \\*%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% > %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% | Select %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Out-File%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-Content%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-Content%')))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate admin scripts may use the same technique, it's better to exclude specific computers or users who execute these commands or scripts often

**References:**
- http://blog.talosintelligence.com/2022/09/lazarus-three-rats.html
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/10/18/defenders-beware-a-case-for-post-ransomware-investigations/

## Net WebClient Casing Anomalies

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c86133ad-4725-4bd0-8170-210788e0a7ba` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_webclient_casing.yml)**

> Detects PowerShell command line contents that include a suspicious abnormal casing in the Net.Webclient (e.g. nEt.WEbCliEnT) string as used in obfuscation techniques

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Net WebClient Casing Anomalies
-- Sigma ID:     c86133ad-4725-4bd0-8170-210788e0a7ba
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_webclient_casing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TgBlAFQALgB3AEUAQg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%4AZQBUAC4AdwBFAEIA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OAGUAVAAuAHcARQBCA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bgBFAHQALgB3AGUAYg%' OR ## Suspicious X509Enrollment - Process Creation
```

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `114de787-4eb2-48cc-abdb-c0b449f93ea4` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1553.004 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_x509enrollment.yml)**

> Detect use of X509Enrollment

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious X509Enrollment - Process Creation
-- Sigma ID:     114de787-4eb2-48cc-abdb-c0b449f93ea4
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1553.004
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-12-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_x509enrollment.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative script
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%X509Enrollment.CBinaryConverter%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%884e2002-217d-11da-b2a4-000e7bbb2b09%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrative script

**References:**
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-powershell-abuse?slide=42
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-powershell-abuse?slide=41
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/microsoft.hpc.scheduler.store.cx509enrollmentwebclassfactoryclass?view=hpc-sdk-5.1.6115

## Suspicious XOR Encoded PowerShell Command

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `bb780e0c-16cf-4383-8383-1e5471db6cf9` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001, T1140, T1027 |
| **Author** | Sami Ruohonen, Harish Segar, Tim Shelton, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Vasiliy Burov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_xor_commandline.yml)**

> Detects presence of a potentially xor encoded powershell command

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious XOR Encoded PowerShell Command
-- Sigma ID:     bb780e0c-16cf-4383-8383-1e5471db6cf9
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001, T1140, T1027
-- Author:       Sami Ruohonen, Harish Segar, Tim Shelton, Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Vasiliy Burov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2018-09-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_xor_commandline.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ForEach%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%for(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%for %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-join %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-join'%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-join"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-join`%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::Join%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[char]%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bxor%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Windows PowerShell')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'PowerShell Core 6')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-powershell-abuse?slide=65
- https://redcanary.com/blog/yellow-cockatoo/
- https://zero2auto.com/2020/05/19/netwalker-re/
- https://mez0.cc/posts/cobaltstrike-powershell-exec/

---

## Folder Compress To Potentially Suspicious Output Via Compress-Archive Cmdlet

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `85a8e5ba-bd03-4bfb-bbfa-a4409a8f8b98` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1074.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_zip_compress.yml)**

> Detects PowerShell scripts that make use of the "Compress-Archive" Cmdlet in order to compress folders and files where the output is stored in a potentially suspicious location that is used often by malware for exfiltration.
An adversary might compress data (e.g., sensitive documents) that is collected prior to exfiltration in order to make it portable and minimize the amount of data sent over the network.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Folder Compress To Potentially Suspicious Output Via Compress-Archive Cmdlet
-- Sigma ID:     85a8e5ba-bd03-4bfb-bbfa-a4409a8f8b98
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1074.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_powershell_zip_compress.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath $env:TEMP%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Compress-Archive -Path*-DestinationPath*:\\Windows\\Temp\\%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1074.001/T1074.001.md
- https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-347a

---

## Arbitrary File Download Via PresentationHost.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b124ddf4-778d-418e-907f-6dd3fc0d31cd` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_presentationhost_download.yml)**

> Detects usage of "PresentationHost" which is a utility that runs ".xbap" (Browser Applications) files to download arbitrary files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary File Download Via PresentationHost.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     b124ddf4-778d-418e-907f-6dd3fc0d31cd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_presentationhost_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ftp://%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\presentationhost.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PresentationHost.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/LOLBAS-Project/LOLBAS/pull/239/files

## XBAP Execution From Uncommon Locations Via PresentationHost.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d22e2925-cfd8-463f-96f6-89cec9d9bc5f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_presentationhost_uncommon_location_exec.yml)**

> Detects the execution of ".xbap" (Browser Applications) files via PresentationHost.EXE from an uncommon location. These files can be abused to run malicious ".xbap" files any bypass AWL


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        XBAP Execution From Uncommon Locations Via PresentationHost.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     d22e2925-cfd8-463f-96f6-89cec9d9bc5f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_presentationhost_uncommon_location_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate ".xbap" being executed via "PresentationHost"
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate ".xbap" being executed via "PresentationHost"

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Presentationhost/

## Visual Studio NodejsTools PressAnyKey Arbitrary Binary Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a20391f8-76fb-437b-abc0-dba2df1952c6` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pressanykey_lolbin_execution.yml)**

> Detects child processes of Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe that can be used to execute any other binary

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Visual Studio NodejsTools PressAnyKey Arbitrary Binary Execution
-- Sigma ID:     a20391f8-76fb-437b-abc0-dba2df1952c6
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pressanykey_lolbin_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by developers as part of NodeJS development with Visual Studio Tools
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft.NodejsTools.PressAnyKey.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use by developers as part of NodeJS development with Visual Studio Tools

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/mrd0x/status/1463526834918854661
- https://gist.github.com/nasbench/a989ce64cefa8081bd50cf6ad8c491b5

## Abusing Print Executable

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `bafac3d6-7de9-4dd9-8874-4a1194b493ed` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Furkan CALISKAN, @caliskanfurkan_, @oscd_initiative |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_print_remote_file_copy.yml)**

> Attackers can use print.exe for remote file copy

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Abusing Print Executable
-- Sigma ID:     bafac3d6-7de9-4dd9-8874-4a1194b493ed
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Furkan CALISKAN, @caliskanfurkan_, @oscd_initiative
-- Date:         2020-10-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_print_remote_file_copy.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\print.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE 'print%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/D%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe%'))
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%print.exe%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Print/
- https://twitter.com/Oddvarmoe/status/985518877076541440

## Suspicious Provlaunch.EXE Child Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f9999590-1f94-4a34-a91e-951e47bedefd` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_provlaunch_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects suspicious child processes of "provlaunch.exe" which might indicate potential abuse to proxy execution.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Provlaunch.EXE Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     f9999590-1f94-4a34-a91e-951e47bedefd
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-08-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_provlaunch_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\notepad.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%:\\PerfLogs\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp\\%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\provlaunch.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Provlaunch/
- https://twitter.com/0gtweet/status/1674399582162153472

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Screen Capture Activity Via Psr.EXE

-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
```

## PUA - 3Proxy Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f38a82d2-fba3-4781-b549-525efbec8506` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1572 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_3proxy_execution.yml)**

> Detects the use of 3proxy, a tiny free proxy server

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - 3Proxy Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f38a82d2-fba3-4781-b549-525efbec8506
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1572
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_3proxy_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\3proxy.exe'
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe -i127.0.0.1 -p%')
  OR rawEventMsg = '3proxy - tiny proxy server'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative activity

**References:**
- https://github.com/3proxy/3proxy
- https://blog.talosintelligence.com/2022/09/lazarus-three-rats.html

## PUA - Suspicious ActiveDirectory Enumeration Via AdFind.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `455b9d50-15a1-4b99-853f-8d37655a4c1b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1087.002 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_adfind_enumeration.yml)**

> Detects active directory enumeration activity using known AdFind CLI flags

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Suspicious ActiveDirectory Enumeration Via AdFind.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     455b9d50-15a1-4b99-853f-8d37655a4c1b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1087.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-12-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_adfind_enumeration.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Authorized administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sc admincountdmp%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sc exchaddresses%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lockoutduration%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lockoutthreshold%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lockoutobservationwindow%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%maxpwdage%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%minpwdage%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%minpwdlength%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pwdhistorylength%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pwdproperties%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Authorized administrative activity

**References:**
- https://www.joeware.net/freetools/tools/adfind/
- https://social.technet.microsoft.com/wiki/contents/articles/7535.adfind-command-examples.aspx
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1087.002/T1087.002.md

---

## PUA - AdFind.EXE Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `514e7e3e-b3b4-4a67-af60-be20f139198b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1087.002 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_adfind_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of Adfind.exe utility, which can be used for reconnaissance in an Active Directory environment

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - AdFind.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     514e7e3e-b3b4-4a67-af60-be20f139198b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1087.002
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_adfind_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\AdFind.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'AdFind.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=d144de8117df2beceaba2201ad304764%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=12ce1c0f3f5837ecc18a3782408fa975%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=bca5675746d13a1f246e2da3c2217492%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=4fbf3f084fbbb2470b80b2013134df35%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=49b639b4acbecc49d72a01f357aa4930%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=53e117a96057eaf19c41380d0e87f1c2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=680dad9e300346e05a85023965867201%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=21aa085d54992511b9f115355e468782%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.joeware.net/freetools/tools/adfind/
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1087.002/T1087.002.md

---

## PUA - AdFind Suspicious Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9a132afa-654e-11eb-ae93-0242ac130002` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1018, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.002 |
| **Author** | Janantha Marasinghe (https://github.com/blueteam0ps), FPT.EagleEye Team, omkar72, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_adfind_susp_usage.yml)**

> Detects AdFind execution with common flags seen used during attacks

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - AdFind Suspicious Execution
-- Sigma ID:     9a132afa-654e-11eb-ae93-0242ac130002
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1018, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.002
-- Author:       Janantha Marasinghe (https://github.com/blueteam0ps), FPT.EagleEye Team, omkar72, oscd.community
-- Date:         2021-02-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_adfind_susp_usage.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate admin activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%domainlist%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%trustdmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dcmodes%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%adinfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sc dclist%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%computer\_pwdnotreqd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%objectcategory=%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-subnets -f%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%name="Domain Admins"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sc u:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%domainncs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dompol%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% oudmp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%subnetdmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gpodmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%fspdmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%users\_noexpire%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%computers\_active%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%computers\_pwdnotreqd%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate admin activity

**References:**
- https://www.joeware.net/freetools/tools/adfind/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2020/05/08/adfind-recon/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/01/11/trickbot-still-alive-and-well/
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/01/20/deep-dive-into-the-solorigate-second-stage-activation-from-sunburst-to-teardrop-and-raindrop/
- https://social.technet.microsoft.com/wiki/contents/articles/7535.adfind-command-examples.aspx
- https://github.com/center-for-threat-informed-defense/adversary_emulation_library/blob/bf62ece1c679b07b5fb49c4bae947fe24c81811f/fin6/Emulation_Plan/Phase1.md
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/0f229c0e42bfe7ca736a14023836d65baa941ed2/atomics/T1087.002/T1087.002.md#atomic-test-7---adfind---enumerate-active-directory-user-objects

## PUA - Advanced IP Scanner Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `bef37fa2-f205-4a7b-b484-0759bfd5f86f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1046, T1135 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), @ROxPinTeddy |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_advanced_ip_scanner.yml)**

> Detects the use of Advanced IP Scanner. Seems to be a popular tool for ransomware groups.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Advanced IP Scanner Execution
-- Sigma ID:     bef37fa2-f205-4a7b-b484-0759bfd5f86f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1046, T1135
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), @ROxPinTeddy
-- Date:         2020-05-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_advanced_ip_scanner.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative use
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/portable%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/lng%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\advanced\_ip\_scanner%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%advanced\_ip\_scanner%'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%Advanced IP Scanner%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrative use

**References:**
- https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2019/12/09/snatch-ransomware-reboots-pcs-into-safe-mode-to-bypass-protection/
- https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2020/05/tactics-techniques-procedures-associated-with-maze-ransomware-incidents.html
- https://labs.f-secure.com/blog/prelude-to-ransomware-systembc
- https://assets.documentcloud.org/documents/20444693/fbi-pin-egregor-ransomware-bc-01062021.pdf
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/01/18/all-that-for-a-coinminer
- https://github.com/3CORESec/MAL-CL/tree/master/Descriptors/Other/Advanced%20IP%20Scanner

## PUA - AdvancedRun Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d2b749ee-4225-417e-b20e-a8d2193cbb84` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.003, T1134.002, T1059.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_advancedrun.yml)**

> Detects the execution of AdvancedRun utility

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - AdvancedRun Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d2b749ee-4225-417e-b20e-a8d2193cbb84
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1564.003, T1134.002, T1059.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_advancedrun.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'AdvancedRun.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /EXEFilename %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /Run%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /WindowState 0%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /CommandLine %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/splinter_code/status/1483815103279603714
- https://medium.com/s2wblog/analysis-of-destructive-malware-whispergate-targeting-ukraine-9d5d158f19f3

## PUA - AdvancedRun Suspicious Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `fa00b701-44c6-4679-994d-5a18afa8a707` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1134.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_advancedrun_priv_user.yml)**

> Detects the execution of AdvancedRun utility in the context of the TrustedInstaller, SYSTEM, Local Service or Network Service accounts

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - AdvancedRun Suspicious Execution
-- Sigma ID:     fa00b701-44c6-4679-994d-5a18afa8a707
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_advancedrun_priv_user.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/EXEFilename%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/CommandLine%'))
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs 8 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs 4 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs 10 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /RunAs 11 %')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/RunAs 8' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/RunAs 4' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/RunAs 10' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/RunAs 11'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## PUA - Chisel Tunneling Tool Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8b0e12da-d3c3-49db-bb4f-256703f380e5` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1090.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_chisel.yml)**

> Detects usage of the Chisel tunneling tool via the commandline arguments

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Chisel Tunneling Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     8b0e12da-d3c3-49db-bb4f-256703f380e5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_chisel.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some false positives may occur with other tools with similar commandlines
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\chisel.exe'
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%exe client %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%exe server %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-socks5%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-reverse%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% r:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:127.0.0.1:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-tls-skip-verify %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:socks%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some false positives may occur with other tools with similar commandlines

**References:**
- https://github.com/jpillora/chisel/
- https://arcticwolf.com/resources/blog/lorenz-ransomware-chiseling-in/
- https://blog.sekoia.io/lucky-mouse-incident-response-to-detection-engineering/

## PUA - CleanWipe Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f44800ac-38ec-471f-936e-3fa7d9c53100` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_cleanwipe.yml)**

> Detects the use of CleanWipe a tool usually used to delete Symantec antivirus.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - CleanWipe Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f44800ac-38ec-471f-936e-3fa7d9c53100
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_cleanwipe.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative use (Should be investigated either way)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\SepRemovalToolNative\_x64.exe'
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\CATClean.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--uninstall%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\NetInstaller.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-r%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\WFPUnins.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/uninstall%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/enterprise%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrative use (Should be investigated either way)

**References:**
- https://github.com/3CORESec/MAL-CL/tree/master/Descriptors/Other/CleanWipe

---

## PUA - Crassus Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2c32b543-1058-4808-91c6-5b31b8bed6c5` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery, reconnaissance |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1590.001 |
| **Author** | pH-T (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_crassus.yml)**

> Detects Crassus, a Windows privilege escalation discovery tool, based on PE metadata characteristics.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Crassus Execution
-- Sigma ID:     2c32b543-1058-4808-91c6-5b31b8bed6c5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, reconnaissance | T1590.001
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-04-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_crassus.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Crassus.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Crassus.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%Crassus%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/vu-ls/Crassus

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

```sql
-- Sigma ID:     f0ca6c24-3225-47d5-b1f5-352bf07ecfa7

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\DefenderCheck.exe')
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'DefenderCheck')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**

## PUA - Fast Reverse Proxy (FRP) Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `32410e29-5f94-4568-b6a3-d91a8adad863` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1090 |
| **Author** | frack113, Florian Roth |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_frp.yml)**

> Detects the use of Fast Reverse Proxy. frp is a fast reverse proxy to help you expose a local server behind a NAT or firewall to the Internet.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Fast Reverse Proxy (FRP) Execution
-- Sigma ID:     32410e29-5f94-4568-b6a3-d91a8adad863
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth
-- Date:         2022-09-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_frp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\frpc.ini%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=7D9C233B8C9E3F0EA290D2B84593C842%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=06DDC9280E1F1810677935A2477012960905942F%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=57B0936B8D336D8E981C169466A15A5FD21A7D5A2C7DAF62D5E142EE860E387C%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\frpc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\frps.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**
- https://asec.ahnlab.com/en/38156/
- https://github.com/fatedier/frp

---

## PUA- IOX Tunneling Tool Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d7654f02-e04b-4934-9838-65c46f187ebc` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1090 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_iox.yml)**

> Detects the use of IOX - a tool for port forwarding and intranet proxy purposes

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA- IOX Tunneling Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d7654f02-e04b-4934-9838-65c46f187ebc
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_iox.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\iox.exe'
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe fwd -l %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe fwd -r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe proxy -l %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe proxy -r %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=9DB2D314DD3F704A02051EF5EA210993%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=039130337E28A6623ECF9A0A3DA7D92C5964D8DD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=C6CF82919B809967D9D90EA73772A8AA1C1EB3BC59252D977500F64F1A0D6731%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**

## PUA - Kernel Driver Utility (KDU) Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e76ca062-4de0-4d79-8d90-160a0d335eca` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1543.003 |
| **Author** | Matt Anderson, Dray Agha, Anna Pham (Huntress) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_kdu_driver_tool.yml)**

> Detects execution of the Kernel Driver Utility (KDU) tool.
KDU can be used to bypass driver signature enforcement and load unsigned or malicious drivers into the Windows kernel.
Potentially allowing for privilege escalation, persistence, or evasion of security controls.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Kernel Driver Utility (KDU) Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e76ca062-4de0-4d79-8d90-160a0d335eca
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003
-- Author:       Matt Anderson, Dray Agha, Anna Pham (Huntress)
-- Date:         2026-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_kdu_driver_tool.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate driver development, testing, or administrative troubleshooting (e.g., enabling/disabling hardware)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-map %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-prv %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-dse %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ps %'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\kdu.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\hamakaze.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'hamakaze.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate driver development, testing, or administrative troubleshooting (e.g., enabling/disabling hardware)

**References:**
- https://github.com/h4rmy/KDU
- https://huntress.com/blog/esxi-vm-escape-exploit

---

## PUA - Mouse Lock Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c9192ad9-75e5-43eb-8647-82a0a5b493e3` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1056.002 |
| **Author** | Cian Heasley |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_mouselock_execution.yml)**

> In Kaspersky's 2020 Incident Response Analyst Report they listed legitimate tool "Mouse Lock" as being used for both credential access and collection in security incidents.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Mouse Lock Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c9192ad9-75e5-43eb-8647-82a0a5b493e3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1056.002
-- Author:       Cian Heasley
-- Date:         2020-08-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_mouselock_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate uses of Mouse Lock software
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%Mouse Lock%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] LIKE '%Misc314%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Mouse Lock\_%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate uses of Mouse Lock software

**References:**
- https://github.com/klsecservices/Publications/blob/657deb6a6eb6e00669afd40173f425fb49682eaa/Incident-Response-Analyst-Report-2020.pdf
- https://sourceforge.net/projects/mouselock/

## PUA - Netcat Suspicious Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e31033fc-33f0-4020-9a16-faf9b31cbf08` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1095 |
| **Author** | frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_netcat.yml)**

> Detects execution of Netcat. Adversaries may use a non-application layer protocol for communication between host and C2 server or among infected hosts within a network

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Netcat Suspicious Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e31033fc-33f0-4020-9a16-faf9b31cbf08
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1095
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_netcat.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate ncat use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -lvp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -lvnp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -l -v -p %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -lv -p %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -l --proxy-type http %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -vnl --exec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -vnl -e %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --lua-exec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --sh-exec %'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\nc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\ncat.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\netcat.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate ncat use

**References:**
- https://nmap.org/ncat/
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1095/T1095.md
- https://www.revshells.com/

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - SoftPerfect Netscan Execution
-- Sigma ID:     ca387a8e-1c84-4da3-9993-028b45342d30
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1046
-- Author:       @d4ns4n_ (Wuerth-Phoenix)
-- Date:         2024-04-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_netscan.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator activity
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\netscan.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Network Scanner'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Application for scanning networks')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrator activity

**References:**
- https://www.protect.airbus.com/blog/uncovering-cyber-intruders-netscan/
- https://secjoes-reports.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/Sockbot%2Bin%2BGoLand.pdf
- https://www.sentinelone.com/labs/black-basta-ransomware-attacks-deploy-custom-edr-evasion-tools-tied-to-fin7-threat-actor/
- https://symantec-enterprise-blogs.security.com/blogs/threat-intelligence/yanluowang-ransomware-attacks-continue
- https://research.nccgroup.com/2022/07/13/climbing-mount-everest-black-byte-bytes-back/
- https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/microsoft-exchange-servers-hacked-to-deploy-hive-ransomware/
- https://www.softperfect.com/products/networkscanner/
