## PUA - Ngrok Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ee37eb7c-a4e7-4cd5-8fa4-efa27f1c3f31` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1572 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_ngrok.yml)**

> Detects the use of Ngrok, a utility used for port forwarding and tunneling, often used by threat actors to make local protected services publicly available.
Involved domains are bin.equinox.io for download and *.ngrok.io for connections.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Ngrok Execution
-- Sigma ID:     ee37eb7c-a4e7-4cd5-8fa4-efa27f1c3f31
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1572
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-05-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_ngrok.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Another tool that uses the command line switches of Ngrok; Ngrok http 3978 (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/bot-service/bot-service-debug-channel-ngrok?view=azure-bot-service-4.0)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 139%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 445%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 3389%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 5985%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp 5986%'))
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% start %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--all%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--config%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.yml%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%ngrok.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% tcp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% http %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% authtoken %')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe authtoken %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe start --all%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Another tool that uses the command line switches of Ngrok; Ngrok http 3978 (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/bot-service/bot-service-debug-channel-ngrok?view=azure-bot-service-4.0)

**References:**
- https://ngrok.com/docs
- https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2021/05/shining-a-light-on-darkside-ransomware-operations.html
- https://stackoverflow.com/questions/42442320/ssh-tunnel-to-ngrok-and-initiate-rdp
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/58d21840d915aaf4040ceb89522396124c82f325282f805d1085527e1e2ccfa1/detection
- https://cybleinc.com/2021/02/15/ngrok-platform-abused-by-hackers-to-deliver-a-new-wave-of-phishing-attacks/
- https://twitter.com/xorJosh/status/1598646907802451969
- https://www.softwaretestinghelp.com/how-to-use-ngrok/

---

## PUA - Nimgrab Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `74a12f18-505c-4114-8d0b-8448dd5485c6` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nimgrab.yml)**

> Detects the usage of nimgrab, a tool bundled with the Nim programming framework and used for downloading files.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Nimgrab Execution
-- Sigma ID:     74a12f18-505c-4114-8d0b-8448dd5485c6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-08-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nimgrab.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Nim on a developer systems
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=2DD44C3C29D667F5C0EF5F9D7C7FFB8B%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=F266609E91985F0FE3E31C5E8FAEEEC4FFA5E0322D8B6F15FE69F4C5165B9559%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=C07FDDD21D123EA9B3A08EEF44AAAC45%'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\nimgrab.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of Nim on a developer systems

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/28d190330fe44de6ff4767fc400cc10fa7cd6540/atomics/T1105/T1105.md

## PUA - NimScan Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4fd6b1c7-19b8-4488-97f6-00f0924991a3` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1046 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nimscan.yml)**

> Detects usage of NimScan, a portscanner utility.
In early 2025, adversaries were observed using this utility to scan for open ports on remote hosts in a compromised environment.
This rule identifies the execution of NimScan based on the process image name and specific hash values associated with different versions of the tool.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NimScan Execution
-- Sigma ID:     4fd6b1c7-19b8-4488-97f6-00f0924991a3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1046
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nimscan.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\NimScan.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=41BB1C7571B3A724EB83A1D2B96DBB8C%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=B1B6ADACB172795480179EFD18A29549%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=0D1F896DC7642AD8384F9042F30279C2%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrator activity

**References:**
- https://x.com/cyberfeeddigest/status/1887041526397587859
- https://github.com/elddy/NimScan

---

## PUA - NirCmd Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4e2ed651-1906-4a59-a78a-18220fca1b22` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1569.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nircmd.yml)**

> Detects the use of NirCmd tool for command execution, which could be the result of legitimate administrative activity

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NirCmd Execution
-- Sigma ID:     4e2ed651-1906-4a59-a78a-18220fca1b22
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1569.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nircmd.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by administrators
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% execmd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe script %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe shexec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% runinteractive %'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\NirCmd.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'NirCmd.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% exec %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% exec2 %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% show %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% hide %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use by administrators

**References:**
- https://www.nirsoft.net/utils/nircmd.html
- https://www.winhelponline.com/blog/run-program-as-system-localsystem-account-windows/
- https://www.nirsoft.net/utils/nircmd2.html#using

| Field | Value |
|---|---|

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NirCmd Execution As LOCAL SYSTEM
-- Sigma ID:     d9047477-0359-48c9-b8c7-792cedcdc9c4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## PUA - Nmap/Zenmap Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f6ecd1cf-19b8-4488-97f6-00f0924991a3` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1046 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nmap_zenmap.yml)**

> Detects usage of namp/zenmap. Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of services running on remote hosts, including those that may be vulnerable to remote software exploitation

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Nmap/Zenmap Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f6ecd1cf-19b8-4488-97f6-00f0924991a3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1046
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-12-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nmap_zenmap.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\nmap.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\zennmap.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('nmap.exe', 'zennmap.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrator activity

**References:**
- https://nmap.org/
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1046/T1046.md#atomic-test-3---port-scan-nmap-for-windows

## PUA - NPS Tunneling Tool Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `68d37776-61db-42f5-bf54-27e87072d17e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1090 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nps.yml)**

> Detects the use of NPS, a port forwarding and intranet penetration proxy server

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NPS Tunneling Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     68d37776-61db-42f5-bf54-27e87072d17e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nps.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -server=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -vkey=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -password=%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -config=npc%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=AE8ACF66BFE3A44148964048B826D005%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=CEA49E9B9B67F3A13AD0BE1C2655293EA3C18181%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=5A456283392FFCEEEACA3D3426C306EB470304637520D72FED1CC1FEBBBD6856%'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\npc.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**
- https://github.com/ehang-io/nps

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `771d1eb5-9587-4568-95fb-9ec44153a012` |

| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1569.002 |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nsudo.yml)**

> Detects the use of NSudo tool for command execution

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - NSudo Execution
-- Sigma ID:     771d1eb5-9587-4568-95fb-9ec44153a012
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1569.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2022-01-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_nsudo.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by administrators
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U:S %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U:T %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U:E %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-P:E %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-M:S %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-M:H %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U=S %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U=T %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-U=E %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-P=E %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-M=S %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-M=H %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ShowWindowMode:Hide%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\NSudo.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\NSudoLC.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\NSudoLG.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('NSudo.exe', 'NSudoLC.exe', 'NSudoLG.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use by administrators

## PUA - PingCastle Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b1cb4ab6-ac31-43f4-adf1-d9d08957419c` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | reconnaissance |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1595 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_pingcastle.yml)**

> Detects the execution of PingCastle, a tool designed to quickly assess the Active Directory security level.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - PingCastle Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b1cb4ab6-ac31-43f4-adf1-d9d08957419c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        reconnaissance | T1595
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113
-- Date:         2024-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_pingcastle.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=f741f25ac909ee434e50812d436c73ff%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=d40acbfc29ee24388262e3d8be16f622%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=01bb2c16fadb992fa66228cd02d45c60%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=9e1b18e62e42b5444fc55b51e640355b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=b7f8fe33ac471b074ca9e630ba0c7e79%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=324579d717c9b9b8e71d0269d13f811f%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=63257a1ddaf83cfa43fe24a3bc06c207%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=049e85963826b059c9bac273bb9c82ab%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=ecb98b7b4d4427eb8221381154ff4cb2%' OR   OR (procName LIKE '%\\PingCastle.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PingCastle.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Ping Castle'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner aclcheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner computerversion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner foreignusers%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner laps\_bitlocker%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner localadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession-trust%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner oxidbindings%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner share%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb3querynetwork%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner spooler%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner startup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner zerologon%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--no-enum-limit%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--level Full%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--server %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/vletoux/pingcastle
- https://thedfirreport.com/2023/10/30/netsupport-intrusion-results-in-domain-compromise/
- https://github.com/fengjixuchui/Start-ADEnum/blob/e237a739db98b6104427d833004836507da36a58/Functions/Start-ADEnum.ps1#L450
- https://github.com/lkys37en/Start-ADEnum/blob/5b42c54215fe5f57fc59abc52c20487d15764005/Functions/Start-ADEnum.ps1#L680
- https://github.com/projectHULK/AD_Recon/blob/dde2daba9b3393a9388cbebda87068972cc0bd3b/SecurityAssessment.ps1#L2699
- https://github.com/802-1x/Compliance/blob/2e53df8b6e89686a0b91116b3f42c8f717dca820/Ping%20Castle/Get-PingCastle-HTMLComplianceReport.ps1#L8
- https://github.com/EvotecIT/TheDashboard/blob/481a9ce8f82f2fd55fe65220ee6486bae6df0c9d/Examples/RunReports/PingCastle.ps1

## PUA - PingCastle Execution From Potentially Suspicious Parent

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b37998de-a70b-4f33-b219-ec36bf433dc0` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | reconnaissance |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1595 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_pingcastle_script_parent.yml)**

> Detects the execution of PingCastle, a tool designed to quickly assess the Active Directory security level via a script located in a potentially suspicious or uncommon location.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - PingCastle Execution From Potentially Suspicious Parent
-- Sigma ID:     b37998de-a70b-4f33-b219-ec36bf433dc0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        reconnaissance | T1595
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_pingcastle_script_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.chm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.hta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.htm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.html%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.vbe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.vbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.wsf%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\PingCastle.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PingCastle.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Ping Castle'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner aclcheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner computerversion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner foreignusers%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner laps\_bitlocker%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner localadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession-trust%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner oxidbindings%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner share%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb3querynetwork%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner spooler%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner startup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner zerologon%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--no-enum-limit%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--level Full%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--server %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/vletoux/pingcastle
- https://thedfirreport.com/2023/10/30/netsupport-intrusion-results-in-domain-compromise/
- https://github.com/fengjixuchui/Start-ADEnum/blob/e237a739db98b6104427d833004836507da36a58/Functions/Start-ADEnum.ps1#L450
- https://github.com/lkys37en/Start-ADEnum/blob/5b42c54215fe5f57fc59abc52c20487d15764005/Functions/Start-ADEnum.ps1#L680
- https://github.com/projectHULK/AD_Recon/blob/dde2daba9b3393a9388cbebda87068972cc0bd3b/SecurityAssessment.ps1#L2699
- https://github.com/802-1x/Compliance/blob/2e53df8b6e89686a0b91116b3f42c8f717dca820/Ping%20Castle/Get-PingCastle-HTMLComplianceReport.ps1#L8
- https://github.com/EvotecIT/TheDashboard/blob/481a9ce8f82f2fd55fe65220ee6486bae6df0c9d/Examples/RunReports/PingCastle.ps1

## PUA - Process Hacker Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `811e0002-b13b-4a15-9d00-a613fce66e42` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery, persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1622, T1564, T1543 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_process_hacker.yml)**

> Detects the execution of Process Hacker based on binary metadata information (Image, Hash, Imphash, etc).
Process Hacker is a tool to view and manipulate processes, kernel options and other low level options.
Threat actors abused older vulnerable versions to manipulate system processes.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Process Hacker Execution
-- Sigma ID:     811e0002-b13b-4a15-9d00-a613fce66e42
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, persistence | T1622, T1564, T1543
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_process_hacker.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    While sometimes 'Process Hacker is used by legitimate administrators, the execution of Process Hacker must be investigated and allowed on a case by case basis
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ProcessHacker\_%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\ProcessHacker.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('ProcessHacker.exe', 'Process Hacker')))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Process Hacker')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Process Hacker'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=68F9B52895F4D34E74112F3129B3B00D%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=B365AF317AE730A67C936F21432B9C71%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=A0BDFAC3CE1880B32FF9B696458327CE352E3B1D%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=C5E2018BF7C0F314FED4FD7FE7E69FA2E648359E%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=D4A0FE56316A2C45B9BA9AC1005363309A3EDC7ACF9E4DF64D326A0FF273E80F%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=BD2C2CF0631D881ED382817AFCCE2B093F4E412FFB170A719E2762F250ABFEA4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=3695333C60DEDECDCAFF1590409AA462%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=04DE0AD9C37EB7BD52043D2ECAC958DF%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** While sometimes 'Process Hacker is used by legitimate administrators, the execution of Process Hacker must be investigated and allowed on a case by case basis

**References:**
- https://processhacker.sourceforge.io/
- https://www.crowdstrike.com/blog/falcon-overwatch-report-finds-increase-in-ecrime/

---

## PUA - Radmin Viewer Utility Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5817e76f-4804-41e6-8f1d-5fa0b3ecae2d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1072 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_radmin.yml)**

> Detects the execution of Radmin which can be abused by an adversary to remotely control Windows machines

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Radmin Viewer Utility Execution
-- Sigma ID:     5817e76f-4804-41e6-8f1d-5fa0b3ecae2d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1072
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_radmin.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'Radmin Viewer')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Radmin Viewer'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Radmin.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1072/T1072.md
- https://www.radmin.fr/

## PUA - Potential PE Metadata Tamper Using Rcedit

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0c92f2e6-f08f-4b73-9216-ecb0ca634689` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036.003, T1036, T1027.005, T1027 |
| **Author** | Micah Babinski |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_rcedit_execution.yml)**

> Detects the use of rcedit to potentially alter executable PE metadata properties, which could conceal efforts to rename system utilities for defense evasion.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Potential PE Metadata Tamper Using Rcedit
-- Sigma ID:     0c92f2e6-f08f-4b73-9216-ecb0ca634689
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003, T1036, T1027.005, T1027
-- Author:       Micah Babinski
-- Date:         2022-12-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_rcedit_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of the tool by administrators or users to update metadata of a binary
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OriginalFileName%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CompanyName%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FileDescription%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ProductName%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ProductVersion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LegalCopyright%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--set-%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\rcedit-x64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rcedit-x86.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Edit resources of exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'rcedit')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of the tool by administrators or users to update metadata of a binary

**References:**
- https://security.stackexchange.com/questions/210843/is-it-possible-to-change-original-filename-of-an-exe
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/02e8e8c5d430d8b768980f517b62d7792d690982b9ba0f7e04163cbc1a6e7915
- https://github.com/electron/rcedit

---

## PUA - Rclone Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e37db05d-d1f9-49c8-b464-cee1a4b11638` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | exfiltration |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1567.002 |
| **Author** | Bhabesh Raj, Sittikorn S, Aaron Greetham (@beardofbinary) - NCC Group |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_rclone_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of RClone utility for exfiltration as used by various ransomwares strains like REvil, Conti, FiveHands, etc

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Rclone Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e37db05d-d1f9-49c8-b464-cee1a4b11638
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration | T1567.002
-- Author:       Bhabesh Raj, Sittikorn S, Aaron Greetham (@beardofbinary) - NCC Group
-- Date:         2021-05-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_rclone_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--config %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--no-check-certificate %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% copy %')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%user%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sync%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%config%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ls%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mega%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pcloud%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ftp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ignore-existing%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%auto-confirm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%transfers%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%multi-thread-streams%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%no-check-certificate %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rclone.exe')
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Rsync for cloud storage'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://research.nccgroup.com/2021/05/27/detecting-rclone-an-effective-tool-for-exfiltration/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/03/29/sodinokibi-aka-revil-ransomware
- https://us-cert.cisa.gov/ncas/analysis-reports/ar21-126a
- https://labs.sentinelone.com/egregor-raas-continues-the-chaos-with-cobalt-strike-and-rclone
- https://www.splunk.com/en_us/blog/security/darkside-ransomware-splunk-threat-update-and-detections.html

## PUA - Restic Backup Tool Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6ddff2e8-ea1a-45d0-8938-93dfc1d67ae7` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | exfiltration |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1048, T1567.002 |
| **Author** | Nounou Mbeiri, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_restic.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the Restic backup tool, which can be used for data exfiltration.
Threat actors may leverage Restic to back up and exfiltrate sensitive data to remote storage locations, including cloud services.
If not legitimately used in the enterprise environment, its presence may indicate malicious activity.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Restic Backup Tool Execution
-- Sigma ID:     6ddff2e8-ea1a-45d0-8938-93dfc1d67ae7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        exfiltration | T1048, T1567.002
-- Author:       Nounou Mbeiri, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-10-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_restic.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Restic for backup purposes within the organization.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sftp:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rest:http%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%s3:s3.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%s3.http%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%azure:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% gs:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rclone:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%swift:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% b2:%'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% init %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -r %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--password-file%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%init%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -r %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--use-fs-snapshot%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%backup%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -r %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of Restic for backup purposes within the organization.

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2024/09/30/nitrogen-campaign-drops-sliver-and-ends-with-blackcat-ransomware/#exfiltration
- https://restic.net/
- https://restic.readthedocs.io/en/stable/030_preparing_a_new_repo.html

---

## PUA - RunXCmd Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `93199800-b52a-4dec-b762-75212c196542` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1569.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_runxcmd.yml)**

> Detects the use of the RunXCmd tool to execute commands with System or TrustedInstaller accounts

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - RunXCmd Execution
-- Sigma ID:     93199800-b52a-4dec-b762-75212c196542
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1569.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_runxcmd.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by administrators
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /account=system %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /account=ti %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/exec=%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use by administrators

**References:**
- https://www.d7xtech.com/free-software/runx/
- https://www.winhelponline.com/blog/run-program-as-system-localsystem-account-windows/

## PUA - Seatbelt Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `38646daa-e78f-4ace-9de0-55547b2d30da` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1526, T1087, T1083 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_seatbelt.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the PUA/Recon tool Seatbelt via PE information of command line parameters

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Seatbelt Execution
-- Sigma ID:     38646daa-e78f-4ace-9de0-55547b2d30da
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1526, T1087, T1083
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_seatbelt.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Seatbelt.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Seatbelt.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Seatbelt')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% DpapiMasterKeys%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% InterestingProcesses%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% InterestingFiles%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% CertificateThumbprints%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ChromiumBookmarks%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ChromiumHistory%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ChromiumPresence%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% CloudCredentials%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% CredEnum%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% CredGuard%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% FirefoxHistory%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ProcessCreationEvents%')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=misc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=chromium%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=slack%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=system%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=user%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -group=all%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -outputfile=%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/GhostPack/Seatbelt
- https://www.bluetangle.dev/2022/08/fastening-seatbelt-on-threat-hunting.html

---

## PUA - System Informer Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5722dff1-4bdd-4949-86ab-fbaf707e767a` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence, discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1082, T1564, T1543 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_system_informer.yml)**

> Detects the execution of System Informer, a task manager tool to view and manipulate processes, kernel options and other low level operations

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - System Informer Execution
-- Sigma ID:     5722dff1-4bdd-4949-86ab-fbaf707e767a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, discovery | T1082, T1564, T1543
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_system_informer.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    System Informer is regularly used legitimately by system administrators or developers. Apply additional filters accordingly
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SystemInformer.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SystemInformer.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'System Informer')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'System Informer'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%MD5=19426363A37C03C3ED6FEDF57B6696EC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA1=8B12C6DA8FAC0D5E8AB999C31E5EA04AF32D53DC%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%SHA256=8EE9D84DE50803545937A63C686822388A3338497CDDB660D5D69CF68B68F287%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=B68908ADAEB5D662F87F2528AF318F12%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** System Informer is regularly used legitimately by system administrators or developers. Apply additional filters accordingly

**References:**
- https://github.com/winsiderss/systeminformer

## PUA - TruffleHog Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `44030449-b0df-4c94-aae1-502359ab28ee` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1083, T1552.001 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_trufflehog.yml)**

> Detects execution of TruffleHog, a tool used to search for secrets in different platforms like Git, Jira, Slack, SharePoint, etc. that could be used maliciously.
While it is a legitimate tool, intended for use in CI pipelines and security assessments,
It was observed in the Shai-Hulud malware campaign targeting npm packages to steal sensitive information.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - TruffleHog Execution
-- Sigma ID:     44030449-b0df-4c94-aae1-502359ab28ee
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1083, T1552.001
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-09-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_trufflehog.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of TruffleHog by security teams or developers.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\trufflehog.exe'
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% docker --image %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Git %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% GitHub %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Jira %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Slack %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% Confluence %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% SharePoint %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% s3 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% gcs %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --results=verified%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of TruffleHog by security teams or developers.

**References:**
- https://github.com/trufflesecurity/trufflehog
- https://www.getsafety.com/blog-posts/shai-hulud-npm-attack

---

## PUA - WebBrowserPassView Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d0dae994-26c6-4d2d-83b5-b3c8b79ae513` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1555.003 |

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_webbrowserpassview.yml)**

> Detects the execution of WebBrowserPassView.exe. A password recovery tool that reveals the passwords stored by the following Web browsers, Internet Explorer (Version 4.0 - 11.0), Mozilla Firefox (All Versions), Google Chrome, Safari, and Opera

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - WebBrowserPassView Execution
-- Sigma ID:     d0dae994-26c6-4d2d-83b5-b3c8b79ae513
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1555.003
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-08-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_webbrowserpassview.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'Web Browser Password Viewer')
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\WebBrowserPassView.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/40b77d63808dd4f4eafb83949805636735a1fd15/atomics/T1555.003/T1555.003.md

## PUA - Wsudo Suspicious Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `bdeeabc9-ff2a-4a51-be59-bb253aac7891` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_wsudo_susp_execution.yml)**

> Detects usage of wsudo (Windows Sudo Utility). Which is a tool that let the user execute programs with different permissions (System, Trusted Installer, Administrator...etc)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Wsudo Suspicious Execution
-- Sigma ID:     bdeeabc9-ff2a-4a51-be59-bb253aac7891
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_pua_wsudo_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-u System%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-uSystem%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-u TrustedInstaller%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-uTrustedInstaller%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --ti %'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\wsudo.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wsudo.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'Windows sudo utility')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wsudo-bridge.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/M2Team/Privexec/

---

## PUA - Adidnsdump Execution

| Field | Value |

| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_python_adidnsdump.yml)**

> This tool enables enumeration and exporting of all DNS records in the zone for recon purposes of internal networks Python 3 and python.exe must be installed,
Usee to Query/modify DNS records for Active Directory integrated DNS via LDAP


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PUA - Adidnsdump Execution
-- Sigma ID:     26d3f0a2-f514-4a3f-a8a7-e7e48a8d9160
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1018

  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\python.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%adidnsdump%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1018/T1018.md#atomic-test-9---remote-system-discovery---adidnsdump

## Python Inline Command Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `899133d5-4d7c-4a7f-94ee-27355c879d90` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_python_inline_command_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of python using the "-c" flag. This is could be used as a way to launch a reverse shell or execute live python code.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Python Inline Command Execution
-- Sigma ID:     899133d5-4d7c-4a7f-94ee-27355c879d90
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_python_inline_command_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Python libraries that use a flag starting with "-c". Filter according to your environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Python libraries that use a flag starting with "-c". Filter according to your environment

**References:**
- https://docs.python.org/3/using/cmdline.html#cmdoption-c
- https://www.revshells.com/
- https://pentestmonkey.net/cheat-sheet/shells/reverse-shell-cheat-sheet

---

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_python_pty_spawn.yml)**

> Detects python spawning a pretty tty

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Python Spawning Pretty TTY on Windows
-- Sigma ID:     480e7e51-e797-47e3-8d72-ebfce65b6d8d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nextron Systems
-- Date:         2022-06-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_python_pty_spawn.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%python.exe' OR procName LIKE '%python3.exe' OR procName LIKE '%python2.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.volexity.com/blog/2022/06/02/zero-day-exploitation-of-atlassian-confluence/

---

## Potentially Suspicious Usage Of Qemu

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5fc297ae-25b6-488a-8f25-cc12ac29b744` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1090, T1572 |
| **Author** | Muhammad Faisal (@faisalusuf), Hunter Juhan (@threatHNTR) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_qemu_suspicious_execution.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious execution of the Qemu utility in a Windows environment.
Threat actors have leveraged this utility and this technique for achieving network access as reported by Kaspersky.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Usage Of Qemu
-- Sigma ID:     5fc297ae-25b6-488a-8f25-cc12ac29b744
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1090, T1572
-- Author:       Muhammad Faisal (@faisalusuf), Hunter Juhan (@threatHNTR)
-- Date:         2024-06-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_qemu_suspicious_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-m 1M%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-m 2M%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-m 3M%'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%restrict=off%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-netdev %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%connect=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-nographic%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://securelist.com/network-tunneling-with-qemu/111803/
- https://www.qemu.org/docs/master/system/invocation.html#hxtool-5

---

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `53ef0cef-fa24-4f25-a34a-6c72dfa2e6e2` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_query_session_exfil.yml)**

> Detects usage of "query.exe" a system binary to exfil information such as "sessions" and "processes" for later use

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Query Usage To Exfil Data
-- Sigma ID:     53ef0cef-fa24-4f25-a34a-6c72dfa2e6e2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\System32\\query.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%session >%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%process >%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        QuickAssist Execution

-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
```

## Files Added To An Archive Using Rar.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6f3e2987-db24-4c78-a860-b4f4095a7095` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1560.001 |
| **Author** | Timur Zinniatullin, E.M. Anhaus, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rar_compress_data.yml)**

> Detects usage of "rar" to add files to an archive for potential compression. An adversary may compress data (e.g. sensitive documents) that is collected prior to exfiltration in order to make it portable and minimize the amount of data sent over the network.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Files Added To An Archive Using Rar.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     6f3e2987-db24-4c78-a860-b4f4095a7095
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1560.001
-- Author:       Timur Zinniatullin, E.M. Anhaus, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rar_compress_data.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Highly likely if rar is a default archiver in the monitored environment.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rar.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% a %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Highly likely if rar is a default archiver in the monitored environment.

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1560.001/T1560.001.md
- https://eqllib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/analytics/1ec33c93-3d0b-4a28-8014-dbdaae5c60ae.html

---

## Rar Usage with Password and Compression Level

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `faa48cae-6b25-4f00-a094-08947fef582f` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1560.001 |
| **Author** | @ROxPinTeddy |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rar_compression_with_password.yml)**

> Detects the use of rar.exe, on the command line, to create an archive with password protection or with a specific compression level. This is pretty indicative of malicious actions.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rar Usage with Password and Compression Level
-- Sigma ID:     faa48cae-6b25-4f00-a094-08947fef582f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1560.001
-- Author:       @ROxPinTeddy
-- Date:         2020-05-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rar_compression_with_password.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of Winrar command line version; Other command line tools, that use these flags
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -hp%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -m%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% a %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of Winrar command line version; Other command line tools, that use these flags

**References:**
- https://labs.sentinelone.com/the-anatomy-of-an-apt-attack-and-cobaltstrike-beacons-encoded-configuration/
- https://ss64.com/bash/rar.html
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1560.001/T1560.001.md
