## Remote Access Tool - AnyDesk Piped Password Via CLI

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b1377339-fda6-477a-b455-ac0923f9ec2c` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_anydesk_piped_password_via_cli.yml)**

> Detects piping the password to an anydesk instance via CMD and the '--set-password' flag.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - AnyDesk Piped Password Via CLI
-- Sigma ID:     b1377339-fda6-477a-b455-ac0923f9ec2c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_anydesk_piped_password_via_cli.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate piping of the password to anydesk; Some FP could occur with similar tools that uses the same command line '--set-password'
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%echo %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe --set-password%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate piping of the password to anydesk; Some FP could occur with similar tools that uses the same command line '--set-password'

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/misbehaving-rats/

---

## Remote Access Tool - AnyDesk Execution With Known Revoked Signing Certificate

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `41f407b5-3096-44ea-a74f-96d04fbc41be` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Sai Prashanth Pulisetti, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_anydesk_revoked_cert.yml)**

> Detects the execution of an AnyDesk binary with a version prior to 8.0.8.
Prior to version 8.0.8, the Anydesk application used a signing certificate that got compromised by threat actors.
Use this rule to detect instances of older versions of Anydesk using the compromised certificate
This is recommended in order to avoid attackers leveraging the certificate and signing their binaries to bypass detections.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - AnyDesk Execution With Known Revoked Signing Certificate
-- Sigma ID:     41f407b5-3096-44ea-a74f-96d04fbc41be
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Sai Prashanth Pulisetti, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-02-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_anydesk_revoked_cert.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/anydesk-says-hackers-breached-its-production-servers-reset-passwords/
- https://anydesk.com/en/changelog/windows

---

## Remote Access Tool - AnyDesk Silent Installation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `114e7f1c-f137-48c8-8f54-3088c24ce4b9` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | Ján Trenčanský |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_anydesk_silent_install.yml)**

> Detects AnyDesk Remote Desktop silent installation. Which can be used by attackers to gain remote access.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - AnyDesk Silent Installation
-- Sigma ID:     114e7f1c-f137-48c8-8f54-3088c24ce4b9
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       Ján Trenčanský
-- Date:         2021-08-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_anydesk_silent_install.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate deployment of AnyDesk
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--install%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--start-with-win%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--silent%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate deployment of AnyDesk

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/TheDFIRReport/status/1423361119926816776?s=20
- https://support.anydesk.com/Automatic_Deployment

## Remote Access Tool - Anydesk Execution From Suspicious Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `065b00ca-5d5c-4557-ac95-64a6d0b64d86` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_anydesk_susp_exec.yml)**

> An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software, such as Team Viewer, Go2Assist, LogMein, AmmyyAdmin, etc, to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks.
These services are commonly used as legitimate technical support software, and may be allowed by application control within a target environment.
Remote access tools like VNC, Ammyy, and Teamviewer are used frequently when compared with other legitimate software commonly used by adversaries. (Citation: Symantec Living off the Land)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - Anydesk Execution From Suspicious Folder
-- Sigma ID:     065b00ca-5d5c-4557-ac95-64a6d0b64d86
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_anydesk_susp_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of AnyDesk from a non-standard folder
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\AnyDesk.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AnyDeskMSI.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'AnyDesk')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'AnyDesk'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'AnyDesk Software GmbH'))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\%' OR procName LIKE '%Program Files (x86)\\AnyDesk%' OR procName LIKE '%Program Files\\AnyDesk%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of AnyDesk from a non-standard folder

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1219/T1219.md#atomic-test-2---anydesk-files-detected-test-on-windows

## Remote Access Tool - Potential MeshAgent Execution - Windows

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2fbbe9ff-0afc-470b-bdc0-592198339968` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | Norbert Jaśniewicz (AlphaSOC) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_meshagent_arguments.yml)**

> Detects potential execution of MeshAgent which is a tool used for remote access.
Historical data shows that threat actors rename MeshAgent binary to evade detection.
Matching command lines with the '--meshServiceName' argument can indicate that the MeshAgent is being used for remote access.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - Potential MeshAgent Execution - Windows
-- Sigma ID:     2fbbe9ff-0afc-470b-bdc0-592198339968
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       Norbert Jaśniewicz (AlphaSOC)
-- Date:         2025-05-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_meshagent_arguments.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Environments that legitimately use MeshAgent
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--meshServiceName%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Environments that legitimately use MeshAgent

**References:**
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/know-thy-enemy-a-novel-november-case-on-persistent-remote-access
- https://thecyberexpress.com/ukraine-hit-by-meshagent-malware-campaign/
- https://wazuh.com/blog/how-to-detect-meshagent-with-wazuh/
- https://www.security.com/threat-intelligence/medusa-ransomware-attacks

---

## Remote Access Tool - MeshAgent Command Execution via MeshCentral

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `74a2b202-73e0-4693-9a3a-9d36146d0775` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | @Kostastsale |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_meshagent_exec.yml)**

> Detects the use of MeshAgent to execute commands on the target host, particularly when threat actors might abuse it to execute commands directly.
MeshAgent can execute commands on the target host by leveraging win-console to obscure their activities and win-dispatcher to run malicious code through IPC with child processes.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - MeshAgent Command Execution via MeshCentral
-- Sigma ID:     74a2b202-73e0-4693-9a3a-9d36146d0775
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       @Kostastsale
-- Date:         2024-09-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_meshagent_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives can be found in environments using MeshAgent for remote management, analysis should prioritize the grandparent process, MeshAgent.exe, and scrutinize the resulting child processes triggered by any suspicious interactive commands directed at the target host.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\meshagent.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** False positives can be found in environments using MeshAgent for remote management, analysis should prioritize the grandparent process, MeshAgent.exe, and scrutinize the resulting child processes triggered by any suspicious interactive commands directed at the target host.

**References:**
- https://github.com/Ylianst/MeshAgent
- https://github.com/Ylianst/MeshAgent/blob/52cf129ca43d64743181fbaf940e0b4ddb542a37/modules/win-dispatcher.js#L173
- https://github.com/Ylianst/MeshAgent/blob/52cf129ca43d64743181fbaf940e0b4ddb542a37/modules/win-info.js#L55

## Remote Access Tool - NetSupport Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `758ff488-18d5-4cbe-8ec4-02b6285a434f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_netsupport.yml)**

> An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software, such as Team Viewer, Go2Assist, LogMein, AmmyyAdmin, etc, to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks.
These services are commonly used as legitimate technical support software, and may be allowed by application control within a target environment.
Remote access tools like VNC, Ammyy, and Teamviewer are used frequently when compared with other legitimate software commonly used by adversaries. (Citation: Symantec Living off the Land)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - NetSupport Execution
-- Sigma ID:     758ff488-18d5-4cbe-8ec4-02b6285a434f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-09-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_netsupport.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'NetSupport Client Configurator')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'NetSupport Remote Control'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'NetSupport Ltd'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PCICFGUI.EXE'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1219/T1219.md

---

## Remote Access Tool - NetSupport Execution From Unusual Location

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `37e8d358-6408-4853-82f4-98333fca7014` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_netsupport_susp_exec.yml)**

> Detects execution of client32.exe (NetSupport RAT) from an unusual location (outside of 'C:\Program Files')

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - NetSupport Execution From Unusual Location
-- Sigma ID:     37e8d358-6408-4853-82f4-98333fca7014
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_netsupport_susp_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\client32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%NetSupport Remote Control%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%client32.exe%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=a9d50692e95b79723f3e76fcf70d023e%'))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE 'C:\\Program Files\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Program Files (x86)\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/misbehaving-rats/

---

## Remote Access Tool - Renamed MeshAgent Execution - Windows

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b471f462-eb0d-4832-be35-28d94bdb4780` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002, T1036.003 |
| **Author** | Norbert Jaśniewicz (AlphaSOC) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_renamed_meshagent_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed instance of the Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM) tool, MeshAgent.
RMM tools such as MeshAgent are commonly utilized by IT administrators for legitimate remote support and system management.
However, malicious actors may exploit these tools by renaming them to bypass detection mechanisms, enabling unauthorized access and control over compromised systems.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - Renamed MeshAgent Execution - Windows
-- Sigma ID:     b471f462-eb0d-4832-be35-28d94bdb4780
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1219.002, T1036.003
-- Author:       Norbert Jaśniewicz (AlphaSOC)
-- Date:         2025-05-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_renamed_meshagent_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--meshServiceName%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%meshagent%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/know-thy-enemy-a-novel-november-case-on-persistent-remote-access
- https://thecyberexpress.com/ukraine-hit-by-meshagent-malware-campaign/
- https://wazuh.com/blog/how-to-detect-meshagent-with-wazuh/
- https://www.security.com/threat-intelligence/medusa-ransomware-attacks

---

## Remote Access Tool - RURAT Execution From Unusual Location

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e01fa958-6893-41d4-ae03-182477c5e77d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_rurat_non_default_location.yml)**

> Detects execution of Remote Utilities RAT (RURAT) from an unusual location (outside of 'C:\Program Files')

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - RURAT Execution From Unusual Location
-- Sigma ID:     e01fa958-6893-41d4-ae03-182477c5e77d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_rurat_non_default_location.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\rutserv.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rfusclient.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Remote Utilities'))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE 'C:\\Program Files\\Remote Utilities%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Remote Utilities%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/misbehaving-rats/

## Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `57bff678-25d1-4d6c-8211-8ca106d12053` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect.yml)**

> An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software, such as Team Viewer, Go2Assist, LogMein, AmmyyAdmin, etc, to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks.
These services are commonly used as legitimate technical support software, and may be allowed by application control within a target environment.
Remote access tools like VNC, Ammyy, and Teamviewer are used frequently when compared with other legitimate software commonly used by adversaries. (Citation: Symantec Living off the Land)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Execution
-- Sigma ID:     57bff678-25d1-4d6c-8211-8ca106d12053
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-02-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the tool
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'ScreenConnect Service')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'ScreenConnect'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'ScreenConnect Software'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of the tool

- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1219/T1219.md#atomic-test-5---screenconnect-application-download-and-install-on-windows

## Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Installation Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `75bfe6e6-cd8e-429e-91d3-03921e1d7962` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1133 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_installation_cli_param.yml)**

> Detects ScreenConnect program starts that establish a remote access to a system.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Installation Execution
-- Sigma ID:     75bfe6e6-cd8e-429e-91d3-03921e1d7962
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1133
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-02-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_installation_cli_param.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use by administrative staff
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%e=Access&%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%y=Guest&%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%&p=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%&c=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%&k=%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use by administrative staff

**References:**
- https://www.anomali.com/blog/probable-iranian-cyber-actors-static-kitten-conducting-cyberespionage-campaign-targeting-uae-and-kuwait-government-agencies

---

## Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Remote Command Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b1f73849-6329-4069-bc8f-78a604bb8b23` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.003 |
| **Author** | Ali Alwashali |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_remote_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a system command via the ScreenConnect RMM service.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Remote Command Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b1f73849-6329-4069-bc8f-78a604bb8b23
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003
-- Author:       Ali Alwashali
-- Date:         2023-10-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_remote_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of ScreenConnect. Disable this rule if ScreenConnect is heavily used.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\TEMP\\ScreenConnect\\%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Cmd.Exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\ScreenConnect.ClientService.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of ScreenConnect. Disable this rule if ScreenConnect is heavily used.

**References:**
- https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/pull/4467

---

## Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Potential Suspicious Remote Command Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7b582f1a-b318-4c6a-bf4e-66fe49bf55a5` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), @Kostastsale |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_remote_execution_susp.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious child processes launched via the ScreenConnect client service.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Potential Suspicious Remote Command Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7b582f1a-b318-4c6a-bf4e-66fe49bf55a5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), @Kostastsale
-- Date:         2022-02-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_remote_execution_susp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    If the script being executed make use of any of the utilities mentioned in the detection then they should filtered out or allowed.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\TEMP\\ScreenConnect\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%run.cmd%')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dllhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\nltest.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wevtutil.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** If the script being executed make use of any of the utilities mentioned in the detection then they should filtered out or allowed.

**References:**
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/telegram-malware-iranian-espionage
- https://docs.connectwise.com/ConnectWise_Control_Documentation/Get_started/Host_client/View_menu/Backstage_mode
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/slashandgrab-screen-connect-post-exploitation-in-the-wild-cve-2024-1709-cve-2024-1708
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/24/b/threat-actor-groups-including-black-basta-are-exploiting-recent-.html

---

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b19146a3-25d4-41b4-928b-1e2a92641b1b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1190 |
| **Author** | Jason Rathbun (Blackpoint Cyber) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_webshell.yml)**

> Detects potential web shell execution from the ScreenConnect server process.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - ScreenConnect Server Web Shell Execution
-- Sigma ID:     b19146a3-25d4-41b4-928b-1e2a92641b1b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1190
-- Author:       Jason Rathbun (Blackpoint Cyber)
-- Date:         2024-02-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_screenconnect_webshell.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\ScreenConnect.Service.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\csc.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Remote Access Tool - Simple Help Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `95e60a2b-4705-444b-b7da-ba0ea81a3ee2` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_simple_help.yml)**

> An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software, such as Team Viewer, Go2Assist, LogMein, AmmyyAdmin, etc, to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks.
These services are commonly used as legitimate technical support software, and may be allowed by application control within a target environment.
Remote access tools like VNC, Ammyy, and Teamviewer are used frequently when compared with other legitimate software commonly used by adversaries. (Citation: Symantec Living off the Land)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - Simple Help Execution
-- Sigma ID:     95e60a2b-4705-444b-b7da-ba0ea81a3ee2
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-02-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_simple_help.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the tool
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\JWrapper-Remote Access\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\JWrapper-Remote Support\\%')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\SimpleService.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of the tool

**References:**
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/slashandgrab-screen-connect-post-exploitation-in-the-wild-cve-2024-1709-cve-2024-1708

## Remote Access Tool - TacticalRMM Agent Registration to Potentially Attacker-Controlled Server

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2db93a3f-3249-4f73-9e68-0e77a0f8ae7e` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219, T1105 |
| **Author** | Ahmed Nosir (@egycondor) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_tacticalrmm_agent_registration_via_cli.yml)**

> Detects TacticalRMM agent installations where the --api, --auth, and related flags are used on the command line.
These parameters configure the agent to connect to a specific RMM server with authentication, client ID, and site ID.
This technique could indicate a threat actor attempting to register the agent with an attacker-controlled RMM infrastructure silently.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - TacticalRMM Agent Registration to Potentially Attacker-Controlled Server
-- Sigma ID:     2db93a3f-3249-4f73-9e68-0e77a0f8ae7e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1219, T1105
-- Author:       Ahmed Nosir (@egycondor)
-- Date:         2025-05-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_tacticalrmm_agent_registration_via_cli.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate system administrator deploying TacticalRMM
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\TacticalAgent\\tacticalrmm.exe%'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--api%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--auth%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--client-id%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--site-id%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--agent-type%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate system administrator deploying TacticalRMM

**References:**
- https://github.com/amidaware/tacticalrmm
- https://apophis133.medium.com/powershell-script-tactical-rmm-installation-45afb639eff3

---

## Remote Access Tool - Team Viewer Session Started On Windows Host

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ab70c354-d9ac-4e11-bbb6-ec8e3b153357` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1133 |
| **Author** | Josh Nickels, Qi Nan |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_teamviewer_incoming_connection.yml)**

> Detects the command line executed when TeamViewer starts a session started by a remote host.
Once a connection has been started, an investigator can verify the connection details by viewing the "incoming_connections.txt" log file in the TeamViewer folder.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - Team Viewer Session Started On Windows Host
-- Sigma ID:     ab70c354-d9ac-4e11-bbb6-ec8e3b153357
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1133
-- Author:       Josh Nickels, Qi Nan
-- Date:         2024-03-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_teamviewer_incoming_connection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of TeamViewer
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName = 'TeamViewer_Desktop.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'TeamViewer_Service.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TeamViewer\_Desktop.exe --IPCport 5939 --Module 1'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of TeamViewer

**References:**
- Internal Research

---

## Remote Access Tool - UltraViewer Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `88656cec-6c3b-487c-82c0-f73ebb805503` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_ultraviewer.yml)**

> An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software, such as Team Viewer, Go2Assist, LogMein, AmmyyAdmin, etc, to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks.
These services are commonly used as legitimate technical support software, and may be allowed by application control within a target environment.
Remote access tools like VNC, Ammyy, and Teamviewer are used frequently when compared with other legitimate software commonly used by adversaries. (Citation: Symantec Living off the Land)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Remote Access Tool - UltraViewer Execution
-- Sigma ID:     88656cec-6c3b-487c-82c0-f73ebb805503
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-09-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_access_tools_ultraviewer.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'UltraViewer'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'DucFabulous Co,ltd'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'UltraViewer_Desktop.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1219/T1219.md

---

## Discovery of a System Time

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b243b280-65fe-48df-ba07-6ddea7646427` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1124 |
| **Author** | E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_time_discovery.yml)**

> Identifies use of various commands to query a systems time. This technique may be used before executing a scheduled task or to discover the time zone of a target system.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Discovery of a System Time
-- Sigma ID:     b243b280-65fe-48df-ba07-6ddea7646427
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1124
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_remote_time_discovery.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of the system utilities to discover system time for legitimate reason
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%time%'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\w32tm.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tz%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of the system utilities to discover system time for legitimate reason

**References:**
- https://eqllib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/analytics/fcdb99c2-ac3c-4bde-b664-4b336329bed2.html
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1124/T1124.md

---

## Renamed AdFind Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `df55196f-f105-44d3-a675-e9dfb6cc2f2b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1018, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_adfind.yml)**

> Detects the use of a renamed Adfind.exe. AdFind continues to be seen across majority of breaches. It is used to domain trust discovery to plan out subsequent steps in the attack chain.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed AdFind Execution
-- Sigma ID:     df55196f-f105-44d3-a675-e9dfb6cc2f2b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1018, T1087.002, T1482, T1069.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_adfind.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\AdFind.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.joeware.net/freetools/tools/adfind/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2020/05/08/adfind-recon/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/01/11/trickbot-still-alive-and-well/
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/01/20/deep-dive-into-the-solorigate-second-stage-activation-from-sunburst-to-teardrop-and-raindrop/
- https://social.technet.microsoft.com/wiki/contents/articles/7535.adfind-command-examples.aspx
- https://github.com/center-for-threat-informed-defense/adversary_emulation_library/blob/bf62ece1c679b07b5fb49c4bae947fe24c81811f/fin6/Emulation_Plan/Phase1.md

## Renamed AutoHotkey.EXE Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0f16d9cf-0616-45c8-8fad-becc11b5a41c` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_autohotkey.yml)**

> Detects execution of a renamed autohotkey.exe binary based on PE metadata fields

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed AutoHotkey.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0f16d9cf-0616-45c8-8fad-becc11b5a41c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2023-02-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_autohotkey.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%AutoHotkey%'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%AutoHotkey%')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('AutoHotkey.exe', 'AutoHotkey.rc')))
  AND NOT (((procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey32\_UIA.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey64\_UIA.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyA32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyA32\_UIA.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyU32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyU32\_UIA.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyU64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkeyU64\_UIA.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\AutoHotkey%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.autohotkey.com/download/
- https://thedfirreport.com/2023/02/06/collect-exfiltrate-sleep-repeat/

---

## Renamed AutoIt Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f4264e47-f522-4c38-a420-04525d5b880f` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_autoit.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed AutoIt2.exe or AutoIt3.exe.
AutoIt is a scripting language and automation tool for Windows systems. While primarily used for legitimate automation tasks, it can be misused in cyber attacks.
Attackers can leverage AutoIt to create and distribute malware, including keyloggers, spyware, and botnets. A renamed AutoIt executable is particularly suspicious.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed AutoIt Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f4264e47-f522-4c38-a420-04525d5b880f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-06-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_autoit.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/malmoeb/status/1665463817130725378?s=12&t=C0_T_re0wRP_NfKa27Xw9w
- https://www.autoitscript.com/site/

## Potential Defense Evasion Via Binary Rename

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `36480ae1-a1cb-4eaa-a0d6-29801d7e9142` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036.003 |
| **Author** | Matthew Green @mgreen27, Ecco, James Pemberton @4A616D6573, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_binary.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed binary often used by attackers or malware leveraging new Sysmon OriginalFileName datapoint.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Via Binary Rename
-- Sigma ID:     36480ae1-a1cb-4eaa-a0d6-29801d7e9142
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Matthew Green @mgreen27, Ecco, James Pemberton @4A616D6573, oscd.community, Andreas Hunkeler (@Karneades)
-- Date:         2019-06-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_binary.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Custom applications use renamed binaries adding slight change to binary name. Typically this is easy to spot and add to whitelist
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.Exe', 'CONHOST.EXE', '7z.exe', '7za.exe', 'WinRAR.exe', 'wevtutil.exe', 'net.exe', 'net1.exe', 'netsh.exe', 'InstallUtil.exe'))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\conhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\7z.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\7za.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\WinRAR.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wevtutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\netsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\InstallUtil.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Custom applications use renamed binaries adding slight change to binary name. Typically this is easy to spot and add to whitelist

**References:**
- https://mgreen27.github.io/posts/2019/05/12/BinaryRename.html
- https://mgreen27.github.io/posts/2019/05/29/BinaryRename2.html
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/0f229c0e42bfe7ca736a14023836d65baa941ed2/atomics/T1036.003/T1036.003.md#atomic-test-1---masquerading-as-windows-lsass-process
- https://www.splunk.com/en_us/blog/security/inno-setup-malware-redline-stealer-campaign.html

---

## Potential Defense Evasion Via Rename Of Highly Relevant Binaries

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0ba1da6d-b6ce-4366-828c-18826c9de23e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036.003 |
| **Author** | Matthew Green - @mgreen27, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_binary_highly_relevant.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed binary often used by attackers or malware leveraging new Sysmon OriginalFileName datapoint.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Via Rename Of Highly Relevant Binaries
-- Sigma ID:     0ba1da6d-b6ce-4366-828c-18826c9de23e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Matthew Green - @mgreen27, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), frack113
-- Date:         2019-06-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_binary_highly_relevant.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Custom applications use renamed binaries adding slight change to binary name. Typically this is easy to spot and add to whitelist; PsExec installed via Windows Store doesn't contain original filename field (False negative)
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((rawEventMsg = 'Execute processes remotely')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Sysinternals PsExec'))
  OR ((rawEventMsg LIKE 'Windows PowerShell%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE 'pwsh%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('certutil.exe', 'cmstp.exe', 'cscript.exe', 'IE4UINIT.EXE', 'finger.exe', 'mshta.exe', 'msiexec.exe', 'msxsl.exe', 'powershell_ise.exe', 'powershell.exe', 'psexec.c', 'psexec.exe', 'psexesvc.exe', 'pwsh.dll', 'reg.exe', 'regsvr32.exe', 'rundll32.exe', 'WerMgr', 'wmic.exe', 'wscript.exe')))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmstp.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\ie4uinit.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\finger.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msxsl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\psexec.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\psexec64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PSEXESVC.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\reg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wermgr.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Custom applications use renamed binaries adding slight change to binary name. Typically this is easy to spot and add to whitelist; PsExec installed via Windows Store doesn't contain original filename field (False negative)

**References:**
- https://mgreen27.github.io/posts/2019/05/12/BinaryRename.html
- https://mgreen27.github.io/posts/2019/05/29/BinaryRename2.html
- https://www.trendmicro.com/vinfo/hk-en/security/news/cybercrime-and-digital-threats/megacortex-ransomware-spotted-attacking-enterprise-networks
- https://twitter.com/christophetd/status/1164506034720952320

## Renamed BOINC Client Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `30d07da2-83ab-45d8-ae75-ec7c0edcaffc` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1553 |
| **Author** | Matt Anderson (Huntress) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_boinc.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed BOINC binary.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed BOINC Client Execution
-- Sigma ID:     30d07da2-83ab-45d8-ae75-ec7c0edcaffc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1553
-- Author:       Matt Anderson (Huntress)
-- Date:         2024-07-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_boinc.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'BOINC.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://boinc.berkeley.edu/

## Renamed CreateDump Utility Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1a1ed54a-2ba4-4221-94d5-01dee560d71e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036, T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_createdump.yml)**

> Detects uses of a renamed legitimate createdump.exe LOLOBIN utility to dump process memory

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed CreateDump Utility Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1a1ed54a-2ba4-4221-94d5-01dee560d71e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_createdump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Command lines that use the same flags
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\createdump.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Command lines that use the same flags

**References:**
- https://www.crowdstrike.com/blog/overwatch-exposes-aquatic-panda-in-possession-of-log-4-shell-exploit-tools/
- https://twitter.com/bopin2020/status/1366400799199272960

| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059, T1202 |
| **Author** | X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_curl.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed "CURL.exe" binary based on the PE metadata fields

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed CURL.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7530cd3d-7671-43e3-b209-976966f6ea48
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059, T1202
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_curl.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'curl.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'The curl executable')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Renamed ZOHO Dctask64 Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `340a090b-c4e9-412e-bb36-b4b16fe96f9b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036, T1055.001, T1202, T1218 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_dctask64.yml)**

> Detects a renamed "dctask64.exe" execution, a signed binary by ZOHO Corporation part of ManageEngine Endpoint Central.
This binary can be abused for DLL injection, arbitrary command and process execution.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed ZOHO Dctask64 Execution
-- Sigma ID:     340a090b-c4e9-412e-bb36-b4b16fe96f9b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1055.001, T1202, T1218
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-01-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_dctask64.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6834B1B94E49701D77CCB3C0895E1AFD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=1BB6F93B129F398C7C4A76BB97450BBA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=FAA2AC19875FADE461C8D89DCF2710A3%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=F1039CED4B91572AB7847D26032E6BBF%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1222088214581825540
- https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1222095963789111296
- https://twitter.com/gN3mes1s/status/1222095371175911424

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Jusched.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     edd8a48c-1b9f-4ba1-83aa-490338cd1ccb
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
```

## Renamed Mavinject.EXE Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e6474a1b-5390-49cd-ab41-8d88655f7394` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1055.001, T1218.013 |
| **Author** | frack113, Florian Roth |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_mavinject.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed version of the "Mavinject" process. Which can be abused to perform process injection using the "/INJECTRUNNING" flag

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Mavinject.EXE Execution
-- Sigma ID:     e6474a1b-5390-49cd-ab41-8d88655f7394
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055.001, T1218.013
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_mavinject.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('mavinject32.exe', 'mavinject64.exe'))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\mavinject32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mavinject64.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1218/T1218.md

```sql
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'msdt.exe')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\msdt.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Msdt/

## Renamed NetSupport RAT Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0afbd410-de03-4078-8491-f132303cb67d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_netsupport_rat.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed "client32.exe" (NetSupport RAT) via Imphash, Product and OriginalFileName strings

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed NetSupport RAT Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0afbd410-de03-4078-8491-f132303cb67d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_netsupport_rat.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%NetSupport Remote Control%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] LIKE '%client32.exe%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=A9D50692E95B79723F3E76FCF70D023E%'))
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\client32.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/misbehaving-rats/

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_office_processes.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed office binary

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Office Binary Execution
-- Sigma ID:     0b0cd537-fc77-4e6e-a973-e53495c1083d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_office_processes.yml

-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,

FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0

  OR (rawEventMsg IN ('Microsoft Access', 'Microsoft Excel', 'Microsoft OneNote', 'Microsoft Outlook', 'Microsoft PowerPoint', 'Microsoft Publisher', 'Microsoft Word', 'Sent to OneNote Tool'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```
