## Renamed PAExec Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c4e49831-1496-40cf-8ce1-b53f942b02f9` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1202 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jason Lynch |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_paexec.yml)**

> Detects execution of renamed version of PAExec. Often used by attackers

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed PAExec Execution
-- Sigma ID:     c4e49831-1496-40cf-8ce1-b53f942b02f9
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jason Lynch
-- Date:         2021-05-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_paexec.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Weird admins that rename their tools; Software companies that bundle PAExec with their software and rename it, so that it is less embarrassing; When executed with the "-s" flag. PAExec will copy itself to the "C:\Windows\" directory with a different name. Usually like this "PAExec-[XXXXX]-[ComputerName]"
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'PAExec Application')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'PAExec.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] LIKE '%PAExec%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=11D40A7B7876288F919AB819CC2D9802%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=6444f8a34e99b8f7d9647de66aabe516%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=dfd6aa3f7b2b1035b76b718f1ddc689f%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=1a6cca4d5460b1710a12dea39e4a592c%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Weird admins that rename their tools; Software companies that bundle PAExec with their software and rename it, so that it is less embarrassing; When executed with the "-s" flag. PAExec will copy itself to the "C:\Windows\" directory with a different name. Usually like this "PAExec-[XXXXX]-[ComputerName]"

**References:**
- https://www.poweradmin.com/paexec/
- https://summit.fireeye.com/content/dam/fireeye-www/summit/cds-2018/presentations/cds18-technical-s05-att&cking-fin7.pdf

---

## Renamed PingCastle Binary Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2433a154-bb3d-42e4-86c3-a26bdac91c45` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059, T1202 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_pingcastle.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed "PingCastle" binary based on the PE metadata fields.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed PingCastle Binary Execution
-- Sigma ID:     2433a154-bb3d-42e4-86c3-a26bdac91c45
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059, T1202
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2024-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_pingcastle.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PingCastleReporting.exe', 'PingCastleCloud.exe', 'PingCastle.exe')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner aclcheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner computerversion%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner foreignusers%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner laps\_bitlocker%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner localadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner nullsession-trust%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner oxidbindings%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner remote%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner share%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner smb3querynetwork%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner spooler%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner startup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--scanner zerologon%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--no-enum-limit%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--level Full%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--healthcheck%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--server %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2023/10/30/netsupport-intrusion-results-in-domain-compromise/
- https://www.pingcastle.com/documentation/scanner/

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_plink.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed version of the Plink binary

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Plink Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1c12727d-02bf-45ff-a9f3-d49806a3cf43
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-06

-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

> Detects when 'DllRegisterServer' is called in the commandline and the image is not rundll32. This could mean that the 'rundll32' utility has been renamed in order to avoid detection

```sql
-- ============================================================

-- Sigma ID:     2569ed8c-1147-498a-9b8c-2ad3656b10ed
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DllRegisterServer%')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

> Detects execution of renamed Remote Utilities (RURAT) via Product PE header field

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Remote Utilities RAT (RURAT) Execution
-- Sigma ID:     9ef27c24-4903-4192-881a-3adde7ff92a5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, discovery
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_rurat.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')

  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Remote Utilities')
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\rutserv.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rfusclient.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/misbehaving-rats/

---

## Renamed Schtasks Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f91e51c9-f344-4b32-969b-0b6f6b8537d4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036.003, T1053.005 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_schtasks_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of renamed schtasks.exe binary, which is a legitimate Windows utility used for scheduling tasks.
One of the very common persistence techniques is schedule malicious tasks using schtasks.exe.
Since, it is heavily abused, it is also heavily monitored by security products. To evade detection, threat actors may rename the schtasks.exe binary to schedule their malicious tasks.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed Schtasks Execution
-- Sigma ID:     f91e51c9-f344-4b32-969b-0b6f6b8537d4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1036.003, T1053.005
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_schtasks_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%schtasks%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe')
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://x.com/JangPr0/status/1932034543026065833
- https://ss64.com/nt/schtasks.html

---

| **Status** | test |

> Detects suspicious renamed SysInternals DebugView execution

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed SysInternals DebugView Execution
-- Sigma ID:     cd764533-2e07-40d6-a718-cfeec7f2da7f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1588.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-05-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_sysinternals_debugview.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0

    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Dbgview.exe')

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Renamed ProcDump Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4a0b2c7e-7cb2-495d-8b63-5f268e7bfd67` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_sysinternals_procdump.yml)**

> Detects the execution of a renamed ProcDump executable.
This often done by attackers or malware in order to evade defensive mechanisms.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Renamed ProcDump Execution
-- Sigma ID:     4a0b2c7e-7cb2-495d-8b63-5f268e7bfd67
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-11-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_renamed_sysinternals_procdump.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Procdump illegally bundled with legitimate software.; Administrators who rename binaries (should be investigated).
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'procdump')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Procdump illegally bundled with legitimate software.; Administrators who rename binaries (should be investigated).

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sysinternals/downloads/procdump

```sql
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
```

> Detects using Rpcping.exe to send a RPC test connection to the target server (-s) and force the NTLM hash to be sent in the process.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Capture Credentials with Rpcping.exe
-- Sigma ID:     93671f99-04eb-4ab4-a161-70d446a84003
```

## Ruby Inline Command Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `20a5ffa1-3848-4584-b6f8-c7c7fd9f69c8` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ruby_inline_command_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of ruby using the "-e" flag. This is could be used as a way to launch a reverse shell or execute live ruby code.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Ruby Inline Command Execution
-- Sigma ID:     20a5ffa1-3848-4584-b6f8-c7c7fd9f69c8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ruby_inline_command_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -e%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ruby.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'ruby.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://pentestmonkey.net/cheat-sheet/shells/reverse-shell-cheat-sheet
- https://www.revshells.com/

## Potential Rundll32 Execution With DLL Stored In ADS

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9248c7e1-2bf3-4661-a22c-600a8040b446` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.004 |
| **Author** | Harjot Singh, '@cyb3rjy0t' |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_ads_stored_dll_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of rundll32 where the DLL being called is stored in an Alternate Data Stream (ADS).

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Rundll32 Execution With DLL Stored In ADS
-- Sigma ID:     9248c7e1-2bf3-4661-a22c-600a8040b446
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       Harjot Singh, '@cyb3rjy0t'
-- Date:         2023-01-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_ads_stored_dll_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '[Rr][Uu][Nn][Dd][Ll][Ll]32(\.[Ee][Xx][Ee])? \S+?\w:\S+?:'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Rundll32

---

## Suspicious Advpack Call Via Rundll32.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a1473adb-5338-4a20-b4c3-126763e2d3d3` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_advpack_obfuscated_ordinal_call.yml)**

> Detects execution of "rundll32" calling "advpack.dll" with potential obfuscated ordinal calls in order to leverage the "RegisterOCX" function

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Advpack Call Via Rundll32.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     a1473adb-5338-4a20-b4c3-126763e2d3d3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_advpack_obfuscated_ordinal_call.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%advpack%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#+%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%12%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#-%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/Hexacorn/status/1224848930795552769
- http://www.hexacorn.com/blog/2020/02/05/stay-positive-lolbins-not/

|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1cc50f3f-1fc8-4acf-b2e9-6f172e1fdebd` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1055 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_inline_vbs.yml)**

> Detects suspicious process related to rundll32 based on command line that invokes inline VBScript as seen being used by UNC2452

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Rundll32 Invoking Inline VBScript
-- Sigma ID:     1cc50f3f-1fc8-4acf-b2e9-6f172e1fdebd
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1055
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-03-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_inline_vbs.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Execute%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RegRead%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%window.close%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/03/04/goldmax-goldfinder-sibot-analyzing-nobelium-malware/

---

## Rundll32 InstallScreenSaver Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `15bd98ea-55f4-4d37-b09a-e7caa0fa2221` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Christopher Peacock @securepeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io, TactiKoolSec |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_installscreensaver.yml)**

> An attacker may execute an application as a SCR File using rundll32.exe desk.cpl,InstallScreenSaver

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rundll32 InstallScreenSaver Execution
-- Sigma ID:     15bd98ea-55f4-4d37-b09a-e7caa0fa2221
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Christopher Peacock @securepeacock, SCYTHE @scythe_io, TactiKoolSec
-- Date:         2022-04-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_installscreensaver.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate installation of a new screensaver
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%InstallScreenSaver%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate installation of a new screensaver

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Libraries/Desk/
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/0f229c0e42bfe7ca736a14023836d65baa941ed2/atomics/T1218.011/T1218.011.md#atomic-test-13---rundll32-with-deskcpl

| **FSM Severity** | 7 |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_keymgr.yml)**

> Detects the invocation of the Stored User Names and Passwords dialogue (Key Manager)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Key Manager Access
-- Sigma ID:     a4694263-59a8-4608-a3a0-6f8d3a51664c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1555.004
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-04-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_keymgr.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%keymgr%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%KRShowKeyMgr%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Mshtml.DLL RunHTMLApplication Suspicious Usage

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4782eb5a-a513-4523-a0ac-f3082b26ac5c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems),  Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Josh Nickels, frack113, Zaw Min Htun (ZETA) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_mshtml_runhtmlapplication.yml)**

> Detects execution of commands that leverage the "mshtml.dll" RunHTMLApplication export to run arbitrary code via different protocol handlers (vbscript, javascript, file, http...)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Mshtml.DLL RunHTMLApplication Suspicious Usage
-- Sigma ID:     4782eb5a-a513-4523-a0ac-f3082b26ac5c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems),  Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Josh Nickels, frack113, Zaw Min Htun (ZETA)
-- Date:         2022-08-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_mshtml_runhtmlapplication.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\..\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshtml%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#135%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RunHTMLApplication%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/n1nj4sec/status/1421190238081277959
- https://hyp3rlinx.altervista.org/advisories/MICROSOFT_WINDOWS_DEFENDER_TROJAN.WIN32.POWESSERE.G_MITIGATION_BYPASS_PART2.txt

## Rundll32 Execution Without CommandLine Parameters

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1775e15e-b61b-4d14-a1a3-80981298085a` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1202 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_no_params.yml)**

> Detects suspicious start of rundll32.exe without any parameters as found in CobaltStrike beacon activity

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rundll32 Execution Without CommandLine Parameters
-- Sigma ID:     1775e15e-b61b-4d14-a1a3-80981298085a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-05-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_no_params.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Possible but rare
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe"' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\rundll32'))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft\\Edge\\%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Possible but rare

**References:**
- https://www.cobaltstrike.com/help-opsec
- https://twitter.com/ber_m1ng/status/1397948048135778309

## Suspicious NTLM Authentication on the Printer Spooler Service

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `bb76d96b-821c-47cf-944b-7ce377864492` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1212 |
| **Author** | Elastic (idea), Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_ntlmrelay.yml)**

> Detects a privilege elevation attempt by coercing NTLM authentication on the Printer Spooler service

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious NTLM Authentication on the Printer Spooler Service
-- Sigma ID:     bb76d96b-821c-47cf-944b-7ce377864492
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1212
-- Author:       Elastic (idea), Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-05-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_ntlmrelay.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\windows\\system32\\davclnt.dll,DavSetCookie%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spoolss%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%srvsvc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/print/pipe/%')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**

## Potential Obfuscated Ordinal Call Via Rundll32

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `43fa5350-db63-4b8f-9a01-789a427074e1` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027.010 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_obfuscated_ordinal_call.yml)**

> Detects execution of "rundll32" with potential obfuscated ordinal calls

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Obfuscated Ordinal Call Via Rundll32
-- Sigma ID:     43fa5350-db63-4b8f-9a01-789a427074e1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027.010
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-17
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_obfuscated_ordinal_call.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#+%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#-%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#655%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#656%'))

  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%')))
```

> Detects execution of "rundll32.exe" with a parent process of Explorer.exe. This has been observed by variants of Raspberry Robin, as first reported by Red Canary.

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

## Process Memory Dump Via Comsvcs.DLL

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `646ea171-dded-4578-8a4d-65e9822892e3` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036, T1003.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Modexp, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_process_dump_via_comsvcs.yml)**

> Detects a process memory dump via "comsvcs.dll" using rundll32, covering multiple different techniques (ordinal, minidump function, etc.)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Memory Dump Via Comsvcs.DLL
-- Sigma ID:     646ea171-dded-4578-8a4d-65e9822892e3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1003.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Modexp, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-02-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_process_dump_via_comsvcs.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%24%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%comsvcs%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%full%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% #%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%,#%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%, #%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%"#%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/shantanukhande/status/1229348874298388484
- https://twitter.com/pythonresponder/status/1385064506049630211?s=21
- https://twitter.com/Hexacorn/status/1224848930795552769
- https://modexp.wordpress.com/2019/08/30/minidumpwritedump-via-com-services-dll/
- https://twitter.com/SBousseaden/status/1167417096374050817
- https://twitter.com/Wietze/status/1542107456507203586
- https://github.com/Hackndo/lsassy/blob/14d8f8ae596ecf22b449bfe919829173b8a07635/lsassy/dumpmethod/comsvcs.py
- https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=52tAmVLg1KM&t=2070s

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rundll32 Registered COM Objects

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,

  AND (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-sta %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-localserver %'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%{%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%}%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**
- https://nasbench.medium.com/a-deep-dive-into-rundll32-exe-642344b41e90
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1546.015/T1546.015.md

---

## Suspicious Process Start Locations

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `15b75071-74cc-47e0-b4c6-b43744a62a2b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036 |
| **Author** | juju4, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_run_locations.yml)**

> Detects suspicious process run from unusual locations

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Process Start Locations
-- Sigma ID:     15b75071-74cc-47e0-b4c6-b43744a62a2b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       juju4, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_run_locations.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%:\\RECYCLER\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\SystemVolumeInformation\\%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\debug\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\fonts\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\help\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\drivers\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\addins\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\cursors\\%' OR procName LIKE 'C:\\Windows\\system32\\tasks\\%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment

**References:**
- https://car.mitre.org/wiki/CAR-2013-05-002

---

## Suspicious Rundll32 Setupapi.dll Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `285b85b1-a555-4095-8652-a8a4106af63f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Konstantin Grishchenko, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_setupapi_installhinfsection.yml)**

> setupapi.dll library provide InstallHinfSection function for processing INF files. INF file may contain instructions allowing to create values in the registry, modify files and install drivers. This technique could be used to obtain persistence via modifying one of Run or RunOnce registry keys, run process or use other DLLs chain calls (see references) InstallHinfSection function in setupapi.dll calls runonce.exe executable regardless of actual content of INF file.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Rundll32 Setupapi.dll Activity
-- Sigma ID:     285b85b1-a555-4095-8652-a8a4106af63f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Konstantin Grishchenko, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_setupapi_installhinfsection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Scripts and administrative tools that use INF files for driver installation with setupapi.dll
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\runonce.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%setupapi.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%InstallHinfSection%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Scripts and administrative tools that use INF files for driver installation with setupapi.dll

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Libraries/Setupapi/
- https://gist.githubusercontent.com/bohops/0cc6586f205f3691e04a1ebf1806aabd/raw/baf7b29891bb91e76198e30889fbf7d6642e8974/calc_exe.inf
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huntresslabs/evading-autoruns/master/shady.inf
- https://twitter.com/Z3Jpa29z/status/1313742350292746241?s=20

---

## Shell32 DLL Execution in Suspicious Directory

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `32b96012-7892-429e-b26c-ac2bf46066ff` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_shell32_susp_execution.yml)**

> Detects shell32.dll executing a DLL in a suspicious directory

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Shell32 DLL Execution in Suspicious Directory
-- Sigma ID:     32b96012-7892-429e-b26c-ac2bf46066ff
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218.011
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-11-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_shell32_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%shell32.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Control\_RunDLL%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%AppData\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%LocalAppData\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%Temp\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%tmp\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.group-ib.com/resources/threat-research/red-curl-2.html

## Potential ShellDispatch.DLL Functionality Abuse

|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `82343930-652f-43f5-ab70-2ee9fdd6d5e9` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_shelldispatch_potential_abuse.yml)**

> Detects potential "ShellDispatch.dll" functionality abuse to execute arbitrary binaries via "ShellExecute"

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential ShellDispatch.DLL Functionality Abuse
-- Sigma ID:     82343930-652f-43f5-ab70-2ee9fdd6d5e9
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RunDll\_ShellExecuteW%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

## RunDLL32 Spawning Explorer

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `caa06de8-fdef-4c91-826a-7f9e163eef4b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | elhoim, CD_ROM_ |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_spawn_explorer.yml)**

> Detects RunDLL32.exe spawning explorer.exe as child, which is very uncommon, often observes Gamarue spawning the explorer.exe process in an unusual way

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        RunDLL32 Spawning Explorer
-- Sigma ID:     caa06de8-fdef-4c91-826a-7f9e163eef4b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       elhoim, CD_ROM_
-- Date:         2022-04-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_spawn_explorer.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\explorer.exe')
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%\\shell32.dll,Control\_RunDLL%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/intelligence-insights-november-2021/

## Potentially Suspicious Rundll32 Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e593cf51-88db-4ee1-b920-37e89012a3c9` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | juju4, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_susp_activity.yml)**

> Detects suspicious execution of rundll32, with specific calls to some DLLs with known LOLBIN functionalities

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Rundll32 Activity
-- Sigma ID:     e593cf51-88db-4ee1-b920-37e89012a3c9
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       juju4, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_susp_activity.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%javascript:%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.RegisterXLL%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%url.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenURL%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%url.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenURLA%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%url.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FileProtocolHandler%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%zipfldr.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RouteTheCall%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%shell32.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Control\_RunDLL%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%shell32.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ShellExec\_RunDLL%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshtml.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PrintHTML%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%advpack.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LaunchINFSection%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%advpack.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RegisterOCX%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ieadvpack.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LaunchINFSection%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ieadvpack.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RegisterOCX%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ieframe.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenURL%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%shdocvw.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenURL%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%syssetup.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SetupInfObjectInstallAction%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%setupapi.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%InstallHinfSection%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pcwutl.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LaunchApplication%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dfshim.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ShOpenVerbApplication%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dfshim.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ShOpenVerbShortcut%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%scrobj.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GenerateTypeLib%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%shimgvw.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ImageView\_Fullscreen%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%comsvcs.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MiniDump%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment

**References:**
- http://www.hexacorn.com/blog/2017/05/01/running-programs-via-proxy-jumping-on-a-edr-bypass-trampoline/
- https://twitter.com/Hexacorn/status/885258886428725250
- https://gist.github.com/ryhanson/227229866af52e2d963cf941af135a52
- https://twitter.com/nas_bench/status/1433344116071583746
- https://twitter.com/eral4m/status/1479106975967240209
- https://twitter.com/eral4m/status/1479080793003671557

```sql
SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,

FROM fsiem.events

  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cr2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.eps%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ico%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.nef%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.orf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.raw%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.sr2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.tif%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.tiff%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.zscaler.com/blogs/security-research/onenote-growing-threat-malware-distribution

---

## Suspicious Usage Of ShellExec_RunDLL

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d87bd452-6da1-456e-8155-7dc988157b7d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_susp_shellexec_execution.yml)**

> Detects suspicious usage of the ShellExec_RunDLL function to launch other commands as seen in the the raspberry-robin attack

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Usage Of ShellExec_RunDLL
-- Sigma ID:     d87bd452-6da1-456e-8155-7dc988157b7d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_susp_shellexec_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ShellExec\_RunDLL%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%comspec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iex%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%msiexec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%odbcconf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%regsvr32%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/raspberry-robin/
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/10/27/raspberry-robin-worm-part-of-larger-ecosystem-facilitating-pre-ransomware-activity/
- https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/issues/1009

---

## Suspicious ShellExec_RunDLL Call Via Ordinal

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8823e85d-31d8-473e-b7f4-92da070f0fc6` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_susp_shellexec_ordinal_execution.yml)**

> Detects suspicious call to the "ShellExec_RunDLL" exported function of SHELL32.DLL through the ordinal number to launch other commands.
Adversary might only use the ordinal number in order to bypass existing detection that alert on usage of ShellExec_RunDLL on CommandLine.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious ShellExec_RunDLL Call Via Ordinal
-- Sigma ID:     8823e85d-31d8-473e-b7f4-92da070f0fc6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2024-12-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_susp_shellexec_ordinal_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/raspberry-robin/
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/10/27/raspberry-robin-worm-part-of-larger-ecosystem-facilitating-pre-ransomware-activity/
- https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/issues/1009
- https://strontic.github.io/xcyclopedia/library/shell32.dll-65DA072F25DE83D9F83653E3FEA3644D.html

## Suspicious Rundll32 Activity Invoking Sys File

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `731231b9-0b5d-4219-94dd-abb6959aa7ea` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_sys.yml)**

> Detects suspicious process related to rundll32 based on command line that includes a *.sys file as seen being used by UNC2452

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Rundll32 Activity Invoking Sys File
-- Sigma ID:     731231b9-0b5d-4219-94dd-abb6959aa7ea
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-03-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_sys.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32.exe%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.sys,%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.sys %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/03/04/goldmax-goldfinder-sibot-analyzing-nobelium-malware/

## Potentially Suspicious Rundll32.EXE Execution of UDL File

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0ea52357-cd59-4340-9981-c46c7e900428` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011, T1071 |
| **Author** | @kostastsale |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_udl_exec.yml)**

> Detects the execution of rundll32.exe with the oledb32.dll library to open a UDL file.
Threat actors can abuse this technique as a phishing vector to capture authentication credentials or other sensitive data.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Rundll32.EXE Execution of UDL File
-- Sigma ID:     0ea52357-cd59-4340-9981-c46c7e900428
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218.011, T1071
-- Author:       @kostastsale
-- Date:         2024-08-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_udl_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    UDL files serve as a convenient and flexible tool for managing and testing database connections in various development and administrative scenarios.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%oledb32.dll%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%,OpenDSLFile %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\Users\\\\*\\\\Downloads\\\\%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.udl'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** UDL files serve as a convenient and flexible tool for managing and testing database connections in various development and administrative scenarios.

**References:**
- https://trustedsec.com/blog/oops-i-udld-it-again

---

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Rundll32 UNC Path Execution

ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Suspicious Workstation Locking via Rundll32

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3b5b0213-0460-4e3f-8937-3abf98ff7dcc` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_user32_dll.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious call to the user32.dll function that locks the user workstation

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Workstation Locking via Rundll32
-- Sigma ID:     3b5b0213-0460-4e3f-8937-3abf98ff7dcc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-06-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_rundll32_user32_dll.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Scripts or links on the user desktop used to lock the workstation instead of Windows+L or the menu option
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%user32.dll,%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LockWorkStation%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Scripts or links on the user desktop used to lock the workstation instead of Windows+L or the menu option

**References:**
- https://app.any.run/tasks/2aef9c63-f944-4763-b3ef-81eee209d128/
