## Scheduled Task Executing Encoded Payload from Registry

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c4eeeeae-89f4-43a7-8b48-8d1bdfa66c78` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1053.005, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | pH-T (Nextron Systems), @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport, X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_reg_loader_encoded.yml)**

> Detects the creation of a schtask that potentially executes a base64 encoded payload stored in the Windows Registry using PowerShell.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Scheduled Task Executing Encoded Payload from Registry
-- Sigma ID:     c4eeeeae-89f4-43a7-8b48-8d1bdfa66c78
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005, T1059.001
-- Author:       pH-T (Nextron Systems), @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport, X__Junior (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_reg_loader_encoded.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Create%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FromBase64String%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%encodedcommand%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ItemProperty%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% gp %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HKCU:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HKLM:%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%registry::%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HKEY\_%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2022/02/21/qbot-and-zerologon-lead-to-full-domain-compromise/

---

| **FSM Severity** | 7 |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_schedule_type.yml)**

> Detects scheduled task creations or modification on a suspicious schedule type

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Types
-- Sigma ID:     24c8392b-aa3c-46b7-a545-43f71657fe98
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005

-- Unmapped:     (none)

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**References:**

## Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Type With High Privileges

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7a02e22e-b885-4404-b38b-1ddc7e65258a` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1053.005 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_schedule_type_system.yml)**

> Detects scheduled task creations or modification to be run with high privileges on a suspicious schedule type

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Schtasks Schedule Type With High Privileges
-- Sigma ID:     7a02e22e-b885-4404-b38b-1ddc7e65258a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_schedule_type_system.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some installers were seen using this method of creation unfortunately. Filter them in your environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NT AUT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% SYSTEM%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HIGHEST%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ONLOGON %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ONSTART %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ONCE %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ONIDLE %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some installers were seen using this method of creation unfortunately. Filter them in your environment

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/schtasks-change
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/schtasks-create

---

## Suspicious Command Patterns In Scheduled Task Creation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f2c64357-b1d2-41b7-849f-34d2682c0fad` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1053.005 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_susp_pattern.yml)**

> Detects scheduled task creation using "schtasks" that contain potentially suspicious or uncommon commands

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Command Patterns In Scheduled Task Creation
-- Sigma ID:     f2c64357-b1d2-41b7-849f-34d2682c0fad
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1053.005
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_susp_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Software installers that run from temporary folders and also install scheduled tasks are expected to generate some false positives
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Create %'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -decode %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -enc %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -w hidden %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% bypass %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% IEX%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadData%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadFile%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c start /min %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FromBase64String%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta http%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta.exe http%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Software installers that run from temporary folders and also install scheduled tasks are expected to generate some false positives

**References:**
- https://app.any.run/tasks/512c1352-6380-4436-b27d-bb62f0c020d6/
- https://twitter.com/RedDrip7/status/1506480588827467785
- https://www.ncsc.gov.uk/static-assets/documents/malware-analysis-reports/devil-bait/NCSC-MAR-Devil-Bait.pdf

## Scheduled Task Creation Masquerading as System Processes

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9f8573c9-22b4-40e3-89c1-72bc2b8d49ab` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1053.005, T1036.004, T1036.005 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_system_process.yml)**

> Detects the creation of scheduled tasks that involve system processes, which may indicate malicious actors masquerading as or abusing these processes to execute payloads or maintain persistence.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Scheduled Task Creation Masquerading as System Processes
-- Sigma ID:     9f8573c9-22b4-40e3-89c1-72bc2b8d49ab
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution, persistence | T1053.005, T1036.004, T1036.005
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-02-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_schtasks_system_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate system administration tasks scheduling trusted system processes.
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((rawEventMsg LIKE '% /create %'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% audiodg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% conhost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% dwm.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% explorer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% lsass%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% lsm%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% mmc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% msiexec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% regsvr32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% services%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% spoolsv%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% svchost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% taskeng%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% taskhost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% wininit%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% winlogon%')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'schtasks.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate system administration tasks scheduling trusted system processes.

**References:**
- https://tria.ge/241015-l98snsyeje/behavioral2

## Script Event Consumer Spawning Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f6d1dd2f-b8ce-40ca-bc23-062efb686b34` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047 |
| **Author** | Sittikorn S |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_scrcons_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious child process of Script Event Consumer (scrcons.exe).

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Script Event Consumer Spawning Process
-- Sigma ID:     f6d1dd2f-b8ce-40ca-bc23-062efb686b34
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       Sittikorn S
-- Date:         2021-06-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_scrcons_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\scrcons.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\svchost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\dllhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msbuild.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/child-processes/
- https://docs.paloaltonetworks.com/cortex/cortex-xdr/cortex-xdr-analytics-alert-reference/cortex-xdr-analytics-alert-reference/scrcons-exe-rare-child-process.html

| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |

> Detects installation of a new shim using sdbinst.exe.
Adversaries may establish persistence and/or elevate privileges by executing malicious content triggered by application shims


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Shim Database Persistence via Sdbinst.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     517490a7-115a-48c6-8862-1a481504d5a8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
```

> Detects installation of a potentially suspicious new shim with an uncommon extension using sdbinst.exe.
Adversaries may establish persistence and/or elevate privileges by executing malicious content triggered by application shims


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Extension Shim Database Installation Via Sdbinst.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     18ee686c-38a3-4f65-9f44-48a077141f42
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
```

## Sdclt Child Processes

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `da2738f2-fadb-4394-afa7-0a0674885afa` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sdclt_child_process.yml)**

> A General detection for sdclt spawning new processes. This could be an indicator of sdclt being used for bypass UAC techniques.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sdclt Child Processes
-- Sigma ID:     da2738f2-fadb-4394-afa7-0a0674885afa
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
-- Date:         2020-05-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sdclt_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\sdclt.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sdiagnhost Calling Suspicious Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     f3d39c45-de1a-4486-a687-ab126124f744
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7

  phRecvTime,

  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

    AND (procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\taskkill.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe'))
```

|---|---|

| **Author** | Janantha Marasinghe |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_secedit_execution.yml)**

> Detects potential suspicious behaviour using secedit.exe. Such as exporting or modifying the security policy

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Suspicious Activity Using SeCEdit
-- Sigma ID:     c2c76b77-32be-4d1f-82c9-7e544bdfe0eb
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, discovery, persistence | T1562.002, T1547.001, T1505.005, T1556.002, T1562, T1574.007, T1564.002, T1546.008, T1546.007, T1547.014, T1547.010, T1547.002, T1557, T1082

  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,

  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\secedit.exe')
```

## NodeJS Execution of JavaScript File

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ba3874b9-0fae-465f-836c-eb5d071a1789` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.007 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_security_susp_node_js_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of JavaScript or JSC files using NodeJs binary node.exe, that could be potentially suspicious.
Node.js is a popular open-source JavaScript runtime that runs code outside browsers and is widely used for both frontend and backend development.
Adversaries have been observed abusing Node.js to disguise malware as legitimate processes, evade security defenses, and maintain persistence within target systems.
Because Node.js is commonly used, this rule may generate false positives in some environments. However, if such activity is unusual in your environment, it is highly suspicious and warrants immediate investigation.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        NodeJS Execution of JavaScript File
-- Sigma ID:     ba3874b9-0fae-465f-836c-eb5d071a1789
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.007
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-04-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_security_susp_node_js_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of node.exe to execute JavaScript or JSC files on your environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.js%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\node.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'node.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Node.js')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of node.exe to execute JavaScript or JSC files on your environment

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2025/04/15/threat-actors-misuse-node-js-to-deliver-malware-and-other-malicious-payloads/

---

## Suspicious Serv-U Process Pattern

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `58f4ea09-0fc2-4520-ba18-b85c540b0eaf` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1555 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_servu_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious process pattern which could be a sign of an exploited Serv-U service

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Serv-U Process Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     58f4ea09-0fc2-4520-ba18-b85c540b0eaf
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1555
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_servu_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate uses in which users or programs use the SSH service of Serv-U for remote command execution
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Serv-U.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\bash.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msiexec.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\forfiles.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\scriptrunner.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate uses in which users or programs use the SSH service of Serv-U for remote command execution

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/07/13/microsoft-discovers-threat-actor-targeting-solarwinds-serv-u-software-with-0-day-exploit/

## Uncommon Child Process Of Setres.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `835e75bf-4bfd-47a4-b8a6-b766cac8bcb7` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218, T1202 |
| **Author** | @gott_cyber, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_setres_uncommon_child_process.yml)**

> Detects uncommon child process of Setres.EXE.
Setres.EXE is a Windows server only process and tool that can be used to set the screen resolution.
It can potentially be abused in order to launch any arbitrary file with a name containing the word "choice" from the current execution path.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon Child Process Of Setres.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     835e75bf-4bfd-47a4-b8a6-b766cac8bcb7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218, T1202
-- Author:       @gott_cyber, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_setres_uncommon_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\setres.exe')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\choice%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Setres/
- https://twitter.com/0gtweet/status/1583356502340870144
- https://strontic.github.io/xcyclopedia/library/setres.exe-0E30E4C09637D7A128A37B59A3BC4D09.html
- https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/it-pro/windows-server-2012-r2-and-2012/cc731033(v=ws.11)

## Potential SPN Enumeration Via Setspn.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1eeed653-dbc8-4187-ad0c-eeebb20e6599` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1558.003 |
| **Author** | Markus Neis, keepwatch |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_setspn_spn_enumeration.yml)**

> Detects service principal name (SPN) enumeration used for Kerberoasting

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential SPN Enumeration Via Setspn.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     1eeed653-dbc8-4187-ad0c-eeebb20e6599
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1558.003
-- Author:       Markus Neis, keepwatch
-- Date:         2018-11-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_setspn_spn_enumeration.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Administration activity
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -q %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /q %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\setspn.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'setspn.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg LIKE '%Query or reset the computer%' AND rawEventMsg LIKE '%SPN attribute%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administration activity

**References:**
- https://web.archive.org/web/20200329173843/https://p16.praetorian.com/blog/how-to-use-kerberoasting-t1208-for-privilege-escalation
- https://www.praetorian.com/blog/how-to-use-kerberoasting-t1208-for-privilege-escalation/?edition=2019

---

## Setup16.EXE Execution With Custom .Lst File

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `99c8be4f-3087-4f9f-9c24-8c7e257b442e` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1574.005 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_setup16_custom_lst_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of "Setup16.EXE" and old installation utility with a custom ".lst" file.
These ".lst" file can contain references to external program that "Setup16.EXE" will execute.
Attackers and adversaries might leverage this as a living of the land utility.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Setup16.EXE Execution With Custom .Lst File
-- Sigma ID:     99c8be4f-3087-4f9f-9c24-8c7e257b442e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1574.005
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2024-12-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_setup16_custom_lst_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    On modern Windows system, the "Setup16" utility is practically never used, hence false positive should be very rare.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\Windows\SysWOW64\setup16.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% -m %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** On modern Windows system, the "Setup16" utility is practically never used, hence false positive should be very rare.

**References:**
- https://www.hexacorn.com/blog/2024/10/12/the-sweet16-the-oldbin-lolbin-called-setup16-exe/

---

> Detect attacker collecting audio via SoundRecorder application.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Audio Capture via SoundRecorder
-- Sigma ID:     83865853-59aa-449e-9600-74b9d89a6d6e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
```

## Suspicious Spool Service Child Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `dcdbc940-0bff-46b2-95f3-2d73f848e33b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1203, T1068 |
| **Author** | Justin C. (@endisphotic), @dreadphones (detection), Thomas Patzke (Sigma rule) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_spoolsv_susp_child_processes.yml)**

> Detects suspicious print spool service (spoolsv.exe) child processes.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Spool Service Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     dcdbc940-0bff-46b2-95f3-2d73f848e33b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1203, T1068
-- Author:       Justin C. (@endisphotic), @dreadphones (detection), Thomas Patzke (Sigma rule)
-- Date:         2021-07-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_spoolsv_susp_child_processes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\spoolsv.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('System', 'S-1-16-16384')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe')
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%start%')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.spl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%route add%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%program files%'))))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\netsh.exe'
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add portopening%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rule name%'))))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.spl%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/microsoft/Microsoft-365-Defender-Hunting-Queries/blob/efa17a600b43c897b4b7463cc8541daa1987eeb4/Exploits/Print%20Spooler%20RCE/Suspicious%20Spoolsv%20Child%20Process.md

---

```sql
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%BackupRepositories%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Backups%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Credentials%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%HostCreds%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SmbFileShares%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ssh\_creds%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VSphereInfo%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\sqlcmd.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VeeamBackup%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%From %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://labs.withsecure.com/publications/fin7-target-veeam-servers

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        VeeamBackup Database Credentials Dump Via Sqlcmd.EXE

-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
```

## SQLite Chromium Profile Data DB Access

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `24c77512-782b-448a-8950-eddb0785fc71` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1539, T1555.003, T1005 |
| **Author** | TropChaud |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sqlite_chromium_profile_data.yml)**

> Detect usage of the "sqlite" binary to query databases in Chromium-based browsers for potential data stealing.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        SQLite Chromium Profile Data DB Access
-- Sigma ID:     24c77512-782b-448a-8950-eddb0785fc71
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1539, T1555.003, T1005
-- Author:       TropChaud
-- Date:         2022-12-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sqlite_chromium_profile_data.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\User Data\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Opera Software\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\ChromiumViewer\\%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Login Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Cookies%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Web Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%History%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Bookmarks%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'SQLite'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\sqlite.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sqlite3.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/84d9edaaaa2c5511144521b0e4af726d1c7276ce/atomics/T1539/T1539.md#atomic-test-2---steal-chrome-cookies-windows

## Arbitrary File Download Via Squirrel.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1e75c1cc-c5d4-42aa-ac3d-91b0b68b3b4c` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Karneades / Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_squirrel_download.yml)**

> Detects the usage of the "Squirrel.exe" to download arbitrary files. This binary is part of multiple Electron based software installations (Slack, Teams, Discord, etc.)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary File Download Via Squirrel.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     1e75c1cc-c5d4-42aa-ac3d-91b0b68b3b4c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Karneades / Markus Neis, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2022-06-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_squirrel_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Expected FP with some Electron based applications such as (1Clipboard, Beaker Browser, Caret, Discord, GitHub Desktop, etc.)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --download %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --update %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --updateRollback=%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\squirrel.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\update.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Expected FP with some Electron based applications such as (1Clipboard, Beaker Browser, Caret, Discord, GitHub Desktop, etc.)

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/Squirrel/
- http://www.hexacorn.com/blog/2019/03/30/sqirrel-packages-manager-as-a-lolbin-a-k-a-many-electron-apps-are-lolbins-by-default/
- http://www.hexacorn.com/blog/2018/08/16/squirrel-as-a-lolbin/

| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_squirrel_proxy_execution.yml)**

> Detects the usage of the "Squirrel.exe" binary to execute arbitrary processes. This binary is part of multiple Electron based software installations (Slack, Teams, Discord, etc.)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Proxy Execution Via Squirrel.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     45239e6a-b035-4aaf-b339-8ad379fcb67e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
```

## Port Forwarding Activity Via SSH.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `327f48c1-a6db-4eb8-875a-f6981f1b0183` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1572, T1021.001, T1021.004 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ssh_port_forward.yml)**

> Detects port forwarding activity via SSH.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Port Forwarding Activity Via SSH.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     327f48c1-a6db-4eb8-875a-f6981f1b0183
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1572, T1021.001, T1021.004
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ssh_port_forward.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity using a remote port forwarding to a local port
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ssh.exe'
    AND rawEventMsg LIKE '% -R %')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative activity using a remote port forwarding to a local port

**References:**
- https://www.absolomb.com/2018-01-26-Windows-Privilege-Escalation-Guide/

## Program Executed Using Proxy/Local Command Via SSH.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7d6d30b8-5b91-4b90-a891-46cccaf29598` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ssh_proxy_execution.yml)**

> Detect usage of the "ssh.exe" binary as a proxy to launch other programs.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Program Executed Using Proxy/Local Command Via SSH.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     7d6d30b8-5b91-4b90-a891-46cccaf29598
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2022-12-29
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ssh_proxy_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage for administration purposes
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\sshd.exe')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ProxyCommand=%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PermitLocalCommand=yes%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% LocalCommand%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ssh.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'OpenSSH for Windows'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=55b4964d29aad5438b9e950052dbbbc0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=334d66c33503ccbf647c15b47c27eef4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=27b0da080ef92afb37983d30d839141e%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=977eb4c263d384e47daa0712d34713ab%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=3eaadce9ae43d5a918bb082065815c3b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=980fe6cf0d996ab1eedf877222e722aa%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=5f959422308ac3d721010d66647e100e%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=a49aaa3d03d1cd9c8dc7fca60f7f480b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=dd335f759b6d5d6a8382b71dd9d65791%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage for administration purposes

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Ssh/
- https://github.com/LOLBAS-Project/LOLBAS/pull/211/files
- https://gtfobins.github.io/gtfobins/ssh/
- https://man.openbsd.org/ssh_config#ProxyCommand
- https://man.openbsd.org/ssh_config#LocalCommand

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

```sql
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate activity of system administrators

**References:**
- https://www.mitiga.io/blog/mitiga-security-advisory-abusing-the-ssm-agent-as-a-remote-access-trojan
- https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/amazons-aws-ssm-agent-can-be-used-as-post-exploitation-rat-malware/
- https://www.helpnetsecurity.com/2023/08/02/aws-instances-attackers-access/

## Execution via stordiag.exe

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `961e0abb-1b1e-4c84-a453-aafe56ad0d34` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Austin Songer (@austinsonger) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_stordiag_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects the use of stordiag.exe to execute schtasks.exe systeminfo.exe and fltmc.exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execution via stordiag.exe
-- Sigma ID:     961e0abb-1b1e-4c84-a453-aafe56ad0d34
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218
-- Author:       Austin Songer (@austinsonger)
-- Date:         2021-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_stordiag_susp_child_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of stordiag.exe.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\stordiag.exe')
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\schtasks.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\systeminfo.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\fltmc.exe'))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE 'c:\\windows\\system32\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE 'c:\\windows\\syswow64\\%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of stordiag.exe.

**References:**
- https://strontic.github.io/xcyclopedia/library/stordiag.exe-1F08FC87C373673944F6A7E8B18CD845.html
- https://twitter.com/eral4m/status/1451112385041911809

---

## Start of NT Virtual DOS Machine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `16905e21-66ee-42fe-b256-1318ada2d770` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_16bit_application.yml)**

> Ntvdm.exe allows the execution of 16-bit Windows applications on 32-bit Windows operating systems, as well as the execution of both 16-bit and 32-bit DOS applications

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Start of NT Virtual DOS Machine
-- Sigma ID:     16905e21-66ee-42fe-b256-1318ada2d770
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-07-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_16bit_application.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ntvdm.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\csrstub.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/compatibility/ntvdm-and-16-bit-app-support
- https://support.microsoft.com/fr-fr/topic/an-ms-dos-based-program-that-uses-the-ms-dos-protected-mode-interface-crashes-on-a-computer-that-is-running-windows-7-5dc739ea-987b-b458-15e4-d28d5cca63c7
- https://app.any.run/tasks/93fe92fa-8b2b-4d92-8c09-a841aed2e793/
- https://app.any.run/tasks/214094a7-0abc-4a7b-a564-1b757faed79d/

## Abused Debug Privilege by Arbitrary Parent Processes

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d522eca2-2973-4391-a3e0-ef0374321dae` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548 |
| **Author** | Semanur Guneysu @semanurtg, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_abusing_debug_privilege.yml)**

> Detection of unusual child processes by different system processes

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Abused Debug Privilege by Arbitrary Parent Processes
-- Sigma ID:     d522eca2-2973-4391-a3e0-ef0374321dae
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548
-- Author:       Semanur Guneysu @semanurtg, oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_abusing_debug_privilege.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% route %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ADD %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## User Added to Local Administrators Group

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ad720b90-25ad-43ff-9b5e-5c841facc8e5` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1098 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_add_user_local_admin_group.yml)**

> Detects addition of users to the local administrator group via "Net" or "Add-LocalGroupMember".

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        User Added to Local Administrators Group
-- Sigma ID:     ad720b90-25ad-43ff-9b5e-5c841facc8e5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1098
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_add_user_local_admin_group.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% administrators %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% administrateur%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%localgroup %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /add%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Add-LocalGroupMember %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -Group %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative activity

**References:**
- https://blog.talosintelligence.com/2022/08/recent-cyber-attack.html?m=1

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        User Added To Highly Privileged Group
-- Sigma ID:     10fb649c-3600-4d37-b1e6-56ea90bb7e09

LIMIT 1000;
```

## Execute From Alternate Data Streams

|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7f43c430-5001-4f8b-aaa9-c3b88f18fa5c` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.004 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_alternate_data_streams.yml)**

> Detects execution from an Alternate Data Stream (ADS). Adversaries may use NTFS file attributes to hide their malicious data in order to evade detection

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execute From Alternate Data Streams
-- Sigma ID:     7f43c430-5001-4f8b-aaa9-c3b88f18fa5c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-09-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_alternate_data_streams.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%txt:%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## Always Install Elevated Windows Installer

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cd951fdc-4b2f-47f5-ba99-a33bf61e3770` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_always_install_elevated_windows_installer.yml)**

> Detects Windows Installer service (msiexec.exe) trying to install MSI packages with SYSTEM privilege

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Always Install Elevated Windows Installer
-- Sigma ID:     cd951fdc-4b2f-47f5-ba99-a33bf61e3770
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_always_install_elevated_windows_installer.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    System administrator usage; Anti virus products; WindowsApps located in "C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\"
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (user LIKE '%AUTHORI%' OR user LIKE '%AUTORI%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** System administrator usage; Anti virus products; WindowsApps located in "C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\"

**References:**
- https://image.slidesharecdn.com/kheirkhabarovoffzonefinal-181117201458/95/hunting-for-privilege-escalation-in-windows-environment-48-638.jpg

## Potentially Suspicious Windows App Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f91ed517-a6ba-471d-9910-b3b4a398c0f3` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_appx_execution.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious child process of applications launched from inside the WindowsApps directory. This could be a sign of a rogue ".appx" package installation/execution

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Windows App Activity
-- Sigma ID:     f91ed517-a6ba-471d-9910-b3b4a398c0f3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_appx_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate packages that make use of external binaries such as Windows Terminal
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate packages that make use of external binaries such as Windows Terminal

**References:**
- https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2021/11/11/bazarloader-call-me-back-attack-abuses-windows-10-apps-mechanism/

## Arbitrary Shell Command Execution Via Settingcontent-Ms

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `24de4f3b-804c-4165-b442-5a06a2302c7e` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1204, T1566.001 |
| **Author** | Sreeman |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_arbitrary_shell_execution_via_settingcontent.yml)**

> The .SettingContent-ms file type was introduced in Windows 10 and allows a user to create "shortcuts" to various Windows 10 setting pages. These files are simply XML and contain paths to various Windows 10 settings binaries.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Arbitrary Shell Command Execution Via Settingcontent-Ms
-- Sigma ID:     24de4f3b-804c-4165-b442-5a06a2302c7e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204, T1566.001
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-03-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_arbitrary_shell_execution_via_settingcontent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.SettingContent-ms%')
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%immersivecontrolpanel%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://posts.specterops.io/the-tale-of-settingcontent-ms-files-f1ea253e4d39

## Phishing Pattern ISO in Archive

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `fcdf69e5-a3d3-452a-9724-26f2308bf2b1` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1566 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_archiver_iso_phishing.yml)**

> Detects cases in which an ISO files is opend within an archiver like 7Zip or Winrar, which is a sign of phishing as threat actors put small ISO files in archives as email attachments to bypass certain filters and protective measures (mark of web)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Phishing Pattern ISO in Archive
-- Sigma ID:     fcdf69e5-a3d3-452a-9724-26f2308bf2b1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1566
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_archiver_iso_phishing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate cases in which archives contain ISO or IMG files and the user opens the archive and the image via clicking and not extraction
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Winrar.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\7zFM.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\peazip.exe'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\isoburn.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PowerISO.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\ImgBurn.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate cases in which archives contain ISO or IMG files and the user opens the archive and the image via clicking and not extraction

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/1ZRR4H/status/1534259727059787783
- https://app.any.run/tasks/e1fe6a62-bce8-4323-a49a-63795d9afd5d/

---

## Automated Collection Command Prompt

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f576a613-2392-4067-9d1a-9345fb58d8d1` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1119, T1552.001 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_automated_collection.yml)**

> Once established within a system or network, an adversary may use automated techniques for collecting internal data.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Automated Collection Command Prompt
-- Sigma ID:     f576a613-2392-4067-9d1a-9345fb58d8d1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1119, T1552.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-28
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_automated_collection.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.doc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.docx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xls%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xlsx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pptx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.rtf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pdf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1119/T1119.md

## Bad Opsec Defaults Sacrificial Processes With Improper Arguments

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a7c3d773-caef-227e-a7e7-c2f13c622329` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Oleg Kolesnikov @securonix invrep_de, oscd.community, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_bad_opsec_sacrificial_processes.yml)**

> Detects attackers using tooling with bad opsec defaults.
E.g. spawning a sacrificial process to inject a capability into the process without taking into account how the process is normally run.
One trivial example of this is using rundll32.exe without arguments as a sacrificial process (default in CS, now highlighted by c2lint), running WerFault without arguments (Kraken - credit am0nsec), and other examples.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Bad Opsec Defaults Sacrificial Processes With Improper Arguments
-- Sigma ID:     a7c3d773-caef-227e-a7e7-c2f13c622329
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Oleg Kolesnikov @securonix invrep_de, oscd.community, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-10-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_bad_opsec_sacrificial_processes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://blog.malwarebytes.com/malwarebytes-news/2020/10/kraken-attack-abuses-wer-service/
- https://www.cobaltstrike.com/help-opsec
- https://twitter.com/CyberRaiju/status/1251492025678983169
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/regsvr32
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/rundll32
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/framework/tools/regasm-exe-assembly-registration-tool
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/framework/tools/regsvcs-exe-net-services-installation-tool

## Potential Suspicious Browser Launch From Document Reader Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1193d960-2369-499f-a158-7b50a31df682` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1204.002 |
| **Author** | Joseph Kamau |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_browser_launch_from_document_reader_process.yml)**

> Detects when a browser process or browser tab is launched from an application that handles document files such as Adobe, Microsoft Office, etc. And connects to a web application over http(s), this could indicate a possible phishing attempt.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Suspicious Browser Launch From Document Reader Process
-- Sigma ID:     1193d960-2369-499f-a158-7b50a31df682
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.002
-- Author:       Joseph Kamau
-- Date:         2024-05-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_browser_launch_from_document_reader_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely in most cases, further investigation should be done in the commandline of the browser process to determine the context of the URL accessed.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%Acrobat Reader%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%Microsoft Office%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%PDF Reader%'))
    AND (procName LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\firefox.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\opera.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\maxthon.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\seamonkey.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\vivaldi.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely in most cases, further investigation should be done in the commandline of the browser process to determine the context of the URL accessed.

**References:**
- https://app.any.run/tasks/69c5abaa-92ad-45ba-8c53-c11e23e05d04/
- https://app.any.run/tasks/64043a79-165f-4052-bcba-e6e49f847ec1/
