## Suspicious Child Process Created as System

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `590a5f4c-6c8c-4f10-8307-89afe9453a9d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1134.002 |
| **Author** | Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Roberto Rodriguez (@Cyb3rWard0g), Open Threat Research (OTR) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_child_process_as_system_.yml)**

> Detection of child processes spawned with SYSTEM privileges by parents with LOCAL SERVICE or NETWORK SERVICE accounts

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Child Process Created as System
-- Sigma ID:     590a5f4c-6c8c-4f10-8307-89afe9453a9d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1134.002
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Roberto Rodriguez (@Cyb3rWard0g), Open Threat Research (OTR)
-- Date:         2019-10-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_child_process_as_system_.yml
-- Unmapped:     ParentUser
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: ParentUser

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((rawEventMsg LIKE '%AUTHORI%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '%AUTORI%')
    AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%\\NETWORK SERVICE' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '%\\LOCAL SERVICE')
    AND (user LIKE '%AUTHORI%' OR user LIKE '%AUTORI%')
    AND (user LIKE '%\\SYSTEM' OR user LIKE '%\\Système' OR user LIKE '%\\СИСТЕМА')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('System', 'S-1-16-16384')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://speakerdeck.com/heirhabarov/hunting-for-privilege-escalation-in-windows-environment
- https://foxglovesecurity.com/2016/09/26/rotten-potato-privilege-escalation-from-service-accounts-to-system/
- https://github.com/antonioCoco/RogueWinRM
- https://twitter.com/Cyb3rWard0g/status/1453123054243024897

## Potential Commandline Obfuscation Using Escape Characters

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f0cdd048-82dc-4f7a-8a7a-b87a52b6d0fd` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1140 |
| **Author** | juju4 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_cli_obfuscation_escape_char.yml)**

> Detects potential commandline obfuscation using known escape characters

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Commandline Obfuscation Using Escape Characters
-- Sigma ID:     f0cdd048-82dc-4f7a-8a7a-b87a52b6d0fd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1140
-- Author:       juju4
-- Date:         2018-12-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_cli_obfuscation_escape_char.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%h^t^t^p%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%h"t"t"p%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/vysecurity/status/885545634958385153

## Potential CommandLine Obfuscation Using Unicode Characters From Suspicious Image

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `584bca0f-3608-4402-80fd-4075ff6072e3` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1027 |
| **Author** | frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Josh Nickels |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_cli_obfuscation_unicode_img.yml)**

> Detects potential commandline obfuscation using unicode characters.
Adversaries may attempt to make an executable or file difficult to discover or analyze by encrypting, encoding, or otherwise obfuscating its contents on the system or in transit.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential CommandLine Obfuscation Using Unicode Characters From Suspicious Image
-- Sigma ID:     584bca0f-3608-4402-80fd-4075ff6072e3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1027
-- Author:       frack113, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Josh Nickels
-- Date:         2024-09-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_cli_obfuscation_unicode_img.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.EXE', 'cscript.exe', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'PowerShell_ISE.EXE', 'pwsh.dll', 'wscript.exe')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ˣ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%˪%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ˢ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%∕%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%⁄%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%―%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%—%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%¯%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%®%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%¶%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%⠀%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.wietzebeukema.nl/blog/windows-command-line-obfuscation
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1027/T1027.md#atomic-test-6---dlp-evasion-via-sensitive-data-in-vba-macro-over-http

## Suspicious ClickFix/FileFix Execution Pattern

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d487ed4a-fd24-436d-a0b2-f4e95f7b2635` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1204.001, T1204.004 |
| **Author** | montysecurity, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_clickfix_filefix_execution.yml)**

> Detects suspicious execution patterns where users are tricked into running malicious commands via clipboard manipulation, either through the Windows Run dialog (ClickFix) or File Explorer address bar (FileFix).
Attackers leverage social engineering campaigns—such as fake CAPTCHA challenges or urgent alerts—encouraging victims to paste clipboard contents, often executing mshta.exe, powershell.exe, or similar commands to infect systems.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious ClickFix/FileFix Execution Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     d487ed4a-fd24-436d-a0b2-f4e95f7b2635
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.001, T1204.004
-- Author:       montysecurity, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_clickfix_filefix_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%account%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%anti-bot%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%botcheck%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%captcha%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%challenge%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%confirmation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%fraud%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%human%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%identification%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%identificator%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%identity%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%robot%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%validation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%verification%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%verify%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/JohnHammond/recaptcha-phish
- https://www.zscaler.com/blogs/security-research/deepseek-lure-using-captchas-spread-malware
- https://www.threatdown.com/blog/clipboard-hijacker-tries-to-install-a-trojan/
- https://app.any.run/tasks/5c16b4db-4b36-4039-a0ed-9b09abff8be2
- https://www.esentire.com/security-advisories/netsupport-rat-clickfix-distribution
- https://www.scpx.com.au/2025/11/16/decades-old-finger-protocol-abused-in-clickfix-malware-attacks/

## Suspicious Explorer Process with Whitespace Padding - ClickFix/FileFix

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3ae9974a-eb09-4044-8e70-8980a50c12c8` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1204.004, T1027.010 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_clickfix_filefix_whitespace_padding.yml)**

> Detects process creation with suspicious whitespace padding followed by a '#' character, which may indicate ClickFix or FileFix techniques used to conceal malicious commands from visual inspection.
ClickFix and FileFix are social engineering attack techniques where adversaries distribute phishing documents or malicious links that deceive users into opening the Windows Run dialog box or File Explorer search bar.
The victims are then instructed to paste commands from their clipboard, which contain extensive whitespace padding using various Unicode space characters to push the actual malicious command far to the right, effectively hiding it from immediate view.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Explorer Process with Whitespace Padding - ClickFix/FileFix
-- Sigma ID:     3ae9974a-eb09-4044-8e70-8980a50c12c8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.004, T1027.010
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-04
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_clickfix_filefix_whitespace_padding.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%            %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://expel.com/blog/cache-smuggling-when-a-picture-isnt-a-thousand-words/
- https://mrd0x.com/filefix-clickfix-alternative/

## Suspicious Usage of For Loop with Recursive Directory Search in CMD

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2782fbd8-b662-4eb5-9962-5bfbfb671e7b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.003, T1027.010 |
| **Author** | Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_cmd_for_loop_execution_with_recursive_directory_search.yml)**

> Detects suspicious usage of the cmd.exe 'for /f' loop combined with the 'tokens=' parameter and a recursive directory listing.
This pattern may indicate an attempt to discover and execute system binaries dynamically, for example powershell, a technique sometimes used by attackers to evade detection.
This behavior has been observed in various malicious lnk files.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Usage of For Loop with Recursive Directory Search in CMD
-- Sigma ID:     2782fbd8-b662-4eb5-9962-5bfbfb671e7b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.003, T1027.010
-- Author:       Joseliyo Sanchez, @Joseliyo_Jstnk
-- Date:         2025-11-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_cmd_for_loop_execution_with_recursive_directory_search.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%for /f%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tokens=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%in (%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dir%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%for /f%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%tokens=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%in (%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%dir%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/29837d0d3202758063185828c8f8d9e0b7b42b365c8941cc926d2d7c7bae2fb3

---

## Potential Command Line Path Traversal Evasion Attempt

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1327381e-6ab0-4f38-b583-4c1b8346a56b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_commandline_path_traversal_evasion.yml)**

> Detects potential evasion or obfuscation attempts using bogus path traversal via the commandline

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Command Line Path Traversal Evasion Attempt
-- Sigma ID:     1327381e-6ab0-4f38-b583-4c1b8346a56b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-10-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_commandline_path_traversal_evasion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Google Drive; Citrix
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Google Drive; Citrix

## Potential Browser Data Stealing

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `47147b5b-9e17-4d76-b8d2-7bac24c5ce1b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1555.003 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_browser_data.yml)**

> Adversaries may acquire credentials from web browsers by reading files specific to the target browser.
Web browsers commonly save credentials such as website usernames and passwords so that they do not need to be entered manually in the future.
Web browsers typically store the credentials in an encrypted format within a credential store.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Browser Data Stealing
-- Sigma ID:     47147b5b-9e17-4d76-b8d2-7bac24c5ce1b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1555.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-12-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_browser_data.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy-item%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cpi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% cp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%move %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%move-item%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% mi %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% mv %')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\esentutl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\xcopy.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\robocopy.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('esentutl.exe', 'XCOPY.EXE', 'robocopy.exe')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Amigo\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\BraveSoftware\\Brave-Browser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\CentBrowser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Chromium\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\CocCoc\\Browser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Comodo\\Dragon\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Elements Browser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Epic Privacy Browser\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Google\\Chrome Beta\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Google\\Chrome SxS\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Google\\Chrome\\User Data\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Kometa\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Maxthon5\\Users%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft\\Edge\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Mozilla\\Firefox\\Profiles%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Nichrome\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Opera Software\\Opera GX Stable\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Opera Software\\Opera Neon\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Opera Software\\Opera Stable\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Orbitum\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\QIP Surf\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Sputnik\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Torch\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\uCozMedia\\Uran\\User Data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Vivaldi\\User Data%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1555.003/T1555.003.md
- https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/2024-04/aa24-109a-stopransomware-akira-ransomware_2.pdf

## Copy From Or To Admin Share Or Sysvol Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `855bc8b5-2ae8-402e-a9ed-b889e6df1900` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection, exfiltration |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1039, T1048, T1021.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Teymur Kheirkhabarov @HeirhabarovT, Zach Stanford @svch0st, Nasreddine Bencherchali |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_lateral_movement.yml)**

> Detects a copy command or a copy utility execution to or from an Admin share or remote

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Copy From Or To Admin Share Or Sysvol Folder
-- Sigma ID:     855bc8b5-2ae8-402e-a9ed-b889e6df1900
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, exfiltration | T1039, T1048, T1021.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Teymur Kheirkhabarov @HeirhabarovT, Zach Stanford @svch0st, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2019-12-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_lateral_movement.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\*\\\\*$%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Sysvol\\%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\robocopy.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\xcopy.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('robocopy.exe', 'XCOPY.EXE'))))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Cmd.Exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative scripts

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/SBousseaden/status/1211636381086339073
- https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lKya3_mLnR3UQuCoiYruO3qgu052_iS_/view
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/remote-file-copy-to-a-hidden-share.html
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/10/18/defenders-beware-a-case-for-post-ransomware-investigations/

---

## Suspicious Copy From or To System Directory

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `fff9d2b7-e11c-4a69-93d3-40ef66189767` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Tim Shelton (HAWK.IO), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_system_dir.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious copy operation that tries to copy a program from system (System32, SysWOW64, WinSxS) directories to another on disk.
Often used to move LOLBINs such as 'certutil' or 'desktopimgdownldr' to a different location with a different name in order to bypass detections based on locations.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Copy From or To System Directory
-- Sigma ID:     fff9d2b7-e11c-4a69-93d3-40ef66189767
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Markus Neis, Tim Shelton (HAWK.IO), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-07-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_copy_system_dir.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment (For example an admin scripts like https://www.itexperience.net/sccm-batch-files-and-32-bits-processes-on-64-bits-os/); When cmd.exe and xcopy.exe are called directly; When the command contains the keywords but not in the correct order
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: re|i

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND rawEventMsg LIKE '%\\s['"]?C:\\\\Windows\\\\(System32|SysWOW64|WinSxS)%'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment (For example an admin scripts like https://www.itexperience.net/sccm-batch-files-and-32-bits-processes-on-64-bits-os/); When cmd.exe and xcopy.exe are called directly; When the command contains the keywords but not in the correct order

**References:**
- https://www.hybrid-analysis.com/sample/8da5b75b6380a41eee3a399c43dfe0d99eeefaa1fd21027a07b1ecaa4cd96fdd?environmentId=120
- https://web.archive.org/web/20180331144337/https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2018/03/sanny-malware-delivery-method-updated-in-recently-observed-attacks.html
- https://thedfirreport.com/2023/08/28/html-smuggling-leads-to-domain-wide-ransomware/

---

## Potential Crypto Mining Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `66c3b204-9f88-4d0a-a7f7-8a57d521ca55` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | impact |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1496 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_crypto_mining_monero.yml)**

> Detects command line parameters or strings often used by crypto miners

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Crypto Mining Activity
-- Sigma ID:     66c3b204-9f88-4d0a-a7f7-8a57d521ca55
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        impact | T1496
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-10-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_crypto_mining_monero.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of crypto miners; Some build frameworks
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --cpu-priority=%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--donate-level=0%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -o pool.%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --nicehash%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --algo=rx/0 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%stratum+tcp://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%stratum+udp://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LS1kb25hdGUtbGV2ZWw9%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0tZG9uYXRlLWxldmVsP%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tLWRvbmF0ZS1sZXZlbD%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%c3RyYXR1bSt0Y3A6Ly%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%N0cmF0dW0rdGNwOi8v%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%zdHJhdHVtK3RjcDovL%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%c3RyYXR1bSt1ZHA6Ly%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%N0cmF0dW0rdWRwOi8v%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%zdHJhdHVtK3VkcDovL%'))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% pool.c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% pool.o %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gcc -%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of crypto miners; Some build frameworks

**References:**
- https://www.poolwatch.io/coin/monero

---

## Potential Data Exfiltration Activity Via CommandLine Tools

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7d1aaf3d-4304-425c-b7c3-162055e0b3ab` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_data_exfiltration_via_cli.yml)**

> Detects the use of various CLI utilities exfiltrating data via web requests

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Data Exfiltration Activity Via CommandLine Tools
-- Sigma ID:     7d1aaf3d-4304-425c-b7c3-162055e0b3ab
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_data_exfiltration_via_cli.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RestMethod%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%irm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ur%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -me%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -b%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% POST %'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--ur%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -d %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --data %')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\wget.exe'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--post-data%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--post-file%')))
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'net\s+view') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'sc\s+query'))))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-Content%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetBytes%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%hostname%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ifconfig%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ipconfig%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%netstat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%nltest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%qprocess%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%systeminfo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%tasklist%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ToBase64String%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%whoami%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%type %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% > %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% C:\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://www.sentinelone.com/blog/living-off-windows-defender-lockbit-ransomware-sideloads-cobalt-strike-through-microsoft-security-tool/

---

## Raccine Uninstall

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a31eeaed-3fd5-478e-a8ba-e62c6b3f9ecc` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_disable_raccine.yml)**

> Detects commands that indicate a Raccine removal from an end system. Raccine is a free ransomware protection tool.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Raccine Uninstall
-- Sigma ID:     a31eeaed-3fd5-478e-a8ba-e62c6b3f9ecc
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-01-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_disable_raccine.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate deinstallation by administrative staff
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%taskkill %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RaccineSettings.exe%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%reg.exe%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%delete%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Raccine Tray%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%schtasks%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/DELETE%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Raccine Rules Updater%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate deinstallation by administrative staff

**References:**
- https://github.com/Neo23x0/Raccine

---

## Suspicious Double Extension File Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1cdd9a09-06c9-4769-99ff-626e2b3991b8` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1566.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), @blu3_team (idea), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_double_extension.yml)**

> Detects suspicious use of an .exe extension after a non-executable file extension like .pdf.exe, a set of spaces or underlines to cloak the executable file in spear phishing campaigns

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Double Extension File Execution
-- Sigma ID:     1cdd9a09-06c9-4769-99ff-626e2b3991b8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        T1566.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), @blu3_team (idea), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-06-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_double_extension.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%      .exe' OR procName LIKE '%\_\_\_\_\_\_.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.doc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.doc.js' OR procName LIKE '%.docx.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.docx.js' OR procName LIKE '%.gif.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.jpeg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.jpg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.mkv.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.mov.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.mp3.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.mp4.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.pdf.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.pdf.js' OR procName LIKE '%.png.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.ppt.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.ppt.js' OR procName LIKE '%.pptx.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.pptx.js' OR procName LIKE '%.rtf.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.rtf.js' OR procName LIKE '%.svg.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.txt.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.txt.js' OR procName LIKE '%.xls.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.xls.js' OR procName LIKE '%.xlsx.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.xlsx.js' OR procName LIKE '%⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%      .exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\_\_\_\_\_\_.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.doc.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.doc.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.docx.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.docx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpg.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mkv.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mov.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mp3.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mp4.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pdf.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pdf.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppt.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppt.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pptx.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pptx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.rtf.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.rtf.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.svg.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xls.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xls.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xlsx.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xlsx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀.exe%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://blu3-team.blogspot.com/2019/06/misleading-extensions-xlsexe-docexe.html
- https://twitter.com/blackorbird/status/1140519090961825792
- https://cloud.google.com/blog/topics/threat-intelligence/cybercriminals-weaponize-fake-ai-websites

## Suspicious Parent Double Extension File Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5e6a80c8-2d45-4633-9ef4-fa2671a39c5c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036.007 |
| **Author** | frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_double_extension_parent.yml)**

> Detect execution of suspicious double extension files in ParentCommandLine

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Parent Double Extension File Execution
-- Sigma ID:     5e6a80c8-2d45-4633-9ef4-fa2671a39c5c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.007
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_double_extension_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.doc.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.docx.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.xls.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.xlsx.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.ppt.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.pptx.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.rtf.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.pdf.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.txt.lnk' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.doc.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.docx.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.xls.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.xlsx.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.ppt.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.pptx.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.rtf.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.pdf.js' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%.txt.js')))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.doc.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.docx.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.xls.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.xlsx.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.ppt.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.pptx.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.rtf.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.pdf.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.txt.lnk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.doc.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.docx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.xls.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.xlsx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.ppt.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.pptx.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.rtf.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.pdf.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.txt.js%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/7872d8845a332dce517adae9c3389fde5313ff2fed38c2577f3b498da786db68/behavior
- https://symantec-enterprise-blogs.security.com/blogs/threat-intelligence/bluebottle-banks-targeted-africa

## Suspicious Download from Office Domain

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `00d49ed5-4491-4271-a8db-650a4ef6f8c1` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1105, T1608 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_download_office_domain.yml)**

> Detects suspicious ways to download files from Microsoft domains that are used to store attachments in Emails or OneNote documents

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Download from Office Domain
-- Sigma ID:     00d49ed5-4491-4271-a8db-650a4ef6f8c1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1105, T1608
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_download_office_domain.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Scripts or tools that download attachments from these domains (OneNote, Outlook 365)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://attachment.outlook.live.net/owa/%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%https://onenoteonlinesync.onenote.com/onenoteonlinesync/%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\curl.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wget.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Start-BitsTransfer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadFile(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DownloadString(%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Scripts or tools that download attachments from these domains (OneNote, Outlook 365)

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/an0n_r0/status/1474698356635193346?s=12
- https://twitter.com/mrd0x/status/1475085452784844803?s=12

## DumpStack.log Defender Evasion

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4f647cfa-b598-4e12-ad69-c68dd16caef8` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_dumpstack_log_evasion.yml)**

> Detects the use of the filename DumpStack.log to evade Microsoft Defender

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        DumpStack.log Defender Evasion
-- Sigma ID:     4f647cfa-b598-4e12-ad69-c68dd16caef8
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_dumpstack_log_evasion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\DumpStack.log'
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -o DumpStack.log%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/mrd0x/status/1479094189048713219

## Always Install Elevated MSI Spawned Cmd And Powershell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `1e53dd56-8d83-4eb4-a43e-b790a05510aa` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_elavated_msi_spawned_shell.yml)**

> Detects Windows Installer service (msiexec.exe) spawning "cmd" or "powershell"

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Always Install Elevated MSI Spawned Cmd And Powershell
-- Sigma ID:     1e53dd56-8d83-4eb4-a43e-b790a05510aa
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Mangatas Tondang (rule), oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_elavated_msi_spawned_shell.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.Exe', 'PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Installer\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%msi%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%tmp')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://image.slidesharecdn.com/kheirkhabarovoffzonefinal-181117201458/95/hunting-for-privilege-escalation-in-windows-environment-50-638.jpg

---

## Suspicious Electron Application Child Processes

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f26eb764-fd89-464b-85e2-dc4a8e6e77b8` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_electron_app_children.yml)**

> Detects suspicious child processes of electron apps (teams, discord, slack, etc.). This could be a potential sign of ".asar" file tampering (See reference section for more information) or binary execution proxy through specific CLI arguments (see related rule)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Electron Application Child Processes
-- Sigma ID:     f26eb764-fd89-464b-85e2-dc4a8e6e77b8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_electron_app_children.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\discord.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\GitHubDesktop.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\keybase.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\msedgewebview2.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\msteams.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\slack.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\teams.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://taggart-tech.com/quasar-electron/
- https://github.com/mttaggart/quasar
- https://positive.security/blog/ms-officecmd-rce
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Msedge/
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Teams/
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/msedgewebview2/
- https://medium.com/@MalFuzzer/one-electron-to-rule-them-all-dc2e9b263daf

---

## Potentially Suspicious Electron Application CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `378a05d8-963c-46c9-bcce-13c7657eac99` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_electron_execution_proxy.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious CommandLine of electron apps (teams, discord, slack, etc.). This could be a sign of abuse to proxy execution through a signed binary.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Electron Application CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     378a05d8-963c-46c9-bcce-13c7657eac99
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_electron_execution_proxy.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage for debugging purposes
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--browser-subprocess-path%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--gpu-launcher%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--renderer-cmd-prefix%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--utility-cmd-prefix%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\code.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\discord.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\GitHubDesktop.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\keybase.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge\_proxy.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedge.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msedgewebview2.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\msteams.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\slack.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\Teams.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('chrome.exe', 'code.exe', 'discord.exe', 'GitHubDesktop.exe', 'keybase.exe', 'msedge_proxy.exe', 'msedge.exe', 'msedgewebview2.exe', 'msteams.exe', 'slack.exe', 'Teams.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage for debugging purposes

**References:**
- https://positive.security/blog/ms-officecmd-rce
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Teams/
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Msedge/
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/msedgewebview2/
- https://medium.com/@MalFuzzer/one-electron-to-rule-them-all-dc2e9b263daf
- https://chromium.googlesource.com/chromium/chromium/+/master/content/public/common/content_switches.cc

## Elevated System Shell Spawned From Uncommon Parent Location

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `178e615d-e666-498b-9630-9ed363038101` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | frack113, Tim Shelton (update fp) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_elevated_system_shell_uncommon_parent.yml)**

> Detects when a shell program such as the Windows command prompt or PowerShell is launched with system privileges from a uncommon parent location.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Elevated System Shell Spawned From Uncommon Parent Location
-- Sigma ID:     178e615d-e666-498b-9630-9ed363038101
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       frack113, Tim Shelton (update fp)
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_elevated_system_shell_uncommon_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some legitimate applications may spawn shells from uncommon parent locations. Apply additional filters and perform an initial baseline before deploying.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some legitimate applications may spawn shells from uncommon parent locations. Apply additional filters and perform an initial baseline before deploying.

**References:**
- https://github.com/Wh04m1001/SysmonEoP

---

## Hidden Powershell in Link File Pattern

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `30e92f50-bb5a-4884-98b5-d20aa80f3d7a` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.001 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_embed_exe_lnk.yml)**

> Detects events that appear when a user click on a link file with a powershell command in it

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Hidden Powershell in Link File Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     30e92f50-bb5a-4884-98b5-d20aa80f3d7a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-02-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_embed_exe_lnk.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate commands in .lnk files
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\Windows\explorer.exe')
    AND procName = 'C:\Windows\System32\cmd.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.lnk%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate commands in .lnk files

**References:**
- https://www.x86matthew.com/view_post?id=embed_exe_lnk

---

```sql
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- Internal Research

## Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 2

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c98f2a0d-e1b8-4f76-90d3-359caf88d6b9` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_2.yml)**

> Detects the usage of emojis in the command line, this could be a sign of potential defense evasion activity.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 2
-- Sigma ID:     c98f2a0d-e1b8-4f76-90d3-359caf88d6b9
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_2.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤷🏼%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🤷🏼‍♂️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙎🏼‍♀️%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🙎🏼%' OR **References:**
```

## Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 3

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f9578658-9e71-4711-b634-3f9b50cd3c06` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_3.yml)**

> Detects the usage of emojis in the command line, this could be a sign of potential defense evasion activity.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 3
-- Sigma ID:     f9578658-9e71-4711-b634-3f9b50cd3c06
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_3.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦆%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🦅%' OR ## Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 4
```

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `225274c4-8dd1-40db-9e09-71dff4f6fb3c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_4.yml)**

> Detects the usage of emojis in the command line, this could be a sign of potential defense evasion activity.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Activity Via Emoji Usage In CommandLine - 4
-- Sigma ID:     225274c4-8dd1-40db-9e09-71dff4f6fb3c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       @Kostastsale, TheDFIRReport
-- Date:         2022-12-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_emoji_usage_in_cli_4.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔸%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔹%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔶%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔷%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔳%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%🔲%' OR **False Positives:** Unknown
```

**References:**
- Internal Research

---

## ETW Logging Tamper In .NET Processes Via CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `41421f44-58f9-455d-838a-c398859841d4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562 |
| **Author** | Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_etw_modification_cmdline.yml)**

> Detects changes to environment variables related to ETW logging via the CommandLine.
This could indicate potential adversaries stopping ETW providers recording loaded .NET assemblies.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        ETW Logging Tamper In .NET Processes Via CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     41421f44-58f9-455d-838a-c398859841d4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562
-- Author:       Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
-- Date:         2020-05-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_etw_modification_cmdline.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%COMPlus\_ETWEnabled%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%COMPlus\_ETWFlags%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/_xpn_/status/1268712093928378368
- https://social.msdn.microsoft.com/Forums/vstudio/en-US/0878832e-39d7-4eaf-8e16-a729c4c40975/what-can-i-use-e13c0d23ccbc4e12931bd9cc2eee27e4-for?forum=clr
- https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/blob/ee2355c801d892f2894b0f7b14a20e6cc50e0e54/docs/design/coreclr/jit/viewing-jit-dumps.md#setting-configuration-variables
- https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/blob/f62e93416a1799aecc6b0947adad55a0d9870732/src/coreclr/src/inc/clrconfigvalues.h#L35-L38
- https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/blob/7abe42dc1123722ed385218268bb9fe04556e3d3/src/coreclr/src/inc/clrconfig.h#L33-L39
- https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/search?p=1&q=COMPlus_&unscoped_q=COMPlus_
