## ETW Trace Evasion Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a238b5d0-ce2d-4414-a676-7a531b3d13d6` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1070, T1562.006 |
| **Author** | @neu5ron, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_etw_trace_evasion.yml)**

> Detects command line activity that tries to clear or disable any ETW trace log which could be a sign of logging evasion.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        ETW Trace Evasion Activity
-- Sigma ID:     a238b5d0-ce2d-4414-a676-7a531b3d13d6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1070, T1562.006
-- Author:       @neu5ron, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-03-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_etw_trace_evasion.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cl%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Trace%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%clear-log%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/Trace%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%sl%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/e:false%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%set-log%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/e:false%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%logman%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%update%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%trace%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%--p%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ets%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Remove-EtwTraceProvider%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Set-EtwTraceProvider%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%0x11%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/wevtutil
- https://abuse.io/lockergoga.txt
- https://medium.com/palantir/tampering-with-windows-event-tracing-background-offense-and-defense-4be7ac62ac63

---

## Suspicious Eventlog Clearing or Configuration Change Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cc36992a-4671-4f21-a91d-6c2b72a2edf5` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1070.001, T1562.002 |
| **Author** | Ecco, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, D3F7A5105, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_eventlog_clear.yml)**

> Detects the clearing or configuration tampering of EventLog using utilities such as "wevtutil", "powershell" and "wmic".
This technique were seen used by threat actors and ransomware strains in order to evade defenses.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Eventlog Clearing or Configuration Change Activity
-- Sigma ID:     cc36992a-4671-4f21-a91d-6c2b72a2edf5
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        T1070.001, T1562.002
-- Author:       Ecco, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community, D3F7A5105, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-09-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_eventlog_clear.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Admin activity; Scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment; Maintenance activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell\_ise.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ClearEventLog%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Admin activity; Scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment; Maintenance activity

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1070.001/T1070.001.md
- https://eqllib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/analytics/5b223758-07d6-4100-9e11-238cfdd0fe97.html
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/wevtutil
- https://gist.github.com/fovtran/ac0624983c7722e80a8f5a4babb170ee
- https://jdhnet.wordpress.com/2017/12/19/changing-the-location-of-the-windows-event-logs/
- https://www.linkedin.com/posts/huntress-labs_when-a-sketchy-incident-hits-your-network-activity-7304940371078238208-Th_l/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAAJTlRcB28IaUtg03HUU-IdliwzoAL1flGc
- https://stackoverflow.com/questions/66011412/how-to-clear-a-event-log-in-powershell-7
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.diagnostics.eventing.reader.eventlogsession.clearlog?view=windowsdesktop-9.0&viewFallbackFrom=dotnet-plat-ext-5.0#System_Diagnostics_Eventing_Reader_EventLogSession_ClearLog_System_String_
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.diagnostics.eventlog.clear

## Potentially Suspicious EventLog Recon Activity Using Log Query Utilities

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `beaa66d6-aa1b-4e3c-80f5-e0145369bfaf` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1552, T1087 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_eventlog_content_recon.yml)**

> Detects execution of different log query utilities and commands to search and dump the content of specific event logs or look for specific event IDs.
This technique is used by threat actors in order to extract sensitive information from events logs such as usernames, IP addresses, hostnames, etc.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious EventLog Recon Activity Using Log Query Utilities
-- Sigma ID:     beaa66d6-aa1b-4e3c-80f5-e0145369bfaf
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1552, T1087
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_eventlog_content_recon.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the utility by administrators to query the event log
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Select%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Win32\_NTLogEvent%')
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% qe %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% query-events %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wevtutil.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wevtutil.exe')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% ntevent%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-WinEvent %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%get-eventlog %'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of the utility by administrators to query the event log

**References:**
- http://blog.talosintelligence.com/2022/09/lazarus-three-rats.html
- https://thedfirreport.com/2023/10/30/netsupport-intrusion-results-in-domain-compromise/
- https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-144a
- https://www.group-ib.com/blog/apt41-world-tour-2021/
- https://labs.withsecure.com/content/dam/labs/docs/f-secureLABS-tlp-white-lazarus-threat-intel-report2.pdf
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.powershell.diagnostics/get-winevent?view=powershell-7.3
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.powershell.management/get-eventlog?view=powershell-5.1
- http://www.solomonson.com/posts/2010-07-09-reading-eventviewer-command-line/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/wevtutil
- https://ptsecurity.com/research/pt-esc-threat-intelligence/striking-panda-attacks-apt31-today
- https://www.cybertriage.com/artifact/terminalservices_remoteconnectionmanager_log/
- https://ponderthebits.com/2018/02/windows-rdp-related-event-logs-identification-tracking-and-investigation/

## Potentially Suspicious Execution From Parent Process In Public Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `69bd9b97-2be2-41b6-9816-fb08757a4d1a` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564, T1059 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_execution_from_public_folder_as_parent.yml)**

> Detects a potentially suspicious execution of a parent process located in the "\Users\Public" folder executing a child process containing references to shell or scripting binaries and commandlines.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Execution From Parent Process In Public Folder
-- Sigma ID:     69bd9b97-2be2-41b6-9816-fb08757a4d1a
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1564, T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_execution_from_public_folder_as_parent.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bitsadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%certutil%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%regsvr32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscript%')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/blackbyte-ransomware/

---

## Process Execution From A Potentially Suspicious Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3dfd06d2-eaf4-4532-9555-68aca59f57c4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_execution_path.yml)**

> Detects a potentially suspicious execution from an uncommon folder.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Execution From A Potentially Suspicious Folder
-- Sigma ID:     3dfd06d2-eaf4-4532-9555-68aca59f57c4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_execution_path.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%:\\Perflogs\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\All Users\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\Default\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\NetworkService\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\addins\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\debug\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Fonts\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Help\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\IME\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Media\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\repair\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\security\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\System32\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Tasks\\%' OR procName LIKE '%$Recycle.bin%' OR procName LIKE '%\\config\\systemprofile\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Intel\\Logs\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\RSA\\MachineKeys\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/mbevilacqua/appcompatprocessor/blob/6c847937c5a836e2ce2fe2b915f213c345a3c389/AppCompatSearch.txt
- https://www.secureworks.com/research/bronze-butler-targets-japanese-businesses
- https://www.crowdstrike.com/resources/reports/2019-crowdstrike-global-threat-report/
- https://github.com/ThreatHuntingProject/ThreatHunting/blob/cb22598bb70651f88e0285abc8d835757d2cb596/hunts/suspicious_process_creation_via_windows_event_logs.md

## Suspicious File Characteristics Due to Missing Fields

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9637e8a5-7131-4f7f-bdc7-2b05d8670c43` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.006 |
| **Author** | Markus Neis, Sander Wiebing |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_file_characteristics.yml)**

> Detects Executables in the Downloads folder without FileVersion,Description,Product,Company likely created with py2exe

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious File Characteristics Due to Missing Fields
-- Sigma ID:     9637e8a5-7131-4f7f-bdc7-2b05d8670c43
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.006
-- Author:       Markus Neis, Sander Wiebing
-- Date:         2018-11-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_file_characteristics.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description, FileVersion
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: FileVersion

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = '\?'
    AND rawEventMsg = '\?')
  OR (rawEventMsg = '\?'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = '\?'))
  OR ((rawEventMsg = '\?'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = '\?'))
  AND procName LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://securelist.com/muddywater/88059/
- https://www.virustotal.com/#/file/276a765a10f98cda1a38d3a31e7483585ca3722ecad19d784441293acf1b7beb/detection

## Suspicious FileFix Execution Pattern

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b5b29e4e-31fa-4fdf-b058-296e7a1aa0c2` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1204.004 |
| **Author** | 0xFustang, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_filefix_execution_pattern.yml)**

> Detects suspicious FileFix execution patterns where users are tricked into running malicious commands through browser file upload dialog manipulation.
This attack typically begins when users visit malicious websites impersonating legitimate services or news platforms,
which may display fake CAPTCHA challenges or direct instructions to open file explorer and paste clipboard content.
The clipboard content usually contains commands that download and execute malware, such as information stealing tools.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious FileFix Execution Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     b5b29e4e-31fa-4fdf-b058-296e7a1aa0c2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.004
-- Author:       0xFustang, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-11-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_filefix_execution_pattern.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of PowerShell or other utilities launched from browser extensions or automation tools
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\brave.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\chrome.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\firefox.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\msedge.exe'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%#%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of PowerShell or other utilities launched from browser extensions or automation tools

**References:**
- https://mrd0x.com/filefix-clickfix-alternative/
- https://expel.com/blog/cache-smuggling-when-a-picture-isnt-a-thousand-words/
- https://blog.checkpoint.com/research/filefix-the-new-social-engineering-attack-building-on-clickfix-tested-in-the-wild/

## Suspicious Reconnaissance Activity Via GatherNetworkInfo.VBS

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `07aa184a-870d-413d-893a-157f317f6f58` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1615, T1059.005 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_gather_network_info_execution.yml)**

> Detects execution of the built-in script located in "C:\Windows\System32\gatherNetworkInfo.vbs". Which can be used to gather information about the target machine

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Reconnaissance Activity Via GatherNetworkInfo.VBS
-- Sigma ID:     07aa184a-870d-413d-893a-157f317f6f58
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, execution | T1615, T1059.005
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-08
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_gather_network_info_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%gatherNetworkInfo.vbs%')
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://posts.slayerlabs.com/living-off-the-land/#gathernetworkinfovbs
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/trojanized-windows-installers-ukrainian-government

---

## Potential Hidden Directory Creation Via NTFS INDEX_ALLOCATION Stream - CLI

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0900463c-b33b-49a8-be1d-552a3b553dae` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.004 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Scoubi (@ScoubiMtl) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_hidden_dir_index_allocation.yml)**

> Detects command line containing reference to the "::$index_allocation" stream, which can be used as a technique to prevent access to folders or files from tooling such as "explorer.exe" or "powershell.exe"


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Hidden Directory Creation Via NTFS INDEX_ALLOCATION Stream - CLI
-- Sigma ID:     0900463c-b33b-49a8-be1d-552a3b553dae
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Scoubi (@ScoubiMtl)
-- Date:         2023-10-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_hidden_dir_index_allocation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%::$index\_allocation%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/pfiatde/status/1681977680688738305
- https://soroush.me/blog/2010/12/a-dotty-salty-directory-a-secret-place-in-ntfs-for-secret-files/
- https://sec-consult.com/blog/detail/pentesters-windows-ntfs-tricks-collection/
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/5c3b23002d2bbede3c07e7307165fc2a235a427d/atomics/T1564.004/T1564.004.md#atomic-test-5---create-hidden-directory-via-index_allocation
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/openspecs/windows_protocols/ms-fscc/c54dec26-1551-4d3a-a0ea-4fa40f848eb3

## Writing Of Malicious Files To The Fonts Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ae9b0bd7-8888-4606-b444-0ed7410cb728` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence, execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1211, T1059 |
| **Author** | Sreeman |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_hiding_malware_in_fonts_folder.yml)**

> Monitors for the hiding possible malicious files in the C:\Windows\Fonts\ location. This folder doesn't require admin privillege to be written and executed from.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Writing Of Malicious Files To The Fonts Folder
-- Sigma ID:     ae9b0bd7-8888-4606-b444-0ed7410cb728
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution | T1211, T1059
-- Author:       Sreeman
-- Date:         2020-04-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_hiding_malware_in_fonts_folder.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%echo%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%copy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%type%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%file createnew%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cacls%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Windows\\Fonts\\%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.sh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.reg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.scr%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ps%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vb%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jar%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.inf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cpl%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.hta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.msi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2020/04/20/sqlserver-or-the-miner-in-the-basement/

## Potential Homoglyph Attack Using Lookalike Characters

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `32e280f1-8ad4-46ef-9e80-910657611fbc` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036, T1036.003 |
| **Author** | Micah Babinski, @micahbabinski |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_homoglyph_cyrillic_lookalikes.yml)**

> Detects the presence of unicode characters which are homoglyphs, or identical in appearance, to ASCII letter characters.
This is used as an obfuscation and masquerading techniques. Only "perfect" homoglyphs are included; these are characters that
are indistinguishable from ASCII characters and thus may make excellent candidates for homoglyph attack characters.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Homoglyph Attack Using Lookalike Characters
-- Sigma ID:     32e280f1-8ad4-46ef-9e80-910657611fbc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036, T1036.003
-- Author:       Micah Babinski, @micahbabinski
-- Date:         2023-05-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_homoglyph_cyrillic_lookalikes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Commandlines with legitimate Cyrillic text; will likely require tuning (or not be usable) in countries where these alphabets are in use.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%а%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%е%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%о%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%р%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%с%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%х%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ѕ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%і%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ӏ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ј%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%һ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ԁ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ԛ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ԝ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ο%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%А%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%В%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Е%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%К%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%М%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Н%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%О%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Р%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%С%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Т%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Х%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ѕ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%І%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ј%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ү%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ӏ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ԍ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ԛ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ԝ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Α%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Β%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ε%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ζ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Η%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ι%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Κ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Μ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ν%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ο%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Ρ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Τ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Υ%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Χ%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Commandlines with legitimate Cyrillic text; will likely require tuning (or not be usable) in countries where these alphabets are in use.

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/socgholish/#threat-socgholish
- http://www.irongeek.com/homoglyph-attack-generator.php

## Execution Of Non-Existing File

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `71158e3f-df67-472b-930e-7d287acaa3e1` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_image_missing.yml)**

> Checks whether the image specified in a process creation event is not a full, absolute path (caused by process ghosting or other unorthodox methods to start a process)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execution Of Non-Existing File
-- Sigma ID:     71158e3f-df67-472b-930e-7d287acaa3e1
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_image_missing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://pentestlaboratories.com/2021/12/08/process-ghosting/

## Base64 MZ Header In CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `22e58743-4ac8-4a9f-bf19-00a0428d8c5f` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_inline_base64_mz_header.yml)**

> Detects encoded base64 MZ header in the commandline

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Base64 MZ Header In CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     22e58743-4ac8-4a9f-bf19-00a0428d8c5f
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_inline_base64_mz_header.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVqQAAMAAAAEAAAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVpQAAIAAAAEAA8A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVqAAAEAAAAEABAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVoAAAAAAAAAAAAA%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TVpTAQEAAAAEAAAA%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Potentially Suspicious Inline JavaScript Execution via NodeJS Binary

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8537c866-072e-460d-bfff-aaf39cbd73d3` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.007 |
| **Author** | Microsoft (idea), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_inline_node_js_execution.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious inline JavaScript execution using Node.js with specific keywords in the command line.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Inline JavaScript Execution via NodeJS Binary
-- Sigma ID:     8537c866-072e-460d-bfff-aaf39cbd73d3
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.007
-- Author:       Microsoft (idea), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-04-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_inline_node_js_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate scripts using Node.js with these modules
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%execSync%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%spawn%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%fs%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%path%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%zlib%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\node.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'node.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'Node.js')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate scripts using Node.js with these modules

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2025/04/15/threat-actors-misuse-node-js-to-deliver-malware-and-other-malicious-payloads/

---

## Potential WinAPI Calls Via CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ba3f5c1b-6272-4119-9dbd-0bc8d21c2702` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1106 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_inline_win_api_access.yml)**

> Detects the use of WinAPI Functions via the commandline. As seen used by threat actors via the tool winapiexec

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential WinAPI Calls Via CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     ba3f5c1b-6272-4119-9dbd-0bc8d21c2702
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1106
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_inline_win_api_access.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some legitimate action or applications may use these functions. Investigate further to determine the legitimacy of the activity.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AddSecurityPackage%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AdjustTokenPrivileges%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Advapi32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CloseHandle%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreateProcessWithToken%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreatePseudoConsole%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreateRemoteThread%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreateThread%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CreateUserThread%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DangerousGetHandle%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DuplicateTokenEx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EnumerateSecurityPackages%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FreeHGlobal%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FreeLibrary%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetDelegateForFunctionPointer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetLogonSessionData%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetModuleHandle%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetProcAddress%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetProcessHandle%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%GetTokenInformation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ImpersonateLoggedOnUser%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kernel32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LoadLibrary%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%memcpy%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MiniDumpWriteDump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ntdll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenDesktop%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenProcess%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenProcessToken%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenThreadToken%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%OpenWindowStation%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PtrToString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%QueueUserApc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ReadProcessMemory%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RevertToSelf%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%RtlCreateUserThread%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%secur32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SetThreadToken%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VirtualAlloc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VirtualFree%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VirtualProtect%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WaitForSingleObject%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WriteInt32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%WriteProcessMemory%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ZeroFreeGlobalAllocUnicode%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some legitimate action or applications may use these functions. Investigate further to determine the legitimacy of the activity.

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/m417z/status/1566674631788007425

---

## Potentially Suspicious JWT Token Search Via CLI

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6d3a3952-6530-44a3-8554-cf17c116c615` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1528, T1552.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), kagebunsher |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_jwt_token_search.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious search for JWT tokens via CLI by looking for the string "eyJ0eX" or "eyJhbG".
JWT tokens are often used for access-tokens across various applications and services like Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS, Google Cloud, and others.
Threat actors may search for these tokens to steal them for lateral movement or privilege escalation.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious JWT Token Search Via CLI
-- Sigma ID:     6d3a3952-6530-44a3-8554-cf17c116c615
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1528, T1552.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), kagebunsher
-- Date:         2022-10-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_jwt_token_search.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%eyJ0eXAiOi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%eyJhbGciOi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% eyJ0eX%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% "eyJ0eX"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 'eyJ0eX'%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% eyJhbG%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% "eyJhbG"%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% 'eyJhbG'%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%find %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%find.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%findstr%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%select-string %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%strings%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://mrd0x.com/stealing-tokens-from-office-applications/
- https://www.scip.ch/en/?labs.20240523

---

## Suspicious LNK Command-Line Padding with Whitespace Characters

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `dd8756e7-a3a0-4768-b47e-8f545d1a751c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1204.002 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_lnk_exec_hidden_cmd.yml)**

> Detects exploitation of LNK file command-line length discrepancy, where attackers hide malicious commands beyond the 260-character UI limit while the actual command-line argument field supports 4096 characters using whitespace padding (e.g., 0x20, 0x09-0x0D).
Adversaries insert non-printable whitespace characters (e.g., Line Feed \x0A, Carriage Return \x0D) to pad the visible section of the LNK file, pushing malicious commands past the UI-visible boundary.
The hidden payload, executed at runtime but invisible in Windows Explorer properties, enables stealthy execution and evasion—commonly used for social engineering attacks.
This rule flags suspicious use of such padding observed in real-world attacks.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious LNK Command-Line Padding with Whitespace Characters
-- Sigma ID:     dd8756e7-a3a0-4768-b47e-8f545d1a751c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.002
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-03-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_lnk_exec_hidden_cmd.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%                 %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u0009%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u000A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u0011%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u0012%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u0013%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u000B%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u000C%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u000D%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], '\n\n\n\n\n\n')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\explorer.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%.lnk%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://syedhasan010.medium.com/forensics-analysis-of-an-lnk-file-da68a98b8415
- https://thehackernews.com/2025/03/unpatched-windows-zero-day-flaw.html
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/25/c/windows-shortcut-zero-day-exploit.html

---

## Local Accounts Discovery

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `502b42de-4306-40b4-9596-6f590c81f073` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1033, T1087.001 |
| **Author** | Timur Zinniatullin, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_local_system_owner_account_discovery.yml)**

> Local accounts, System Owner/User discovery using operating systems utilities

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Local Accounts Discovery
-- Sigma ID:     502b42de-4306-40b4-9596-6f590c81f073
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1033, T1087.001
-- Author:       Timur Zinniatullin, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_local_system_owner_account_discovery.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrator or user enumerates local users for legitimate reason
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /c%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dir %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\%'))
  AND NOT (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% rmdir %')))
  OR (((procName LIKE '%\\net.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\net1.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%user%'))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/domain%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/add%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/delete%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/active%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/expires%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/passwordreq%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/scriptpath%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/times%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/workstations%'))))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\cmdkey.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /l%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\whoami.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\quser.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\qwinsta.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('whoami.exe', 'quser.exe', 'qwinsta.exe')))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%useraccount%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%get%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrator or user enumerates local users for legitimate reason

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1033/T1033.md

---

## LOLBIN Execution From Abnormal Drive

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d4ca7c59-e9e4-42d8-bf57-91a776efcb87` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Christopher Peacock '@securepeacock', SCYTHE '@scythe_io', Angelo Violetti - SEC Consult '@angelo_violetti', Aaron Herman |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_lolbin_exec_from_non_c_drive.yml)**

> Detects LOLBINs executing from an abnormal or uncommon drive such as a mounted ISO.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        LOLBIN Execution From Abnormal Drive
-- Sigma ID:     d4ca7c59-e9e4-42d8-bf57-91a776efcb87
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Christopher Peacock '@securepeacock', SCYTHE '@scythe_io', Angelo Violetti - SEC Consult '@angelo_violetti', Aaron Herman
-- Date:         2022-01-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_lolbin_exec_from_non_c_drive.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Rare false positives could occur on servers with multiple drives.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\calc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\certutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cmstp.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\installutil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('CALC.EXE', 'CertUtil.exe', 'CMSTP.EXE', 'cscript.exe', 'installutil.exe', 'MSHTA.EXE', 'REGSVR32.EXE', 'RUNDLL32.EXE', 'wscript.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Rare false positives could occur on servers with multiple drives.

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/12/13/diavol-ransomware/
- https://www.scythe.io/library/threat-emulation-qakbot
- https://sec-consult.com/blog/detail/bumblebee-hunting-with-a-velociraptor/

---

## LSASS Dump Keyword In CommandLine

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ffa6861c-4461-4f59-8a41-578c39f3f23e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.001 |
| **Author** | E.M. Anhaus, Tony Lambert, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_lsass_dmp_cli_keywords.yml)**

> Detects the presence of the keywords "lsass" and ".dmp" in the commandline, which could indicate a potential attempt to dump or create a dump of the lsass process.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        LSASS Dump Keyword In CommandLine
-- Sigma ID:     ffa6861c-4461-4f59-8a41-578c39f3f23e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.001
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus, Tony Lambert, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_lsass_dmp_cli_keywords.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass.dmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass.zip%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass.rar%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Andrew.dmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Coredump.dmp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NotLSASS.zip%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass\_2%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsassdump%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsassdmp%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%lsass%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dmp%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%SQLDmpr%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.mdmp%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%nanodump%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dmp%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/Hackndo/lsassy
- https://medium.com/@markmotig/some-ways-to-dump-lsass-exe-c4a75fdc49bf
- https://github.com/elastic/detection-rules/blob/c76a39796972ecde44cb1da6df47f1b6562c9770/rules/windows/credential_access_lsass_memdump_file_created.toml
- https://www.whiteoaksecurity.com/blog/attacks-defenses-dumping-lsass-no-mimikatz/
- https://github.com/helpsystems/nanodump
- https://github.com/CCob/MirrorDump

## Potential File Download Via MS-AppInstaller Protocol Handler

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `180c7c5c-d64b-4a63-86e9-68910451bc8b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ms_appinstaller_download.yml)**

> Detects usage of the "ms-appinstaller" protocol handler via command line to potentially download arbitrary files via AppInstaller.EXE
The downloaded files are temporarly stored in ":\Users\%username%\AppData\Local\Packages\Microsoft.DesktopAppInstaller_8wekyb3d8bbwe\AC\INetCache\<RANDOM-8-CHAR-DIRECTORY>"


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential File Download Via MS-AppInstaller Protocol Handler
-- Sigma ID:     180c7c5c-d64b-4a63-86e9-68910451bc8b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2023-11-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ms_appinstaller_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ms-appinstaller://?source=%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%http%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/AppInstaller/

---

## Suspicious Network Command

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a29c1813-ab1f-4dde-b489-330b952e91ae` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1016 |
| **Author** | frack113, Christopher Peacock '@securepeacock', SCYTHE '@scythe_io' |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_network_command.yml)**

> Adversaries may look for details about the network configuration and settings of systems they access or through information discovery of remote systems

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Network Command
-- Sigma ID:     a29c1813-ab1f-4dde-b489-330b952e91ae
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1016
-- Author:       frack113, Christopher Peacock '@securepeacock', SCYTHE '@scythe_io'
-- Date:         2021-12-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_network_command.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrator, hotline ask to user
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'ipconfig\s+/all') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'netsh\s+interface show interface') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'arp\s+-a') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'nbtstat\s+-n') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'net\s+config') OR match(metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')], 'route\s+print')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrator, hotline ask to user

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1016/T1016.md#atomic-test-1---system-network-configuration-discovery-on-windows

---

## Suspicious Scan Loop Network

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f8ad2e2c-40b6-4117-84d7-20b89896ab23` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059, T1018 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_network_scan_loop.yml)**

> Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of other systems by IP address, hostname, or other logical identifier on a network that may be used for Lateral Movement from the current system

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Scan Loop Network
-- Sigma ID:     f8ad2e2c-40b6-4117-84d7-20b89896ab23
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, discovery | T1059, T1018
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-03-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_network_scan_loop.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate script
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%for %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%foreach %'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%nslookup%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ping%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate script

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1018/T1018.md
- https://ss64.com/nt/for.html
- https://ss64.com/ps/foreach-object.html
