## Potential Network Sniffing Activity Using Network Tools

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ba1f7802-adc7-48b4-9ecb-81e227fddfd5` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1040 |
| **Author** | Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_network_sniffing.yml)**

> Detects potential network sniffing via use of network tools such as "tshark", "windump".
Network sniffing refers to using the network interface on a system to monitor or capture information sent over a wired or wireless connection.
An adversary may place a network interface into promiscuous mode to passively access data in transit over the network, or use span ports to capture a larger amount of data.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Network Sniffing Activity Using Network Tools
-- Sigma ID:     ba1f7802-adc7-48b4-9ecb-81e227fddfd5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1040
-- Author:       Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_network_sniffing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administration activity to troubleshoot network issues
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\tshark.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-i%'))
  OR procName LIKE '%\\windump.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administration activity to troubleshoot network issues

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1040/T1040.md

---

## Process Launched Without Image Name

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f208d6d8-d83a-4c2c-960d-877c37da84e5` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Matt Anderson (Huntress) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_no_image_name.yml)**

> Detect the use of processes with no name (".exe"), which can be used to evade Image-based detections.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Process Launched Without Image Name
-- Sigma ID:     f208d6d8-d83a-4c2c-960d-877c37da84e5
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Matt Anderson (Huntress)
-- Date:         2024-07-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_no_image_name.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Rare legitimate software.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Rare legitimate software.

**References:**
- https://www.huntress.com/blog/fake-browser-updates-lead-to-boinc-volunteer-computing-software

---

## Execution of Suspicious File Type Extension

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c09dad97-1c78-4f71-b127-7edb2b8e491a` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_non_exe_image.yml)**

> Detects whether the image specified in a process creation event doesn't refer to an ".exe" (or other known executable extension) file. This can be caused by process ghosting or other unorthodox methods to start a process.
This rule might require some initial baselining to align with some third party tooling in the user environment.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Execution of Suspicious File Type Extension
-- Sigma ID:     c09dad97-1c78-4f71-b127-7edb2b8e491a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_non_exe_image.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%.bin' OR procName LIKE '%.cgi' OR procName LIKE '%.com' OR procName LIKE '%.exe' OR procName LIKE '%.scr' OR procName LIKE '%.tmp'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://pentestlaboratories.com/2021/12/08/process-ghosting/

---

## Non-privileged Usage of Reg or Powershell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8f02c935-effe-45b3-8fc9-ef8696a9e41d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1112 |
| **Author** | Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Ryan Plas (rule), oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_non_priv_reg_or_ps.yml)**

> Search for usage of reg or Powershell by non-privileged users to modify service configuration in registry

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Non-privileged Usage of Reg or Powershell
-- Sigma ID:     8f02c935-effe-45b3-8fc9-ef8696a9e41d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1112
-- Author:       Teymur Kheirkhabarov (idea), Ryan Plas (rule), oscd.community
-- Date:         2020-10-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_non_priv_reg_or_ps.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%reg %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%add%'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%set-itemproperty%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% sp %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%new-itemproperty%')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('Medium', 'S-1-16-8192'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ControlSet%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Services%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ImagePath%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FailureCommand%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ServiceDLL%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://image.slidesharecdn.com/kheirkhabarovoffzonefinal-181117201458/95/hunting-for-privilege-escalation-in-windows-environment-20-638.jpg

---

## Suspicious Process Patterns NTDS.DIT Exfil

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8bc64091-6875-4881-aaf9-7bd25b5dda08` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003.003 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntds.yml)**

> Detects suspicious process patterns used in NTDS.DIT exfiltration

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Process Patterns NTDS.DIT Exfil
-- Sigma ID:     8bc64091-6875-4881-aaf9-7bd25b5dda08
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003.003
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntds.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ac i ntds%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%create full%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/c copy %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\windows\\ntds\\ntds.dit%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%activate instance ntds%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%create full%')
  OR indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ntds.dit%')
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\NTDSDump.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\NTDSDumpEx.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ntds.dit%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%system.hiv%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%NTDSgrab.ps1%'))
  OR (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\apache%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\tomcat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\PerfLogs\\%')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\apache%' OR procName LIKE '%\\tomcat%' OR procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Temp\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Public\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\PerfLogs\\%'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ntds.dit%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.ired.team/offensive-security/credential-access-and-credential-dumping/ntds.dit-enumeration
- https://www.n00py.io/2022/03/manipulating-user-passwords-without-mimikatz/
- https://pentestlab.blog/tag/ntds-dit/
- https://github.com/samratashok/nishang/blob/414ee1104526d7057f9adaeee196d91ae447283e/Gather/Copy-VSS.ps1
- https://github.com/zcgonvh/NTDSDumpEx
- https://github.com/rapid7/metasploit-framework/blob/d297adcebb5c1df6fe30b12ca79b161deb71571c/data/post/powershell/NTDSgrab.ps1
- https://blog.talosintelligence.com/2022/08/recent-cyber-attack.html?m=1

## Potentially Suspicious Call To Win32_NTEventlogFile Class

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `caf201a9-c2ce-4a26-9c3a-2b9525413711` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_nteventlogfile_usage.yml)**

> Detects usage of the WMI class "Win32_NTEventlogFile" in a potentially suspicious way (delete, backup, change permissions, etc.) from a PowerShell script

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Call To Win32_NTEventlogFile Class
-- Sigma ID:     caf201a9-c2ce-4a26-9c3a-2b9525413711
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_nteventlogfile_usage.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Win32\_NTEventlogFile%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.BackupEventlog(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ChangeSecurityPermissions(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ChangeSecurityPermissionsEx(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ClearEventLog(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Delete(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.DeleteEx(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.Rename(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.TakeOwnerShip(%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.TakeOwnerShipEx(%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/desktop/legacy/aa394225(v=vs.85)

---

## Use Short Name Path in Image

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a96970af-f126-420d-90e1-d37bf25e50e1` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.004 |
| **Author** | frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_path_use_image.yml)**

> Detect use of the Windows 8.3 short name. Which could be used as a method to avoid Image detection

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use Short Name Path in Image
-- Sigma ID:     a96970af-f126-420d-90e1-d37bf25e50e1
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali
-- Date:         2022-08-07
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_path_use_image.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Applications could use this notation occasionally which might generate some false positives. In that case Investigate the parent and child process.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%~1\\%' OR procName LIKE '%~2\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Applications could use this notation occasionally which might generate some false positives. In that case Investigate the parent and child process.

**References:**
- https://www.acunetix.com/blog/articles/windows-short-8-3-filenames-web-security-problem/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/it-pro/windows-2000-server/cc959352(v=technet.10)
- https://twitter.com/frack113/status/1555830623633375232

---

## Use NTFS Short Name in Command Line

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `dd6b39d9-d9be-4a3b-8fe0-fe3c6a5c1795` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.004 |

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_use_cli.yml)**

> Detect use of the Windows 8.3 short name. Which could be used as a method to avoid command-line detection

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use NTFS Short Name in Command Line
-- Sigma ID:     dd6b39d9-d9be-4a3b-8fe0-fe3c6a5c1795
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_use_cli.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Applications could use this notation occasionally which might generate some false positives. In that case Investigate the parent and child process.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.msi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.vbe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.vbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~1.hta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.exe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.bat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.msi%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.vbe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.vbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.dll%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%~2.hta%'))
  AND NOT (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\WebEx\\WebexHost.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\thor\\thor64.exe')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\xampp\\vcredist\\VCREDI~1.EXE%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Applications could use this notation occasionally which might generate some false positives. In that case Investigate the parent and child process.

**References:**
- https://www.acunetix.com/blog/articles/windows-short-8-3-filenames-web-security-problem/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/it-pro/windows-2000-server/cc959352(v=technet.10)
- https://twitter.com/jonasLyk/status/1555914501802921984

## Use NTFS Short Name in Image

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3ef5605c-9eb9-47b0-9a71-b727e6aa5c3b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1564.004 |
| **Author** | frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_use_image.yml)**

> Detect use of the Windows 8.3 short name. Which could be used as a method to avoid Image based detection

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use NTFS Short Name in Image
-- Sigma ID:     3ef5605c-9eb9-47b0-9a71-b727e6aa5c3b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1564.004
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-06
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_ntfs_short_name_use_image.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Software Installers
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%~1.bat%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.dll%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.exe%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.hta%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.js%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.msi%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.ps1%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.tmp%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.vbe%' OR procName LIKE '%~1.vbs%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.bat%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.dll%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.exe%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.hta%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.js%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.msi%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.ps1%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.tmp%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.vbe%' OR procName LIKE '%~2.vbs%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Software Installers

**References:**
- https://www.acunetix.com/blog/articles/windows-short-8-3-filenames-web-security-problem/
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/it-pro/windows-2000-server/cc959352(v=technet.10)
- https://twitter.com/jonasLyk/status/1555914501802921984

## Obfuscated IP Download Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cb5a2333-56cf-4562-8fcb-22ba1bca728d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_obfuscated_ip_download.yml)**

> Detects use of an encoded/obfuscated version of an IP address (hex, octal...) in an URL combined with a download command

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Obfuscated IP Download Activity
-- Sigma ID:     cb5a2333-56cf-4562-8fcb-22ba1bca728d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_obfuscated_ip_download.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-WebRequest%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%iwr %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-RestMethod%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%irm %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wget %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%curl %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DownloadFile%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DownloadString%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://h.43z.one/ipconverter/
- https://twitter.com/Yasser_Elsnbary/status/1553804135354564608
- https://twitter.com/fr0s7_/status/1712780207105404948

## Obfuscated IP Via CLI

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `56d19cb4-6414-4769-9644-1ed35ffbb148` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_obfuscated_ip_via_cli.yml)**

> Detects usage of an encoded/obfuscated version of an IP address (hex, octal, etc.) via command line

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Obfuscated IP Via CLI
-- Sigma ID:     56d19cb4-6414-4769-9644-1ed35ffbb148
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_obfuscated_ip_via_cli.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\ping.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\arp.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## Suspicious Process Parents

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cbec226f-63d9-4eca-9f52-dfb6652f24df` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_parents.yml)**

> Detects suspicious parent processes that should not have any children or should only have a single possible child program

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Process Parents
-- Sigma ID:     cbec226f-63d9-4eca-9f52-dfb6652f24df
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-03-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_parents.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\minesweeper.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\winver.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\bitsadmin.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/x86matthew/status/1505476263464607744?s=12
- https://svch0st.medium.com/stats-from-hunting-cobalt-strike-beacons-c17e56255f9b

## Potential PowerShell Execution Via DLL

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6812a10b-60ea-420c-832f-dfcc33b646ba` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218.011 |
| **Author** | Markus Neis, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_powershell_execution_via_dll.yml)**

> Detects potential PowerShell execution from a DLL instead of the usual PowerShell process as seen used in PowerShdll.
This detection assumes that PowerShell commands are passed via the CommandLine.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential PowerShell Execution Via DLL
-- Sigma ID:     6812a10b-60ea-420c-832f-dfcc33b646ba
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1218.011
-- Author:       Markus Neis, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2018-08-25
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_powershell_execution_via_dll.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Default.GetString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DownloadString%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FromBase64String%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ICM %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%IEX %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Command%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-Expression%'))
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\InstallUtil.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\RegAsm.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\RegSvcs.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\regsvr32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\rundll32.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('InstallUtil.exe', 'RegAsm.exe', 'RegSvcs.exe', 'REGSVR32.EXE', 'RUNDLL32.EXE'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/p3nt4/PowerShdll/blob/62cfa172fb4e1f7f4ac00ca942685baeb88ff356/README.md

---

## Privilege Escalation via Named Pipe Impersonation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9bd04a79-dabe-4f1f-a5ff-92430265c96b` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1021 |
| **Author** | Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_priv_escalation_via_named_pipe.yml)**

> Detects a remote file copy attempt to a hidden network share. This may indicate lateral movement or data staging activity.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Privilege Escalation via Named Pipe Impersonation
-- Sigma ID:     9bd04a79-dabe-4f1f-a5ff-92430265c96b
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1021
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_priv_escalation_via_named_pipe.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Other programs that cause these patterns (please report)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%echo%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%>%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\.\\\\pipe\\\\%')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('Cmd.Exe', 'PowerShell.EXE'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Other programs that cause these patterns (please report)

**References:**
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/privilege-escalation-via-named-pipe-impersonation.html

---

## Private Keys Reconnaissance Via CommandLine Tools

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `213d6a77-3d55-4ce8-ba74-fcfef741974e` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1552.004 |
| **Author** | frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_private_keys_recon.yml)**

> Adversaries may search for private key certificate files on compromised systems for insecurely stored credential

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Private Keys Reconnaissance Via CommandLine Tools
-- Sigma ID:     213d6a77-3d55-4ce8-ba74-fcfef741974e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1552.004
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-07-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_private_keys_recon.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.key%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pgp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gpg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppk%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.p12%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pem%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.pfx%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.cer%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.p7b%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.asc%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Get-ChildItem %')
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll'))))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\findstr.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'FINDSTR.EXE'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1552.004/T1552.004.md

---

## Suspicious RunAs-Like Flag Combination

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `50d66fb0-03f8-4da0-8add-84e77d12a020` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_privilege_escalation_cli_patterns.yml)**

> Detects suspicious command line flags that let the user set a target user and command as e.g. seen in PsExec-like tools

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious RunAs-Like Flag Combination
-- Sigma ID:     50d66fb0-03f8-4da0-8add-84e77d12a020
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-11-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_privilege_escalation_cli_patterns.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c "cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c "powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --command cmd%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --command powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c whoami%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c wscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c cscript%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u system %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --user system %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u NT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u "NT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u 'NT%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --system %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -u administrator %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/22/k/hack-the-real-box-apt41-new-subgroup-earth-longzhi.html

## Windows Processes Suspicious Parent Directory

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `96036718-71cc-4027-a538-d1587e0006a7` |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_proc_wrong_parent.yml)**

> Detect suspicious parent processes of well-known Windows processes

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Processes Suspicious Parent Directory
-- Sigma ID:     96036718-71cc-4027-a538-d1587e0006a7
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.003, T1036.005

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\svchost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\taskhost.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\lsm.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\lsass.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\services.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\lsaiso.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\csrss.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wininit.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\winlogon.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some security products seem to spawn these

**References:**
- https://web.archive.org/web/20180718061628/https://securitybytes.io/blue-team-fundamentals-part-two-windows-processes-759fe15965e2
- https://www.carbonblack.com/2014/06/10/screenshot-demo-hunt-evil-faster-than-ever-with-carbon-black/
- https://www.13cubed.com/downloads/windows_process_genealogy_v2.pdf

## Suspicious Program Names

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `efdd8dd5-cee8-4e59-9390-7d4d5e4dd6f6` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_progname.yml)**

> Detects suspicious patterns in program names or folders that are often found in malicious samples or hacktools

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Program Names
-- Sigma ID:     efdd8dd5-cee8-4e59-9390-7d4d5e4dd6f6
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_progname.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate tools that accidentally match on the searched patterns
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%inject.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Invoke-CVE%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pupy.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%payload.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%beacon.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%PowerView.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bypass.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%obfuscated.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%obfusc.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%obfus.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%obfs.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%evil.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%MiniDogz.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\_enc.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\shell.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\rshell.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%revshell.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\av.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\av\_test.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%adrecon.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mimikatz.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\PowerUp\_%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powerup.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\a.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\p.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temp\\1.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Hound.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%encode.ps1%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powercat.ps1%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\CVE-202%' OR procName LIKE '%\\CVE202%'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\poc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact\_protected.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact32.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\artifact32big.exe' OR procName LIKE '%obfuscated.exe' OR procName LIKE '%obfusc.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\meterpreter'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate tools that accidentally match on the searched patterns

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1560.001/T1560.001.md

## Recon Information for Export with Command Prompt

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `aa2efee7-34dd-446e-8a37-40790a66efd7` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1119 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_recon.yml)**

> Once established within a system or network, an adversary may use automated techniques for collecting internal data.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Recon Information for Export with Command Prompt
-- Sigma ID:     aa2efee7-34dd-446e-8a37-40790a66efd7
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection | T1119
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-07-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_recon.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\tree.com' OR procName LIKE '%\\WMIC.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\doskey.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\sc.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('wmic.exe', 'DOSKEY.EXE', 'sc.exe')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% > \%TEMP\%\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% > \%TMP\%\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1119/T1119.md

## Suspicious Process Execution From Fake Recycle.Bin Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `5ce0f04e-3efc-42af-839d-5b3a543b76c0` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **Author** | X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_recycle_bin_fake_execution.yml)**

> Detects process execution from a fake recycle bin folder, often used to avoid security solution.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Process Execution From Fake Recycle.Bin Folder
-- Sigma ID:     5ce0f04e-3efc-42af-839d-5b3a543b76c0
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence
-- Author:       X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-07-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_recycle_bin_fake_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%RECYCLERS.BIN\\%' OR procName LIKE '%RECYCLER.BIN\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/blog/infected-usb-steal-secrets
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/cloaked-ursa-phishing/

## Suspicious Redirection to Local Admin Share

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ab9e3b40-0c85-4ba1-aede-455d226fd124` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | exfiltration |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1048 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_redirect_local_admin_share.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious output redirection to the local admins share, this technique is often found in malicious scripts or hacktool stagers

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Redirection to Local Admin Share
-- Sigma ID:     ab9e3b40-0c85-4ba1-aede-455d226fd124
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration | T1048
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_redirect_local_admin_share.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%>%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\127.0.0.1\\\\admin$\\\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\localhost\\\\admin$\\\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2022/01/15/destructive-malware-targeting-ukrainian-organizations/

## Registry Modification of MS-settings Protocol Handler

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `dd3ee8cc-f751-41c9-ba53-5a32ed47e563` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002, T1546.001, T1112 |
| **Author** | frack113, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_registry_modification_of_ms_setting_protocol_handler.yml)**

> Detects registry modifications to the 'ms-settings' protocol handler, which is frequently targeted for UAC bypass or persistence.
Attackers can modify this registry to execute malicious code with elevated privileges by hijacking the command execution path.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Registry Modification of MS-settings Protocol Handler
-- Sigma ID:     dd3ee8cc-f751-41c9-ba53-5a32ed47e563
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1548.002, T1546.001, T1112
-- Author:       frack113, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_registry_modification_of_ms_setting_protocol_handler.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\ms-settings\\shell\\open\\command%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/12/13/diavol-ransomware/
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/25/f/water-curse.html

## Potential Remote Desktop Tunneling

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8a3038e8-9c9d-46f8-b184-66234a160f6f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1021 |
| **Author** | Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_remote_desktop_tunneling.yml)**

> Detects potential use of an SSH utility to establish RDP over a reverse SSH Tunnel. This can be used by attackers to enable routing of network packets that would otherwise not reach their intended destination.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Remote Desktop Tunneling
-- Sigma ID:     8a3038e8-9c9d-46f8-b184-66234a160f6f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1021
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_remote_desktop_tunneling.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:3389%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -L %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -P %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -R %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -pw %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -ssh %')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/potential-remote-desktop-tunneling-detected.html

## Potential Defense Evasion Via Right-to-Left Override

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ad691d92-15f2-4181-9aa4-723c74f9ddc3` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036.002 |
| **Author** | Micah Babinski, @micahbabinski, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_right_to_left_override.yml)**

> Detects the presence of the "u202+E" character, which causes a terminal, browser, or operating system to render text in a right-to-left sequence.
This is used as an obfuscation and masquerading techniques.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Defense Evasion Via Right-to-Left Override
-- Sigma ID:     ad691d92-15f2-4181-9aa4-723c74f9ddc3
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036.002
-- Author:       Micah Babinski, @micahbabinski, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_right_to_left_override.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Commandlines that contains scriptures such as arabic or hebrew might make use of this character
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\u202e%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%[U+202E]%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Commandlines that contains scriptures such as arabic or hebrew might make use of this character

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/right-to-left-override/
- https://www.malwarebytes.com/blog/news/2014/01/the-rtlo-method
- https://unicode-explorer.com/c/202E
- https://tria.ge/241015-l98snsyeje/behavioral2

> Detects a suspicious script execution in temporary folders or folders accessible by environment variables

```sql
-- ============================================================

-- Sigma ID:     1228c958-e64e-4e71-92ad-7d429f4138ba
```

## Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a6a39bdb-935c-4f0a-ab77-35f4bbf44d33` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_script_exec_from_temp.yml)**

> Detects a suspicious script executions from temporary folder

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Script Execution From Temp Folder
-- Sigma ID:     a6a39bdb-935c-4f0a-ab77-35f4bbf44d33
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tim Shelton
-- Date:         2021-07-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_script_exec_from_temp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative scripts
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\mshta.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Temporary Internet%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Roaming\\Temp%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%TEMP\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%TMP\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%LocalAppData\%\\Temp%')))
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% >%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Out-File%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ConvertTo-Json%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-WindowStyle hidden -Verb runAs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\system32\\config\\systemprofile\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\Amazon\\EC2-Windows\\%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative scripts

**References:**
- https://www.microsoft.com/security/blog/2021/07/13/microsoft-discovers-threat-actor-targeting-solarwinds-serv-u-software-with-0-day-exploit/

---

## Sensitive File Access Via Volume Shadow Copy Backup

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `f57f8d16-1f39-4dcb-a604-6c73d9b54b3d` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | impact |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1490 |
| **Author** | Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_sensitive_file_access_shadowcopy.yml)**

> Detects a command that accesses the VolumeShadowCopy in order to extract sensitive files such as the Security or SAM registry hives or the AD database (ntds.dit)


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sensitive File Access Via Volume Shadow Copy Backup
-- Sigma ID:     f57f8d16-1f39-4dcb-a604-6c73d9b54b3d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1490
-- Author:       Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems), Tobias Michalski (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_sensitive_file_access_shadowcopy.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\\\?\\\\GLOBALROOT\\\\Device\\\\HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\NTDS.dit%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\SYSTEM%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\SECURITY%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/vxunderground/status/1423336151860002816?s=20
- https://www.virustotal.com/gui/file/03e9b8c2e86d6db450e5eceec057d7e369ee2389b9daecaf06331a95410aa5f8/detection
- https://pentestlab.blog/2018/07/04/dumping-domain-password-hashes/

---

## Suspicious New Service Creation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `17a1be64-8d88-40bf-b5ff-a4f7a50ebcc8` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1543.003 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_service_creation.yml)**

> Detects creation of a new service via "sc" command or the powershell "new-service" cmdlet with suspicious binary paths

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious New Service Creation
-- Sigma ID:     17a1be64-8d88-40bf-b5ff-a4f7a50ebcc8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1543.003
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_service_creation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%svchost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%dllhost%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /k%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /r%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Users\\Public%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Downloads\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Desktop\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Start Menu\\Programs\\Startup\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Windows\\TEMP\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1543.003/T1543.003.md
- https://web.archive.org/web/20180331144337/https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2018/03/sanny-malware-delivery-method-updated-in-recently-observed-attacks.html

---

## Suspicious Service Binary Directory

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `883faa95-175a-4e22-8181-e5761aeb373c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1202 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_service_dir.yml)**

> Detects a service binary running in a suspicious directory

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Service Binary Directory
-- Sigma ID:     883faa95-175a-4e22-8181-e5761aeb373c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-03-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_service_dir.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\$Recycle.bin%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\All Users\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Default\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Contacts\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Users\\Searches\\%' OR procName LIKE '%C:\\Perflogs\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\config\\systemprofile\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\Fonts\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\IME\\%' OR procName LIKE '%\\Windows\\addins\\%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\services.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\svchost.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://blog.truesec.com/2021/03/07/exchange-zero-day-proxylogon-and-hafnium/

---

## Suspicious Windows Service Tampering

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ce72ef99-22f1-43d4-8695-419dcb5d9330` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | impact |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1489, T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113 , X__Junior (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_service_tamper.yml)**

> Detects the usage of binaries such as 'net', 'sc' or 'powershell' in order to stop, pause, disable or delete critical or important Windows services such as AV, Backup, etc. As seen being used in some ransomware scripts


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Windows Service Tampering
-- Sigma ID:     ce72ef99-22f1-43d4-8695-419dcb5d9330
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1489, T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), frack113 , X__Junior (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-01
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_susp_service_tamper.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrators or tools shutting down the services due to upgrade or removal purposes. If you experience some false positive, please consider adding filters to the parent process launching this command and not removing the entry
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%143Svc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Acronis VSS Provider%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AcronisAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AcrSch2Svc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AdobeARMservice%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AHS Service%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Apache4%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ARSM%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%aswBcc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AteraAgent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Avast Business Console Client Antivirus Service%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%avast! Antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AVG Antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%avgAdminClient%' OR
```
