## PsExec Service Child Process Execution as LOCAL SYSTEM

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7c0dcd3d-acf8-4f71-9570-f448b0034f94` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_psexesvc_as_system.yml)**

> Detects suspicious launch of the PSEXESVC service on this system and a sub process run as LOCAL_SYSTEM (-s), which means that someone remotely started a command on this system running it with highest privileges and not only the privileges of the login user account (e.g. the administrator account)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        PsExec Service Child Process Execution as LOCAL SYSTEM
-- Sigma ID:     7c0dcd3d-acf8-4f71-9570-f448b0034f94
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_psexesvc_as_system.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Users that debug Microsoft Intune issues using the commands mentioned in the official documentation; see https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/mem/intune/apps/intune-management-extension
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] = 'C:\Windows\PSEXESVC.exe')
    AND (user LIKE '%AUTHORI%' OR user LIKE '%AUTORI%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Users that debug Microsoft Intune issues using the commands mentioned in the official documentation; see https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/mem/intune/apps/intune-management-extension

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sysinternals/downloads/psexec

---

## Suspicious Use of PsLogList

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `aae1243f-d8af-40d8-ab20-33fc6d0c55bc` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1087, T1087.001, T1087.002 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_psloglist.yml)**

> Detects usage of the PsLogList utility to dump event log in order to extract admin accounts and perform account discovery or delete events logs

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Use of PsLogList
-- Sigma ID:     aae1243f-d8af-40d8-ab20-33fc6d0c55bc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1087, T1087.001, T1087.002
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_psloglist.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Another tool that uses the command line switches of PsLogList; Legitimate use of PsLogList by an administrator
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% security%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% application%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% system%'))
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% -d%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -x%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -s%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -c%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -g%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'psloglist.exe'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\psloglist.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\psloglist64.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Another tool that uses the command line switches of PsLogList; Legitimate use of PsLogList by an administrator

**References:**
- https://research.nccgroup.com/2021/01/12/abusing-cloud-services-to-fly-under-the-radar/
- https://www.cybereason.com/blog/deadringer-exposing-chinese-threat-actors-targeting-major-telcos
- https://github.com/3CORESec/MAL-CL/tree/master/Descriptors/Sysinternals/PsLogList

```sql
  phRecvTime,

  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'psservice.exe'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\PsService.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\PsService64.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of PsService by an administrator

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sysinternals/downloads/psservice

> Detects usage of Sysinternals PsSuspend which can be abused to suspend critical processes

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sysinternals PsSuspend Execution
-- Sigma ID:     48bbc537-b652-4b4e-bd1d-281172df448f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery, persistence | T1543.003

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'pssuspend.exe'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\pssuspend.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pssuspend64.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## Sysinternals PsSuspend Suspicious Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4beb6ae0-f85b-41e2-8f18-8668abc8af78` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_pssuspend_susp_execution.yml)**

> Detects suspicious execution of Sysinternals PsSuspend, where the utility is used to suspend critical processes such as AV or EDR to bypass defenses

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sysinternals PsSuspend Suspicious Execution
-- Sigma ID:     4beb6ae0-f85b-41e2-8f18-8668abc8af78
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-03-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_pssuspend_susp_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unlikely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%msmpeng.exe%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'pssuspend.exe'))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\pssuspend.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pssuspend64.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unlikely

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sysinternals/downloads/pssuspend
- https://twitter.com/0gtweet/status/1638069413717975046

## Potential File Overwrite Via Sysinternals SDelete

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a4824fca-976f-4964-b334-0621379e84c4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | impact |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1485 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_sdelete.yml)**

> Detects the use of SDelete to erase a file not the free space

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential File Overwrite Via Sysinternals SDelete
-- Sigma ID:     a4824fca-976f-4964-b334-0621379e84c4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        impact | T1485
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-06-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_sdelete.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'sdelete.exe')
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -h%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -c%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -z%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /\\?%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1485/T1485.md

## Potential Privilege Escalation To LOCAL SYSTEM

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `207b0396-3689-42d9-8399-4222658efc99` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1587.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_susp_psexec_paexec_flags.yml)**

> Detects unknown program using commandline flags usually used by tools such as PsExec and PAExec to start programs with SYSTEM Privileges

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Privilege Escalation To LOCAL SYSTEM
-- Sigma ID:     207b0396-3689-42d9-8399-4222658efc99
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1587.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-05-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_susp_psexec_paexec_flags.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Weird admins that rename their tools; Software companies that bundle PsExec/PAExec with their software and rename it, so that it is less embarrassing
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '% -s cmd%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -s -i cmd%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -i -s cmd%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -s pwsh%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -s -i pwsh%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -i -s pwsh%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -s powershell%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -s -i powershell%' OR rawEventMsg LIKE '% -i -s powershell%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Weird admins that rename their tools; Software companies that bundle PsExec/PAExec with their software and rename it, so that it is less embarrassing

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sysinternals/downloads/psexec
- https://www.poweradmin.com/paexec/
- https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2020/10/kegtap-and-singlemalt-with-a-ransomware-chaser.html

---

## Sysmon Configuration Update

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `87911521-7098-470b-a459-9a57fc80bdfd` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_sysmon_config_update.yml)**

> Detects updates to Sysmon's configuration. Attackers might update or replace the Sysmon configuration with a bare bone one to avoid monitoring without shutting down the service completely

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sysmon Configuration Update
-- Sigma ID:     87911521-7098-470b-a459-9a57fc80bdfd
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-03-09
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_sysmon_config_update.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrators might use this command to update Sysmon configuration.
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-c%'
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\Sysmon64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\Sysmon.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'System activity monitor'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrators might use this command to update Sysmon configuration.

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sysinternals/downloads/sysmon

---

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uninstall Sysinternals Sysmon
-- Sigma ID:     6a5f68d1-c4b5-46b9-94ee-5324892ea939
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001

-- Unmapped:     Description

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events

  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-u%'
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\Sysmon64.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\Sysmon.exe'))
  OR (rawEventMsg = 'System activity monitor'))

LIMIT 1000;
```

## Potential Binary Impersonating Sysinternals Tools

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7cce6fc8-a07f-4d84-a53e-96e1879843c9` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218, T1202, T1036.005 |
| **Author** | frack113, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_tools_masquerading.yml)**

> Detects binaries that use the same name as legitimate sysinternals tools to evade detection.
This rule looks for the execution of binaries that are named similarly to Sysinternals tools.
Adversary may rename their malicious tools as legitimate Sysinternals tools to evade detection.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Binary Impersonating Sysinternals Tools
-- Sigma ID:     7cce6fc8-a07f-4d84-a53e-96e1879843c9
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218, T1202, T1036.005
-- Author:       frack113, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-12-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysinternals_tools_masquerading.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sysinternals/downloads/sysinternals-suite

## Sysprep on AppData Folder

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d5b9ae7a-e6fc-405e-80ff-2ff9dcc64e7e` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysprep_appdata.yml)**

> Detects suspicious sysprep process start with AppData folder as target (as used by Trojan Syndicasec in Thrip report by Symantec)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Sysprep on AppData Folder
-- Sigma ID:     d5b9ae7a-e6fc-405e-80ff-2ff9dcc64e7e
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2018-06-22
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_sysprep_appdata.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\sysprep.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** False positives depend on scripts and administrative tools used in the monitored environment

**References:**
- https://www.symantec.com/blogs/threat-intelligence/thrip-hits-satellite-telecoms-defense-targets

## Potential Signing Bypass Via Windows Developer Features

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `a383dec4-deec-4e6e-913b-ed9249670848` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_systemsettingsadminflows_turn_on_dev_features.yml)**

> Detects when a user enable developer features such as "Developer Mode" or "Application Sideloading". Which allows the user to install untrusted packages.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Signing Bypass Via Windows Developer Features
-- Sigma ID:     a383dec4-deec-4e6e-913b-ed9249670848
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        (none)
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_systemsettingsadminflows_turn_on_dev_features.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%TurnOnDeveloperFeatures%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\SystemSettingsAdminFlows.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'SystemSettingsAdminFlows.EXE'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DeveloperUnlock%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%EnableSideloading%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- Internal Research
- https://www.sentinelone.com/labs/inside-malicious-windows-apps-for-malware-deployment/

---

## Suspicious Recursive Takeown

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `554601fb-9b71-4bcc-abf4-21a611be4fde` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1222.001 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_takeown_recursive_own.yml)**

> Adversaries can interact with the DACLs using built-in Windows commands takeown which can grant adversaries higher permissions on specific files and folders

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Recursive Takeown
-- Sigma ID:     554601fb-9b71-4bcc-abf4-21a611be4fde
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1222.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-01-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_takeown_recursive_own.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Scripts created by developers and admins; Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\takeown.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/f %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/r%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Scripts created by developers and admins; Administrative activity

**References:**
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/takeown
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1222.001/T1222.001.md#atomic-test-1---take-ownership-using-takeown-utility

## Tap Installer Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `99793437-3e16-439b-be0f-078782cf953d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | exfiltration |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1048 |
| **Author** | Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Ian Davis, oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tapinstall_execution.yml)**

> Well-known TAP software installation. Possible preparation for data exfiltration using tunneling techniques

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Tap Installer Execution
-- Sigma ID:     99793437-3e16-439b-be0f-078782cf953d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        exfiltration | T1048
-- Author:       Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Ian Davis, oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tapinstall_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate OpenVPN TAP installation
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName LIKE '%\\tapinstall.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate OpenVPN TAP installation

**References:**
- https://community.openvpn.net/openvpn/wiki/ManagingWindowsTAPDrivers

---

## Compressed File Creation Via Tar.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `418a3163-3247-4b7b-9933-dcfcb7c52ea9` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | collection, exfiltration |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1560, T1560.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), AdmU3 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tar_compression.yml)**

> Detects execution of "tar.exe" in order to create a compressed file.
Adversaries may abuse various utilities to compress or encrypt data before exfiltration.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Compressed File Creation Via Tar.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     418a3163-3247-4b7b-9933-dcfcb7c52ea9
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, exfiltration | T1560, T1560.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), AdmU3
-- Date:         2023-12-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tar_compression.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Likely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-c%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-r%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-u%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\tar.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'bsdtar')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Likely

**References:**
- https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/chromeloader-malware/
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Tar/
- https://symantec-enterprise-blogs.security.com/blogs/threat-intelligence/cicada-apt10-japan-espionage

---

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tar_extraction.yml)**

> Detects execution of "tar.exe" in order to extract compressed file.
Adversaries may abuse various utilities in order to decompress data to avoid detection.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Compressed File Extraction Via Tar.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     bf361876-6620-407a-812f-bfe11e51e924
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        collection, exfiltration | T1560, T1560.001
-- Author:       AdmU3
-- Date:         2023-12-19
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tar_extraction.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Likely
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-x%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\tar.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'bsdtar')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Taskkill Symantec Endpoint Protection

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4a6713f6-3331-11ed-a261-0242ac120002` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Ilya Krestinichev, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_taskkill_sep.yml)**

> Detects one of the possible scenarios for disabling Symantec Endpoint Protection.
Symantec Endpoint Protection antivirus software services incorrectly implement the protected service mechanism.
As a result, the NT AUTHORITY/SYSTEM user can execute the taskkill /im command several times ccSvcHst.exe /f, thereby killing the process belonging to the service, and thus shutting down the service.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Taskkill Symantec Endpoint Protection
-- Sigma ID:     4a6713f6-3331-11ed-a261-0242ac120002
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Ilya Krestinichev, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-09-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_taskkill_sep.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%taskkill%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /F %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% /IM %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ccSvcHst.exe%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.exploit-db.com/exploits/37525
- https://community.spiceworks.com/topic/2195015-batch-script-to-uninstall-symantec-endpoint-protection
- https://community.broadcom.com/symantecenterprise/communities/community-home/digestviewer/viewthread?MessageKey=6ce94b67-74e1-4333-b16f-000b7fd874f0&CommunityKey=1ecf5f55-9545-44d6-b0f4-4e4a7f5f5e68&tab=digestviewer

---

## Loaded Module Enumeration Via Tasklist.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `34275eb8-fa19-436b-b959-3d9ecd53fa1f` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1003 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tasklist_module_enumeration.yml)**

> Detects the enumeration of a specific DLL or EXE being used by a binary via "tasklist.exe".
This is often used by attackers in order to find the specific process identifier (PID) that is using the DLL in question.
In order to dump the process memory or perform other nefarious actions.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Loaded Module Enumeration Via Tasklist.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     34275eb8-fa19-436b-b959-3d9ecd53fa1f
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1003
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2024-02-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tasklist_module_enumeration.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg LIKE '%-m%'
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\tasklist.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'tasklist.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rdpcorets.dll%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.n00py.io/2021/05/dumping-plaintext-rdp-credentials-from-svchost-exe/
- https://pentestlab.blog/tag/svchost/

---

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_taskmgr_susp_child_process.yml)**

> Detects the creation of a process via the Windows task manager. This might be an attempt to bypass UAC

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        New Process Created Via Taskmgr.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     3d7679bd-0c00-440c-97b0-3f204273e6c7
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\taskmgr.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

## Potentially Suspicious Command Targeting Teams Sensitive Files

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d2eb17db-1d39-41dc-b57f-301f6512fa75` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1528 |
| **Author** | @SerkinValery |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_teams_suspicious_command_line_cred_access.yml)**

> Detects a commandline containing references to the Microsoft Teams database or cookies files from a process other than Teams.
The database might contain authentication tokens and other sensitive information about the logged in accounts.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potentially Suspicious Command Targeting Teams Sensitive Files
-- Sigma ID:     d2eb17db-1d39-41dc-b57f-301f6512fa75
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1528
-- Author:       @SerkinValery
-- Date:         2022-09-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_teams_suspicious_command_line_cred_access.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft\\Teams\\Cookies%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Microsoft\\Teams\\Local Storage\\leveldb%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/microsoft-teams-stores-auth-tokens-as-cleartext-in-windows-linux-macs/
- https://www.vectra.ai/blogpost/undermining-microsoft-teams-security-by-mining-tokens

## New Virtual Smart Card Created Via TpmVscMgr.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|

| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tpmvscmgr_add_virtual_smartcard.yml)**

> Detects execution of "Tpmvscmgr.exe" to create a new virtual smart card.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        New Virtual Smart Card Created Via TpmVscMgr.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     c633622e-cab9-4eaa-bb13-66a1d68b3e47
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
```

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious RDP Redirect Using TSCON
```

## Potential RDP Session Hijacking Activity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `224f140f-3553-4cd1-af78-13d81bf9f7cc` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | @juju4 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tscon_rdp_session_hijacking.yml)**

> Detects potential RDP Session Hijacking activity on Windows systems

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential RDP Session Hijacking Activity
-- Sigma ID:     224f140f-3553-4cd1-af78-13d81bf9f7cc
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       @juju4
-- Date:         2022-12-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_tscon_rdp_session_hijacking.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\tscon.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'tscon.exe'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('System', 'S-1-16-16384')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Administrative activity

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/Moti_B/status/909449115477659651

## UAC Bypass Using ChangePK and SLUI

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `503d581c-7df0-4bbe-b9be-5840c0ecc1fc` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_changepk_slui.yml)**

> Detects an UAC bypass that uses changepk.exe and slui.exe (UACMe 61)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass Using ChangePK and SLUI
-- Sigma ID:     503d581c-7df0-4bbe-b9be-5840c0ecc1fc
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_changepk_slui.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\changepk.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\slui.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System', 'S-1-16-16384', 'S-1-16-12288')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

## UAC Bypass Using Disk Cleanup

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b697e69c-746f-4a86-9f59-7bfff8eab881` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_cleanmgr.yml)**

> Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using scheduled tasks and variable expansion of cleanmgr.exe (UACMe 34)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass Using Disk Cleanup
-- Sigma ID:     b697e69c-746f-4a86-9f59-7bfff8eab881
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_cleanmgr.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%"\\system32\\cleanmgr.exe /autoclean /d C:')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] = 'C:\Windows\system32\svchost.exe -k netsvcs -p -s Schedule')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System', 'S-1-16-16384', 'S-1-16-12288')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME

## Bypass UAC via CMSTP

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e66779cc-383e-4224-a3a4-267eeb585c40` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002, T1218.003 |
| **Author** | E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_cmstp.yml)**

> Detect commandline usage of Microsoft Connection Manager Profile Installer (cmstp.exe) to install specially formatted local .INF files

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Bypass UAC via CMSTP
-- Sigma ID:     e66779cc-383e-4224-a3a4-267eeb585c40
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002, T1218.003
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Endgame), oscd.community
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_cmstp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of cmstp.exe utility by legitimate user
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/s%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-s%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/au%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-au%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/ni%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%-ni%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\cmstp.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CMSTP.EXE')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of cmstp.exe utility by legitimate user

**References:**
- https://eqllib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/analytics/e584f1a1-c303-4885-8a66-21360c90995b.html
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1218.003/T1218.003.md
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Cmstp/

---

## CMSTP UAC Bypass via COM Object Access

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4b60e6f2-bf39-47b4-b4ea-398e33cfe253` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002, T1218.003 |
| **Author** | Nik Seetharaman, Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_cmstp_com_object_access.yml)**

> Detects UAC Bypass Attempt Using Microsoft Connection Manager Profile Installer Autoelevate-capable COM Objects (e.g. UACMe ID of 41, 43, 58 or 65)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        CMSTP UAC Bypass via COM Object Access
-- Sigma ID:     4b60e6f2-bf39-47b4-b4ea-398e33cfe253
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        execution | T1548.002, T1218.003
-- Author:       Nik Seetharaman, Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-07-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_cmstp_com_object_access.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate CMSTP use (unlikely in modern enterprise environments)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\DllHost.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% /Processid:{3E5FC7F9-9A51-4367-9063-A120244FBEC7}%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% /Processid:{3E000D72-A845-4CD9-BD83-80C07C3B881F}%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% /Processid:{BD54C901-076B-434E-B6C7-17C531F4AB41}%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% /Processid:{D2E7041B-2927-42FB-8E9F-7CE93B6DC937}%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% /Processid:{E9495B87-D950-4AB5-87A5-FF6D70BF3E90}%'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System', 'S-1-16-16384', 'S-1-16-12288')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate CMSTP use (unlikely in modern enterprise environments)

**References:**
- https://web.archive.org/web/20190720093911/http://www.endurant.io/cmstp/detecting-cmstp-enabled-code-execution-and-uac-bypass-with-sysmon/
- https://twitter.com/hFireF0X/status/897640081053364225
- https://medium.com/falconforce/falconfriday-detecting-uac-bypasses-0xff16-86c2a9107abf
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME

## UAC Bypass Tools Using ComputerDefaults

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3c05e90d-7eba-4324-9972-5d7f711a60a8` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_computerdefaults.yml)**

> Detects tools such as UACMe used to bypass UAC with computerdefaults.exe (UACMe 59)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass Tools Using ComputerDefaults
-- Sigma ID:     3c05e90d-7eba-4324-9972-5d7f711a60a8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-31
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_computerdefaults.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System', 'S-1-16-16384', 'S-1-16-12288'))
    AND procName = 'C:\Windows\System32\ComputerDefaults.exe')
  AND NOT ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\System32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%:\\Program Files%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

## Bypass UAC via Fodhelper.exe

> Identifies use of Fodhelper.exe to bypass User Account Control. Adversaries use this technique to execute privileged processes.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Bypass UAC via Fodhelper.exe
```

- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1548.002/T1548.002.md

## UAC Bypass via Windows Firewall Snap-In Hijack

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e52cb31c-10ed-4aea-bcb7-593c9f4a315b` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548 |
| **Author** | Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_hijacking_firwall_snap_in.yml)**

> Detects attempts to bypass User Account Control (UAC) by hijacking the Microsoft Management Console (MMC) Windows Firewall snap-in

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass via Windows Firewall Snap-In Hijack
-- Sigma ID:     e52cb31c-10ed-4aea-bcb7-593c9f4a315b
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548
-- Author:       Tim Rauch, Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-27
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_hijacking_firwall_snap_in.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\mmc.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%WF.msc%'))
  AND NOT (procName LIKE '%\\WerFault.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/uac-bypass-via-windows-firewall-snap-in-hijack.html#uac-bypass-via-windows-firewall-snap-in-hijack

---

## UAC Bypass via ICMLuaUtil

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `49f2f17b-b4c8-4172-a68b-d5bf95d05130` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Elastic (idea) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_icmluautil.yml)**

> Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using ICMLuaUtil Elevated COM interface

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass via ICMLuaUtil
-- Sigma ID:     49f2f17b-b4c8-4172-a68b-d5bf95d05130
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Elastic (idea)
-- Date:         2022-09-13
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_icmluautil.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\dllhost.exe')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%/Processid:{3E5FC7F9-9A51-4367-9063-A120244FBEC7}%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%/Processid:{D2E7041B-2927-42FB-8E9F-7CE93B6DC937}%')))
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\WerFault.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'WerFault.exe'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/security/current/uac-bypass-via-icmluautil-elevated-com-interface.html

| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |

| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_idiagnostic_profile.yml)**

> Detects the "IDiagnosticProfileUAC" UAC bypass technique

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass Using IDiagnostic Profile
-- Sigma ID:     4cbef972-f347-4170-b62a-8253f6168e6d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1548.002
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_idiagnostic_profile.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\DllHost.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '% /Processid:{12C21EA7-2EB8-4B55-9249-AC243DA8C666}%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System', 'S-1-16-16384', 'S-1-16-12288')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

> Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using IEInstal.exe (UACMe 64)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass Using IEInstal - Process
-- Sigma ID:     80fc36aa-945e-4181-89f2-2f907ab6775d
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002

-- Unmapped:     (none)

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
```

## UAC Bypass Using MSConfig Token Modification - Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ad92e3f9-7eb6-460e-96b1-582b0ccbb980` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_msconfig_gui.yml)**

> Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using a msconfig GUI hack (UACMe 55)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass Using MSConfig Token Modification - Process
-- Sigma ID:     ad92e3f9-7eb6-460e-96b1-582b0ccbb980
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_msconfig_gui.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System', 'S-1-16-16384', 'S-1-16-12288'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pkgmgr.exe')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] = '"C:\Windows\system32\msconfig.exe" -5'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME

## UAC Bypass Using NTFS Reparse Point - Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `39ed3c80-e6a1-431b-9df3-911ac53d08a7` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_ntfs_reparse_point.yml)**

> Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using NTFS reparse point and wusa.exe DLL hijacking (UACMe 36)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass Using NTFS Reparse Point - Process
-- Sigma ID:     39ed3c80-e6a1-431b-9df3-911ac53d08a7
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-08-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_ntfs_reparse_point.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '"C:\\Windows\\system32\\wusa.exe"  /quiet C:\\Users\\%')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\update.msu')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System', 'S-1-16-16384', 'S-1-16-12288')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] = '"C:\Windows\system32\dism.exe" /online /quiet /norestart /add-package /packagepath:"C:\Windows\system32\pe386" /ignorecheck')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System'))
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%C:\\Users\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\dismhost.exe {%')
    AND procName LIKE '%\\DismHost.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME

---

## Potential UAC Bypass Via Sdclt.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `40f9af16-589d-4984-b78d-8c2aec023197` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_sdclt.yml)**

> A General detection for sdclt being spawned as an elevated process. This could be an indicator of sdclt being used for bypass UAC techniques.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential UAC Bypass Via Sdclt.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     40f9af16-589d-4984-b78d-8c2aec023197
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research)
-- Date:         2020-05-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_sdclt.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%sdclt.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'S-1-16-12288')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/OTRF/detection-hackathon-apt29/issues/6

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4ac47ed3-44c2-4b1f-9d51-bf46e8914126` |
| **Level** | critical |
| **FSM Severity** | 9 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_trustedpath.yml)**

> Detects indicators of a UAC bypass method by mocking directories

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        TrustedPath UAC Bypass Pattern
-- Sigma ID:     4ac47ed3-44c2-4b1f-9d51-bf46e8914126
-- Level:        critical  |  FSM Severity: 9
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_trustedpath.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%C:\\Windows \\System32\\%' OR procName LIKE '%C:\\Windows \\SysWOW64\\%')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass Abusing Winsat Path Parsing - Process

  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] AS parentCommandLine,
  rawEventMsg

WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System', 'S-1-16-16384', 'S-1-16-12288'))

    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentCommand') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentCommand')] LIKE '%C:\\Windows \\system32\\winsat.exe%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/hfiref0x/UACME

| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_wmp.yml)**

> Detects the pattern of UAC Bypass using Windows Media Player osksupport.dll (UACMe 32)

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UAC Bypass Using Windows Media Player - Process
-- Sigma ID:     0058b9e5-bcd7-40d4-9205-95ca5a16d7b2
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       Christian Burkard (Nextron Systems)

-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_wmp.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] AS integrityLevel,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'integrityLevel') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'integrityLevel')] IN ('High', 'System', 'S-1-16-16384', 'S-1-16-12288'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**

## Bypass UAC via WSReset.exe

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d797268e-28a9-49a7-b9a8-2f5039011c5c` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1548.002 |
| **Author** | E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Tony Lambert), oscd.community, Florian Roth |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_wsreset.yml)**

> Detects use of WSReset.exe to bypass User Account Control (UAC). Adversaries use this technique to execute privileged processes.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Bypass UAC via WSReset.exe
-- Sigma ID:     d797268e-28a9-49a7-b9a8-2f5039011c5c
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1548.002
-- Author:       E.M. Anhaus (originally from Atomic Blue Detections, Tony Lambert), oscd.community, Florian Roth
-- Date:         2019-10-24
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_uac_bypass_wsreset.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown sub processes of Wsreset.exe
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wsreset.exe')
  AND NOT ((procName LIKE '%\\conhost.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'CONHOST.EXE'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown sub processes of Wsreset.exe

**References:**
- https://eqllib.readthedocs.io/en/latest/analytics/532b5ed4-7930-11e9-8f5c-d46d6d62a49e.html
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Wsreset/
- https://www.activecyber.us/activelabs/windows-uac-bypass
- https://twitter.com/ReaQta/status/1222548288731217921

## Use of UltraVNC Remote Access Software

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `145322e4-0fd3-486b-81ca-9addc75736d8` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1219.002 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ultravnc.yml)**

> An adversary may use legitimate desktop support and remote access software,to establish an interactive command and control channel to target systems within networks

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Use of UltraVNC Remote Access Software
-- Sigma ID:     145322e4-0fd3-486b-81ca-9addc75736d8
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1219.002
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2022-10-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_ultravnc.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] AS product,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] AS company,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'VNCViewer')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'product') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'product')] = 'UltraVNC VNCViewer'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'company') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'company')] = 'UltraVNC'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'VNCViewer.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/9e5b12c4912c07562aec7500447b11fa3e17e254/atomics/T1219/T1219.md
