## Local Groups Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `164eda96-11b2-430b-85ff-6a265c15bf32` |
| **Level** | low |
| **FSM Severity** | 3 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1069.001 |
| **Author** | frack113 |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_group.yml)**

> Detects the execution of "wmic" with the "group" flag.
Adversaries may attempt to find local system groups and permission settings.
The knowledge of local system permission groups can help adversaries determine which groups exist and which users belong to a particular group.
Adversaries may use this information to determine which users have elevated permissions, such as the users found within the local administrators group.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Local Groups Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     164eda96-11b2-430b-85ff-6a265c15bf32
-- Level:        low  |  FSM Severity: 3
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1069.001
-- Author:       frack113
-- Date:         2021-12-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_group.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% group%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1069.001/T1069.001.md

## Windows Hotfix Updates Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `dfd2fcb7-8bd5-4daa-b132-5adb61d6ad45` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_hotfix.yml)**

> Detects the execution of wmic with the "qfe" flag in order to obtain information about installed hotfix updates on the system. This is often used by pentester and attacker enumeration scripts

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Hotfix Updates Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     dfd2fcb7-8bd5-4daa-b132-5adb61d6ad45
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_hotfix.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% qfe%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\WMIC.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/carlospolop/PEASS-ng/blob/fa0f2e17fbc1d86f1fd66338a40e665e7182501d/winPEAS/winPEASbat/winPEAS.bat

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

## Potential Product Class Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e568650b-5dcd-4658-8f34-ded0b1e13992` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1082 |
| **Author** | Michael Haag, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), juju4, oscd.community, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_product_class.yml)**

> Detects the execution of WMIC in order to get a list of firewall, antivirus and antispywware products.
Adversaries often enumerate security products installed on a system to identify security controls and potential ways to evade detection or disable protection mechanisms.
This information helps them plan their next attack steps and choose appropriate techniques to bypass security measures.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Product Class Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     e568650b-5dcd-4658-8f34-ded0b1e13992
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, discovery | T1047, T1082
-- Author:       Michael Haag, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), juju4, oscd.community, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_product_class.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate use of wmic.exe for reconnaissance of firewall, antivirus and antispywware products.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AntiVirusProduct%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AntiSpywareProduct%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%FirewallProduct%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate use of wmic.exe for reconnaissance of firewall, antivirus and antispywware products.

**References:**
- https://github.com/albertzsigovits/malware-notes/blob/c820c7fea76cf76a861b28ebc77e06100e20ec29/Ransomware/Maze.md
- https://www.hybrid-analysis.com/sample/4be06ecd234e2110bd615649fe4a6fa95403979acf889d7e45a78985eb50acf9?environmentId=1
- https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/research/25/c/socgholishs-intrusion-techniques-facilitate-distribution-of-rans.html

## Service Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `76f55eaa-d27f-4213-9d45-7b0e4b60bbae` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047 |
| **Author** | frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_service.yml)**

> An adversary might use WMI to check if a certain remote service is running on a remote device.
When the test completes, a service information will be displayed on the screen if it exists.
A common feedback message is that "No instance(s) Available" if the service queried is not running.
A common error message is "Node - (provided IP or default) ERROR Description =The RPC server is unavailable" if the provided remote host is unreachable


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Service Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     76f55eaa-d27f-4213-9d45-7b0e4b60bbae
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_service.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%service%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\WMIC.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1047/T1047.md
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/wmic

## Uncommon System Information Discovery Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `9d5a1274-922a-49d0-87f3-8c653483b909` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1082 |
| **Author** | TropChaud |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_system_info_uncommon.yml)**

> Detects the use of the WMI command-line (WMIC) utility to identify and display various system information,
including OS, CPU, GPU, and disk drive names; memory capacity; display resolution; and baseboard, BIOS,
and GPU driver products/versions.
Some of these commands were used by Aurora Stealer in late 2022/early 2023.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Uncommon System Information Discovery Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     9d5a1274-922a-49d0-87f3-8c653483b909
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        discovery | T1082
-- Author:       TropChaud
-- Date:         2023-01-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_system_info_uncommon.yml
-- Unmapped:     Description
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNMAPPED_FIELD: Description

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LOGICALDISK get Name,Size,FreeSpace%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%os get Caption,OSArchitecture,Version%'))
  AND (rawEventMsg = 'WMI Commandline Utility')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\WMIC.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/a2ccd19c37d0278b4ffa8583add3cf52060a5418/atomics/T1082/T1082.md#atomic-test-25---system-information-discovery-with-wmic
- https://nwgat.ninja/getting-system-information-with-wmic-on-windows/
- https://blog.sekoia.io/aurora-a-rising-stealer-flying-under-the-radar
- https://blog.cyble.com/2023/01/18/aurora-a-stealer-using-shapeshifting-tactics/
- https://app.any.run/tasks/a6aa0057-82ec-451f-8f99-55650ca537da/

## Potential Unquoted Service Path Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `68bcd73b-37ef-49cb-95fc-edc809730be6` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_unquoted_service_search.yml)**

> Detects known WMI recon method to look for unquoted service paths using wmic. Often used by pentester and attacker enumeration scripts

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Unquoted Service Path Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     68bcd73b-37ef-49cb-95fc-edc809730be6
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_unquoted_service_search.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% service get %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%name,displayname,pathname,startmode%')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\WMIC.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://github.com/nccgroup/redsnarf/blob/35949b30106ae543dc6f2bc3f1be10c6d9a8d40e/redsnarf.py
- https://github.com/S3cur3Th1sSh1t/Creds/blob/eac23d67f7f90c7fc8e3130587d86158c22aa398/PowershellScripts/jaws-enum.ps1
- https://www.absolomb.com/2018-01-26-Windows-Privilege-Escalation-Guide/

## System Disk And Volume Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c79da740-5030-45ec-a2e0-479e824a562c` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution, discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1082 |
| **Author** | Stephen Lincoln '@slincoln-aiq' (AttackIQ) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_volume.yml)**

> An adversary might use WMI to discover information about the system, such as the volume name, size,
free space, and other disk information. This can be done using the 'wmic' command-line utility and has been
observed being used by threat actors such as Volt Typhoon.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        System Disk And Volume Reconnaissance Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     c79da740-5030-45ec-a2e0-479e824a562c
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution, discovery | T1047, T1082
-- Author:       Stephen Lincoln '@slincoln-aiq' (AttackIQ)
-- Date:         2024-02-02
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_recon_volume.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% volumename%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% logicaldisk%')))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%path%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%win32\_logicaldisk%'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% volume%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% list %'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\WMIC.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-144a
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-server/administration/windows-commands/wmic

## WMIC Remote Command Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `7773b877-5abb-4a3e-b9c9-fd0369b59b00` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047 |
| **Author** | frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_remote_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of WMIC to query information on a remote system

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        WMIC Remote Command Execution
-- Sigma ID:     7773b877-5abb-4a3e-b9c9-fd0369b59b00
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       frack113, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_remote_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**

## Service Started/Stopped Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `0b7163dc-7eee-4960-af17-c0cd517f92da` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_service_manipulation.yml)**

> Detects usage of wmic to start or stop a service

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Service Started/Stopped Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     0b7163dc-7eee-4960-af17-c0cd517f92da
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-06-20
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_service_manipulation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% service %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% call %')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%stopservice%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%startservice%')))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\WMIC.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://sushant747.gitbooks.io/total-oscp-guide/content/privilege_escalation_windows.html

## Potential Remote SquiblyTwo Technique Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `8d63dadf-b91b-4187-87b6-34a1114577ea` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1220, T1059.005, T1059.007 |
| **Author** | Markus Neis, Florian Roth, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_squiblytwo_bypass.yml)**

> Detects potential execution of the SquiblyTwo technique that leverages Windows Management Instrumentation (WMI)
to execute malicious code remotely. This technique bypasses application whitelisting by using wmic.exe to process
malicious XSL (eXtensible Stylesheet Language) scripts that can contain embedded JScript or VBScript.
The attack typically works by fetching XSL content from a remote source (using HTTP/HTTPS) and executing it
with full trust privileges directly in memory, avoiding disk-based detection mechanisms. This is a common
LOLBin (Living Off The Land Binary) technique used for defense evasion and code execution.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Remote SquiblyTwo Technique Execution
-- Sigma ID:     8d63dadf-b91b-4187-87b6-34a1114577ea
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047, T1220, T1059.005, T1059.007
-- Author:       Markus Neis, Florian Roth, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_squiblytwo_bypass.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================
-- UNSUPPORTED_MODIFIER: contains|windash

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] AS hashes,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((rawEventMsg LIKE '%/format:%'
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%://%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\%')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe'))
  OR ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'hashMD5') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=1B1A3F43BF37B5BFE60751F2EE2F326E%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=37777A96245A3C74EB217308F3546F4C%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=9D87C9D67CE724033C0B40CC4CA1B206%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=B12619881D79C3ACADF45E752A58554A%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'hashMD5')] LIKE '%IMPHASH=16A48C3CABF98A9DC1BF02C07FE1EA00%'))))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://web.archive.org/web/20190209154607/https://subt0x11.blogspot.com/2018/04/wmicexe-whitelisting-bypass-hacking.html
- https://twitter.com/mattifestation/status/986280382042595328
- https://atomicredteam.io/defense-evasion/T1220/
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/Binaries/Wmic/
- https://x.com/byrne_emmy12099/status/1932346420226658668

## Registry Manipulation via WMI Stdregprov

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c453ab7a-1f5c-4716-a3b4-dea8135fb43a` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence, execution, discovery |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1112, T1012 |
| **Author** | Daniel Koifman (KoifSec) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_stdregprov_reg_modification.yml)**

> Detects the usage of wmic.exe to manipulate Windows registry via the WMI StdRegProv class.
This behaviour could be potentially suspicious because it uses an alternative method to modify registry keys instead of legitimate registry tools like reg.exe or regedit.exe.
Attackers specifically choose this technique to evade detection and bypass security monitoring focused on traditional registry modification commands.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Registry Manipulation via WMI Stdregprov
-- Sigma ID:     c453ab7a-1f5c-4716-a3b4-dea8135fb43a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        persistence, execution, discovery | T1047, T1112, T1012
-- Author:       Daniel Koifman (KoifSec)
-- Date:         2025-07-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_stdregprov_reg_modification.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administrative activity
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%call%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%stdregprov%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wmic.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administrative activity

**References:**
- https://www.bitdefender.com/en-us/blog/businessinsights/shrinklocker-decryptor-from-friend-to-foe-and-back-again
- https://trustedsec.com/blog/command-line-underdog-wmic-in-action
- https://trustedsec.com/blog/wmi-for-script-kiddies

## Suspicious WMIC Execution Via Office Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `e1693bc8-7168-4eab-8718-cdcaa68a1738` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1204.002, T1047, T1218.010 |
| **Author** | Vadim Khrykov, Cyb3rEng |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_susp_execution_via_office_process.yml)**

> Office application called wmic to proxye execution through a LOLBIN process. This is often used to break suspicious parent-child chain (Office app spawns LOLBin).

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious WMIC Execution Via Office Process
-- Sigma ID:     e1693bc8-7168-4eab-8718-cdcaa68a1738
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1204.002, T1047, T1218.010
-- Author:       Vadim Khrykov, Cyb3rEng
-- Date:         2021-08-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_susp_execution_via_office_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\WINWORD.EXE' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\EXCEL.EXE' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\POWERPNT.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\MSPUB.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\VISIO.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\MSACCESS.EXE' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\EQNEDT32.EXE' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\ONENOTE.EXE' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wordpad.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wordview.exe'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%process%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%create%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%call%')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%regsvr32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%msiexec%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%verclsid%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cscript%')))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wbem\\WMIC.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/03/29/sodinokibi-aka-revil-ransomware/
- https://github.com/vadim-hunter/Detection-Ideas-Rules/blob/02bcbfc2bfb8b4da601bb30de0344ae453aa1afe/Threat%20Intelligence/The%20DFIR%20Report/20210329_Sodinokibi_(aka_REvil)_Ransomware.yaml

## Suspicious Process Created Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `3c89a1e8-0fba-449e-8f1b-8409d6267ec8` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_susp_process_creation.yml)**

> Detects WMIC executing "process call create" with suspicious calls to processes such as "rundll32", "regsrv32", etc.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Process Created Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     3c89a1e8-0fba-449e-8f1b-8409d6267ec8
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2020-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_susp_process_creation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%process %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%call %' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%create %')
    AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%rundll32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%bitsadmin%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%regsvr32%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /k %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd.exe /r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /c %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /k %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cmd /r %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%powershell%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%pwsh%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%certutil%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%cscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%wscript%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%mshta%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Windows\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%temp\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%tmp\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%ProgramData\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%appdata\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%comspec\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%localappdata\%%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2020/10/08/ryuks-return/
- https://symantec-enterprise-blogs.security.com/blogs/threat-intelligence/ransomware-hive-conti-avoslocker

---

## Application Terminated Via Wmic.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `49d9671b-0a0a-4c09-8280-d215bfd30662` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_terminate_application.yml)**

> Detects calls to the "terminate" function via wmic in order to kill an application

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Application Terminated Via Wmic.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     49d9671b-0a0a-4c09-8280-d215bfd30662
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-09-11
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_terminate_application.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%call%' AND metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%terminate%')
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\WMIC.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wmic.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://cyble.com/blog/lockfile-ransomware-using-proxyshell-attack-to-deploy-ransomware/
- https://www.bitdefender.com/files/News/CaseStudies/study/377/Bitdefender-Whitepaper-WMI-creat4871-en-EN-GenericUse.pdf

---

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

## Potential Tampering With Security Products Via WMIC

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `847d5ff3-8a31-4737-a970-aeae8fe21765` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1562.001 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_uninstall_security_products.yml)**

> Detects uninstallation or termination of security products using the WMIC utility

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Tampering With Security Products Via WMIC
-- Sigma ID:     847d5ff3-8a31-4737-a970-aeae8fe21765
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1562.001
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2021-01-30
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_uninstall_security_products.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate administration
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%carbon\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%cylance\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%endpoint\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%eset\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%malware\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%Sophos\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\%symantec\%%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Antivirus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%AVG %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Carbon Black%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%CarbonBlack%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Cb Defense Sensor 64-bit%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Crowdstrike Sensor%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Cylance %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Dell Threat Defense%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%DLP Endpoint%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Endpoint Detection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Endpoint Protection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Endpoint Security%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Endpoint Sensor%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%ESET File Security%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%LogRhythm System Monitor Service%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Malwarebytes%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%McAfee Agent%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Microsoft Security Client%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Sophos Anti-Virus%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Sophos AutoUpdate%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Sophos Credential Store%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Sophos Management Console%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Sophos Management Database%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Sophos Management Server%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Sophos Remote Management System%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Sophos Update Manager%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Threat Protection%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%VirusScan%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Webroot SecureAnywhere%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Windows Defender%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate administration

**References:**
- https://twitter.com/cglyer/status/1355171195654709249
- https://thedfirreport.com/2021/10/18/icedid-to-xinglocker-ransomware-in-24-hours/
- https://www.mandiant.com/resources/unc2165-shifts-to-evade-sanctions

## XSL Script Execution Via WMIC.EXE

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `05c36dd6-79d6-4a9a-97da-3db20298ab2d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1220, T1059.005, T1059.007 |
| **Author** | Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_xsl_script_processing.yml)**

> Detects the execution of WMIC with the "format" flag to potentially load local XSL files.
Adversaries abuse this functionality to execute arbitrary files while potentially bypassing application whitelisting defenses.
Extensible Stylesheet Language (XSL) files are commonly used to describe the processing and rendering of data within XML files.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        XSL Script Execution Via WMIC.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     05c36dd6-79d6-4a9a-97da-3db20298ab2d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047, T1220, T1059.005, T1059.007
-- Author:       Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel
-- Date:         2019-10-21
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmic_xsl_script_processing.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    WMIC.exe FP depend on scripts and administrative methods used in the monitored environment.; Static format arguments - https://petri.com/command-line-wmi-part-3
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** WMIC.exe FP depend on scripts and administrative methods used in the monitored environment.; Static format arguments - https://petri.com/command-line-wmi-part-3

**References:**
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1220/T1220.md

---

## WmiPrvSE Spawned A Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `d21374ff-f574-44a7-9998-4a8c8bf33d7d` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047 |
| **Author** | Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmiprvse_spawning_process.yml)**

> Detects WmiPrvSE spawning a process

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        WmiPrvSE Spawned A Process
-- Sigma ID:     d21374ff-f574-44a7-9998-4a8c8bf33d7d
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047
-- Author:       Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g
-- Date:         2019-08-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmiprvse_spawning_process.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    False positives are expected (e.g. in environments where WinRM is used legitimately)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\WmiPrvSe.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** False positives are expected (e.g. in environments where WinRM is used legitimately)

**References:**
- https://threathunterplaybook.com/hunts/windows/190815-RemoteServiceInstallation/notebook.html

## Potential WMI Lateral Movement WmiPrvSE Spawned PowerShell

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `692f0bec-83ba-4d04-af7e-e884a96059b6` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1047, T1059.001 |
| **Author** | Markus Neis @Karneades |
| **Status** | stable |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmiprvse_spawns_powershell.yml)**

> Detects Powershell as a child of the WmiPrvSE process. Which could be a sign of lateral movement via WMI.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential WMI Lateral Movement WmiPrvSE Spawned PowerShell
-- Sigma ID:     692f0bec-83ba-4d04-af7e-e884a96059b6
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       stable
-- MITRE:        execution | T1047, T1059.001
-- Author:       Markus Neis @Karneades
-- Date:         2019-04-03
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wmiprvse_spawns_powershell.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    AppvClient; CCM; WinRM
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (((procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe'))
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('PowerShell.EXE', 'pwsh.dll')))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\WmiPrvSE.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** AppvClient; CCM; WinRM

**References:**
- https://any.run/report/68bc255f9b0db6a0d30a8f2dadfbee3256acfe12497bf93943bc1eab0735e45e/a2385d6f-34f7-403c-90d3-b1f9d2a90a5e

```sql
-- ============================================================
```

## UEFI Persistence Via Wpbbin - ProcessCreation

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `4abc0ec4-db5a-412f-9632-26659cddf145` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | persistence |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1542.001 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wpbbin_potential_persistence.yml)**

> Detects execution of the binary "wpbbin" which is used as part of the UEFI based persistence method described in the reference section

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        UEFI Persistence Via Wpbbin - ProcessCreation
-- Sigma ID:     4abc0ec4-db5a-412f-9632-26659cddf145
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        persistence | T1542.001
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-07-18
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wpbbin_potential_persistence.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate usage of the file by hardware manufacturer such as lenovo (Thanks @0gtweet for the tip)
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND procName = 'C:\Windows\System32\wpbbin.exe'
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate usage of the file by hardware manufacturer such as lenovo (Thanks @0gtweet for the tip)

**References:**
- https://grzegorztworek.medium.com/using-uefi-to-inject-executable-files-into-bitlocker-protected-drives-8ff4ca59c94c
- https://persistence-info.github.io/Data/wpbbin.html

---

## Potential Dropper Script Execution Via WScript/CScript

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `cea72823-df4d-4567-950c-0b579eaf0846` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.005, T1059.007 |
| **Author** | Margaritis Dimitrios (idea), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wscript_cscript_dropper.yml)**

> Detects wscript/cscript executions of scripts located in user directories

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Potential Dropper Script Execution Via WScript/CScript
-- Sigma ID:     cea72823-df4d-4567-950c-0b579eaf0846
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.005, T1059.007
-- Author:       Margaritis Dimitrios (idea), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2019-01-16
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wscript_cscript_dropper.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some installers might generate a similar behavior. An initial baseline is required
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe')
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.js%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jse%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vba%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbe%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.vbs%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.wsf%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Tmp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some installers might generate a similar behavior. An initial baseline is required

**References:**
- https://thedfirreport.com/2023/10/30/netsupport-intrusion-results-in-domain-compromise/
- https://redcanary.com/blog/gootloader/

---

## Cscript/Wscript Potentially Suspicious Child Process

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `b6676963-0353-4f88-90f5-36c20d443c6a` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Alejandro Houspanossian ('@lekz86') |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wscript_cscript_susp_child_processes.yml)**

> Detects potentially suspicious child processes of Wscript/Cscript. These include processes such as rundll32 with uncommon exports or PowerShell spawning rundll32 or regsvr32.
Malware such as Pikabot and Qakbot were seen using similar techniques as well as many others.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Cscript/Wscript Potentially Suspicious Child Process
-- Sigma ID:     b6676963-0353-4f88-90f5-36c20d443c6a
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Alejandro Houspanossian ('@lekz86')
-- Date:         2023-05-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wscript_cscript_susp_child_processes.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Some false positives might occur with admin or third party software scripts. Investigate and apply additional filters accordingly.
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\cscript.exe'))
  OR (procName LIKE '%\\cmd.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\powershell.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\pwsh.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Some false positives might occur with admin or third party software scripts. Investigate and apply additional filters accordingly.

**References:**
- Internal Research
- https://github.com/pr0xylife/Pikabot/blob/fc58126127adf0f65e78f4eec59675523f48f086/Pikabot_30.10.2023.txt
- https://github.com/pr0xylife/Pikabot/blob/fc58126127adf0f65e78f4eec59675523f48f086/Pikabot_22.12.2023.txt

---

## Cscript/Wscript Uncommon Script Extension Execution

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `99b7460d-c9f1-40d7-a316-1f36f61d52ee` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059.005, T1059.007 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wscript_cscript_uncommon_extension_exec.yml)**

> Detects Wscript/Cscript executing a file with an uncommon (i.e. non-script) extension

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Cscript/Wscript Uncommon Script Extension Execution
-- Sigma ID:     99b7460d-c9f1-40d7-a316-1f36f61d52ee
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059.005, T1059.007
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-05-15
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wscript_cscript_uncommon_extension_exec.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.csv%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.dat%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.doc%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.gif%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpeg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.jpg%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.png%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.ppt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.txt%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xls%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%.xml%'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] IN ('wscript.exe', 'cscript.exe')))
  OR ((procName LIKE '%\\wscript.exe' OR procName LIKE '%\\cscript.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- Internal Research

## WSL Child Process Anomaly

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `2267fe65-0681-42ad-9a6d-46553d3f3480` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218, T1202 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wsl_child_processes_anomalies.yml)**

> Detects uncommon or suspicious child processes spawning from a WSL process. This could indicate an attempt to evade parent/child relationship detections or persistence attempts via cron using WSL

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        WSL Child Process Anomaly
-- Sigma ID:     2267fe65-0681-42ad-9a6d-46553d3f3480
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218, T1202
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-01-23
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wsl_child_processes_anomalies.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] AS parentImage,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'parentProcName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wsl.exe' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'parentProcName')] LIKE '%\\wslhost.exe'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://lolbas-project.github.io/lolbas/OtherMSBinaries/Wsl/
- https://twitter.com/nas_bench/status/1535431474429808642

## Installation of WSL Kali-Linux

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `eca8ae39-5c3c-4321-b538-9e64fe25822e` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1059 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wsl_kali_linux_installation.yml)**

> Detects installation of Kali Linux distribution through Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL).
Attackers may use Kali Linux WSL to leverage its penetration testing tools and capabilities for malicious purposes.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Installation of WSL Kali-Linux
-- Sigma ID:     eca8ae39-5c3c-4321-b538-9e64fe25822e
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        execution | T1059
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-10-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wsl_kali_linux_installation.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate installation or usage of Kali Linux WSL by administrators or security teams
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((procName LIKE '%\\wsl.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'wsl'))
  AND (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% --install %' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '% -i %'))
  AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%kali%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate installation or usage of Kali Linux WSL by administrators or security teams

**References:**
- https://medium.com/@redfanatic7/running-kali-linux-on-windows-51ad95166e6e
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/wsl/install

---

## WSL Kali-Linux Usage

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `6f1a11aa-4b8a-4b7f-9e13-4d3e4ff0e0d4` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1202 |
| **Author** | Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | experimental |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wsl_kali_linux_usage.yml)**

> Detects the use of Kali Linux through Windows Subsystem for Linux

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        WSL Kali-Linux Usage
-- Sigma ID:     6f1a11aa-4b8a-4b7f-9e13-4d3e4ff0e0d4
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       experimental
-- MITRE:        T1202
-- Author:       Swachchhanda Shrawan Poudel (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2025-10-10
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wsl_kali_linux_usage.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Legitimate installation or usage of Kali Linux WSL by administrators or security teams
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\%' AND procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\packages\\KaliLinux%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%:\\Users\\%' AND procName LIKE '%\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\kali.exe%')
  OR (procName LIKE '%:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\KaliLinux.%'
    AND procName LIKE '%\\kali.exe')
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Legitimate installation or usage of Kali Linux WSL by administrators or security teams

**References:**
- https://medium.com/@redfanatic7/running-kali-linux-on-windows-51ad95166e6e
- https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/wsl/install

## Windows Binary Executed From WSL

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `ed825c86-c009-4014-b413-b76003e33d35` |
| **Level** | medium |
| **FSM Severity** | 5 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1202 |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wsl_windows_binaries_execution.yml)**

> Detects the execution of Windows binaries from within a WSL instance.
This could be used to masquerade parent-child relationships


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Windows Binary Executed From WSL
-- Sigma ID:     ed825c86-c009-4014-b413-b76003e33d35
-- Level:        medium  |  FSM Severity: 5
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1202
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2023-02-14
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wsl_windows_binaries_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'currentDirectory')] AS currentDirectory,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND (match(procName, '[a-zA-Z]:\\')
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'currentDirectory') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'currentDirectory')] LIKE '%\\\\\\\\wsl.localhost%'))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- Internal Research

---

| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1218 |
| **Author** | Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Sreeman, FPT.EagleEye Team |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wuauclt_dll_loading.yml)**

> Detects the use of the Windows Update Client binary (wuauclt.exe) for proxy execution.

```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Proxy Execution Via Wuauclt.EXE
-- Sigma ID:     af77cf95-c469-471c-b6a0-946c685c4798
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution | T1218
-- Author:       Roberto Rodriguez (Cyb3rWard0g), OTR (Open Threat Research), Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Sreeman, FPT.EagleEye Team
-- Date:         2020-10-12
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wuauclt_dll_loading.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND 1=1
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://dtm.uk/wuauclt/

## Suspicious Windows Update Agent Empty Cmdline

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `52d097e2-063e-4c9c-8fbb-855c8948d135` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Techniques** | T1036 |
| **Author** | Florian Roth (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wuauclt_no_cli_flags_execution.yml)**

> Detects suspicious Windows Update Agent activity in which a wuauclt.exe process command line doesn't contain any command line flags


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Suspicious Windows Update Agent Empty Cmdline
-- Sigma ID:     52d097e2-063e-4c9c-8fbb-855c8948d135
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        T1036
-- Author:       Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-02-26
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wuauclt_no_cli_flags_execution.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] AS originalFileName,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Wuauclt' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%Wuauclt.exe'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\Wuauclt.exe')
  OR (indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'originalFileName') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'originalFileName')] = 'Wuauclt.exe')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://redcanary.com/blog/blackbyte-ransomware/

## Cab File Extraction Via Wusa.EXE From Potentially Suspicious Paths

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Sigma ID** | `c74c0390-3e20-41fd-a69a-128f0275a5ea` |
| **Level** | high |
| **FSM Severity** | 7 |
| **MITRE Tactics** | execution |
| **Author** | Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems) |
| **Status** | test |

**[View on GitHub ↗](https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wusa_cab_files_extraction_from_susp_paths.yml)**

> Detects the execution of the "wusa.exe" (Windows Update Standalone Installer) utility to extract ".cab" files using the "/extract" argument from potentially suspicious paths.


```sql
-- ============================================================
-- Title:        Cab File Extraction Via Wusa.EXE From Potentially Suspicious Paths
-- Sigma ID:     c74c0390-3e20-41fd-a69a-128f0275a5ea
-- Level:        high  |  FSM Severity: 7
-- Status:       test
-- MITRE:        execution
-- Author:       Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
-- Date:         2022-08-05
-- GitHub:       https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/main/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_wusa_cab_files_extraction_from_susp_paths.yml
-- Unmapped:     (none)
-- False Pos:    Unknown
-- ============================================================

SELECT
  phRecvTime,
  reptDevName,
  reptDevIpAddrV4,
  user,
  procName,
  metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] AS commandLine,
  rawEventMsg
FROM fsiem.events
WHERE eventType IN ('Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process', 'Win-Security-4688')
  AND phRecvTime >= now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
  AND ((indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\PerfLogs\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Users\\Public\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%:\\Windows\\Temp\\%' OR metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%\\Appdata\\Local\\Temp\\%'))
  AND (procName LIKE '%\\wusa.exe'
    AND indexOf(metrics_string.name, 'command') > 0
    AND (metrics_string.value[indexOf(metrics_string.name,'command')] LIKE '%/extract:%')))
ORDER BY phRecvTime DESC
LIMIT 1000;
```

**False Positives:** Unknown

**References:**
- https://web.archive.org/web/20180331144337/https://www.fireeye.com/blog/threat-research/2018/03/sanny-malware-delivery-method-updated-in-recently-observed-attacks.html
- https://www.echotrail.io/insights/search/wusa.exe/
